In Totintune. est soca de Spilesbi. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. boues. Ibi. I. sochemannus. et VI. acrae prati.
In TOYNTON there is a jurisdiction of Spilsby; 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 Freeman. Meadow, 6 acres.
$ In Scitebroc est inland de Couenham. VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. boues. Ibi Sanctus Karilefus habet. VI. homines cum. II. carucis. et IX. acras prati.
In `SKIDBROOKE' there is of Covenham; 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 9 oxen. Saint-Calais has 6 men with 2 ploughs and meadow, 9 acres.
In Germundtorp. est soca de Couenham. IIII. bouatae terre et dimidia /ad geldum. Ibi. VI. uillani habent. I. carucam et II. boues.
`LOUTHESK' Wapentake In GRAINTHORPE there is a jurisdiction of Covenham; 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. 6 villagers have 1 plough and 2 oxen. Meadow, 50 acres. Saint-Calais has it

. II. Maneria In CADITON. habuerunt Harold et Artor. IX. bouatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi Turstinus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et XV. sochemannos et XII. uillanos cum. IIII. carucas. et III. molendina et dimidium. XX. solidorum. et XII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. LX. solidos.

SOUTH RIDING In KEDDINGTON Harold and Andor had 9 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 15 Freemen and 12 villagers with 4 ploughs. 3 1/2 mills, 20s; meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60s.
$ In Salflatebi. est soca huius Manerii. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra II. boues. Ibi. III. sochemanni et I. uillanus. cum. IIII. bobus.
In SALTFLEETBY there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 3 Freemen and 1 villager with 4 oxen. and Andor had it. , the Bishop's man, has it
In Crochinton. est alia soca. dimidia bouata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. bouem. Ibi. I. uillanus arans. I. boue.
In COCKERINGTON there is another jurisdiction; 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. 1 villager who ploughs with 1 ox. and Andor had it. , the Bishop's man, has it

Manerium In GUNFORDEBI. habuit Morcar. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Lanbertus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et II. molendina. XVI. solidorum. et XXII. acras prati et dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter.

`WINNIBRIGGS' Wapentake In GONERBY Morcar had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Lambert <of Gonerby>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. 2 mills, 16s; meadow, 22 1/2 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.

In NEUTONE. habuit Uluricus Wilde. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Episcopus dunelmensis habet medietatem. et Uluiet et uxor eius aliam. de rege habent. Tota haec terra fuit matris uxoris eius. Ibi habet episcopus dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et VI. acras prati. et XXXV. acras silue minute. Uluiet habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et VI. acras prati. et XXX. V. acras siluae minutae. Totum. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo pars episcopi. XXV. solidos. et pars Uluiet XXV. solidos. Episcopus clamat.

AVELAND Wapentake In NEWTON Wulfric Wilde had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. The Bishop of Durham has half and Wulfgeat and his wife have the other from the King. The whole of this land was his wife's mother's. The Bishop has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 35 acres. Wulfgeat has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 35 acres. Value of the whole before 1066, 40s; now of the Bishop's part, 25s; of Wulfgeat's part, 25s; the Bishop claims it.

. II. Maneria In PICHEURDE habuerunt Suuen et Agemundus. I. carucatam et V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas et II. boues. Nunc Goislan homo episcopi habet ibi. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et III. bordarios. arantes. V. bobus. Ibi dimidia aecclesia et XVI. acrae prati. et XXX III. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter.

HACEBY hundred In PICKWORTH Swein and Aghmund had 1 carucate and 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. Now Jocelyn , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough there. 5 villagers and 3 smallholders who plough with 5 oxen. 1/2 church; meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 33 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.
In Brezbi hundret. est soca huius Manerii. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi. I. sochemannus. habet dimidiam carucam. et XXX. acrae prati. et XXI. acrae siluae pastilis per loca.

`THREO' Wapentake In BRACEBY - a hundred - there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 Freeman has 1/2 plough. Meadow, 30 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 21 acres. had it. Jocelyn , the Bishop's man, has it

. III. Maneria In CHELEBI. habuerunt Aslac Brictric et Archil VI. carucatas terre et III. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. Nunc Almodus homo episcopi habet ibi. II. carucas. et VII. uillanos. et III. sochemannos. et III. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. LXX. solidos. modo. VI. libras. Ibi LXX. acrae prati. et quater XX. et X acrae siluae minutae. quas. Remigius. episcopus et Colegrim et eorum socii tenent. episcopus habet socam.

`ASWARDHURN' Wapentake LAYTHORPE hundred In KELBY Aslak , Brictric and Arnketil had 6 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Now Almod, the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs there. 7 villagers, 3 Freemen and 3 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 70s; now £6. Meadow, 70 acres; underwood, 90 acres, which Bishop R, Kolgrim and their companions hold. The Bishop has the jurisdiction.

Manerium In EUEDUNE. habuit Turuert. II. carucatas et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad III. carucas. Ibi Colsuan homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et II. bobus. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras.

`FLAXWELL' Wapentake ASHBY hundred In EVEDON Thorfridh had 2 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Kolsveinn , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough and 2 oxen. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 20s.

In Rosbi hundret et altero Rosbi hundret. est soca in Wilgebi uel Chirchebi. III. carucatae terre et I. bouata ad geldum. Terra ad IIII. carucas. Ibi Almodus homo episcopi habet. XV. sochemannos et VI. bordarios. habentes V. carucas. et dimidiam aecclesiam. Hae appreciantur in Manerio supradicto.

In RAUCEBY - a hundred - and the other RAUCEBY - a hundred - there is a jurisdiction of Willoughby or Kirkby; 3 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Almod, the Bishop's man, has 15 Freemen and 6 smallholders who have 5 ploughs. 1/2 church. These are valued in the above manor.
In Euedune. est soca de Cherchebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. I. uillanus. et II. bordarii. et II. acrae prati.
In EVEDON there is a jurisdiction of Kirkby; 1 bovate of land taxable. 1 villager and 2 smallholders. Meadow, 2 acres.

Manerium In ALESBI. habuit Aben. VI. bouatas terrae et terciam partem. unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Nigel homo episcopi habet dimidiam carucam. et III. sochemannos. et I. uillanum et I. bordarium. cum dimidia caruca. et sedem unius molendini. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

NORTH RIDING BRADLEY Wapentake AYLESBY hundred In AYLESBY Habeinn had 6 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 plough. Nigel, the Bishop's man, has 1/2 plough. 3 Freemen, 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 1/2 plough. 1 mill site. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.
Manerium In RAUENEDAL. habuit Grinchel. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Walbertus homo episcopi. arat eam. III. bobus. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. V. solidos.

`HAVERSTOE' Wapentake `FENBY' hundred In RAVENDALE Grimkel had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Walbert <of Fulstow>, the Bishop's man, ploughs it with 3 oxen. Value before 1066, 20s; now 5s.

. III. Maneria In BISCOPETORP. habuerunt Godric et II. fratres eius III carucatas terrae ad geldum. Duo seruiebant tercio. Nunc. II. homines episcopi. Terra. VI. carucarum. habent ibi. II. carucas. et III. uillanos et VII. bordarios. et IX. sochemannos. cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et II. molendina. V. solidorum. et XXIIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo similiter.

SOUTH RIDING `WRAGGOE' Wapentake In BISCATHORPE Godric and his two brothers had 3 carucates of land taxable. Two served the third. Land for 6 ploughs. Now two of the Bishop's men have 2 ploughs there. 3 villagers, 7 smallholders and 9 Freemen with 2 1/2 ploughs. 2 mills, 5s; meadow, 24 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same.

Manerium In TORP habuerunt Goduine et Gunnewate. V. bouatas terre et terciam partem unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues Ibi habet episcopus. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et IIII. tam partem unius molendini. XII. denariorum. et I. piscariam et dimidiam. III. solidorum. et terciam partem aecclesiae. et VIII. acras prati. et XLVI. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo XXX. III. solidos. et IIII. denarios.

In THORPE Godwin and Gunnhvati had 5 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 oxen. The Bishop has 1 plough and 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough; and the fourth part of 1 mill, 12d; 1 1/2 fisheries, 3s; the third part of a church; meadow, 8 acres; pasturable woodland, 46 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 33s 4d.

Manerium In SCRENBI. habuit Fenchel. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Nunc isdem habet de episcopo. Ibi. I. caruca. et IIII. uillani. V. bobus arantes. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

`CANDLESHOE' Wapentake In SCREMBY Fenkell had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Now he also has it from the Bishop. 1 plough. 4 villagers who plough with 5 oxen. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.
In Aschebi. est soca huius Manerii. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi |sunt. II. uillani. et V. acrae prati.
In ASHBY there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 2 villagers. Meadow, 5 acres.
In Screnbi. est soca de Estrecale. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum.
In SCREMBY there is a jurisdiction of East Keal; 2 bovates of land taxable.

In Heretorp. est inland de EstreCale et Heresbi et Greibi. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi. VI. uillani et I. sochemannus. habent. I. carucam. et I. bouem arantes. et CXX. acras prati.
In ADDLETHORPE there is of East Keal, Orby and Grebby; 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. 6 villagers and 1 Freeman have 1 plough and 1 ox ploughing and meadow, 120 acres.

Berewita In WENFLET. habuerunt. III. fratres. VII. bouatas terre |et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Haec est inland in supradicto Manerio. Nunc Bundo et Radulfus habent ibi. X. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et II. bobus. et II. salinas. VIII. denariorum. et quater XX. acras prati. et III. acras.

In WAINFLEET 3 brothers had 7 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. It is of the above manor. Now Bondi and Ralph have there 10 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough and 2 oxen; and 2 salt-houses, 8d; meadow, 83 acres.
$ In Salflatebi. I. bouata ad geldum.
In SALTFLEETBY 1 bovate taxable. and Andor had it. , the Bishop's man, has it

. II. Maneria In CATEBI. habuerunt Summerde et Osgot. IIII. bouatas terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et II. boues. Ibi Turstinus homo episcopi habet ibi. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. II. bobus arantes. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XVIII. solidos.

`LOUTHESK' Wapentake In ` CADEBY' Sumarlithi and Asgot had 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough and 2 oxen. , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough there. 3 villagers and 1 smallholder who plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 18s.
In Welletone. est soca huius. Manerii. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam. et terciam partem sedis. I. molendini. et X. /acras prati.

In WELTON there is a jurisdiction of this manor, 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough and the third part of 1 mill site; meadow, 10 acres. Cadeby'. Sumarlithi and Asgot had it. , the Bishop's man, has it

Manerium In HAGE et Calesbi. habuit Aldene. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. boues. Nunc Willelmus homo episcopi habet ibi. dimidiam carucam. et I. bordarium. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo X. solidos.

`CALCEWATH' Wapentake In HAUGH and CALCEBY Healfdene had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. Now William, the Bishop's man, has 1/2 plough there. 1 smallholder. Value before 1066, 10s; now 10s.

Manerium In BRUNETORP. habuit Tori. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Nigellus homo epuscopi habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et IX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. LX. solidos.

In BONTHORPE Thori had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Nigel, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 60s.
Berewita In Slodebi inland. dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. VII. boum. Ibi VI. uillani. et II. bordarii. /cum dimidia caruca. et XX. acrae prati.
In SLOOTHBY, , 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. 6 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 20 acres.

. II. Maneria In FULLOBI. habuerunt Siuuard et Edric. III. carucatas terre et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi Willelmus homo episcopi habet. II. carucas. et V. uillanos. et XIX. sochemannos. habentes. II. carucas. et II. boues. Ibi. L. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo C. solidos

In FULLETBY Siward and Edric had 3 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. William, the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs. 5 villagers and 19 Freemen who have 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. Meadow, 50 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 100s.
In Oxetune et Wluricebi. est soca huius Manerii. I. carucata terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. XI. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et LX. acras prati.

In OXCOMBE and WORLABY there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 11 Freemen have 2 ploughs and meadow, 60 acres. and Edric had it. William, the Bishop's man, has it

Berewita In TRichingheham. est inland de Neutone. V. bouatae terrae et VI. ta pars. II. arum bouatarum ad geldum. Ibi. I. sochemannus et III. uillani habentes dimidiam carucam. Ibi habet episcopus dunelmensis. XII. mam partem unius aecclesiae Sacti Petri. et VI. partem unius aecclesiae Sanctae Mariae. et VI. partem de. IIII. bouatarum terrae que iacent in aecclesia SANCTAE MARIAE.

In THREEKINGHAM there is of Newton; 5 bovates of land and the sixth part of 2 bovates taxable. 1 Freeman and 3 villagers who have 1/2 plough. The Bishop of Durham has the twelfth part of one church of St Peter , the sixth part of one church of St Mary and the sixth part of 4 bovates of land which lie in the church of St Mary.

In eodem hundret et in hac eadem uilla habet quidam Uluiet de elemosina regis. tantundem terrae et aecclesiaruum partes. et carucarum et hominum. quantum supradictum est habere episcopum. partiuntur enim Neutone et quae ibi pertinent per medium.

Also in this hundred and in this village a certain Wulfgeat has in alms from the King as much land and parts of churches, ploughs and men as it is said above that the Bishop has. For they divide Newton and what belongs to it, in half. Land of the Bishop of Bayeux

. IIII. Manerium In CARLENTONE. habuit Aldreman. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi episcopus baiocensis. IIII. sochemannos habet cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et I. aecclesiam. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. et VIII. denarios. modo similiter. Tailla. XIII. solidos. et IIII. denarios. Hanc terra habent Radulfus dapifer et Gislebertus de gand per sigillum episcopi baiocensis. Ernuinus presbyter dicit eam regis. esse.

In CARLTON Ealdormann had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. The Bishop of Bayeux has 4 Freemen with 1 1/2 ploughs and 1 church. Value before 1066, 10s 8d; now the same. Exactions 13s 4d. Ralph the steward and Gilbert of Ghent have this land by the Bishop of Bayeux's seal. Ernwin the priest says that it ought to be the King's.

. II. Maneria In ENGLEBI habuerunt Chetel et Ulchil. III. carucatas terre et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Colsuan et Wadardus homines episcopi Baiocensis habent. II. carucas. et XII. uillanos. et II. sochemannos. et IIII. bordarios. habentes. I. carucam et dimidiam. et quater XX. acras prati. et X. et CX acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. L. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In INGLEBY Ketil and Ulfkil had 3 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Kolsveinn and Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop of Bayeux's men, have 2 ploughs. 12 villagers, 2 Freemen and 4 smallholders who have 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 90 acres; underwood, 110 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 50s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In STRATONE Ulchil Asfort Restelf et Ulmer habuerunt. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. IIII. carucas. et XVI. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et XXX. acras prati. et quater XX. acras silue minute. T. R. E. ualuit VII. libras. modo. IIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In STURTON Ulfkil, Asfrith, Restelf and Wulfmer had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 4 ploughs. 16 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 30 acres; underwood, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £7; now £4. Exactions 40s.

Manerium In WELINGEHAM. habuit Archil. I. carucatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad XII. boues. Nunc Ilbertus homo episcopi habet ibi. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. et III. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.
In WILLINGHAM Arnketil had 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Now Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough there. 2 villagers and 3 Freemen with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

Manerium In INGEHAM. habuit Gamel. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. boues. Nunc Ilbertus habet ibi. II. carucas. et II. uillanos et III. bordariis. et III. sochemanni habentes. I. carucam. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In INGHAM Gamal had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Now Ilbert has 2 ploughs there. 2 villagers, 3 smallholders and 3 Freemen who have 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 5s; now 20s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In GLENTEWRDE. habuit Estan. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Ibidem. IIII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Soca in Glandham. Terra ad. X. carucas. Nunc Wadardus homo episcopi habet dimidiam carucam. et VI. sochemannos et I. uillanum dimidia caruca. et XXX. acras prati. et XX. T. R. E. $ualuit XV. solidos. et IIII. denarios. modo. XL. solidos. et VIII. denarios.

In GLENTWORTH <of Farningham> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Also there 4 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Glentham. Land for 10 ploughs. Now Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's man, has 1/2 plough. 6 Freemen and 1 villager 1/2 plough. Meadow, 30 acres; 20 . Value before 1066, 15s 4d; now 40s 8d.

Manerium In HELMESWELLE. habuit Elnod. IIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Nunc Losoardus homo episcopi habet ibi. I. uillanum et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et XXVII. acras prati. et dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos

In HEMSWELL Alnoth had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Now Losoard <of Rolleston>, the Bishop's man, has there 1 villager and 2 smallholders with 1 plough; and meadow, 27 1/2 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.

. II. Maneria In GLANDHAM. habuerunt Adestan et Ulmaer. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Ibi |habet Wadardus. II. uillanos etet etI. sochemannum cum. I. caruca. Ipse. I. carucam. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. solidos et IIII. denarios. modo. LX. solidos.
In GLENTHAM Aethelstan. Land for 10 oxen. Wadard <of Cogges> has 2 villagers and 1. He 1 plough himself and meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 15s 4d; now 60s.

Manerium In NORMANESTOU. habuit. Tor. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Nunc Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. II. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos modo XII. solidos.
In NORMANBY Thor had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 2 Freemen with 1 plough; and meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 12s.

. II. Maneria In FRISEBI. $ habuerunt Aluui et Aschil. III. carucatas terre. et V. bouatas ad geldum. Nunc Ilbertus homo episcopi habet ibi. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos. et VIII. bordarios. et VI. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. X. solidos.

In FIRSBY Alwy and Eskil had 3 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Now Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs there. 8 villagers, 8 smallholders and 6 Freemen with 2 ploughs. A church; meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In TORP. habuit Aschil X. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Nunc Ilbertus homo episcopi. habet ibi. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.

In NORTHORPE Eskil had 10 bovates taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough there. 5 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 20s.

Manerium In CLETHAM. habuit Aschil. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad XII. boues. Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et VI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo XL. solidos.

In CLEATHAM Eskil had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40s.

Manerium In STANTONE et Widingeham. habuit Ardegrip. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ilbertus homo episcopi habet ibi |ipse. I. carucam. . VI. uillanos. et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca|et XVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XV. solidos.

In `STAINTON' and WADDINGHAM Harthgripr had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough there himself. 6 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 11s.

Manerium In ELESHAM. habuit Chetelbern. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ilbertus homo episcopi habet ibi. VI. uillanos. et. I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et XLVII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XV. solidos.

In ELSHAM Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has there 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 47 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 15s.

. III. Maneria In ALDULUEBI. habuerunt Tosti Turuet et Ernui. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Nunc in dominio. III. carucae. et XV. uillani. et III. sochemanni et VI. bordarii cum. II. carucis. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo VIII. libras. Totum XV. quarentenas longum. et VI. latum.

In AUDLEBY Tosti , Thorfridh and Ernwin had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Now in lordship 3 ploughs; 15 villagers, 3 Freemen and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now £8. The whole 15 furlongs long and 6 wide.
In Neutone. X. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi. X. sochemanni habent. III. carucas.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In NEWTON 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 10 Freemen have 3 ploughs. , Thorfridh and Ernwin had it
In Summerlede. V. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et II. boues arantes.
In 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. 8 Freemen have 1 plough and 2 oxen ploughing. , Thorfridh and Ernwin had it

In Risebi. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni et IIII. uillani habent. III. carucas. et XXX. I. acrae prati et XII. acrae siluae minutae. Tres leuas longa. et III. quarentenas lata

In RISBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 14 Freemen and 4 villagers have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 31 acres; underwood, 12 acres. 3 leagues long and 3 furlongs wide. , Thorfridh and Ernwin had it
In Chenebi. V. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et II. boues arantes. $
In KINGERBY 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 8 Freemen have 1 plough and 2 oxen ploughing. , Thorfridh and Ernwin had it
Berewita In COTES. est inland de Ingeham. dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. $ Terra. ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi Ilbertus habet. III. uillanos et II. bordarios. habent. I. carucam.
In COATES there is of Ingham; 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Ilbert has 3 villagers and 2 smallholders have 1 plough.
$ In Osgotebi. V. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Ibi IX. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et II. boues arantes. Soca in Alduluebi.
In OSGODBY 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. 9 Freemen have 1 plough and 2 oxen ploughing. A jurisdiction of Audleby. , Thorfridh and Ernwin had it

. II. Maneria In NETELTONE. habuerunt Chetelber et Gamel. I. carucatam et VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas et dimidiam. Nunc Ernegis et Wadardus homines episcopi habent ibi. II. carucas. et XIII. uillanos. et V. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et II. bobus. et II. molendina. III. solidorum. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo IIII. libras.

In NETTLETON Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> and Gamal had 1 carucate and 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Now Erneis and Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's men, have 2 ploughs there. 13 villagers and 5 smallholders with 1 plough and 2 oxen. 2 mills, 3s; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now £4.
In Toresbi et Aluuoldebi. est soca huius Manerii. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. ibi. sunt. IIII. uillani. et III. saline. et XX. acrae prati.

In THORESBY and `AUTBY' there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 2 bovates of land taxable. 4 villagers. 3 salt-houses; meadow, 20 acres. [Jurisdiction of Nettleton. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> and Gamal had it. Erneis and Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's men, have it
In Rodowelle. I. bouuata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. I. bouem.
In ROTHWELL 1 bovate of land taxable. 1 Freeman has 1 ox. [Jurisdiction of Nettleton. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> and Gamal had it. Erneis and Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's men, have it
$ In Neutone. est soca de Frisebi. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi habet Ilbertus. V. sochemannos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et XX. acras prati.
In NEWTON there is a jurisdiction of Firsby; 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Ilbert has 5 Freemen with 1 1/2 ploughs; and meadow, 20 acres.

Manerium In GROSBI. habuit Ulchil. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad IIII. carucas. Ibi modo in dominio. II. carucae. et VI. uillani et VI. bordarii. et XI. sochemanni habentes. II. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molendinum III. solidorum. et XL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. C. solidos.

In GRASBY Ulfkil had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Now in lordship 2 ploughs; 6 villagers, 6 smallholders and 11 Freemen who have 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 100s.
In Sualun. est soca huius Manerii. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni cum. I. caruca.
In SWALLOW there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 8 Freemen with 1 plough.

Manerium In CHELEBI. habuit Sigar. IIII. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. boues. Ibi Wadardus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. et III. sochemannos. cum. II. bobus arantes. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo similiter.

In KEELBY Sigar <of Healing> had 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 9 oxen. Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 3 Freemen who plough with 2 oxen. Value before 1066, 30s; now the same.
In Wenflet. II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum.
In 2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 oxen.

In Stalinburg est Inland huius Manerii. V. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad XI. boues. Ibi VIII. uillani et II. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et C et quater XX. acras prati. et dimidium molendinum. III. solidorum.
In STALLINGBOROUGH there is } of this manor; 5 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 11 oxen. 8 villagers and 2 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 180 acres; 1/2 mill, 3s.

Manerium In HEGELINGE. habuit Sigar. VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et VI. boues. Ibi Wadardus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et V. bordarios et II. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et V. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In HEALING Sigar <of Healing> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough and 6 oxen. Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers, 5 smallholders and 2 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 5 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40s. Exactions 20s.
In Cleia. est soca huius Manerii. III. bouate terre ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et II. uillani et I. bordarius. habent. V. boues arantes. et XXV. acras prati.

In CLEE there is a jurisdiction of this manor; 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen, 2 villagers and 1 smallholder have 5 oxen ploughing and meadow, 25 acres. [Jurisdiction of Healing. Sigar <of Healing> had it. Wadard <of Cogges> has it
In Ternesco. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. I. uillanus et III. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam.
In `THRUNSCOE' 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 1 villager and 3 Freemen have 1/2 plough. [Belongs to Healing. Sigar <of Healing> had it. Wadard <of Cogges> has it

Manerium In SUDCOTES habuit Azor. XV. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Nunc sunt ibi XVI. sochemanni habentes. III. carucas. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XL. solidos.
In `SOUTH COATES' COATES * A
In Cotes. VI. uel. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad VI. boues. Soca in Sudcotes. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent. II. boues arantes. et C.
In COATES 6, or 3, bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of `South Coates' Coates *. 2 Freemen have 2 oxen ploughing and meadow, 100 acres.

Manerium In CLEIA. habuit Algar. dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Nunc Ilbertus habet de episcopo. et Wasta. est. Ibi sunt XL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo XX. solidos.
In CLEE Algar had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Now Ilbert has it from the Bishop. It is waste. Meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20s.
In Itrebi. est inland et soca huius. Manerii. I. na. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi habet Ilbertus. V. sochemannos et II. uillanos. habentes I. carucam et dimidiam.
In `ITTERBY' there is and a jurisdiction of this manor; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Ilbert has 5 Freemen and 2 villagers who have 1 1/2 ploughs. Clee. Algar had it

Manerium In RASE. habuit Rolf. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. et II. partes unius bouatae. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi Wimundus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et VII. uillani. et III. bordarii cum. I. caruca. et II. molendina VI. solidorum. et LXI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos

In RASEN Rolf had 5 bovates of land taxable and 2 parts of 1 bovate. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Wimund , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 7 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. 2 mills, 6s; meadow, 61 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s.

Manerium In RASA. habuerunt Ulgrin. Broclos. Ulf. Goduin. Aluuin et Leuric. II. carucatas et I. bouatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi Wadardus homo episcopi habet XVIII. uillanos. et XI. bordarios habentes. V. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter cum. II. bordariis. Una bouata terrae huius pertinet aecclesiae. Ibi. C. XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LXX. solidos. modo. IIII. libras.

In RASEN Ulfgrim <of Laughton>, Broklauss, Ulf , Godwin, Alwin and Leofric had 2 carucates and 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's man, has 18 villagers and 11 smallholders who have 5 ploughs. A church and a priest with 2 smallholders. 1 bovate of this land belongs to the church. Meadow, 120 acres. Value before 1066, 70s; now £4.

Manerium In TOFTE. habuit Azor. XIIII. bouatae terre et terciam partem unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Wadardus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et XI. sochemannos habentes. V. carucas. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.
In TOFT A

Manerium In TAUELESBI. habuit Rolf dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Losoard homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos. cum. III. bobus arantes. et I. molendinum. II. solidorum. et alium molendinum. quod pertinet ad Grosbi. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In TEALBY Rolf had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Losoard <of Rolleston>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers who plough with 3 oxen. 1 mill, 2s; another mill which belongs to Grasby. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

Manerium In TORESBI et ALWOLDEBI. habuit Toruet. IIII. carucatas terre et III. bouatas et VI. partem bouatae. ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. II. carucas. et XX. III. uillanos. et V. bordarios cum. II. carucis. et V. bobus. et XXVII. sochemannos habentes. V. carucas. II. boues minus. Ibi quater XX. acrae prati. et toruelande reddens X. solidos. et XVI. salinae reddentes XVI. solidos. T. R. E. ualuit VIII. libras. modo similiter. Tailla. XL. solidos. Hanc terram cambiauit Eduuardus episcopo baiocensis.

In THORESBY and `AUTBY' Thorfridh had 4 carucates of land, 3 bovates and the sixth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Ilbert the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs. 23 villagers and 5 smallholders with 2 ploughs and 5 oxen. 27 Freemen who have 5 ploughs, less 2 oxen. Meadow, 80 acres; turf-land which pays 10s; 16 salt-houses which pay 16s. Value before 1066 £8; now the same. Exactions 40s. Edward exchanged this land with the Bishop of Bayeux.

Manerium In STRATONE. habuit Grinchel. III. carucatas terre et II. bouatas et II. partes. I. bouatae. ad geldum. |Terra. IIII. carucas. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet nunc. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et III. bordarios et XXIII. sochemannos habentes. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molendinum. VIII. solidorum. et CXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. L. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In STURTON Grimkel had 3 carucates of land, 2 bovates and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Now Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers, 3 smallholders and 23 Freemen who have 4 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 8s; meadow, 120 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50s. Exactions 10s.

In Randebi. est inland et soca huius Manerii. Nouem bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi nunc in dominio. I. caruca. et III. uillani et I. bordarius et IIII. sochemanni habentes. I. carucam. et CC. acrae prati. Ibi aecclesia ad quam pertinent XL. acrae terrae. et V. acrae prati. Ibi presbyter habens dimidiam carucam.

In RANBY there is and a jurisdiction of this manor; 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now in lordship 1 plough; 3 villagers, 1 smallholder and 4 Freemen who have 1 plough. Meadow, 200 acres. A church to which belong 40 acres of land and meadow, 5 acres. A priest who has 1/2 plough. Sturton. Grimkel had it. Ilbert has it

In Burgrede. est soca. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. est unus uillanus et I. bordarius habentes. I. bouem arantes. et XV. acrae prati. et CXX. acrae silue pastilis. et C. acrae silue minutae.

In `BURRETH' there is a jurisdiction; 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 1 villager and 1 smallholder who have 1 ox ploughing. Meadow, 15 acres; pasturable woodland, 120 acres; underwood, 100 acres. Sturton. Grimkel had it. Ilbert has it

Manerium In HAINTONE. habuit Rolf XV. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. et VI. boues. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet dimidiam carucam. et IX. uillanos. et II. bordarios et I. sochemannum. habentes. II. carucas. et C. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter. $

In HAINTON Rolf had 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 6 oxen. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1/2 plough. 9 villagers, 2 smallholders and 1 Freeman who have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.
$ In Sutreie. inland in Haintone. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. II. uillani habent dimidiam carucam. et IIII. acrae prati. et XX. acrae siluae.
In SOUTHREY, of Hainton, 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 2 villagers have 1/2 plough. Meadow, 4 acres; woodland 20 acres. had it. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has it
In Strubi. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Soca. est Ibi III. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam.
In STRUBBY 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. It is a jurisdiction. 3 Freemen have 1/2 plough. had it. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has it
In Bacuurde. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad VI. boues. Ibi III. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam.
In BARKWITH 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. 3 Freemen have 1/2 plough. had it. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has it

Manerium In SOTEBI. habuit Ulnod. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Radulfus homo episcopi habet XVI. sochemannos. et III. uillanos cum. IIII. carucis. In dominio nihil. Ibi aecclesia. et CL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII. libras.

In SOTBY Wulfnoth had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Ralph, the Bishop's man, has 16 Freemen and 3 villagers with 4 ploughs. In lordship nothing. A church; meadow, 150 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now £4.

In LANGETONE et in TORP. habuit Lepsi. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi unus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et XXVI. uillanos. et III. sochemannos habentes. V. boues arantes. et LX. acras prati. et quater XX. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter.

In LANGTON and Leofsi had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. A man of the Bishop's has 1 plough. 26 villagers and 3 Freemen who have 5 oxen ploughing and meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.

In Stinblebi. est inland et soca huius. Manerii. Decem bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XIIII. boues. Ibi. V. uillani et III. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et XII. acrae prati. et XXX. acrae silue minutae

In THIMBLEBY there is and a jurisdiction of this manor; 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. 5 villagers and 3 Freemen have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 12 acres; underwood, 30 acres. [* Jurisdiction and of Sotby. Wulfnoth had it. Ralph, the Bishop's man, has it *

Manerium In ULINGEHAM. habuit Aschil. VI. bouatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. XIII. boues. Ibi Wadardus habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et XXXVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XL. solidos.

In WILLINGHAM Eskil had 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 13 oxen. Wadard <of Cogges> has 1 plough. 4 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 36 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40s.

Manerium In CHIRCHEBI. habuit Wlmar. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et X. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et sedem molendini. et XII. acras prati. et CLX acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos modo. XX. solidos.

In KIRKBY Wulfmer had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough and 10 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough; and a mill site; meadow, 12 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 160 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

$ In TORP. habuit Ulmar. II. carucatas terre ad geldum pro Manerio. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi sunt. XVIII. uillani et IIII. bordarii cum. I. caruca. et XVI. acrae prati. et CXX. acrae silue pastilis. et tercia pars. II. molinorum de. VII. solidis. et III. piscarie de. XXX. denariis Ualuit et ualet. XX. solidos. Eudo tenet de rege.

In THORPE Wulfmer had 2 carucates of land taxable as a manor. Land for 2 ploughs. 18 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland, 120 acres; the third part of 2 mills at 7s; 3 fisheries at 30d. The value was and is 20s. Eudo holds from the King.

$ Manerium In SISSE. habuit Gudmunt. VI. bouatas terre |et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad IX. boues. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos. et I. bordarium et II. sochemannos habentes dimidiam carucam. Ibi ecclesia et XX|. V. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In SIXHILLS Guthmund had 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 9 oxen. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers, 1 smallholder and 2 Freemen who have 1/2 plough. A church; meadow, 25 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 20s.

Manerium In COCRINTONE. habuerunt Aschil et Ulgrin. III. carucatas terre| et unam bouatam. ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. II. carucas. et VII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et XXVII. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas. Ibi quater XX. acrae prati. et LX. acrae silue minute. et II. partes unius molendini. II. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In COCKERINGTON Eskil and Ulfgrim <of Laughton> had 3 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs. 7 villagers, 4 smallholders and 27 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 60 acres; 2 parts of 1 mill, 2s. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same. Exactions 20s.
In Aluingeham. IIII. bouatae terrae et II. partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Soca de Cocrintone. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et VII. acrae prati.
In ALVINGHAM 4 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Cockerington. 4 Freemen have 1 plough. Meadow, 7 acres. , the Bishop's man, has it

Manerium In ABI. habuerunt Ulstan et Aschil. XIIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas et VI. boues. Ibi Wadardus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et et XII. uillanos et IIII. sochemannos. et II. bordarios. habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. et quater XX. acrae prati. et XXVII. acrae silue pastilis. et CCC. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII. libras.

In ABY Wulfstan and Eskil had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 6 oxen. Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 12 villagers, 4 Freemen and 2 smallholders who have 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres; pasturable woodland, 27 acres; underwood, 300 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now £4.
In Strobi. I. carucata et II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. et dimidiam. Ibi. V. sochemanni et IIII. uillani habent. II. carucas. Soca in Abi.
In STRUBBY 1 carucate and 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. 5 Freemen and 4 villagers have 2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Aby.

Manerium In RIGESBI. habuerunt Turulf et Outbert. X. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Losoardus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et CXX acrae silue pastilis. et LX. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo similiter.

In RIGSBY Thorulf and Otbert had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Losoard <of Rolleston>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Pasturable woodland, 120 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same.
In Welle. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. boues. Soca in Rigesbi. Ibi. I. sochemanni et II. o uillani.
In WELL 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. A jurisdiction of Rigsby. 1 Freeman and 2 villagers.

In Alebi. V. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Soca in Rigesbi. Ibi. III. sochemanni. et II. bordarii habent. I. carucam. et XII. acras prati. et XII. acras siluae pastilis. et XL. acras silue minute.
In AILBY 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. A jurisdiction of Rigsby. 3 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 1 plough and meadow, 12 acres; pasturable woodland, 12 acres; underwood, 40 acres.
In Touedebi. dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Soca Rigesbi. Ibi. III. sochemanni. III. bobus arant. et XX. acrae prati. et XII. acrae siluae.
In TOTHBY 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. A jurisdiction Rigsby. 3 Freemen plough with 3 oxen. Meadow, 20 acres; woodland, 12 acres.

Manerium In ASCHEBI habuerunt Odincarle et Chiluert. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Nunc in dominio episcopus habet ibi. I. carucam. et IX. uillanos. et II. bordarios. et XIIII. sochemannos. habentes. III. carucas. et II. molendina. III. solidorum et VI. denariorum. et XXX. I. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. VII. libras.

In ASHBY Othenkar and Ketilfrith had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Now the Bishop has in lordship 1 plough; 9 villagers, 2 smallholders and 14 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. 2 mills, 3s 6d; meadow, 31 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now £7.

In Andrebi. III. bouatae et Marchebi. IIII. bouatae VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Soca Aschebi. Ibi. XIV. sochemanni et X. uillani et I. bordarius. habent. II. carucas. et XII. acrae prati.

In ENDERBY, 3 bovates, and MARKBY, 4 bovates: 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction Ashby . 14 Freemen, 10 villagers and 1 smallholder have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 12 acres. and Ketilfrith had it

Manerium In ASCHEBI habuit Algar. IX. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas et II. boues. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos. et II. bordarios. et VIII. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et I. molendinum. III. solidorum. et XXX. acras prati. et VI. acras silue minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In ASHBY Algar had 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers, 2 smallholders and 8 Freemen with 1 plough. 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 30 acres; underwood, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40s. Exactions 20s.

In Brigeslai. et Wade. et Rauenedal. II. carucatae terre et V. bouatae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas et VI. boues. Soca in Aschebi. Ibi XIII. sochemanni et X. uillani habent. IIII. carucas. et XXV. acrae prati.

In BRIGSLEY, WAITHE and RAVENDALE 2 carucates of land and 5 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs and 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of Ashby. 13 Freemen and 10 villagers have 4 ploughs. Meadow, 25 acres. , the Bishop's man, has it

. III. Maneria In LEUESBI et Bredelou et Scarhou habuerunt Suuen Arich et Tosti. IX. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XVI. carucas. Ibi episcopus Baiocensis in dominio habet. III. carucas. et IIII. uillanos. et V. bordarios. et LXXXV. sochemannos. habentes XIII. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi. III. aecclesiae cum presbyteris. et II. molendina. VIII. solidorum. et CCC. LX. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae minutae.

In LACEBY, BRADLEY and SCARTHO Swein, Erik and Tosti had 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. The Bishop of Bayeux has in lordship 3 ploughs; 4 villagers, 5 smallholders and 85 Freemen who have 13 1/2 ploughs. 3 churches with priests; 2 mills, 8s; meadow, 360 acres; underwood, 100 acres.
In Grimesbi consuetudines et passagium reddunt. XL. solidos. T. R. E. ualuit. XII. libras. modo XXX. libras.
In GRIMSBY customary dues and the ferry pay 40s. Value before 1066 £12; now £30. [Belongs to Laceby, Bradley and Scartho. Swein, Erik and Tosti had it

In Grimesbi XI. bouatae et Cleia. III. bouatae et tercia pars unius bouatae. et Itrebi IIII. bouatae. et Ternescou VII. bouatae. Soca huius Manerii. Ad geldum III. carucatae et I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas et VII. boues. Ibi. LV. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. VI. carucas. et LIIII. acras prati.

In GRIMSBY 11 bovates, CLEE 3 bovates and the third part of 1 bovate, `ITTERBY' 4 bovates and `THRUNSCOE' 7 bovates. A jurisdiction of this manor. 3 carucates and 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs and 7 oxen. 55 Freemen and 1 villager have 6 ploughs and meadow, 54 acres. [Belongs to Laceby, Bradley and Scartho. Swein, Erik and Tosti had it

. II. Maneria In WICHALE. habuerunt Aschil et Outgrim. III. carucatas terrae et dimidiam. tercia parte. I. bouatae minus ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Ilbertus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos. et XL. II. sochemannos. habentes VI. carucas. et II. partes molendini. XXVI. denariorum. et LVI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In WITHCALL Eskil and Odhgrim had 3 1/2 carucates of land, less the third part of 1 bovate, taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Ilbert , the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers and 42 Freemen who have 6 ploughs and 2 parts of a mill, 26d; meadow, 56 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now the same. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In STIUETONE. habuit Aschil. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Ilbertus habet. I. carucam. et I. bordarium. et III. acras prati. et LX acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XV. solidos.
In STEWTON Eskil had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Ilbert has 1 plough. 1 smallholder. Meadow, 3 acres; pasturable woodland, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 15s.

Manerium In ARESBI. habuit Gamel. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Wadardus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et XX. VI. sochemannos habentes. V. carucas. et CXXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In OWERSBY Gamal had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Wadard <of Cogges>, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers, 4 smallholders and 26 Freemen who have 5 ploughs and meadow, 130 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In TORGREBI. habuit Aluric XV. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas et VI. boues. Ibi episcopus. I. carucam. habet. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.
In THORGANBY Aelfric had 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 6 oxen. The Bishop has 1 plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

Manerium In DODINTUNE. habuit Gladuine. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Baldricus homo episcopi habet. II. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et dimidium molendinum. III. solidorum. et X. acras prati.

In DODDINGTON Gladwin <of Doddington> had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Baldric , the Bishop's man, has 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 10 acres. Value 10s.

Manerium In CLAIPOL. habuit Turuert. III. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi episcopus habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos. et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et XV. acrae prati. T. R. E. XL. solidos. modo XXX. solidos.

In CLAYPOLE Thorfridh had 3 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. The Bishop has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 15 acres. before 1066, 40s; now 30s.

Manerium In KASCHINGETORP. habuit Turuert. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad XIIII. boues. Ibi Suuen homo episcopi habet. V. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XXX.

In CASTHORPE Thorfridh had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Swein, the Bishop's man, has 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30.

Manerium In STAPLEFORDE. habuit Turuert. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Tor homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et I. bordarium. arantes. VI. bobus. Una quarentena prati. et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In STAPLEFORD Thorfridh had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Thor, the Bishop's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers and 1 smallholder who plough with 6 oxen. Meadow, 1 1/2 furlongs. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.
In CANUIC. habuit Escule. I. carucatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad XII. boues. Ibi Ilbertus habet. II. carucas. et II. . . . et I. bordarium. et XXVII. acras prati.
In CANWICK Skuli had 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Ilbert has 2 ploughs and 2 and 1 smallholder. Meadow, 27 acres.

. II. Maneria In OUNEBI. habuerunt Rolf et Siuuard. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. V. boues. Ibi Ilbertus et Wadardus habent. V. boues iN carruca. et IX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In OWMBY Rolf and Siward had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Ilbert and Wadard <of Cogges> have 5 oxen in a plough and meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066, 15s; now 20s 8d. Land of Bishop Osmund

. V. In LUNDETORP. sunt XV. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. arum. carucarum. Haec terra pertinet ad aecclesiam de Grantham. et est quieta ab omnibus seruitiis. Ibi habet Osmundus episcopus. VII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XIII. acras prati.

In LONDONTHORPE 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. This land belongs to the Church of Grantham and is exempt from all services. Bishop Osmund has 7 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 13 acres.
In Nongetune habet Sanctus Wlfrannus de Grantham dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus arat. II. bobus.
In St Wulfram's of Grantham has 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 villager ploughs with 2 oxen.
In Gunfordebi habet Sanctus Wlfrannus de Granham. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. cum saca et soca. Terra. XII. boum. precium huius terrae computatur cum aecclesia de Grantham.
In GONERBY St Wulfram's of Grantham has 1 carucate of land taxable with full jurisdiction. Land for 12 oxen. The value of this land is accounted for with the Church of Grantham. of Bishop Geoffrey

. VI. . II. Maneria In CANUIC et Brachebrige. habuit Ulf. VI. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Goisfridus episcopus. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. sochemannos de. XI. bouatis huius. terre. et XII. uillanos et XI. bordarios habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. et III. piscarias de. III. solidis. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. LX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In CANWICK and BRACEBRIDGE Ulf had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Bishop Geoffrey has 1 1/2 ploughs. 2 Freemen with 11 bovates of this land; 12 villagers and 11 smallholders who have 2 1/2 ploughs. 3 fisheries at 3s; meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 60s. Exactions 10s. of Bishop Geoffrey Land of the Bishop of Lincoln

. VII. In SANCTAE MARIAE STOU. sunt. IIII. carucate terrae ad geldum. Terra. est ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi episcopus Remigius. in dominio. I. carucam. et XX. uillanos et III. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter et III. ferrariae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. II. libras. modo XXX. libras. Ex ea terra habent. II. milites quod ualet. XXX. solidos.

In St Mary's STOW 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Bishop Remigius in lordship 1 plough; 20 villagers and 3 Freemen who have 3 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 3 smithies. Value before 1066 £32; now £30. Of this land 2 men-at-arms have what is valued at 30s.
In Welingeham. est inland huius Manerii. Decem bouatae terrae. et III. cia. pars duarum bouatarum. Terra ad tantundem. Due bouate sunt de quibus Gozelinus habet socam.
In WILLINGHAM there is of this manor; 10 bovates of land and the third part of 2 bovates. Land for as much. 2 bovates of which Jocelyn has the jurisdiction.

In Couenebi. Inland de Stou. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi. XX. sochemanni et XV. bordarii. habent. V. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molendinum. IIII. solidorum. et XX. acrae prati.
In CAENBY, of Stow, 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 20 Freemen and 15 smallholders have 5 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 4s; meadow, 20 acres.

In Nortune. VI. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Inland et Soca in Stou. Ibi in dominio. III. carucae. et XXV. sochemanni. et IIII. uillani. et XXI. bordarii. habent. V. carucas. Ibi unus homo episcopi habet. I. carucam. Ibi sedes molendini. et CCCC. XXX. acrae prati.

In NORTON 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. and a jurisdiction of Stow. In lordship 3 ploughs. 25 Freemen, 4 villagers and 21 smallholders have 5 ploughs. One of the Bishop's men has 1 plough. A mill site; meadow, 430 acres.
In Glentham. III. carucatae terre et VI. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. et VI. boues. Soca in Stou. Ibi. XVI. sochemanni. et XI. bordarii habent. V. carucas. et CX. acrae prati.
In GLENTHAM 3 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of Stow. 16 Freemen and 11 smallholders have 5 ploughs. Meadow, 110 acres.
In Ounebi. IIII. carucatae terre et III. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem. Ibi XVII. sochemanni habent. V. carucas et dimidiam. et XXI. acrae prati.
In OWMBY 4 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for as much. 17 Freemen have 5 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 21 acres.

In UPTON, KEXBY and NORMANBY, a jurisdiction of Stow, 11 carucates of land } and 4 parts of 2 bovates and 2 parts of 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. 20 Freemen and 7 smallholders have 6 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 171 acres; underwood, 162 acres.

Manerium In WELLETONE habuit Suuen XII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad XVI. carucas. Nunc habent |ibi. VI. canonici de lincole. E. ualuit XVI. libras. modo XI. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos. Tres leuas longa. et I. lata.

In WELTON Swein had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. Now 6 Canons of Lincoln have 5 ploughs in lordship there; 48 Freemen and 4 smallholders who have 11 ploughs. 5 mills, 40s; meadow, 150 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066 £16; now £11. Exactions 40s. 3 leagues long and 1 wide.
In Burton soca huius Manerii. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi. VI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam.

Manerium In BRANTUNE. habuit SANCTA MARIA Stou. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi nunc in dominio. IIII. carucae. et IIII. uillani et I. sochemannus cum. In BRAMPTON St Mary's Stow had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Now in lordship 4 ploughs; 4 villagers and 1 Freeman with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres; underwood 10 furlongs long and 4 wide. The whole manor 16 furlongs long and 9 wide. Value before 1066 £12; now the same.
In CHENEIDE. XII. bouatae |et II. as partes unius bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad XIII. boues. SANCTA MARIA habet ibi. III. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et XX. V. acras prati. et XX. VI. acras siluae.
In KNAITH 12 bovates and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 13 oxen. St Mary's has there 3 Freemen with 2 ploughs; and meadow, 25 acres; woodland, 26 acres.
In STOU. Soca de Brantune. I. carucata. et II. partes de. II. bouatis ad geldum.
In STOW, a jurisdiction of Brampton, 1 carucate and 2 parts of 2 bovates taxable. Land for as much.
Ibidem Alsi. I. toftam in soca Remigii episcopi. Willelmus. de perci tenet
There also Alsi 1 plot in the jurisdiction of Bishop Remigius. William of Percy holds it.

In INGHAM Hakon had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Erchenold, the Bishop's man, has 5 oxen ploughing. 1 villager and 1 Freeman who plough with 6 oxen. Meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 25s. Exactions 5s.
fd Manerium In COTES. habuit Acum dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad tantuntdem. Ibi Erchenold habet. I. carucam. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XXX. solidos.
In COATES Hakon had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for as much. Erchenold has 1 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s.

fd. II. Maneria In Uluricebi. habuerunt Ulmar et Alden. II. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi Goislanus habet. IIII. carucas. et X. uillanos. et V. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. III. libras. et X. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In DUNSBY, of this manor, 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 2 villagers have 1/2 plough and meadow, 20 acres; woodland, 43 acres. had it. Adam <of Leasingham>, the Bishop's man, has it

In WILLOUGHBY Arnketil had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Ralph <of Kimcote>, the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs. 5 villagers and 2 Freemen who have 2 ploughs and meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 50s.

fd Manerium In HACAM. habuit Tori XIIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi Hugo homo episcopi habet. II. carucas. et XXI. uillani. et IIII. sochemanni et I. bordarius. habent. IX. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. molendina. XIII. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo VII. libras.

In HOUGHAM Thori had 14 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 1/2 ploughs. Hugh, the Bishop's man, has 2 ploughs. 21 villagers, 4 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 9 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 mills, 13s 4d; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now £7.

In hac uilla habuit Robertus presbyter. I. carucatam terre de rege in elemosina. et modo cum eadem terra effectus est |monachus in SANCTAE MARIAE Stou. Sed non licet terram alicui habere nisi regis concessu. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo similiter.

In this village Robert the priest had 1 carucate of land from the King in alms. Now he has become a monk in St Mary's Stow, with this land, but no one may have the land except by the King's grant. Value before 1066, 10s; now the same. had it

Manerium In LUDES habuit Episcopus lincolie. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi habet modo episcopus in dominio. III. carucas. et quater XX. burgenses. et I. mercatum de XX. IX. solidis. et XL. sochemannos et II. uillanos. Inter omnes habent. XIII. carucas. et XIII. molinos reddentes. LX. solidos. Ibi habent. II. milites. II. carucas. et XX. I. acra prati. et CCCC. acras silue pastilis per loca. Una leua et VIII. quarentenis longum. et X. quarentenis latum. T. R. E. ualuit XII. libras. modo. XXII. libras. Tailla. III. libras.

In LOUTH the Bishop of Lincoln had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. The Bishop now has in lordship 3 ploughs; 80 burgesses, 1 market at 29s, 40 Freemen and 2 villagers; between them they have 13 ploughs. 13 mills which pay 60s. 2 men-at-arms have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 21 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 400 acres. 1 league and 8 furlongs long and 10 furlongs wide. Value before 1066 £12; now £22. Exactions £3.

Manerium In REBURNE. habuit Archil. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad II. carucas. Nunc episcopus Remigius et canonici. in SANCTA MARIA habent II. uillanos. cum. III. bobus arantes. et XX. IIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In REDBOURNE Arnketil had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now Bishop Remigius and the Canons in St Mary's have 2 villagers who plough with 3 oxen; and meadow, 24 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.

In CHENEBI. tenet Goislan de episcopo. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Outi tenuit. T. R. E. Ibi sunt. II. carucae. presbyter et aecclesia. et XX. uillani et V. bordarii cum. V. carucis. et molinus. IIII. solidorum. et CCCC. acrae prati. Ualuit et ualet. IIII. or libras.

In KINGERBY Jocelyn holds from the Bishop 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Auti held them before 1066. 2 ploughs. A priest and a church; 20 villagers and 5 smallholders with 5 ploughs. A mill, 4s; meadow, 400 acres. The value was and is £4.
In GULLINGHAM. X. boutae terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Ibi. VIII. uillani. et I. sochemannus cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et XX. acrae prati. Olim. XX. solidos. Modo. XXX. solidos ualet.
In WILLINGHAM 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. 8 villagers and 1 Freeman with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 20 acres. Formerly 20s; value now 30s. Land of St Peter's of Peterborough

Manerium In FISCARTUNE. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Hoc Manerium fuit et est Sancti Petri de Burg. Ibi in dominio. III. carucae. et XVIII. uillani. et III. bordarii. habentes. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et III. piscariae et dimidia reddentes XX. I. denarios. et CXX. acras prati. Silua pastilis. X. quarentenas longa. et IX. lata. Totum XX. quarentenas longum. et IX. latum. T. R. E. ualuit. XIIII. libras. modo XVII. libras. Tailla. III. libras.

In FISKERTON 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. This manor was and is St Peter's of Peterborough. In lordship 3 ploughs; 18 villagers and 3 smallholders who have 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; 3 1/2 fisheries which pay 21d; meadow, 120 acres; pasturable woodland 10 furlongs long and 9 wide. The whole 20 furlongs long and 9 wide. Value before 1066 £14; now £17. Exactions £3.
SOCA huius Manerii In Scoltorne et Holme et Sutbroc V. carucatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi habet Sanctus Petrus XXX. II. sochemannos habentes VIII. carucas.
Jurisdiction of this manor in SCOTHERN, `HOLME' and SUDBROOKE; 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. St Peter's has 32 Freemen who have 8 ploughs.

Inland huius Manerii In Refaim. IIII. carucatae|et. VI. bouatae. terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. |et. VI. boues. Ibi XII. uillani et II. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. et XL. acras prati. Silua minuta. VIII. quarentenas longa. et IIII. lata.

of this manor in REEPHAM; 4 carucates and 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs and 6 oxen. 12 villagers and 2 smallholders have 4 ploughs and meadow, 60 acres; underwood 8 furlongs long and 4 wide.

Manerium In TUROLUEBI. habuit et habet Sanctus Petrus de Burg. III. carucatas terre et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem carucas et boues. Ibi. est in dominio I. caruca. et X. uillani et II. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. De hac terra habent. II. homines abbatis. II. carucatas. et ibi. I. carucam et dimidiam et VII. uillanos et II. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. Ibi XX. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo similiter.

In THURLBY St Peter's of Peterborough had and has 3 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. In lordship 1 plough. 10 villagers and 2 Freemen have 1 1/2 ploughs. Two of the Abbot's men have 2 carucates of this land; 1 1/2 ploughs there; 7 villagers and 2 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In ADEWELLE. habuit et habet Sanctus Petrus de Burg. V. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi nunc in dominio. II. carucae. et X. uillani. et II. bordarii. et II. sochemanni. habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam. et XVIII. acrae prati. Siluae pastilis C et quater XX. acras. et minute siluae. LX. acras. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. XII. solidos.

In St Peter's of Peterborough had and has 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Now in lordship 2 ploughs; 10 villagers, 2 smallholders and 2 Freemen who have 3 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 18 acres; pasturable woodland, 180 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same. Exactions 12s.

In WITHAM et Mannetor. et Toftlund. est Bereuuita dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. boues. Ibi. II. o uillani habent dimidiam carucam. et VIII. acras prati et XL. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos et IIII. denarios. modo similiter. Ansfridus tenet.

In WITHAM, MANTHORPE, TOFT and LOUND there is an outlier; 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 2 villagers have 1/2 plough and meadow, 8 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 5s 4d; now the same. Ansfrid holds it.

# Berewita de Bergestorp. est in Bintham. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Haec terra est Sancti petri Burg dominica. Ibi nunc. VI. uillani habent. II. carucas et II. boues. Ibi Sasuualo homo abbatis habet de ipsa terra. II. carucatas terrae. et in dominio dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XXV. acras prati. et C. acras silue minutae. T. R. E. ualuit haec socha terra. XXX. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

There is an outlier of in BYTHAM; 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. The land is lordship of St Peter's Peterborough. Now 6 villagers have 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. Of this land Saswalo <of Bytham>, the Abbot's man, has 2 carucates of land. In lordship 1/2 plough; 3 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 25 acres; underwood, 100 acres. Value before 1066 of this jurisdiction, 30s; now 20s.

Manerium In OSGOTEBI habuit et habet Sanctus Petrus de burg. V. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Nunc Anschitillus homo abbatis habet ibi. II. carucas. et XIII. uillanos cum. IIII. carucis. et XIIII. acras prati. Siluae pastilis. XIII. quarentenas longi. et IIII. lati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. C. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos. Terra arabilis. XIIII. quarentenas longa. et VI. lata. Duae carucatae istius Manerii. iacent in Lauintone hundret

In OSGODBY St Peter's of Peterborough had and has 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Now Ansketil , the Abbot's man, has 2 ploughs there. 13 villagers with 4 ploughs. Meadow, 14 acres; pasturable woodland, 13 furlongs long and 4 wide. Value before 1066, 60s; now 100s. Exactions 20s. Arable land 14 furlongs long and 6 wide. 2 carucates of this manor lie in Lenton hundred.

Manerium In WALECOTE. habuit et habet Sanctus Petrus de Burg. V. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Nunc Gislebertus homo abbatis habet ibi. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos. et V. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et Ecclesiam. et XIIII. sochemannos de. II. carucatis. habentes. IIII. carucas. Una medietas de soca. est Sancti Petri. et altera Gisleberti de gant pertinet in Folchingeham. Ibi. XXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. IIII. libras. $

In WALCOT St Peter's of Peterborough had and has 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Now Gilbert, the Abbot's man, has 1 plough there. 6 villagers and 5 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A church; 14 Freemen with 2 carucates who have 4 ploughs. Half of the jurisdiction is St Peter's, the other Gilbert of Ghent's belongs in Folkingham. Meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now £4.
$ SOCA de Walecote. In hedebi. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum Terra ad. I. bouem et dimidium. Ibi. I. sochemannus arat. II. obus bobus. Iuo tenet.
A jurisdiction of Walcot in `HAIRBY'; 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. 1 Freeman ploughs with 2 oxen. Ivo holds it.

Manerium In DUNINCTUNE. habuit et habet Sanctus Petrus de Burg. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi nunc. I. caruca in dominio. et XII. uillani et XX. bordarii cum. II. carucis. et XVI. saline. XX. solidorum. et XII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo similiter.

In DONINGTON St Peter's of Peterborough had and has 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Now 1 plough in lordship; 12 villagers and 20 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 16 salt-houses, 20s; meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same.
In HOCTUNE habet Sanctus Petrus de Burg dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. cum saca et soca. Ibi. III. uillani habent. I. carucam. Colegrim tenet.
In `HOUGHTON' St Peter's of Peterborough has 1/2 carucate of land taxable with full jurisdiction. 3 villagers have 1 plough. Kolgrim holds it.

Manerium In RISUN. habuit Elnod. IIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Nunc habet Colsuan de abbate. Turoldo. et ipse ibi. II. bordarios. T. R. E. ualuit dimidiam marcam argenti. et modo similiter.
In RISEHOLME Alnoth had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Now Kolsveinn has it from Abbot Turold and himself there 2 smallholders. Value before 1066, 1/2 mark of silver; now the same.

f Manerium In IOLESTORP habuit Rolft dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad IIII. boues. Ibi. Turoldus. abbas habet. I. carucam. et III. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XII. solidos. modo. V. solidos.
In YAWTHORPE Rolf had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Abbot Turold has 1 plough and meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 12s; now 5s.

Manerium In SCOTONE habuit Aschil. VI. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Ricardus homo abbatis habet sub abbate. III. carucas. et XXII. uillanos et V. bordarios. et XVII. sochemannos. habentes. II. carucas. In Lincolia. III. burgenses. V. solidos reddentes. et L. acras prati. et XXX. VI. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. IIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In SCOTTON Eskil had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Richard, the Abbot's man, has under the Abbot 3 ploughs. 22 villagers, 5 smallholders and 17 Freemen who have 2 ploughs. In Lincoln 3 burgesses who pay 5s. Meadow, 50 acres; underwood, 36 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now £4. Exactions 40s.
SOCA huius Manerii in Torp. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent. II. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca.

A jurisdiction of this manor in NORTHORPE; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. 4 Freemen have 2 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. [Jurisdiction of Scotton. Eskil had it. Richard, the Abbot's man, has it

. II. Maneria In SCOTERE. habuerunt Alnod et Aschil. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi Turoldus abbas habet nunc. IIII. carucas. et XXX. II. uillanos. et XIII. bordarios. cum. IIII. or carucis. et XV. sochemannos cum. III. carucis. et I. molinum et medietatem duorum reddentes. VIII. solidos. et II. piscarias. XV. solidorum. et CXX. acras prati. et XXVIII. acrae siluae pastilis. T. R. E. XI. libras. modo X. libras. Tres leuas longa. et I. lata.

In SCOTTER Alnoth and Eskil had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Now Abbot Turold has 4 ploughs and 32 villagers and 13 smallholders with 4 ploughs; 15 Freemen with 3 ploughs; and 1 mill and a half of 2 which pay 8s; 2 fisheries, 15s; meadow, 120 acres; pasturable woodland, 28 acres. Value before 1066 £11; now £10. 3 leagues long and 1 wide.
f SOCA huius Manerii est in Scaltorp. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni et IIII. uillani habent. IIII. carucas. et XXX. acras prati.
There is a jurisdiction of this manor in SCOTTERTHORPE; 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 8 Freemen and 4 villagers have 4 ploughs and meadow, 30 acres.

f Manerium In CLETHAM. habuit AElnod. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi Rogerius homo abbatis habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos arantes cum. V. bobus. et VII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo XXX. solidos.
In CLEATHAM Alnoth had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Roger, the Abbot's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers who plough with 5 oxen. Meadow, 7 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30s.

f Manerium In MAMELTUNE. habuit Rolft. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Radulfus homo abbatis habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XII. libras. modo. LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos. Duas leuas longa. et I. lata.

In MANTON Rolf had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Ralph, the Abbot's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £12; now 60s. Exactions 20s. 2 leagues long and 1 wide.
SOCA huius Manerii in Cletham. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Ibi. I. sochemannus arans. I. boue.
A jurisdiction of this manor in CLEATHAM; 1 bovate of land taxable. 1 Freeman who ploughs with 1 ox. had it. Ralph, the Abbot's man, has it

Manerium In HIBOLDESTOU. habuit Rolft. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Gislebertus homo abbatis habet. II. carucas. et XI. uillani et I. sochemannus et III. bordarii habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. et I. molendinum. IIII. solidorum. et CXI. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. LXX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In HIBALDSTOW Rolf had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Gilbert, the Abbot's man, has 2 ploughs. 11 villagers, 1 Freeman and 3 smallholders have 2 1/2 ploughs. 1 mill, 4s; meadow, 111 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 70s. Exactions 20s.

f Manerium In RAGENELTORP. habuit Aschil. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Radulfus homo abbatis habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et XII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit VI. libras. modo. XXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In RAVENTHORPE Eskil had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Ralph, the Abbot's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 30s. Exactions 10s.
In CLETHAM. II. bouatae ad geldum.
In CLEATHAM 2 bovates taxable.
f SOCA huius Manerii in Holm. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad III. carucas. Ibi. VI. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et I. molinum. IIII. solidorum. et XII. acras siluae minutae.

A jurisdiction of this manor in HOLME; 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 6 Freemen have 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 4s; underwood, 12 acres. [A jurisdiction of Raventhorpe. Eskil had it. Ralph, the Abbot's man, has it
SOCA alia In Aschebi. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. boues. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. I. carucam. et III. acras silue minute.
Another jurisdiction in ASHBY; 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. 1 Freeman has 1 plough. Underwood, 3 acres. [A jurisdiction of Raventhorpe. Eskil had it. Ralph, the Abbot's man, has it

f Manerium In APLEBI et RISEBI et SALECLIF. habuit Aschil. III bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Radulfus homo abbatis habet. I. carucam. et XII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XVI. solidos.
In APPLEBY, RISBY and SAWCLIFFE Eskil had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Ralph, the Abbot's man, has 1 plough and meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16s.
