f Manerium In WALECOTE. habuit Aschil. VI. carucatas terre et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas et boues. Nunc Iuo habet de abbate. Ibi. I. carucam. et VII. uillanos et II. bordarios et X. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et CCC. et quater XX. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit VI. libras. modo XL. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In WALCOT Eskil had 6 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Now Ivo has them from the Abbot. 1 plough. 7 villagers, 2 smallholders and 10 Freemen with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 380 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 40s. Exactions 10s.
f BEREWITA huius Manerii in Alchebarge. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi. III. uillani arant. III. bobus.
An outlier of this manor in ALKBOROUGH; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. 3 villagers plough with 3 oxen. [Outlier of Walcot. Eskil had it. Ivo has it
SOCA in Hedebi. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. bouem et dimidium. Ibi. I. sochemannus arat. II. bobus.
A jurisdiction in `HAIRBY'; 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. 1 Freeman ploughs with 2 oxen. [Jurisdiction of Walcot. Eskil had it. Ivo has it

Manerium In MESSINGEHAM. habuit Elnod. V. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas et II. boues. Ibi Willelmus homo abbatis habet. II. carucas. et V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et XVIII. sochemannos. habentes. III. carucas. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In MESSINGHAM Alnoth had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs and 2 oxen. William, the Abbot's man, has 2 ploughs. 5 villagers, 4 smallholders and 18 Freemen who have 3 ploughs and meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now the same. Exactions 20s.
BEREWITA huius Manerii in Escumetorp. una bouata terrae et tercia pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. bouem. Ibi unus uillanus habet. II. boues in carruca.

An outlier of this manor in SCUNTHORPE; 1 bovate of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 ox. 1 villager has 2 oxen in a plough. [Outlier of Messingham. Alnoth had it. William, the Abbot's man, has it
In Offintone habet Sanctus Petrus de Burg. XLVIII. acras prati sine geldo. Hos tenet Goisfridus. et uillanos abbatis. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.
In UFFINGTON St Peter's of Peterborough has 48 acres of meadow without tax. Geoffrey holds them and the Abbot's villagers. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

Manerium In WITHAM et Mannetorp et Toftlund. habuit Hereuuard XII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi Asuert homo abbatis Turoldi habet. VI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios et II sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et XX. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter.

In WITHAM, MANTHORPE and TOFT and LOUND Hereward had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Asfrith, Abbot Turold's man, has 6 villagers, 4 smallholders and 2 Freemen with 2 ploughs; and meadow, 20 acres; woodland, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.
BEREWITA huius Manerii in Bercaham et Estou. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Asford habet. II. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca.
Outliers of this manor in BARHOLM and STOWE; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Asfrith has 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. . Hereward had it

Ibidem. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Soca in Burg. Nunc Godefridus homo abbatis habet IX. sochemannos. et I. uillanum. et II. bordarios. cum II. carucis. Robertus tenet dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XX. similiter.

There also 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Peterborough. Now Godfrey, the Abbot's man, has 9 Freemen, 1 villager and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Robert holds half. Value before 1066, 20s; now 20 likewise. had it
In ESTOU Soca in Witham. IIII. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem. Ibi Asfort de abbate habet. I. uillanum et II. sochemannos cum dimidia caruca.
In STOWE, a jurisdiction of Witham, 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as much. Asfrith has from the Abbot 1 villager and 2 Freemen with 1/2 plough. had it

Ibidem. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. boues. Soca in Werche Sancti Petri de Burg. Ibi habet Godefridus de abbate. I. uillanum et II. sochemannos cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. III. solidos. modo similiter.

There also 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Witham, of St Peter's of Peterborough. Godfrey has from the Abbot 1 villager and 2 Freemen with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 3s; now the same. had it

Manerium In TUROLUEBI. habuit Elnod. I. carucatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad I. carucam et dimidiam. Frigsoca sub Aslac. Ibi Goisfridus sub abbate. habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum et IIII. bordarios. et XXX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XX. solidos similiter.

In THURLBY Alnoth had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. a free jurisdiction under Aslak . Geoffrey has under the Abbot 1 plough. 1 villager and 4 smallholders. Underwood, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 20s likewise. Land of St Peter's of Westminster

Manerium In DODINCTONE. habuit Ailric. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi SANCTUS PETRUS de Westmonasterio habet. I. carucam. et XIIII. uillanos et VI. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. Pratum dimidiam leuam longum. et dimidiam latum. Silua pastilis. I. leuam et dimidiam longa. et dimidiam leuam lata. T. R. E. cum omnibus ad hoc Manerium pertinetibus. ualuit. XX. libras. Modo ualet quod Sanctus Petrus habet. IIII. libras.

In DODDINGTON Aelric had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. St Peter's of Westminster has 1 plough. 14 villagers and 6 smallholders with 4 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 1/2 league long and 1/2 wide; pasturable woodland 1 1/2 leagues long and 1/2 league wide. Value before 1066, with everything belonging to this manor, £20; now value of what St Peter's has, £4
Soca In Torp. VI. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. XXX. sochemanni habent. VII. carucas et dimidiam. Prati. II. quarentenas longi.

In THORPE 6 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. A jurisdiction also of this manor. 30 Freemen have 7 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 2 furlongs long and 2 wide. Land of St Benedict's of Ramsey

Manerium In CORNINCTUNE habuit et habet Sanctus Benedictus de Ramesy I. carucatam terre et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas et boues. Ibi nunc in dominio. I. caruca. et III. uillani et I. bordarius. et I. sochemannus cum. I. caruca. Ibi. II. aecclesiae et I. molinus XXI. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et XIIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo IIII. libras.

In QUARRINGTON St Benedict's of Ramsey had and has 1 carucate of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Now in lordship 1 plough; 3 villagers, 1 smallholder and 1 Freeman with 1 plough. 2 churches; 1 mill, 21s 4d; meadow, 14 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £4.
SOCA huius Manerii in Eslaforde. I. carucata terre ad geldum. . Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi. I. sochemannus et II. uillani habent. I. carucam. et XXVII. acrae prati.
A jurisdiction of this manor in SLEAFORD; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 Freeman and 2 villagers have 1 plough. Meadow, 27 acres.
SOCA alia in Dunnesbi. VI. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. Ibi modo. XI. sochemanni et III. bordarii. habent. III. carucas. et VI. acras prati.
Another jurisdiction is DUNSBY; 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Now 11 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 6 acres.

Manerium In TRICHINGHAM habuit et habet Sanctus Benedictus de Ramesy. dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. boues. Ibi. I. uillanus habet dimidiam carucam. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos. modo similiter.
In THREEKINGHAM St Benedict's of Ramsey had and has 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 villager has 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 5s; now the same.
In Coteland habet Sanctus Benedictus. dimidima carucatam prati ad geldum. in Craneuuelle.
In St Benedict 's has 1/2 carucate of meadow taxable in Cranwell. Land of St Guthlac's of Crowland

Manerium In HOLEBEN et COPELADE habuit et habet Sanctus Gutlacus. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi nunc. I. caruca in dominio. et III. uillani cum dimidia caruca. et XII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In HOLBEACH and WHAPLODE St Guthlac's had and has 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Now 1 plough in lordship; 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

In Spallinge BEREWITA de Croiland. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi. VII. uillani et IIII. bordarii. habent. III. carucas. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.
In SPALDING, an outlier of Crowland, 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. 7 villagers and 4 smallholders have 3 ploughs. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

Manerium In LANGETOF. habuit et habet Sanctus Gutlacus. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi nunc in dominio. I. caruca. et VIII. uillani. et IIII. bordarii. et XX. sochemanni habentes. V. carucas. et C. acrae prati. Silua. II. solidorum. Maresc. II. leuas longum. et II. latum. Terra arabilis. XV. quarentenas longa. et IX. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo LX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In LANGTOFT St Guthlac's had and has 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Now in lordship 1 plough; 8 villagers, 4 smallholders and 20 Freemen who have 5 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres; woodland, 2s; marsh 2 leagues long and 2 wide; arable land 15 furlongs long and 9 wide. Value before 1066 £4; now 60s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In BASTUNE habuit et habet Sanctus Gutlacus. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi nunc in dominio. I. caruca. et V. uillani. et II. bordarii. et VII. sochemanni cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et dimidius molinus. et XLV. acrae prati. Maresc. XVI. quarentenas longum. et VIII. lata. Terra arabilis VIII. quarentenas longa. et VIII. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter.

In BASTON St Guthlac's had and has 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Now in lordship 1 plough; 5 villagers, 2 smallholders and 7 Freemen with 2 ploughs. A church and 1/2 mill; meadow, 45 acres; marsh 16 furlongs long and 8 wide; arable land 8 furlongs long and 8 wide. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.

Manerium In DUUEDIC. habuit et habet Sanctus Gutlacus. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. cum sacca et soca. Ibi nunc. I. caruca in dominio. et XIII. uillani cum. I. caruca. et XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter. Colegrim tenet

In DOWDYKE St Guthlac's had and has 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs with full jurisdiction. Now 1 plough in lordship; 13 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same. Kolgrim holds it.
BEREWITA huius Manerii in Draitone. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi. V. uillani. non arant. Ibi. IIII. salinae V. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et VI. acrae prati.
An outlier of this manor in DRAYTON; 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 5 villagers do not plough. 4 salt-houses, 5s 4d; meadow, 6 acres. DOWDYKE. Kolgrim holds it
In Alfgare BereWita alia. XII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Nunc Wasta. est. Colegrim tenet de abbate.
In ALGARKIRK, another outlier, 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Now it is waste. Kolgrim holds it from the Abbot. DOWDYKE
In Burtoft habuit et habet Sanctus Gutlacus. I. bouatam terre quae iacet in Duuedic. Inde habet rex socam.
In BURTOFT St Guthlac's had and has 1 bovate of land which lies in DOWDYKE. The King has jurisdiction over it. holds it
Manerium In BUCHEHALE. habuit Gamel. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum.

In BUCKNALL Gamal had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. There also a jurisdiction of Belchford, 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Now St Guthlac's has 1 plough in lordship; 5 villagers, 2 smallholders and 8 Freemen who have 1 plough. Meadow, 120 acres; pasturable woodland, 50 acres; underwood, 70 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now the same. Thorald the sheriff gave this land to St Guthlac's for his soul. Land of Count Alan

. II. Maneria In BORTONE. habuerunt Gonneuuate et Godric IIII. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Nunc habet comes Alanus ibi. I. carucam. et X. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas. et XL. acras prati. et LXX. acrae broce. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo XXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In BURTON Gunnhvati and Godric had 4 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Now Count Alan has 1 plough there. 10 Freemen who have 3 ploughs and meadow, 40 acres; water-meadow, 70 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 30s. Exactions 10s.
SOCA huius Manerii in Martone. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Wasta. est.
A jurisdiction of this manor in MARTON; 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. It is waste. Burton. Gunnhvati and Godric had it

Manerium In WELINGEHAM. habuit Staigrim XII. bouatas terre ad geldum. ManeriumTerra ad XII. boues. Ibidem habuit Gunneuuate. VI. bouatas terre et III. partes. II. bouatarum. ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem boues. Ibi habet comes Alanus in dominio. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et II. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In WILLINGHAM Steingrimr had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. There also Gunnhvati had 6 bovates of land and the third part of 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many oxen. Count Alan has in lordship 1 plough; 5 villagers and 2 Freemen with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

. IIII. Maneria In LEA. habuerunt Fulcheri et II. frates eius. III. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Ibidem habuit Ulchil dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi Robertus homo comitis habet nunc. I. carucam. et XVI. uillanos et II. sochemannos cum. III. carucis. et dimidiam piscariam de. X. denariorum. et I. passagium de. XII. denariorum. et C. |et XV. acras prati. et C. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo XXX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In LEA Fulcric and his 2 brothers had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. There also Ulfkil had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Robert , the Count's man, now has 1 plough and 16 villagers and 2 Freemen with 3 ploughs; and 1/2 fishery at 10d; 1 ferry at 12d; meadow, 115 acres; underwood, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now 30s. Exactions 20s.
BEREWITA huius Manerii et SOCA. IIII. or bouatae terrae ad geldum. In Iopeham. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni modo arant II. bus bobus. Ibi. XX. acrae prati
An outlier of this manor and a jurisdiction in HEAPHAM; 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen now plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 20 acres. , the Count's man, now has it *
SOCA alia in Sumerdebi. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. boues. Ibi. II. sochemanni arant. III. bobus. Ibi. X. acrae prati. et X. acrae silue minutae.
Another jurisdiction in SOMERBY; 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 2 Freemen plough with 3 oxen. Meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 10 acres. , the Count's man, now has it *

. VI. Maneria In CHELUINGEHOLM Radolf Welgrim. Aschil Archel Sagrim. et Ernuin presbyter habuerunt. II. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Landricus homo comes habet nunc. II. carucas. et XI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit IIII. libras. modo XXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.
In KILLINGHOLME Ralph, Wilgrim. Land for 6 ploughs. Landric , the Count's man, now has 2 ploughs. 11 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 30s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In CHERNITONE. habuit. Aschilbar. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi nunc. I. caruca in dominio. et I. uillanus. et IIII. sochemanni cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. solidos. modo XX. solidos.
In KIRMINGTON Eskil Barn had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Now 1 plough in lordship; 1 villager and 4 Freemen with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

Manerium In NORTCHELESEI. habuit Grimbold crac. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi nunc. I. uillanus cum. VI. bobus. et I. molinus. VII. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo similiter.
In NORTH KELSEY Grimbald Krakr had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now 1 villager with 6 oxen. 1 mill, 7s. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.
BEREWITA huius Manerii. in Seurebi. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi. I. uillanus arat. III. bus bobus.
An outlier of this manor in SEARBY; 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. 1 villager ploughs with 3 oxen.

BEREWITA alia in Catenase et Usun. V. bouatae terrae ad geldum. et tercia pars. I. bouate ad geldum. et tantundem terra ad arandum. Ibi. V. uillani habent. II. carucas. et C. acrae prati. Ualet. XL. solidos.
Another outlier in CADNEY and HOWSHAM; 5 bovates of land taxable and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. As much land for ploughing. 5 villagers have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres. Value 40s.
BEREWITA alia in Odenebi. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Ibi unus uillanus arat. III. bobus. Ibi. VIII. acrae prati.
Another outlier in OWMBY; 3 bovates of land taxable. 1 villager ploughs with 3 oxen. Meadow, 8 acres.

Manerium In CATENASE et USUN. habuit Grimbold crac. V. bouatas terrae. et terciam partem bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem boues. Ibi. VI. cum domino habent. III. carucas et dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo XL. solidos.
In CADNEY and HOWSHAM Grimbald Krakr had 5 bovates of land and the third part of a bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. 6 with the lord have 3 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 60s; now 40s.

Manerium In ALESBI. habuit Orm. II. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas. et II. as partes unius bouate ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi Picot homo comitis habet nunc. II. carucas. et VI. uillanos et III. bordarios. et XX. sochemannos habentes. II. carucas et II. boues. Ibi ecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus et dimidius. IX. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. V. libras. modo. IIII. libras.

In AYLESBY Orm had 2 carucates of land and 6 bovates and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Picot , the Count's man, now has 2 ploughs. 6 villagers, 3 smallholders and 20 Freemen who have 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. A church and a priest; 1 1/2 mills, 9s. Value before 1066 £5; now £4. Exactions 20s.
SOCA huius Manerii in Sualun. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi modo unus bordarius.
A jurisdiction of this manor in SWALLOW; 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Now 1 smallholder. [Jurisdiction of Aylesby. Orm had it. Picot , the Count's man, now has it
SOCA alia in Cotes. una bouata terre ad geldum. Wasta. est.
Another jurisdiction in COATES; 1 bovate of land taxable. It is waste. [Jurisdiction of Aylesby. Orm had it. Picot , the Count's man, now has it

Manerium In SUALUN. habuit Sbern. I. carucatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi habet Picot dimidiam carucam. et V. uillanos et I. bordarium. et IX. sochemannos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. LX. solidos.
In SWALLOW Esbiorn had 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Picot has 1/2 plough. 5 villagers, 1 smallholder and 9 Freemen with 1 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 20s; now 60s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In HOLTUN. habuit Turgot. II. bouatas terre et V. acras |et. II. uirgas ad geldum. Ibi Wimundus homo comitis. habet. II. uillanos. cum V. bobus arantes. et V. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. solidos. modo. VIII. solidos.
In HOLTON Thorgot had 2 bovates of land and 5 acres and 2 virgates taxable. Wimund , the Count's man, has 2 villagers who plough with 5 oxen; and meadow, 5 acres. Value before 1066, 3s; now 8s.

. II. Maneria In FUGELESTOU. habuerunt Rolf et Sbern. II. carucatas terre et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi Picot de comite habet. II. carucas. et XIIII. uillanos. et VII. bordarios. et II. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et VIII. salinas de. VIII. solidorum. et CC. LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. IIII. libras. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In FULSTOW Rolf and Esbiorn had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Picot has 2 ploughs from the Count and 14 villagers, 7 smallholders and 2 Freemen with 2 ploughs; and 8 salt-houses at 8s; meadow, 260 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £4. Exactions 20s.

. III. Maneria In GRENESBI. Spille. Adestan. et Lepsi. habuerunt. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi Wimundus homo comitis habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et XIII. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam et LI. acras prati. et Toruelande V. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit LXX. solidos. modo. IIII. libras Tailla. XX. solidos.

In GRAINSBY Spillir, Aethelstan and Leofsi had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Wimund , the Count's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 12 villagers, 4 smallholders and 13 Freemen who have 3 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 51 acres; turf-land, 5s 4d. Value before 1066, 70s; now £4. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In WALTHAM. habuit Radulfus stalre. VI. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi habet nunc comes Alanus. IIII. carucas. et XII. uillanos. et I. bordarium. et XVIII. sochemannos habentes. IX. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et LX. VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. libras. modo XL. V. libras. Tailla. XV. libras. Totum. XV. quarentenas longum. et IX. latum.

In WALTHAM Ralph the constable had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Now Count Alan has 4 ploughs. 12 villagers, 1 smallholder and 18 Freemen who have 9 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 68 acres. Value before 1066 £20; now £45. Exactions £15. The whole 15 furlongs long and 9 wide.
SOCA huius Manerii In Wade. XI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad XI. boues. Ibi. XII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XX. acras prati.
A jurisdiction of this manor in WAITHE; 11 bovates of land taxable. Land for 11 oxen. 12 Freemen have 1 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 20 acres. Ralph the constable had it
SOCA alia In Aschebi. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi. V. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et XX. V. acras prati. et V. acras silue minutae.
Another jurisdiction in ASHBY; 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 5 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 25 acres; underwood, 5 acres. Ralph the constable had it
In Bernulfbi SOCA. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi. XXVI. sochemanni et IX. bordarii. habentes. IX. carucas et dimidiam. et CC. acrae prati.
In BARNOLDBY, a jurisdiction, 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 26 Freemen and 9 smallholders who have 9 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 200 acres. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In FENDEBI Soca. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi XV. sochemanni et II. bordarii habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam. et XL. acras prati.
In `FENBY', a jurisdiction, 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 15 Freemen and 2 smallholders who have 3 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 40 acres. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Rauenedal et altera Rauenedale. Soca. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi XIIII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas.
In RAVENDALE and the other RAVENDALE, a jurisdiction, 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 14 Freemen have 2 ploughs. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Cadebi Soca. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi XIIII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas.
In CADEBY, a jurisdiction, 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 14 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Besebi Soca. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi habet comes Alanus. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum. et XVI. acras prati. et VI. acras siluae minutae.
In BEESBY, a jurisdiction, 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Count Alan has 1 plough. 1 Freeman. Meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 6 acres. Ralph the constable had it

Manerium In |eadem BASEBI. habuerunt Ingemundus et Oune Edric et Eculf III. carucatas et III. bouatas terrae et III. partes. unius bouate. et item terciam partem unius bouatae. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. . . . Ibi habet nunc comes. I. sochemannum et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia et XVI. acrae prati. et VI. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. XX. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos. Terram Eculf. V. bouatas et dimidiam. habebat Willelmus blundus eo die quo Ernuinus presbyter captus fuit. et ante.

Also in BEESBY Ingimundr, One, Edric and Ecgwulf had 3 carucates and 3 bovates of land and 3 parts of 1 bovate and also the third part of 1 bovate. Land for 4 ploughs. Now the Count has 1 Freeman and 8 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s. William Blunt had Ecgwulf's land, 5 1/2 bovates, on the day on which Ernwin the priest was taken, and before.
Soca In Neutone Soca. III. carucatae terre et dimidia bouata ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi XX. sochemanni et II. bordarii. habent. IIII. carucas.
In NEWTON, a jurisdiction, 3 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 20 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 4 ploughs.
. IIII. Maneria In eadem NEUTONE. habuerunt Ingemundus et III. fratres eius. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Wimundus homo comitis habet. I. carucam.
Also in NEWTON Ingimundr and his 3 brothers had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Wimund , the Count's man, has 1 plough.
Soca In Hauuardebi Soca. II. carucatae terre et III. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi XIIII. sochemanni. et I. uillanus et I. bordarius. cum. III. carucis.
Jurisdiction of Waltham: In HAWERBY, a jurisdiction, 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 14 Freemen, 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 3 ploughs. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Suinhope Soca XV. bouatae terrae et quarta pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi XVI. sochemanni habent. II. carucas.
In SWINHOPE, a jurisdiction, 15 bovates of land and the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 16 Freemen have 2 ploughs. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Gunresbi Soca. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi. VI. sochemanni et V. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. et I. molinum. VI. solidorum. et X. acras prati
In GUNNERBY, a jurisdiction, 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 6 Freemen and 5 smallholders have 4 ploughs. 1 mill, 6s; meadow, 10 acres. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Hadecliue Soca. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VII. carucas. Ibi. IX. sochemanni et IX. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. et II. molinos VIII. solidorum. et XX. acras prati.
In HATCLIFFE, a jurisdiction, 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. 9 Freemen and 9 smallholders have 4 ploughs and 2 mills, 8s; meadow, 20 acres. Ralph the constable had it

Soca In Belesbi Soca. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. Ibi XX. IIII. sochemanni et VII. bordarii habent VII. carucas. et II. molinos et dimidium. XII. solidorum. et XXX. acras prati.
In BEELSBY, a jurisdiction, 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. 24 Freemen and 7 smallholders have 7 ploughs. 2 1/2 mills, 12s; meadow, 30 acres. Ralph the constable had it

Manerium In WELLETUNE habuit Siuuard. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Landricus homo comitis habet. II. carucas. et XI. uillanos et II. sochemannos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et I. molinum. X. solidorum. et XX. acras prati. et IIII. tam partem. aecclesiae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III. libras.

In WELTON Siward had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Landric , the Count's man, has 2 ploughs and 11 villagers and 2 Freemen with 1 1/2 ploughs; and 1 mill, 10s; meadow, 20 acres; the fourth part of a church. Value before 1066 £4; now £3.

Soca In Toresbi Soca de Waltham. IX. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. XIIII. boues. Ibi XIIII. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. II. carucas. et II. salinas. II. solidorum. et XVI. acras prati.

`HAVERSTOE' Wapentake In THORESBY, a jurisdiction of Waltham, 9 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. 14 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 2 ploughs. 2 salt-houses, 2s; meadow, 16 acres. Ralph the constable had it
Soca In Brigeslai. Soca de Waltham. I. carucata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi XVII. sochemanni I. bordarius habent III. carucas. et X. acrae prati.
In BRIGSLEY, a jurisdiction of Waltham, 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 17 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 10 acres. Ralph the constable had it

Manerium In HALTUN Hundret et Stepi. habuit AElric. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Eudo homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo similiter.

BOLINGBROKE Wapentake In HALTON - a hundred - and STEEPING Alric had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Eudo , the Count's man, has 1 plough and meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now the same.
Soca In STOU habet Alanus comes dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Soca est Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam.
`WELL' Wapentake In STOW Count Alan has 1/2 carucate of land taxable. It is a jurisdiction. Land for 1/2 plough. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough.

Manerium In SPREDELINTONE habuit Cnut. II. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas et II. boues. Ibi habet comes. I. carucam in dominio. et VI. uillanos et VI. bordarios. et VI. sochemannos. habentes III. carucas et II. boues. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. X. solidos.

`ASLACOE' Wapentake In SPRIDLINGTON Cnut had 2 carucates of land and 1 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 2 oxen. The Count has 1 plough in lordship; 6 villagers, 6 smallholders and 6 Freemen who have 3 ploughs and 2 oxen and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now the same. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In HACHE. habuit Radulfus stalre. VII. carucatas et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad XII. carucas. Ibi habet Alanus comes. IIII. carucas. et XVII. uillanos. et XIIII. sochemannos. et VII. bordarios. habentes XII. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et IIII. molinos. XXX. solidorum. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XII. libras. modo XVI. libras. Tailla. IIII. libras. Ad uictum equorum. L. solidos.

LOVEDEN Wapentake HOUGH hundred In HOUGH Ralph the constable had 7 carucates and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Count Alan has 4 ploughs. 17 villagers, 14 Freemen and 7 smallholders who have 12 ploughs. A priest and a church; 4 mills, 30s; meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £12; now £16. Exactions £4. For the supplies of horses, 50s.

In Cheuelestune BEREWITA huius Manerii. XII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XVI. carucas. Ibi modo XVIII. uillani et VI. bordarii et II. sochemanni habent. VI. carucas. et CXLVI. acras prati. et CC. acrae silue minute. et Warenna Leporum. $

In GELSTON - a hundred - an outlier of this manor, 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. Now 18 villagers, 6 smallholders and 2 Freemen have 6 ploughs and meadow, 146 acres; underwood, 200 acres; a warren of hares. . Ralph the constable had it
In Carletune est. I. carucata terre ad geldum. SOCA de HACH.
In CARLTON 1 carucate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Hough. Ralph the constable had it

Manerium In BURTUNE HUNDRET. habuit Radulfus stalre XIII. carucatas terre ad geldum in dominio et V. carucatas terre ad geldum de soca. Terra ad XVIII. carucas. Ibi habet. Alanus. comes in dominio. III. carucas. et XXXVI. uillanos et IX. bordarios et XV. sochemannos et alios XI. bordarios. Simul habentes XV. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et I. molinus. XII. solidorum. et CC. acrae prati. De supradicta soca tenet Cadiou. VI. bou terre. et habet Ibi. VI. boues arantes. T. R. E. ualuit XV. libras. modo XVIII. libras. Tailla. C. solidos. Ad uictum equorum. . L. solidos.

In BROUGHTON - a hundred - Ralph the constable had 13 carucates of land taxable in lordship and 5 carucates of land taxable of the jurisdiction. Land for 18 ploughs. Count Alan has in lordship 3 ploughs and 36 villagers, 9 smallholders, 15 Freemen and another 11 smallholders who together have 15 ploughs. A priest and a church; 1 mill, 12s; meadow, 200 acres. Of the above jurisdiction Cadio <of Broughton> holds 6 bovates of land and has 6 oxen ploughing there. Value before 1066 £15; now £18. Exactions 100s. For the supplies of horses, 50s.

In FULEBEC et LEDENEHAM habuit Radulfus Stalre XXIIII. carucatas terre ad geldum Terra ad. XXIIII. carucas. Ibi habet. Alanus. comes in dominio. VI. carucas. et LXIX. uillanos et II. II bordarios et XLIV. sochemannos. Simul habentes XXVIII. carucas. Ibi. II. aecclesiae et II. presbyteri. et dimidius molinus. X. solidorum. De hac terra habent Colegrim et Derinc. V. carucatas et VI. bouatas. et ibi habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. libras. modo XXXII. libras. Tailla. VIII. libras. Ad uictum equorum. C. solidos.

In FULBECK and LEADENHAM - four hundreds - Ralph the constable had 24 carucates of land taxable {{in lordship and 15 carucates taxable of the jurisdiction}}. Land for 24 ploughs. Count Alan has in lordship 6 ploughs; 69 villagers, 4 smallholders and 44 Freemen who together have 28 ploughs. 2 churches and 2 priests; 1/2 mill, 10s. Of this land Kolgrim and Deoring have 5 carucates and 6 bovates. They have 2 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066 £30; now £32. Exactions £8. For the supplies of horses, 100s.
$ In Merestune. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Soca de Hach. Terra ad XII bouatas.
In MARSTON 1 carucate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Hough. Land for 12 oxen. Ralph the constable had it

Manerium In BENINCTUN. II. HUNDRET habuit Radulfus stalre XIIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. in dominio. et VII. carucas et VI. bouatas terre ad geldum de SOCA Ibi habet. Alanus. comes in dominio. V. carucas. et XIX. uillanos. et V. bordarios. et XX. sochemannos. Simul habentes. XII. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia et CCC. acrae prati. De hac terra tenet Herueus. . I. carucatam et III. bouatas. et habet ibi. I. carucam. T. R. E. ualuit XXVI. libras. modo XXX. II. libras. Tailla. VIII. libras. Ad uictum equorum. C. solidos. Ibi sunt. IIII. molini. reddentes. IIII. libras.

In BENNINGTON - two hundreds - Ralph the constable had 14 carucates of land taxable in lordship and 7 carucates and 6 bovates of land taxable of the jurisdiction. Count Alan has in lordship 5 ploughs; 19 villagers, 5 smallholders and 20 Freemen who together have 12 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 300 acres. Of this land Hervey holds 1 carucate and 3 bovates and has 1 plough there. Value before 1066 £26; now £32. Exactions £8. For the supplies of horses, 100s. 4 mills which pay £4.

In Foztune HUNDRET BEREWITA huius Manerii. XII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Ibi habet modo comes. II. carucas. et X. uillanos et V. bordarios et XLVI. sochemannos habentes simul. XI. carucas. et C. acras prati. Terra arabilis. ad XII. II. carucas

In FOSTON - a hundred -, an outlier of this manor, 12 carucates of land taxable {{in lordship and 7 carucates of land taxable of the jurisdiction}}. Now the Count has 2 ploughs. 10 villagers, 5 smallholders and 46 Freemen who together have 11 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres; arable land for 14 ploughs. Bennington. Ralph the constable had it

Manerium In eadem FOZTUN. habuit Turuert. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Herueus homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. solidos. modo X. solidos.
also in FOSTON Thorfridh had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Hervey, the Count's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 16s; now 10s.

Manerium In WESTBI. habuit Carle. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Colegrim homo comitis habet. I. uillanum. et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et VII. acras et dimidiam prati. et XXIX acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XII. solidos.

`BELTISLOE' Wapentake BURTON hundred In WESTBY Karli had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Kolgrim , the Count's man, has 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 1 plough; and meadow, 7 1/2 acres; underwood, 29 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 12s.

Manerium In CHERCHEBI. habuit Wider. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. boues. Ibi Godricus homo comitis habet. II. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. II. bobus arantes. et IIII. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

AVELAND Wapentake In KIRKBY Withar had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Godric , the Count's man, has 2 villagers and 1 smallholder who plough with 2 oxen; and meadow, 4 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.
In Pochinton SOCA huius Manerii dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. boues. Ibi. I. sochemannus et II. bordarii habent dimidiam carucam.
In POINTON - a hundred -, a jurisdiction of this manor, 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 Freeman and 2 smallholders have 1/2 plough. . Withar had it. Godric , the Count's man, has it

Manerium In BILINGEBURG HUNDRET habuit Carle. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Colegrim homo comitis habet. I. carucam in dominio. et. *I. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et XV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo similiter. HUNDRET.

In BILLINGBOROUGH - a hundred -, Karli had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Kolgrim , the Count's man, has 1 plough in lordship villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 15 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

Manerium In HORBELINGE. habuit Greue. IIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Stefanus homo comitis habet. II. carucas. et IX. uillanos et I. bordarium et III. es sochemannos habentes. III. carucas. et XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter.

In HORBLING - a hundred - Greifi had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Stephen, the Count's man, has 2 ploughs. 9 villagers, 1 smallholder and 3 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.

Manerium In HERIGERBI. ORBELINGE habuit Wider. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et II. boues. Ibi Godricus homo comes habet dimidiam carucam in dominio. et IIII. uillanos habentes V. boues arantes. et II. molinos X. solidorum. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XII. solidos. modo. XVI. solidos

`THREO' Wapentake In HARROWBY - HORBLING - Withar had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough and 2 oxen. Godric , the Count's man, has 1/2 plough in lordship; 4 villagers who have 5 oxen ploughing. 2 mills, 10s; meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 12s; now 16s.

Manerium In DRAITONE HUNDRET. habuit Greue VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Toli homo comitis habet. I. carucam in dominio. et IIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et X. acrae prati et dimidia salina. VIII. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit XVI. solidos. modo similiter.

In DRAYTON - a hundred - Greifi had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Toli, the Count's man, has 1 plough in lordship; 4 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres; 1/2 salt-house, 8d. Value before 1066, 16s; now the same.

In eadem Draitone habuit Wluui episcopus. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Haec fuit Sancti Benedicti de Ramesy. testimonio hominum de Wapentac. qui dicunt se nescire per quem episcopus eam tenuerit. Ibi habet comes. Alanus. II. bordarios. et VIII. acras prati. et I. salina de XVI. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit. III. solidos. modo. II. solidos.

Also in DRAYTON Bishop Wulfwy had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. It was St Benedict's of Ramsey's according to the witness of men of the Wapentake who say they do not know through whom the Bishop held it. Count Alan has 2 smallholders. Meadow, 8 acres; 1 salt-house at 16d. Value before 1066, 3s; now 2s.

Manerium In ipsa DRAITONE. habuit Radulfus stalr. VIII. carucatas terre et II. bouatas. ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. Haec terra. est Soca in ipsa uilla. Ibi habet modo. Alanus. comes. VI. uillanos et VI. sochemannos. et I. bordarium. habentes V. carucas. Ibi. IIII. salinae et dimidia. VI. solidorum. et XL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit Draitone cum omnibus |sibi adiacentibus XXX. libras. modo LXX. libras. Tailla. XX. libras.

DRAYTON hundred In DRAYTON itself Ralph the constable had 8 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. This land is a jurisdiction of the village itself. Now Count Alan has 6 villagers, 6 Freemen and 1 smallholder who have 5 ploughs. 4 1/2 salt-houses, 6s; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066 of Drayton with all that was attached to it, £30; now £70. Exactions £20.

In Donnintune. habuit Radulfus VI. bouatas terre ad geldum pro Manerio. Terra VI. bobus. Ibi sunt. IIII. uillani et III. bordarii cum dimidia caruca. et II. acrae prati. et II. e saline de XXXII. denariorum. Ualuit et ualet. XX. solidos.
In DONINGTON Ralph had 6 bovates of land taxable as a manor. Land for 6 oxen. 4 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 2 acres; 2 salt-houses at 32d. The value was and is 20s.

Manerium In Donninctune BEREWITA huius Manerii. V. carucatae terre et VI. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem carucas et boues. Ibi habet comes. Alanus. III. carucas in dominio. et XXVI. uillanos cum. V. carucis. et IX. salinas XII. solidorum. et LX acras prati.

KIRTON Wapentake In DONINGTON, an outlier of this manor, 5 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Count Alan has 3 ploughs in lordship; 26 villagers with 5 ploughs. 9 salt-houses, 12s; meadow, 60 acres. Ralph the constable had it *
In Weranghe Soca in Draitone. X. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. V. carucas. Ibi. VII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam.
`WOLMERSTY' Wapentake In WRANGLE, a jurisdiction of Drayton, 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 7 Freemen have 1 plough. Ralph the constable had it *

In Leche. SOCA Draitone. XII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. X. carucas. Ibi. XXX. II. sochemanni et XXX. uillani et XV. bordarii habent XI. carucas. et XXVI. salinas. et XXXIIII. acras prati. De hac Soca habent. II. homines comitis. II. carucatas. et ibi. II. carucas. et I. bordarium. et XV. salinas. et X. uillanos. cum I. caruca.

LEAKE hundred In LEAKE, a jurisdiction Drayton, 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. 32 Freemen, 30 villagers and 15 smallholders have 11 ploughs and 26 salt-houses; meadow, 34 acres. Of this jurisdiction two of the Count's men have 2 carucates; 2 ploughs there and 1 smallholder; 15 salt-houses; 10 villagers with 1 plough. Ralph the constable had it *

In Leuretune SOCA Draitone. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. Ibi XXV. sochemanni et XV. uillani et XXIIII. bordarii habent XII. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et LX. acrae prati. De hac Soca habent. II. homines comitis. II. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas. et Ibi habent. III. carucas arantes.

LEVERTON hundred In LEVERTON, a jurisdiction Drayton, 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 25 Freemen, 15 villagers and 24 smallholders have 12 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 60 acres. Of this jurisdiction two of the Count's men have 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates. They have 3 ploughs which plough. Ralph the constable had it *
In Toft SOCA Draitone. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi. XVII. sochemanni habent. V. carucas et dimidiam. et XX. acras prati.
FISHTOFT hundred In FISHTOFT, a jurisdiction Drayton, 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 17 Freemen have 5 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 20 acres. Ralph the constable had it *

In Schirebec HUNDRET BEREWITA Draitone. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. et In eadem IX. carucatae terre et VI. bouatae ad geldum. SOCA. in Draitone. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. Ibi. XIX. sochemanni et XIII. cim uillani habent. VIII. carucas. Ipse comes. I. carucam in dominio. Ibi. II. aecclesiae et II. presbyteri. et II. piscinae. X. solidorum. et XL. acrae prati.

In SKIRBECK - a hundred -, an outlier Drayton, 2 carucates of land taxable. Also in it 9 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. A jurisdiction of Drayton. Land for 8 ploughs. 19 Freemen and 13. The Count himself 1 plough in lordship. 2 churches and 2 priests; 2 fishponds, 10s; meadow, 40 acres. Ralph the constable had it *
In WIBERTUNE habet. X. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. est. XIII. carucis. Edelric tenuit Ualuit et ualet. XX. solidos.
In WYBERTON he has 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 13 ploughs. Aethelric held it. The value was and is 20s.

In Wibertune HUNDRET. SOCA Draitone. IX. carucatae terre et III. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi XXX. IIII. sochemanni habent. XI. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et. XII. acrae prati.

In WYBERTON - a hundred -, a jurisdiction Drayton, 9 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 12 1/2 ploughs. 34 Freemen have 11 ploughs. A church; meadow, 12 acres. Ralph the constable had it *

In Franetone BEREWITA Draitone. VII. carucatae terre et VI. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. X. carucas. Ibi habet Alanus. comes in dominio II. carucas. et XII. sochemannos et XVI. uillanos et II. bordarios habentes. VIII. carucas. Ibi XV. salinae de XX. solidis. et C. acrae prati.

FRAMPTON hundred In FRAMPTON, an outlier Drayton, 7 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. Count Alan has in lordship 2 ploughs; 12 Freemen, 16 villagers and 2 smallholders who have 8 ploughs. 15 salt-houses at 20s; meadow, 100 acres. Ralph the constable had it *

In Cherchetune SOCA Draitone. X. carucatae terrae. et I. bouata et tercia pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi. Alanus. comes habet XXX. sochemannos et XVI. bordarios habentes. X. carucas. et II. salinae. XVI. denariorum. Ibi aecclesia. et LX. acrae prati.

In KIRTON - a hundred -, a jurisdiction Drayton, 10 carucates of land and 1 bovate and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Count Alan has 30 Freemen and 16 smallholders who have 10 ploughs. 2 salt-houses, 16d. A church; meadow, 60 acres. Ralph the constable had it *
Soca In Reschintone HUNDRET SOCA. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi. XX. . IX. sochemanni. et XII. bordarii. habent. VI. carucas. et XXX. acrae prati.
In `RISKENTON' - a hundred -, a jurisdiction, 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 29 Freemen and 12 smallholders have 6 ploughs. Meadow, 30 acres. Ralph the constable had it *
Soca In Alfgare HUNDRET. SOCA Draitone. X. carucatae terre et V. bouatae. ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. carucas. Ibi XL. II. sochemanni habent. VI. carucas. et V. acras prati.
In ALGARKIRK - a hundred -, a jurisdiction Drayton, 10 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. 42 Freemen have 6 ploughs and meadow, 5 acres. Ralph the constable had it *
Soca In RICHE SOCA Draitone. X. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. X. carucas. Ibi XXX. V. sochemanni et XXVIII. bordarii. habent. VII. carucas. et XII. acrae prati.
hundred In , a jurisdiction Drayton, 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. 35 Freemen and 28 smallholders have 7 ploughs. Meadow, 12 acres. Ralph the constable had it *

Soca In BICHERE SOCA Draitone. V. carucatae terrae et VII. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas et boues. Ibi XIX. sochemanni et XVIII. uillani et I. bordarius habentes. V. carucas. Ibi aecclesia |et presbyter et XX. salinae XXX. solidorum. et XX. acrae prati.

BICKER hundred In BICKER, a jurisdiction Drayton, 5 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 19 Freemen, 18 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 5 ploughs. A church and a priest; 20 salt-houses, 30s; meadow, 20 acres. Ralph the constable had it *

Soca In Gosebertechirche. SOCA Draitone. III. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas et II. boues. De hac terra habet Ulbert. VI. bouatas. Ibi. I. caruca. et II. uillani et X. bordarii. cum. I. caruca. et VI. acras prati. et II. saline XII. denariorum. Aliae. II. carucate et IIII. bouatae sunt in Soca Draitone. Sex bouatas tenet Adestan. et socam habuit Radulfus comes. et he. VI. ualuerunt. T. R. E. IIII. solidos. modo XL. solidos.

In GOSBERTON - a hundred -, a jurisdiction Drayton, 3 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 2 oxen. Of this land Wulfbert has 6 bovates; 1 plough there. 2 villagers and 10 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 6 acres; 2 salt-houses, 12d. The other 2 carucates and 4 bovates are in the jurisdiction Drayton. Aethelstan held 6 bovates and Earl Ralph had the jurisdiction. Value before 1066 of these 6 , 4s; now 40s.
Soca In Tric. SOCA Draitone. dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad IIII. boues. Ibi. I. bordarius. et LX. acrae prati.
In , a jurisdiction Drayton, 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 smallholder. Meadow, 60 acres. had it *
Soca In Burch SOCA Draitone. I. carucata et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad XII. boues. Ibi. III. sochemanni et II. uillani et III. bordarii. habent. I. carucam et dimidiam.
In BURGH, a jurisdiction Drayton, 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 3 Freemen, 2 villagers and 3 smallholders have 1 1/2 ploughs. had it *
Soca In Herdetorp SOCA. Draitone. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. bouem. Ibi. II. uillani. arant. II. bobus. et XX. acrae prati.
In ADDLETHORPE, a jurisdiction Drayton, 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. 2 villagers plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 20 acres. had it *

Manerium In eadem HARDETORP. habuit Elnod. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Eudo homo comes habet. III. sochemannos. cum dimidia caruca. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. II. solidos et VIII. denarios.
Also in ADDLETHORPE Alnoth had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Eudo , the Count's man, has 3 Freemen with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 2s 8d.
Soca In Calnodesbi SOCA huius Manerii. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. boues. Ibi. II. uillani habent dimidiam carucam. et C. acrae maresc.

In CANDLESBY - a hundred -, a jurisdiction of this manor, 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. 2 villagers have 1/2 plough. Marsh, 100 acres. [Jurisdiction of Addlethorpe. Alnoth had it. Eudo , the Count's man, has it
Soca In Hacberdingham. SOCA alia. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. boues. Ibi Eudo homo comitis. IIII. sochemannos et II. uillanos habentes. I. carucam. et XXX. acras prati.
In HAGWORTHINGHAM, another jurisdiction, 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 9 oxen. Eudo , the Count's man, 4 Freemen and 2 villagers who have 1 plough and meadow, 30 acres.

Berewita In Holobech et Copolade. habuit Algarus comes. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. BEREWITA in Flec. Alanus comes habet. sed ministri regis clamant ad opus regis. Ibi sunt. III. uillani. cum. III. bobus in caruca.

ELLOE Wapentake In HOLBEACH and WHAPLODE Earl Algar had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. An outlier of Fleet. Count Alan has it, but the King's officers claim it for the King's use. 3 villagers with 3 oxen in a plough.

Soca Ibideem habuit Algarus comes XIII. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra IX. carucarum et II. boum. SOCA in Gadenay. De hac terra habet Alanus comes. V. carucas. Landricus tenet de eo. Ibi habet. II. carucas. et XXIX. uillanos cum. V. carucis. et quater XX. acras prati. Ualet. VIII. libras Haec deratiocinata. est ad opus regis.

There also Earl Algar had 13 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 9 ploughs and 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Gedney. Of this land Count Alan has 5 carucates. Landric holds from him. He has 2 ploughs. 29 villagers with 5 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres. Value £8. It is adjudged for the King's use.

Manerium In HACBERDINGHAM. habuit Holchetel dimidiam carucatan terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi habet Eudo homo comes XVI. acras prati. De hac terra sunt XXX. acrae soca in Bizebi. Precium eius in aliis Maneriis.

HILL Wapentake In HAGWORTHINGHAM Holmketill had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Eudo , the Count's man, has meadow, 16 acres. Of this land 30 acres are a jurisdiction of Beesby. Its valuation is in other manors.

Manerium In MALTEBI. Brocles habuit. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad VI. boues. Ibi Eudo sub comite habet. III. sochemannos. et IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo similiter.

`CALCEWATH' Wapentake In MALTBY Broklauss had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Eudo has under the Count 3 Freemen and 5 villagers with 1 plough; and meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now the same.
In Strobi SOCA in Lecheburne. II. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. V. boues. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam. et X. acras prati.
In STRUBBY, a jurisdiction of Legbourne, 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough and meadow, 10 acres.

Manerium In CHIRCHETUNE. habuit Edric. X. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et V. boues. Ibi Toli homo comitis. habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillani habent. I. carucam. et VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos.

KIRTON Wapentake In KIRTON Edric had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough and 5 oxen. Toli, the Count's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers have 1 plough. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

Manerium In STEUENINGE. habuit Aldene. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Goisfridus tornai homo comitis habet II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos habentes dimidiam carucam. et VI. salinas. VIII. solidorum. et L. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo similiter.

BICKER hundred In STEYNING Healfdene had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Geoffrey Tournai, the Count's man, has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers who have 1/2 plough. 6 salt-houses, 8s; meadow, 50 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

Manerium In QUEDHAUERINGE. habuit Turchil. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. cum saca et soca. praeter. II. bouatas. super quas comes habet socam. Hanc terram tenet Guert homo comitis. sed homines de Wapentac nesciunt per quem. Ibi. III. uillani. et VI. acrae prati. et II. saline. XII. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos.

DONINGTON hundred In QUADRING Thorkil had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough with full jurisdiction except for 2 bovates over which the Count has jurisdiction. Gyrth <of Quadring>, the Count's man, holds this land, but the men of the Wapentake do not know through whom. 3 villagers. Meadow, 6 acres; 2 salt-houses, 12d. Value before 1066, 10s; now the same.

Manerium In STOCHE. habuit Radulfus Stalr. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Colegrim homo comitis habet. II. carucas ad aulam. et VII. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. II. carucis. et II. molinos. VII. solidorum. et IIII. denariorum. et XXX. acrae prati. et CXL acrae silue pastilis. et VI. perticae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. LX. solidos.

`WINNIBRIGGS' Wapentake In STOKE Ralph the constable had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Kolgrim , the Count's man, has 2 ploughs at the hall; 7 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs. 2 mills, 7s 4d; meadow, 30 acres; pasturable woodland, 140 acres and 6 perches. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60s.

Manerium In NORTHNICHE. HUNDRET habuit Siuuard. IIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. K Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Colegrim homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et II. Sortebrant calumniatur uillanos arantes. II. bobus. et I. molinum. V. solidorum. et XX. VI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In NORTH HYKEHAM - a hundred - Siward had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Kolgrim , the Count's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers who plough with 2 oxen. 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 26 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same. Swartbrand claims it.

Manerium In MUNDEBI. habuit Arnui. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Eudo homo comitis habet. III. carucas. et XVI. uillani et VIII. bordarii habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et CC. acrae prati.
MUMBY hundred In MUMBY Ernwin had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Eudo , the Count's man, has 3 ploughs. 16 villagers and 8 smallholders have 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 200 acres.
In Clachesbi BEREWITA huius Manerii. habet. Alanus. comes XV. acras terrae.
In CLAXBY , an outlier of this manor, Count Alan has 15 acres of land. had it
In Telagestorp. SOCA |In Mundebi. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. III. boues. Ibi. V. sochemanni et. I. bordarius. habent dimidiam carucam. et XXX. acrae prati.

`CALCEWATH' Wapentake In THEDDLETHORPE, a jurisdiction of Mumby, 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. 5 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 1/2 plough. Meadow, 30 acres. had it. Eudo , the Count's man, has it

. VI. Maneria In MUNDEBI. Ormchetel Siuert Elric Suen Suaue Holmchethel. habuerunt VIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad XI. carucas et V. boues. Ibi Eudo homo comitis habet in dominio. III. carucas. et XL. uillanos. et IIII. sochemannos et XII. bordarios. habentes. V. carucas et VI. boues arantes. et CCC. X. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit hi. VII. manerii X. libras. Modo. XVI. libras.

In MUMBY, Ormketill, Sifrith, Alric, Swein , Svavi and Holmketill had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 11 ploughs and 5 oxen. Eudo , the Count's man, has in lordship 3 ploughs; 40 villagers, 4 Freemen and 12 smallholders who have 5 ploughs and 6 oxen ploughing. Meadow, 310 acres. Value before 1066 of these 7 manors £10; now £16.
Soca In SUDtone. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. II. uillani habent. XX. acras prati. Soca in Combreuorde.
HUTTOFT hundred In SUTTON 1 bovate of land taxable. 2 villagers have meadow, 20 acres. A jurisdiction of Cumberworth. Land of Earl Hugh

Manerium In GRANDHAM. habuit Haroldus comes. II. carucatas terre sine geldo. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Duae bouate in SOCA. de hac terra. Ibi habet Hugo comes. IIII. carucas in dominio. et XLVI. uillanos. et VIII. bordarios. et I. sochemannum. habentes. VIII. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et I. molinum VIII. solidorum. et CCC. acras prati. Una leua et I. quarentena longum. et I. leua latum. T. R. E. ualuit XL. libras et dimidiam markam auri. modo. LX. libras. Tailla. LXX. libras.

In GREETHAM Earl Harold had 2 carucates of land without tax. Land for 6 ploughs. 2 bovates of this land in a jurisdiction. Earl Hugh has 4 ploughs in lordship; 46 villagers, 8 smallholders and 1 Freeman who have 8 ploughs. A priest and a church; 1 mill, 8s; meadow, 300 acres. 1 league and 1 furlong long and 1 league wide. Value before 1066 £40 and 1/2 mark of gold; now £60. Exactions £70.

In Lecheburne SOCA. X. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad XII. carucas. Ibi. XXXI. sochemanni et XVIII. uillani et XI. VIII bordarii. habentes. XVI. carucas. et XL. acras prati. et quater XX. acras siluae pastilis per loca.
In LEGBOURNE, a jurisdiction, 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 31 Freemen, 18 villagers and 19.

In Suabi et Elgelo et Toresbi et Clactorp et Totele. SOCA. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XVIII. carucas. Ibi XLVI. sochemanni et XX. II. uillani. et XXXVIII. bordarii habentes. XXX. I. carucas. et VI. molini. de. IIII. libris. et XVI. denariis. et XX. acrae prati. et sexcentas acras siluae pastilis.

In SWABY, BELLEAU, THORESBY, CLAYTHORPE and TOTHILL, a jurisdiction, 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 18 ploughs. 46 Freemen, 22 villagers and 38 smallholders who have 31 ploughs. 6 mills at £4 16d; meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 600 acres.

In Widerne et Abi et Hage et Calesbi. SOCA. VII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad VI. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi. XVII. sochemanni. et X. uillani habent. VI. carucas et dimidiam. et XVI. acras prati. et quater XX. et XII. acrae siluae pastilis et minutae.

In WITHERN, ABY, HAUGH and CALCEBY, a jurisdiction, 7 carucates of land } taxable. Land for 6 1/2 ploughs. 17 Freemen and 10 villagers have 6 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland and underwood, 92 acres.

In Sutrebi et Dalbi et Dristorp. SOCA. XV. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad XVI. carucas. Ibi XLVII. sochemanni. et VIII. uillani. et XI. bordarii habentes. XI. carucas. In dalbi habet comes. I. carucam in dominio. et II. ecclesias. et quater XX. acras prati.

In SUTTERBY, DALBY and DEXTHORPE, a jurisdiction, 15 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. 47 Freemen, 8 villagers and 11 smallholders who have 11 ploughs. In Dalby the Earl has 1 plough in lordship and 2 churches; meadow, 80 acres.

In Fortintone. et Aschebi. et Bretoft. et Langene. SOCA. XVIII. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad XVIII. carucas. Ibi nunc XLIX. sochemanni. et XXVI. uillani. et XX. II. bordarii. habent. XVIII. carucas. Ibi. III. aecclesiae. et sexcentas et XX. acras prati.

In FORDINGTON, ASHBY, BRATOFT and , a jurisdiction, 18 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 18 ploughs. Now 49 Freemen, 26 villagers and 22 smallholders have 18 ploughs. 3 churches; meadow, 620 acres.

In Wenflet et Haghe et Calesbi. et Tedlagestorp. et Malbertorp. SOCA. XX. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. Ibi quater XX. et III. sochemanni. et XXXIII. uillani. et XXXV. bordarii. habent. XVIII. carucas et dimidiam. et decies. C. acras prati. et XX. salinas X. solidorum. et quater XX. acras siluae minutae.

In WAINFLEET, HAUGH, CALCEBY, THEDDLETHORPE and MABLETHORPE, a jurisdiction, 20 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 83 Freemen, 33 villagers and 35 smallholders have 18 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 1000 acres; 20 salt-houses, 10s; underwood, 80 acres.

In Hotot et Toruluesbi et Sutune et Druistorp et Billesbi et Marchesbi. SOCA. XVIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad XX. carucas. Ibi. LXIX. sochemanni. et XIX. uillani. et XXIII. bordarii. habent XVI. carucas. et septingentas et quater XX. acras prati.

In HUTTOFT, THURLBY, SUTTON, TRUSTHORPE, BILSBY and MARKBY, a jurisdiction, 18 carucates of land taxable. Land for 20 ploughs. 69 Freemen, 19 villagers and 23 smallholders have 16 ploughs and meadow, 780 acres.

In Langetune et Hacberdincham et Salmundebi et Tedforde et Brincle. et Winzebi et Clachesbi. SOCA. XXIX. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XXX. III. carucas. Ibi. CL. sochemanni. et XX. bordarii. et XII. uillani. habentes XXX. IX. carucas. et IX. molinos. de. XX. solidis. et CCC. et L. acras prati. Omnis haec terra uel SOCA. pertinet ad Grandham. Simul ad geldum. CXXXI. carucatae. Terra ad. CXL. IIII. carucas. Sochemanni. CCC LXX. VI. Uillani. CXLVIII. Bordarii. CXLVIII. habentes. CLVI. carucas.

HILL Wapentake In LANGTON, HAGWORTHINGHAM, SALMONBY, TETFORD, BRINKHILL, WINCEBY and CLAXBY , a jurisdiction, 29 carucates of land taxable. Land for 33 ploughs. 150 Freemen, 20 smallholders and 12 villagers who have 39 ploughs. 9 mills at 20s; meadow, 350 acres. All this land or jurisdiction belongs to Greetham. Altogether 131 carucates taxable. Land for 144 ploughs. 376 Freemen, 148 villagers and 168 smallholders who have 156 ploughs.

In HALTONE. habuit Haroldus comes. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. De hac terra. sunt. IIII. carucatae in Soca. Nunc habet Comes Hugo et Willelmus filius Nigelli de eo. In dominio. IIII. carucae. et III. uillani et IX. bordarii. et XIIII. sochemanni. habentes. II. carucas. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XIX. libras. modo X. libras. Tailla. V. libras.

In HALTON Earl Harold had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Of this land 4 carucates are in a jurisdiction. Now Earl Hugh has it, and William son of Nigel from him. In lordship 4 ploughs; 3 villagers, 9 smallholders and 14 Freemen who have 2 ploughs and meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066 £19; now £10. Exactions £5.
In Walecote BEREWITA huius Manerii. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. boues.
In WALCOT, an outlier of this manor, 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. Halton. William son of Nigel holds it. Earl Harold had it
In Wintrintune SOCA. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad IIII. carucas. Ibi XVI. sochemanni et VII. bordarii habent. II. carucas et dimidiam
In WINTERTON, a jurisdiction, 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 16 Freemen and 7 smallholders have 2 1/2 ploughs. Halton. William son of Nigel holds it. Earl Harold had it
In Colebi SOCA. XV. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. III. sochemanni. I. boue arant. et IX. acrae prati.
In COLEBY, a jurisdiction, 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 3 Freemen plough with 1 ox. Meadow, 9 acres. Halton. William son of Nigel holds it. Earl Harold had it
In Hedebi SOCA. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi nunc. IX. sochemanni et I. bordarius habent. II. carucas. et quater XX. ti acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae.

In `HAIRBY', a jurisdiction, 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now 9 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 2 ploughs and meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Halton. William son of Nigel holds it. Earl Harold had it

In Tedulfbi. SOCA. X. carucatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad IX carucas. Ibi nunc. XVI. sochemanni et XV. bordarii. habent. IIII. carucas et dimidiam. et L. acras prati. et LXX acras silue minutae.

In THEALBY, a jurisdiction, 10 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Now 16 Freemen and 15 smallholders have 4 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 50 acres; underwood, 70 acres. Halton. William son of Nigel holds it. Earl Harold had it
In Cropesbi et Cunesbi SOCA. VI. carucatae terre et VI. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas et VI. boues. Ibi nunc XXV. sochemanni et X. bordarii. habent. VI. carucas. et quater XX. acras prati.

In CROSBY and CONESBY, a jurisdiction, 6 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 6 ploughs and 6 oxen. Now 25 Freemen and 10 smallholders have 6 ploughs and meadow, 80 acres. Halton. William son of Nigel holds it. Earl Harold had it

Manerium In BERNODEBI. habuit Harold comes. VI. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Tres carucatae sunt in SOCA. Ibi Willelmus homo comitis. Hugonis. habet. III. carucas in dominio. et IIII. uillanos. et LX. sochemannos et X. bordario. habentes. VII. carucas et dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit. XIIII. libras. modo. XX. libras. Tailla. X. libras.

NORTH RIDING In BARNETBY Earl Harold had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 3 carucates are in a jurisdiction. William , Earl H's man, has 3 ploughs in lordship; 4 villagers, 60 Freemen and 10 smallholders who have 7 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066 £14; now £20. Exactions £10.

In Bertone. II. bouatae et Bechebi. I. carucata et Wirichebi. II. carucatae. et Sumertebi dimidia carucata. et Haburne. I. bouata. et II. partes unius bouatae. ad geldum. Terra ad VII. carucas. Ibi XXX. VI. sochemanni. et I. uillanus. habentes. IIII. carucas et dimidiam. et XL acras prati. Haec SOCA pertinet ad Bernodebi.

In BARTON 2 bovates, BIGBY 1 carucate, WORLABY 2 carucates, SOMERBY 1/2 carucate, and HABROUGH 1 bovate and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. 36 Freemen and 1 villager who have 4 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 40 acres. This jurisdiction belongs to Barnetby. holds it. Earl Harold had it

Item in Lobingeham IIII. carucatae et. I. bouata. et Irebi. I. carucata et dimidia et Ribi IIII carucatae et dimidia Simul ad geldum. X. carucatae terrae. et I. bouata. Terra ad XX. carucas et II. bouatas. SOCA in Bernodebi. Ibi. L. II. sochemanni et XI. uillani. et VII. bordarii. habentes XI. carucas. et CCCXV. acras prati.

Also in `LOPINGHEHAM' 4 carucates and 1 bovate, IRBY 1 1/2 carucates, and RIBY 4 1/2 carucates. Altogether 10 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 20 ploughs and 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Barnetby. 52 Freemen, 11 villagers and 7 smallholders who have 11 ploughs and meadow, 315 acres. holds it. Earl Harold had it
In Ribi habet Erneis homo comitis. II. carucas in dominio. Illam Socam tenet ipse de comite. Alias tenent Willelmus Radulfus et Azelinus homines comitis.
In RIBY Erneis , the Earl's man, has 2 ploughs in lordship. He holds that jurisdiction himself from the Earl. William , Ralph and Ascelin, the Earl's men, hold the others. . Earl Harold had it

In FUGELESTOU. habuit Godric. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad XI. boues. Ibi Rozelinus homo comes habet. I. carucam. et VII. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XL. solidos.

In FULSTOW Godric had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 11 oxen. Roscelin <of Fulstow>, the Earl's man, has 1 plough. 7 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40s.

Manerium In HAMINGEBI. habuit Lambecarl. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Baldricus homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. et II. bordarios. et VII. sochemannos habentes. II. carucas. et dimidium molinum VII. solidorum. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XXV. solidos.

In HEMINGBY Lambakarl had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Baldric , the Earl's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers, 2 smallholders and 7 Freemen who have 2 ploughs. 1/2 mill, 7s; meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 25s.
In Buchehale et Horsitone SOCA huius Manerii. IX. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et II. boues. Ibi. X. sochemanni. et III. bordarii habent. II. carucas. et LX. II. acras prati. et XX.

In BUCKNALL and HORSINGTON, a jurisdiction of this manor, 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough and 2 oxen. 10 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 2 ploughs and meadow, 62 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 20 acres. has it. Lambakarl had it

Manerium In STAINTUNE. habuit Godric. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Dimidia carucata sochemannorum. Ibi Osbernus homo comitis habet. II. carucas. et V. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. et IIII. sochemannos. cum. II. carucis. et I. molinum. XII. denariorum. et quater XX. acras prati. et CXL. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo similiter.
In STAINTON Godric had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 1/2 carucate the Freemen's. Osbern
In Reresbi BEREWITA huius Manerii. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad /VI. boues.
In REASBY, an outlier of this manor, 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. . Osbern

Manerium In BOLINTONE. habuit Lambecarl. III. bouatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi Colsuan homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. et III. bordarios. habentes dimidiam carucam. et X. acras prati. et CLX acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In BULLINGTON Lambakarl had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Kolsveinn , the Earl's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 3 smallholders who have 1/2 plough and meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 160 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.
In Cuningesbi. Inland in Tedintone. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. I. uillanus arat. II. bobus. et I. piscaria. XXX. denariorum. et II. acrae prati. et XX. acras siluae.
In CONINGSBY, of Toynton, 1 bovate of land taxable. 1 villager ploughs with 2 oxen. 1 fishery, 30d; meadow, 2 acres; woodland, 20 acres.

Manerium In TADEWELLE. habuit Harold comes. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad XX. carucas. Duae carucate in SOCA. Ibi habet Hugo comes VI. carucas in dominio. et XII. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. et XX. IIII. sochemannos. habentes. III. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molinus XVI. denariorum. et VIII. acrae prati. et quater. XX. acrae siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. libras. modo XX. libras. Tailla. C. solidos.

In TATHWELL Earl Harold had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 20 ploughs. 2 carucates in a jurisdiction. Earl Hugh has 6 ploughs in lordship; 12 villagers, 4 smallholders and 24 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 16d; meadow, 8 acres; pasturable woodland, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £15; now £20. Exactions 100s.

In Halintun et Chelesturne et Radresbi et Maltebi. SOCA huius. Manerii. IX. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. carucas |et dimidiam. Ibi XLI. sochemanni et XX. uillani habent. VI. carucas. et X. acras prati.

In HALLINGTON, KELSTERN, RAITHBY and MALTBY, a jurisdiction of this manor, 9 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 9 1/2 ploughs. 41 Freemen and 20 villagers have 6 ploughs and meadow, 10 acres.

Manerium In ROCHELAND. habuit Godric. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad III. carucas. Ibi Brisard homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos. et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. Ibi aecclesia et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et XXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. XL. solidos.

In RUCKLAND Godric had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Brisard, the Earl's man, has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. A church; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 40s.

Manerium In FARFORDE. habuit Lambecarl. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. In Soca. I. bouata. Ibi Baldricus homo comes habet $ I. carucam. et X. uillanos et II. sochemannos et VI. bordarios cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et I. molinus. III. solidorum. et VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras modo similiter.

In FARFORTH Lambakarl had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1 bovate. Baldric , the Earl's man, has 1 plough. 10 villagers, 2 Freemen and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now the same.

. III. Maneria In WELLE. habuerunt Allef. Edric et Godric. II. carucatas terre una bouata minus ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. In Soca dimidia bouata. Ibi Osbernus homo comitis habet III. carucas. et VIII. uillanos. et II. sochemannos. cum. I. caruca. et I. salina. et XXXIIII. acras prati. et V. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. IIII. libras. Taila. V. solidos.
In MAIDENWELL Aleifr, Edric and Godric had 2 carucates of land, less 1 bovate, taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1/2 bovate. Osbern
$ In Oxecumbe. SOCA in Farforde. I. carucata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi XII. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. II. carucas. et LX. acras prati.

In OXCOMBE, a jurisdiction of Farforth, 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 12 Freemen and 1 villager have 2 ploughs and meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. has it. Lambakarl had it

Manerium In WADINTUNE. habuit Haroldus comes. XXIIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. In SOCA. IX. carucatae. et II. bouatae. Ibi habet comes Hugo. IIII. carucas in dominio. et XV. uillanos. et IX. bordarios. et XXIIII. sochemannos. habentes XI. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. molini de XI. solidorum. et CCLXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. C. libras. IIII. libris minus. modo XX. libras. Tailla. X. libras.

In WADDINGTON Earl Harold had 24 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. In a jurisdiction 9 carucates of land and 2 bovates. Earl Hugh has 4 ploughs in lordship; 15 villagers, 9 smallholders and 24 Freemen who have 11 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 mills at 11s; meadow, 270 acres. Value before 1066 £100 less £4; now £20. Exactions £10.

In Medricesham BEREWITA huius Manerii. VIII. carucatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas et II. boues. Ibi habet comes. II. carucas. et X. uillanos et VI. bordarios. cum. II. carucas. et I. miolinum. VIII. solidorum. et CXC nonaginta. acras prati. et CXX. acras siluae minutae.

In METHERINGHAM, an outlier of this manor, 8 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs and 2 oxen. The Earl has 2 ploughs. 10 villagers and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 8s; meadow, 190 acres; underwood, 120 acres.
In Timbrelund. BEREWITA. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. boues. Ibi. II. bordarii habent dimidiam carucam. et L. acras siluae minutae
In TIMBERLAND, an outlier, 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 2 smallholders have 1/2 plough and underwood, 50 acres.

In Hermodestune SOCA de Wadintone. XX. carucatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. Ibi XXXVIII. sochemanni et XI. bordarii habent. X. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. piscaria reddens LXXmilliaV. anguillas.

In HARMSTON, a jurisdiction of Waddington, 20 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 38 Freemen and 11 smallholders have 10 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 fishery pays 75000 eels.

Manerium In EXEWELLE. habuit Haroldus comes. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi Gozelinus homo comitis. Hugonis. habet. II. carucas. et XIII. uillanos. et II. bordarios. habentes. V. carucas. et XVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. VI. libras.

In ASHWELL Earl Harold had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Jocelyn , Earl H's man, has 2 ploughs. 13 villagers and 2 smallholders who have 5 ploughs. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now £6.

Manerium In FULLOBI. habuit Harold comes. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Baldricus homo comitis habet. I. carucam. et IX. sochemannos. et V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios habentes. I. carucam et dimidiam. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter.

In FULLETBY Earl Harold had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Baldric , the Earl's man, has 1 plough. 9 Freemen, 5 villagers and 4 smallholders who have 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.
Presbyter eiusdem uillae habet de rege. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. et XII. acras /prati.
A priest of this village has from the King 2 bovates of land taxable and meadow, 12 acres.

Manerium In ORMESBI. habuit Godric. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad IIII. carucas. Ibi Hugo homo comitis habet. II. carucas. et VII. uillanos. et I. bordarium. et XI. sochemannos habentes. II. carucas. et I. molinum XXX. II. denariorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LXX. solidos. modo. IIII. libras.

In ORMSBY Godric had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Hugh , the Earl's man, has 2 ploughs. 7 villagers, 1 smallholder and 11 Freemen who have 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 32d; meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 70s; now £4.

Manerium In CHETELESBI. habuit Godric. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi Hugo homo comes habet. III. carucas. et VI. uillanos. et I. bordarium. et XI. sochemannos habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. et I. molendinum. XXX. II. denariorum. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. C. solidos.
