In KETSBY Godric had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Hugh , the Earl's man, has 3 ploughs. 6 villagers, 1 smallholder and 11 Freemen who have 2 1/2 ploughs. 1 mill, 32d; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 100s.
In Walmesgar SOCA huius Manerii. una carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XIIII. boues.
In WALMSGATE, a jurisdiction of this manor, 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. has it. Godric had it

. III. Maneria In HECHAM. habuerunt Elueua Godric et Edric. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. Ibi monachi Sancti Seueri habent III. carucas. et XXIX. uillanos. et III. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. et XLVI. acras prati. et siluae per loca pastilis. I. leuam longae. et III. quarentenas latae. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. VIII. libras.

In HAUGHAM Aelfeva, Godric and Edric had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. The monks of Saint-Sever have 3 ploughs. 29 villagers and 3 smallholders with 6 ploughs. Meadow, 46 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 1 league long and 3 furlongs wide. Value before 1066 £6; now £8.

Manerium In NEUBERIE. habuit Godric. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad III. carucas. Ibi Osbernus homo comitis habet. II. carucas. et XIII. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et CXX. acras prati. et quingentas acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. C. solidos.
In NEWBALL Godric had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Osbern

. II. Maneria In TATENAI habuerunt Turgisle et Suen. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. In SOCA. I. carucata et II. bouatae. et III. cia pars II. bouatarum. de hac terra. Nunc Iuo taillebosc habet ibi in dominio VI. carucas. et XXV. uillanos. et VII. bordarios. et XII. sochemannos. habentes VI. carucas. Ibi. I. molinus. XVI. solidorum. et XIII. saline. XII. solidorum. et CXL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras. modo. XX. libras. Tailla XX. libras.

In TETNEY Thorgisl and Swein had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1 carucate, 2 bovates and the third part of 2 bovates of this land. Now Ivo Tallboys has in lordship there 6 ploughs; 25 villagers, 7 smallholders and 12 Freemen who have 6 ploughs. 1 mill, 16s; 13 salt-houses, 12s; meadow, 140 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £20. Exactions £20.
In Holtone SOCA huius Manerii. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. Ualet. XL. solidos.
In HOLTON, a jurisdiction of this manor, 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 14 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Value 40s.

Manerium IBIDEM habuit Esbern. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Hermerus homo Iuonis habet. V. uillanos et II. bordarios. arantes. V. bobus. Ibi sedes molini. et XIIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo. XL. solidos.

There also Esbiorn had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Hermer <of Holton>, Ivo's man, has 5 villagers and 2 smallholders who plough with 5 oxen. A mill site; meadow, 14 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.
In Humbrestone. SOCA de Tatenai. VI. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. carucas. Ibi. LXVII. sochemanni. habent XVIII. carucas. et CC.
In HUMBERSTON, a jurisdiction of Tetney, 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 67 Freemen have 18 ploughs and meadow, 200 acres.

Manerium In CLEIA. habuit Grimboldus. II. bouatas terre et II. partes unius bouatae. ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi Wimundus homo Iuonis habet dimidiam carucam. et XVI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo X. solidos.
In CLEE Grimbald had 2 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Wimund , Ivo's man, has 1/2 plough and meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.

Manerium In TERNESCROU. habuit Grinchel. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Ibi Wimundus habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. cum uno boue. et XII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit et modo. XX. solidos.
In `THRUNSCOE' Grimkel had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Wimund has 1 plough. 5 villagers with 1 ox. Meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
In Wifilingham. habet Iuo dimidiam carucatam terre. de Soca Eriz.
`WALSHCROFT' Wapentake In WILLINGHAM Ivo has 1/2 carucate of land of the jurisdiction of Erik .
Manerium In CLACHESBI et NORMANESBI. habuit Goduinus. X. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas et dimidiam.
In CLAXBY and NORMANBY Godwin had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs.

. III. Maneria Ibidem habuerunt Godric Siuuard Ulchel et Goduinus XII. bouatas terre ad geldum. et I. toftam cum saca et soca. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Hugo homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et XLVIII. sochemannos. et IIII. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. Ibi. II. aecclesiae. et C. acrae prati. et XL. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. IIII. libras. Tailla. IIII. libras.

There also Godric, Siward, Ulfkil and Godwin had 12 bovates of land taxable and 1 plot with full jurisdiction. Land for 3 ploughs. Hugh, Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 48 Freemen and 4 smallholders with 6 ploughs. 2 churches; meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £4. Exactions £4.

In Osgotebi et Tauelebi. Inland. II. bouatae et Soca. I. bouata huius Manerii. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et I. uillanus arant VI. bobus. et I. molinus ibi. III. solidorum. et III. acrae prati.

In OSGODBY and TEALBY , 2 bovates, and a jurisdiction, 1 bovate, of this manor: 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. 4 Freemen and 1 villager plough with 6 oxen. 1 mill there, 3s; meadow, 3 acres. . Hugh, Ivo's man, has it

Manerium In CLACHESBI. habuit Aluuinus. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Goisfridus homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos non arantes. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. et XIII. acrae prati. et VI. acrae siluae minute. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. solidos. modo. XIII. solidos.

In CLAXBY Alwin had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Geoffrey, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers who do not plough. 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 13 acres; underwood, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 15s; now 13s.

Manerium In TORGREBI. habuit Grimbaldus. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. V. boues. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. et III. es partes unius molini. V. solidorum. et IX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XXX. solidos.
In THORGANBY Grimbald had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers. 3 parts of 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s.

Manerium In WALESBI et Otesbi. habuit Grimboldus. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Goisfridus homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et XX. uillanos. cum. II. carucis. et I. molinum. XVI. denariorum. et XX. acras prati. et V. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. /X. solidos.

In WALESBY and OTBY Grimbald had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Geoffrey, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 20 villagers with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 16d; meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 5 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In TORESWE. habuit Grimboldus. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. boues. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. I. uillanum. I. boue arantem. et XV. acrae prati et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo IX. solidos et IIII.
In THORESWAY Grimbald had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 villager who ploughs with 1 ox. Meadow, 15 1/2 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 9s 4d.

Manerium In CROSBI. habuit Siuuard. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. In SOCA. V. acrae terrae. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VI. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et III. molinos VIII. solidorum. et XVIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo XL. solidos.

In CROXBY Siward had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 5 acres of land. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. 3 mills, 8s; meadow, 18 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40s.

Manerium In BLIBURG. habuit Gamel. V. bouatas et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. XI. boues. Ibi Nigellus homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et VII. uillanos et V. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et I. molinum. XII. denariorum. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXVI. solidos. et VIII. denarios. modo. L. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In BLYBOROUGH Gamal had 5 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 11 oxen. Nigel, Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 7 villagers and 5 smallholders with 1 plough. 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 26s 8d; now 50s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In GLANTHAM. habuit Turgisle. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. In SOCA. II. carucatae terre et II. bouatae de hac terra. Ibi Rainfridus homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et II. uillanos et XIII. bordarios et XIX. sochemannos cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et quater XX. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In GLENTHAM Thorgisl had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates of this land. Rainfrid, Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 2 villagers, 13 smallholders and 19 Freemen with 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 90 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In NORMANEBI. habuit Code. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. In SOCA. I. carucata et dimidia. Ibi habet Iuo modo IIII. carucas. et XV. uillanos et XIIII. sochemannos habentes. V. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. molini. V. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et LXVII. acrae prati et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. C. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In NORMANBY Koddi had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1 1/2 carucates. Now Ivo has 4 ploughs. 15 villagers and 14 Freemen who have 5 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 mills, 5s 4d; meadow, 67 1/2 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 100s. Exactions 20s.
In Esnetrebi SOCA huius Manerii. I. bouata terrae. Ibi. III. sochemanni. VI. bobus arantes. et XL. acrae prati.
In SNITTERBY, a jurisdiction of this manor, 1 bovate of land. 3 Freemen who plough with 6 oxen. Meadow, 40 acres. . Koddi had it

Manerium In OUNEBI. habuit Code. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi Petrus homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.
In OWMBY Koddi had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Peter, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20s.
Ibidem habet Iuo. I. bouatam terrae de soca. Remigii. episcopi.
There also Ivo has 1 bovate of land of the jurisdiction of Bishop R.
Manerium In SUMMERTEBI. VII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VII. boues. Ibi habet Iuo. I. bordarium et XX. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos.
In SOMERBY 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. Ivo has 1 smallholder and pasturable woodland, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 5s.

Manerium In TONESTALE. habuit. Gamel. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas et dimidiam. In SOCA. X. bouatae istius terrae. Ibi habet Iuo. II. carucas in dominio. et II. uillanos et XI. sochemannos et I. bordarium cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et VII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. IIII. libras.

In DUNSTALL Gamal had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 10 bovates of this land. Ivo has 2 ploughs in lordship; 2 villagers, 11 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 7 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £4.

Manerium In MORTUNE. habuit Gamel. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad VI. boues. Ibi habet Iuo. IIII. uillanos. II. bobus arantes. et X. acras prati. Morae et minuta silua. dimidiam leuam longae. et dimidiam latae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In MORTON Gamal had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Ivo has 4 villagers who plough with 2 oxen; and meadow, 10 acres; moors and underwood 1/2 league long and 1/2 wide. Value before 1066, 4s; now 10s.

Manerium In SCOTONE. habuit Gamel. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas et dimidiam. In SOCA. dimidia carucata de hac terra. Ibi Gozelinus homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et XV. uillanos. et III. bordarios. et VI. sochemannos. cum. II. carucis. et XXX. I. acrae prati. et XVIII. acrae siluae minutae. et sedes molini. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. L. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In SCOTTON Gamal had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1/2 carucate of this land. Jocelyn , Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 15 villagers, 3 smallholders and 6 Freemen with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 31 acres; underwood, 18 acres; a mill site. Value before 1066, 30s; now 50s. Exactions 10s.

. II. Maneria In HIBOLDESTOU habuit Gamel. I. carucatam terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi habet Iuo. IIII. carucas. et XVIII. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et I. molinum. V. solidorum. et CXI. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. C. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

`MANLEY' Wapentake In HIBALDSTOW Gamal had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Ivo has 4 ploughs. 18 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 111 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now 100s. Exactions 20s.
Manerium In GAMELSTORP Hilboldestou. habuit Ulgar. II. bouatas terrae. Hanc habet in cambio pro una bouata. et II. piscariis de Crul. Ibi. I. caruca. T. R. E. et modo. X. solidos.
In GAINSTHORPE - HIBALDSTOW - Wulfgar had 2 bovates of land. He has this in exchange for 1 bovate and 2 fisheries of Crowle. 1 plough. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
Berewita In STRAITONE et Scallebi. Inland. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Ibi unus homo Iuonis. I. carucam et I. uillanum. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos. et IIII. denarios. modo XX. solidos.
In STURTON and SCAWBY, , 3 bovates of land taxable. One of Ivo's men has 1 plough. 1 villager. Value before 1066, 5s 4d; now 20s.

Manerium In ALCHEBARGE. habuit Willelmus malet. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. In SOCA. III. carucatae de hac terra. Ibi habet Iuo. III. carucas. et VIII. uillanos. et XX. sochemannos. cum. V. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. IIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In ALKBOROUGH William Malet had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 3 carucates of this land. Ivo has 3 ploughs. 8 villagers and 20 Freemen with 5 ploughs. Value before 1066, 100s; now £4. Exactions 40s.

. II. Maneria In SAXEBI. habuerunt Siuuardus et Turgisle. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VII. carucas |et dimidiam. Ibi Rogerius homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos. et II. sochemannos cum. III. carucis. et III. piscarias. III. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. L. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In SAXBY Siward and Thorgisl had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 1/2 ploughs. Roger, Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers and 2 Freemen with 3 ploughs. 3 fisheries, 3s. Value before 1066 £4; now 50s. Exactions 10s.

. III. Maneria In CHELUINGEHOU. Briford. Siuuardus et Turgis. II. carucatas terrae et VII. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. In SOCA. I. carucata et I. bouata et II. toftae. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. III. carucas. et IIII. uillanos et XIX. sochemannos cum. III. carucis. et dimidium molinum. III. solidorum. et CCXII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. libras. modo. III. libras.

In KILLINGHOLME Brictfrith <of Killingholme>, Siward and Thorgisl 2 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1 carucate, 1 bovate and 2 plots. Odo, Ivo's man, has 3 ploughs. 4 villagers and 19 Freemen with 3 ploughs. 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 212 acres. Value before 1066 £5; now £3. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In LINBERGE. habuit Aluuin. IX. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. carucas. In SOCA. una bouata de hac terra. Ibi Nigellus homo Iuonis habet. III. carucas. et I. uillanum. T. R. E. ualuit. X. L. solidos. modo LX. solidos.
In LIMBER Alwin had 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1 bovate of this land. Nigel, Ivo's man, has 3 ploughs. 1 villager. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60s.

Manerium In NEUHUSE. habuit Aluuinus. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. X. boues. Ibi Rogerius homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXII. solidos.
In NEWSHAM Alwin had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Roger, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 6 villagers with 1 plough. 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 22s; now 40s.

Manerium In IRIBI. habuit Seuuard. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et X bordarios arantes. III. bobus. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos et VIII. denarios. modo. XX. solidos.
In IRBY Siward had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 10 smallholders who plough with 3 oxen. Value before 1066, 10s 8d; now 20s.
In HOCTUNE habet Iuo. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. in Escambio. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi. est. I. caruca. Odo habet. et ualet XV. solidos. $
In HOLTON Ivo has 1 carucate of land taxable, in exchange. Land for 2 ploughs. 1 plough; Odo has it. Value 15s.
In HABURNE habuit Turgis. III. bouatas et terciam partem bouatae ad geldum. SOCA in Haltune. Wasta. est.
In HABROUGH Thorgisl had 3 bovates and the third part of a bovate taxable. A jurisdiction of Halton. It is waste.

Manerium In BROCHELESBI. habuit Aluuinus. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Una bouata in SOCA. Ibi Nigellus homo Iuonis habet $ II. sochemannos cum. II. bobus arantes. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. solidos. modo. III. solidos.
In BROCKLESBY Alwin had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 bovate in a jurisdiction. Nigel, Ivo's man, has 2 Freemen who plough with 2 oxen. Value before 1066, 16s; now 3s.
$ SOCA In Wade. II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. boues. Ibi. IIII. uillani et I.
Jurisdiction: In WAITHE 2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 4 villagers and 1 Freeman have 1/2 plough and meadow, 5 acres. . Siward had it. Odo has it *

Manerium In CABURNE. habuit Unlof. I. carucatam terrae et III. bouatas ad geldum. Terra ad. III. carucas. Ibi Rogerius homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et III. uillanos et V. bordarios et XI. sochemannos cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In CABOURNE Wulfnoth had 1 carucate of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Roger, Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 3 villagers, 5 smallholders and 11 Freemen with 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60s. Exactions 20s.
Manerium In CUCUALT. habuit Aluuinus. I. bouatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi Gozelinus homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. T. R. E. ualuit. XX.
In CUXWOLD Alwin had 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Jocelyn , Ivo's man, has 1 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16s.

Manerium In REBURNE. habuit Gamel. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam bouatam ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidium bouem. Ibi Petrus homo Iuonis habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et I. sochemannum et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et XXIIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXI. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In REDBOURNE Gamal had 1 carucate of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 1 plough and 1/2 ox. Peter, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers, 1 Freeman and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 24 acres. Value before 1066, 21s; now 30s. Exactions 10s.
Manerium Ibidem habuit Aldene. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Ibi habet Iuo. I. uillanum /cum. I. boue. et VIII. acrae prati. Ualet. V. solidos.
There also Healfdene had 3 bovates of land taxable. Ivo has 1 villager with 1 ox. Meadow, 8 acres. Value 5s.

Manerium In WESTLEDEBI. habuit Haroldus. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. XIIII. boues. Ibi habet Odo homo Iuonis. dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos et II. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos.
In WESTLABY Harold had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16s.

Manerium In LOBINGEHAM habuit Aluuinus. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. XII. boues. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. I. bordarium. cum. I. boue arantem. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XII. solidos.
In `LOPINGHEHAM' Alwin had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 smallholder who ploughs with 1 ox; and meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 12s.

Manerium In CHELEBI. habuit Aluuin. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IIII. boues. Ibi habet Nigel homo Iuonis dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium. uno boue arantes. Ibi sedes molini. et XXVII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.

In KEELBY Alwin had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Nigel, Ivo's man, has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder who plough with 1 ox. A mill site; meadow, 27 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20s.

Manerium In BELTESFORD. habuit. . . Stori. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. VIII. carucas. De hac terra. II. carucatae in soca. Ibi habet Iuo V. carucas iN dominio. et IX. uillanos. et XV. bordarios. et XLV. sochemannos. habentes. IX. carucas. Ibi. II. molini de. XVIII. solidorum et VIII. denariorum. et CCC. LX. acras prati. et III. acrae siluae minute. Una leua longa. et I. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. libras. modo XXXIII. libras. Tailla XXVII. libras.

`HAVERSTOE' Wapentake In BELCHFORD Stori <of Bolingbroke> had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Of this land 2 carucates in a jurisdiction. Ivo has 5 ploughs in lordship; 9 villagers, 15 smallholders and 45 Freemen who have 9 ploughs. 2 mills at 18s 8d; meadow, 360 acres; underwood, 3 acres. 1 league long and 1 wide. Value before 1066 £15; now £33. Exactions £27.

In Colchesbi. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XVI. sochemanni et II. uillani. habent. VI. carucas. et I. molinus. IIII. solidorum. et presbyter et aecclesia. et CXX. acrae prati.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In GOULCEBY 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 16 Freemen and 2 villagers have 6 ploughs. 1 mill, 4s; a priest and a church; meadow, 120 acres.
In Hamingebi. III. carucatae. ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XX. II. sochemanni et VII. uillani et VI. bordarii. habent. VII. carucas. et CXX. acrae prati.
In HEMINGBY 3 carucates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 22 Freemen, 7 villagers and 6 smallholders have 7 ploughs. Meadow, 120 acres.
In Scamelesbi. VI. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi habet Iuo. I. carucam. et XXVII. sochemanni. et XI. uillani et III. bordarii habent. V. carucas. et CC. XL. acrae prati.
In SCAMBLESBY 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Ivo has 1 plough. 27 Freemen, 11 villagers and 3 smallholders have 5 ploughs. Meadow, 240 acres.
In Calcheuuelle. I. carucata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem. Ibi. XII. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. II. carucas. et LX. acras prati.
In CAWKWELL 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as much. 12 Freemen and 1 villager have 2 ploughs and meadow, 60 acres.

In Duninctune. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Iuo. III. carucas. et XXVIII. sochemanni. et VI. bordarii. habent. VI. carucas. et II. molini. XVII. solidorum et. IIII. denariorum. et CC. XL. acrae prati.
In DONINGTON 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Ivo has 3 ploughs. 28 Freemen and 6 smallholders have 6 ploughs. 2 mills, 17s 4d; meadow, 240 acres.

In Stangehou. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Iuo. II. carucas. et XXIII. sochemanni. et V. uillani. habent. IIII. carucas. et CXX. acrae prati. et XX. acrae siluae minutae.
In STENIGOT 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Ivo has 2 ploughs. 23 Freemen and 5 villagers have 4 ploughs. Meadow, 120 acres; underwood, 20 acres.
In Estrebi. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. IX. sochemanni et II. uillani et VII. bordarii habentes. III. carucas. et CXX. acras prati.
In ASTERBY 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 9 Freemen, 2 villagers and 7 smallholders who have 3 ploughs and meadow, 120 acres.

In duobus mentinghes. VII. carucatae terre ad geldum. et V. bouatae. et V. pars bouatae ad geldum. Terra arabilis duplex. Ibi habet Iuo. II. carucas in dominio. et XXVII. sochemannos et X. uillanos et XX. bordarios habentes. IX. carucas. et CC. LX. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae pastilis. et decies. C. et X. acrae siluae minutae.

In the two MINTING 7 carucates of land taxable and 5 bovates and the fifth part of a bovate taxable. Twice as much arable land. Ivo has 2 ploughs in lordship; 27 Freemen, 10 villagers and 20 smallholders who have 9 ploughs. Meadow, 260 acres; pasturable woodland, 100 acres; underwood, 1010 acres.

In Stigesuuald. II. carucatae terre et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. et II. boum. Ibi. X. sochemanni et III. uillani et IIII. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et XL. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis.
In STIXWOULD 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. 10 Freemen, 3 villagers and 4 smallholders have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres; pasturable woodland, 80 acres.
In Horsintone. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. Ibi. IIII. uillani et IIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et L. acrae prati. et XXV.
In HORSINGTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 4 villagers and 4 Freemen have 1 plough. Meadow, 50 acres; underwood, 25 acres.

In Burgrede et Turlai. I. carucata terrae et II. Ies bouatae. et tercia pars bouatae ad geldum. Terra arabilis ad tantundem. Ibi. IX. sochemanni r habent. III. carucas. et CLXXV. acrae prati. et CLXXX. acrae siluae pastilis. et quingentae acrae siluae minutae.

In `BURRETH' and `THORLEY' 1 carucate of land and 3 bovates and the third part of a bovate taxable. Arable land for as much. 9 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 175 acres; pasturable woodland, 180 acres; underwood, 500 acres.

Manerium In BOLINTONE. habuit Lambe. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum. Ibi habet Odo homo Iuonis. I. carucam. et XIII. uillanos. et I. uillanum et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et V. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae minuae. T. R. E. ualuit XVI. solidos. modo XX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In BULLINGTON Lambi had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 13 villagers, 1 villager and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 5 acres; underwood, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 16s; now 20s. Exactions 10s.

. II. Maneria In BENINGURDE habuit Siuuard et Turgot. III. carucatas terrae |et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad. VI. carucas. De hac terra. dimidia carucata in soca. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis habet. III. carucas. et XI. uillanos et X. bordarios. et XVIII. sochemannos habentes VI. carucas. et CXL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. V. libras. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In BENNIWORTH Siward and Thorgot had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Of this land 1/2 carucate in a jurisdiction. Odo, Ivo's man, has 3 ploughs. 11 villagers, 10 smallholders and 18 Freemen who have 6 ploughs. Meadow, 140 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now £5. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In CHINETORP. habuit Bertor. II. bouatas et dimidiam et tercia pars dimidiae bouatae ad geldum. Terra arabilis duplex. Ibi habet Odo. II. uillanos. arantes. II. bobus. et V. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo similiter.

In KINGTHORPE Bergthorr had 2 1/2 bovates and the third part of 1/2 bovate taxable. Twice as much arable land. Odo has 2 villagers who plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 5 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now the same.
In Strubi. II. e bouatae ad geldum.
In STRUBBY 2 bovates taxable.

Manerium In LUDESFORDE. habuit Turold. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Ibi habet Odo. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et I. molendinum XII. denariorum. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos.
In LUDFORD Thorald had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Odo has 1 plough. 8 villagers with 1 plough. 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30s.

Manerium In ELLINGETONE habuit Gamel. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. II. carucas. Ibi Walterius homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et IIII. uillanos. et VI. sochemannos et III. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et I. molinus. VIII. solidorum. et XXX. acrae prati. et XXX. acrae siluae minutae. et aecclesiam. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX. solidos.

In EDLINGTON Gamal had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Walter, Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 4 villagers, 6 Freemen and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. 1 mill, 8s; meadow, 30 acres; underwood, 30 acres; a church. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60s.

. II. Maneria In WIDUN. habuit Aluuin. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Wimundus homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et IIII. uillanos et IIII. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In WYHAM Alwin had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Wimund , Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 4 villagers and 4 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In ORMESBI. habuit Aluuin. II. carucatas terre et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Wimundus homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos et II. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et XVI. acrae prati. et VIII. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo XL. solidos.

In ORMSBY Alwin had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Wimund , Ivo's man, has 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen and 2 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 40s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In BOLINBROC. habuit Stori. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. In SOCA. I. carucata de hac terra. Ibi habet Iuo modo. II. carucas. et XII. uillanos et VIII. bordarios. et XII. sochemannos. cum. III. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et mercatum nouum. et III. molini. X. solidorum. et LXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. libras. modo. XL. libras. Tailla. quater. XX. libras. cum omnibus adiacentibus.

In BOLINGBROKE Stori <of Bolingbroke> had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. In a jurisdiction 1 carucate of this land. Now Ivo has 2 ploughs. 12 villagers, 8 smallholders and 12 Freemen with 3 ploughs. A church; a new market; 3 mills, 10s; meadow, 70 acres. Value before 1066 £30; now £40. Exactions £80, with all that is attached.
In Harebi. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi. XXX. III. sochemanni et V. uillani et V. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. et C. acrae prati.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In HAREBY 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 33 Freemen, 5 villagers and 5 smallholders have 4 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Melingesbi. VI. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi XXX. VI. sochemanni. et VIII. uillani et IIII. bordarii habent. VI. carucas. et XL. acrae prati.
In MININGSBY 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 36 Freemen, 8 villagers and 4 smallholders have 6 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Asgerebi. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XX. sochemanni et II. uillani. habent. III. carucas. et quater XX. acras prati.
In ASGARBY 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 20 Freemen and 2 villagers have 3 ploughs and meadow, 80 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Endrebi. V. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi. XXIIII. sochemanni et V. bordarii. habent. V. carucas. et C. acras prati.
In ENDERBY 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 24 Freemen and 5 smallholders have 5 ploughs and meadow, 100 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Radebi. III. carucatae terre et VII. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad tantundem carucas et boues. Ibi XVIII. uillani et III. uillani et V. bordarii. habent. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et molinus. XII. solidorum. et XL. acrae prati.
In RAITHBY 3 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 18 villagers, 3 villagers and 5 smallholders have 4 ploughs. A church; a mill, 12s; meadow, 40 acres.

In Hundelbi. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi. XXV. sochemanni et XII. uillani habent. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et molinus. V. solidorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. In hac terra habuit Tor. IIII. acras terre quae pertinent ad Spilesbi Manerium episcopi dunelmensis.

In HUNDLEBY 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 25 Freemen and 12 villagers have 4 ploughs. A church; a mill, 5s; meadow, 80 acres. On this land Thor had 4 acres of land which belong to the Bishop of Durham's manor, Spilsby. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Haltun et Stepi. IX. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IX. carucarum. Ibi habet Iuo. I. carucam. et LVIII. sochemannos et IIII. uillanos cum. IX. carucis. Ibi ecclesia et IIII. molini. XXIIII. solidorum. et CXX. acrae prati

In HALTON and STEEPING 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Ivo has 1 plough. 58 Freemen and 4 villagers with 9 ploughs. A church; 4 mills, 24s; meadow, 120 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Torp. II. carucatae terre et V. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem. carucas et boues. Ibi XVIII. sochemanni et VIII. uillani habent. III. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et CC. LXXX.

In THORPE 2 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 18 Freemen and 8 villagers have 3 ploughs. A church; meadow, 280 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Totintun. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi XIIII. uillani et XIII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et XXX. acrae prati. et V. acrae et dimidiam silue minutae.
In TOYNTON 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 14 villagers and 13 Freemen have 3 ploughs. A church; meadow, 30 acres; underwood, 5 1/2 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Stichenai. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XXXIII. sochemanni et V. uillani habent. III. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et XL. acrae prati.
In STICKNEY 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 33 Freemen and 5 villagers have 3 ploughs. A church; meadow, 40 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Sibolci. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi. LI. sochemanni et XVI. uillani et X. bordarii. habent. VI. carucas. Ipse Iuo habet ibi. I. carucam. et aecclesia. et C. XX. acrae prati.

In SIBSEY 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 51 Freemen, 16 villagers and 10 smallholders have 6 ploughs. Ivo himself has 1 plough there. A church; meadow, 120 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Stichesforde. II. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad totidem. carucas Ibi XXVIII. sochemanni et II. uillani habent. III. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et XXX. acrae prati.
In STICKFORD 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 28 Freemen and 2 villagers have 3 ploughs. A church; meadow, 30 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Estrecale. IIII. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. Ibi habet Iuo. I. carucam. et VII. sochemannos et XII. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis et dimidia. Ibi dimidia aecclesia. et XX. acrae prati. Ibi habuit Summerled Manerium et ualebat XX. solidos. T. R. E. modo similiter.

In EAST KEAL 4 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Ivo has 1 plough. 7 Freemen, 12 villagers and 4 smallholders with 4 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 church; meadow, 20 acres. Sumarlithi had a manor there; value before 1066, 20s; now the same. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Westrecale. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi. XXX. V. sochemanni et VIII. uillani et VI. bordarii habent. VI. carucas. et C. acras prati.
In WEST KEAL 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 35 Freemen, 8 villagers and 6 smallholders have 6 ploughs and meadow, 100 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Totintun. V. carucatae et II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi. XL. sochemanni et VII. uillani et III. bordarii habent. VI. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et LXX. acrae prati. et X. acrae siluae minutae.

In TOYNTON 5 carucates and 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 40 Freemen, 7 villagers and 3 smallholders have 6 ploughs. A church; meadow, 70 acres; underwood, 10 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it
In Hagenebi. II. carucatae terre et V. bouatae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas et boues. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni et IIII. uillani et II. bordarii. habent. III. carucas.

In HAGNABY 2 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 14 Freemen, 4 villagers and 2 smallholders have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 73 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it

In Cherchebi et Resuesbi. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi. L. IIII. sochemanni et XIIII. uillani habent XII. carucas. Ibi habet Iuo. I. carucam. et II. aecclesias. et CLXXX. acras prati. Totum Manerium cum omnibus |sibi adiacentibus. VI. leuas longum. et VI. latum.

In KIRKBY and REVESBY 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 54 Freemen and 14 villagers have 12 ploughs. Ivo has 1 plough and 2 churches; meadow, 180 acres. Bolingbroke. Stori <of Bolingbroke> had it The whole manor with all that is attached to it 6 leagues long and 6 wide.

Manerium In ARCHINTONE. habuit Esbern. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra VIII. carucarum. De hac terra. II. carucatae et dimidia in Soca. Ibi Goisfridus homo Iuonis habet. II. carucas. et XIX. sochemannos et V. uillanos cum. III. carucis. Ibi dimidia aecclesia. et dimidia sedes molini. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo. VI. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In Grimesbi. Soca. I. carucata terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Goisfridus. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et VI. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et X.
In GRIMSBY, a jurisdiction, 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Geoffrey has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 6 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres.

Berewita et Soca In Lodeby. VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam et dimidiam. Inland VI. bouatae in Hundebi. et Soca. I. bouata in Clachesbi. Ibi. VIII. uillani et III. bordarii. habent. I. carucam. et XV. acras prati.
?B&S. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. , 6 bovates, of Hanby and a jurisdiction, 1 bovate, of Claxby . 8 villagers and 3 smallholders have 1 plough and meadow, 15 acres.

XX. denariorum. et III. piscinas. VIII. denariorum. et et III. acras prati. et dimidiam. et XV. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In BOURNE . Land for 3 oxen. Odo, Ivo's man, has 3 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1/2 plough; and the sixth part of a mill, 20d; 3 fishponds, 8d; meadow, 3 1/2 acres; underwood, 15 acres. Value before 1066, 6s; now 10s.

In BREZBI et Sapretone. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra ad. I. carucam. SOCA in Bergebi. Ibi. II. uillani et I. bordarius. habent. I. carucam. et XVI. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae pastilis. et V. acras siluae minutae.

In BRACEBY and SAPPERTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Barrowby. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder have 1 plough and meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland, 30 acres; underwood, 5 acres.

In Hundintone. IX. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra ad. IX. carucas. SOCA in Bergebi. Ibi habet Iuo. II. carucas. et XVI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et X. sochemannos. habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et sedes molini. et CV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. V. libras. Tailla XX. solidos.

In HONINGTON 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Barrowby. Ivo has 2 ploughs. 16 villagers, 4 smallholders and 10 Freemen who have 3 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; a mill site; meadow, 105 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now £5. Exactions 20s.
In Barchestone. X. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. SOCA in Hundndune. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et I. sochemannus et I. uillanus et III. bordarii. cum. I. caruca. et XIII. acrae prati.
In BARKSTON 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. A jurisdiction of Honington. 1 plough in lordship; 1 Freeman, 1 villager and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 13 acres.
In Sidestan. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Soca Hundintone. Wasta. est.
In SYSTON 2 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction Honington. It is waste.

I. carucam. et X. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et XV. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos.

In KINGTHORPE Bergthorr and Thorulf had 7 1/2 bovates and the third part of 1/2 bovate taxable. Twice as much arable land. Odo, Ivo's man, has 1 plough. 10 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 15 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 40s.

Manerium In Wiuelestorp. habuerunt Bernac et Bole. II. . II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. De hac terra. II. carucatae. in SOCA. Ibi Odo homo Iuonis. In BURTON and BASSINGTHORPE he had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. A

In HELPRINGHAM 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of Wilsthorpe. 3 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 1 acre.

Manerium In SPALLINGE. habuit Algar comes. IX. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra ad totidem carucas. Ibi habet Iuo. IIII. carucas in dominio. et XL. uillanos. et XXX. III. bordarios. habentes. In SPALDING Earl Algar had 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Ivo has 4 ploughs in lordship; 40 villagers and 33 smallholders who have 13 ploughs. A market, 40s; 6 fisheries, 30s; from salt-houses, 20s; a wood of alders, 8s. Value before 1066 £23 2s 8d; now £30. Exactions £30.

In Tite. III. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. BEREWITA in Spallinge. Ibi. IX. uillani. et I. bordarius habent. III. carucas. Ibi habet Iuo. II. carucas in dominio. et aecclesiam
In TYDD 3 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. An outlier of Spalding. 9 villagers and 1 smallholder have 3 ploughs. Ivo has 2 ploughs in lordship and a church.
In Picebech SOCA. X. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. Ibi. XX. II. sochemanni. et et XVI. uillani et XII. bordarii. habent. IX. carucas. et. IIII. piscariae. Imille. et D. anguilarum.
In PINCHBECK, a jurisdiction, 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. 22 Freemen, 16 villagers and 12 smallholders have 9 ploughs. 4 fisheries, 1500 eels.
In Westune et Multune. SOCA. X. carucatae terre et I. bouata ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi. XX. VI. sochemanni et XXX. I. uillani et XX. bordarii. habent. XX. carucas.
In WESTON and MOULTON, a jurisdiction, 10 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 26 Freemen, 31 villagers and 20 smallholders have 20 ploughs.

In Waletone et Bodebi. II. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum. SOCA in Hunbia. Ibi. VII. sochemanni et. ** uillani et V. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. et I. molinus. II. solidorum. W*nd habet.

In WELTON and BOOTHBY 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Hanby. 7 Freemen, villagers and 5 smallholders have 4 ploughs. 1 mill, 2s. Wnd has it. Land of William of Warenne

Manerium In CARLETUNE. habuit Haroldus comes. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi Aldelin homo Willelmi de Warena habet. III. carucas in dominio. et XXI. sochemannos de. II. carucatis huius terre. et XI. uillanos et VI. bordarios. cum. V. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et L. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. X. libras.

In CARLTON Earl Harold had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Aldelin, William of Warenne's man, has 3 ploughs in lordship; 21 Freemen with 2 carucates of this land; 11 villagers and 6 smallholders with 5 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 50 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now £10.

Berewita et Soca In Beningtone. II. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Inland X. bouatae et Soca. I. carucata eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et III. sochemanni et I. bordarius habent. I. carucam. et XX. acras prati.

?B&S. Land for 3 ploughs. , 10 bovates, and a jurisdiction, 1 carucate, also of this manor. 1 plough in lordship. 3 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 1 plough and meadow, 20 acres. . Earl Harold had it. Aldelin, William of Warenne's man, has it Land of Roger of Poitou

In RIBY Stenkil <of Riby> had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Ernwin , Roger of Poitou's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 5 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now the same. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In SUALUN. habuerunt Stanchil et Ernuin. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IabusI carucis. Ibi Wimundus homo Rogerii habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos et III. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In SWALLOW Stenkil <of Riby> and Ernwin had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Wimund , Roger's man, has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers and 3 Freemen with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.
k Manerium In RASE. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. boum. Ibi Mainardus homo Rogerii habet. IIII. uillanos. cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo XX. II.
In RASEN 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. Mainard, Roger's man, has 4 villagers with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 10s; now 22s.

In KELSEY Ernwin had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Roger, Roger of Poitou's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 4 villagers, 6 smallholders and 20 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. Value before 1066, 100s; now 60.
In TORENTUN habuit Grimbold. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Rogerius pictauenis. I. carucam. et I. uillanum. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. V.
In THORNTON Grimbald had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Roger of Poitou has 1 plough. 1 villager. Value before 1066, 10s; now 5.
K Ibidem habet Rogerius. XI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XIIII. boum. et CCC. LX. IIII. acras prati.
There also Roger has 11 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Meadow, 364 acres. . Grimbald had it *

In HOLTON Ernwin had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Roger, Roger of Poitou's man, has 1 plough. 4 Freemen with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 5 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

K Manerium In DRESBI. habuit Ernui. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. haec terra iacet in aecclesia de Wingeham. Ibi. II. bordarii arant. II. bobus. Ibi LXX. VI. acrae prati. Rogerius pictauensis habet. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo X. solidos.

In OWERSBY Ernwin had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. This land lies in the church of Winghale. 2 smallholders plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 76 acres. Roger of Poitou has it. Value before 1066, 30s; now 10s.
