In HAINTON Klak and Siundi had 1 carucate and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Albert , Roger's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers who plough with 3 oxen. Meadow, 54 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 60s.
$ In Barcuurde et Sutrei. Inland. II. bouatae et Soca. III. bouatae huius Manerii ad geldum. Ibi. VI. sochemanni et II. uillani habent. II. carucas. Ibi. I. piscaria. et XVI. acrae prati.

In BARKWITH and SOUTHREY , 2 bovates, and a jurisdiction, 3 bovates, of this manor taxable. 6 Freemen and 2 villagers have 2 ploughs. 1 fishery; meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland, 20 acres. [Jurisdiction and of Hainton. Albert has it. Klak and Siundi had it

Manerium In BECHELINGE. habuit Alric. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra IIII. boum. Ibi. III. uillani et IIII. bordarii. arant. III. bobus. Ibi. III. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.
In BECKERING Alric had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 3 villagers and 4 smallholders plough with 3 oxen. Meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20s.
In Terintone SOCA. V. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Ibi. III. sochemanni et III. uillani. et I. bordarius. habent. I. carucam. et I. bouem arantes.
In TORRINGTON, a jurisdiction, 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. 3 Freemen, 3 villagers and 1 smallholder have 1 plough and 1 ox ploughing and meadow, 8 acres.

Manerium In SUARDESFORDE. habuit Ulchil. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra IIII. boum. Nunc Mainardus et Turaldus habent de Rogerio. et Wasta. est. Ibi. XVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos.
WEST RIDING In SNARFORD Ulfkil had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Now Mainard and Turold have them from Roger. It is waste. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 10s.

. III. Maneria In TORP. habuit. Sperri. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. et Frane et Alnod. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Rogerius pictauensis IIII. uillanos et VIII. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas. Ipse. V. boues arantes. et XXIIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. LX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In NORTHORPE Sperri had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. And Frani and Alnoth 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Roger of Poitou has 4 villagers and 8 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. He himself 5 oxen ploughing and meadow, 24 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 60s. Exactions 10s.
In HACKTHORN 3 bovates taxable. A jurisdiction of Snarford.

In Tune-c IN WARTON. I. carucata et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Inland et Soca. Ibi. VI. sochemanni et IIII. uillani et I. bordarius. habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XX. acras prati. Siluae pastilis. I. leuam. et dimidiam. latae.

In `THONOCK' - in WHARTON - 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. and a jurisdiction. 6 Freemen, 4 villagers and 1 smallholder have 1 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 1 league long and 1/2 wide.

In Tonestele. I. carucata terre et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Inland. IIII. bouatae. et Soca. VI. bouatae. Ibi. I. uillanus et I. sochemannus cum dimidia caruca. Iuo habet. II. bouatas. et reddit socam.
In DUNSTALL 1 carucate of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 12 oxen. , 4 bovates, and a jurisdiction, 6 bovates. 1 villager and 1 Freeman with 1/2 plough. Ivo has 2 bovates and pays jurisdiction.
# In altero Torp. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Inland in Torp superiori Manerio. Rogerius pictauensis nil habet ibi.
In the other `THORPE' 2 bovates of land taxable. of the above manor, Northorpe. Roger of Poitou has nothing there.
# In Ioletorp. dimidia carucata ad geldum. Soca.
In YAWTHORPE 1/2 carucate taxable. A jurisdiction.

Manerium In TORP. habuit Godric. I. carucatam terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Rogerius homo Rogerii pictauensis habet. II. carucas. et I. uillanum. et VI. bordarios. II. obus bobus arantes. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.

In NORTHORPE Godric had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Roger, Roger of Poitou's man, has 2 ploughs. 1 villager and 6 smallholders who plough with 2 oxen. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

K Manerium In LASTONE habuit Suuen. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Blancardus homo Rogerii pictauensis habet. I. carucam. et III. uillani. III. bus bobus arantes. et dimidius molinus. XII. denariorum. et dimidia piscaria. II. solidorum. et XV. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In LAUGHTON Swein had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Blancard, Roger of Poitou's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers who plough with 3 oxen. 1/2 mill, 12d; 1/2 fishery, 2s; meadow, 15 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20s.
In Scotone. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. SOCA de Lastone.
In SCOTTON 2 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Laughton.

Manerium In eadem LASTONE. habuit Leduinus. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi. V. sochemanni habent. VI. boues arantes. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.
Also in LAUGHTON Leodwin had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 5 Freemen have 6 oxen ploughing and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 10s.
# In Blitone. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Soca. huius Manerii
In BLYTON 2 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of this manor.

Manerium In STANTONE. habuit Gamel. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi Rogerius homo Rogerii habet dimidiam carucatam. et VI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XVI acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.
In `STAINTON' Gamal had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Roger, Roger's man, has 1/2 plough. 6 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.

Manerium In ELESHAM. habuit Willelmus. IX. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. et dimidiae. Ibi Ernui homo Rogerii habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et I. bordarium. arantes. II. obus bobus. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo XX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In ELSHAM William had 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Ernwin , Roger's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 1 smallholder who plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 20s. Exactions 10s.
In Catenai Inland huius Manerii. V. bouatae terrae et III. es parTes. I. bouatae ad geldum. Ibi. V. uillani habent. I. carucam.
In CADNEY, of this manor, 5 bovates of land and 3 parts of 1 bovate taxable. 5 villagers have 1 plough. had it. Ernwin , Roger's man, has it
$ In Blasebi. sunt. II. bouatae. de silua quae iacet in Haintun.
In BLEASBY 2 bovates of woodland which lies in Hainton. has it. Klak and Siundi had it
In Sisse SOCA in Haintune. II. carucatae terrae et dimidia. et dimidia bouata ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XXX. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. et CCCXX. acras prati.
In SIXHILLS, a jurisdiction of Hainton, 2 1/2 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 30 Freemen have 3 ploughs and meadow, 320 acres. has it. Klak and Siundi had it
Manerium In ALDULUEBI. habuit Grinchil. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Blancardus homo Rogerii pictauensis habet dimidiam carucam. et V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios.
In AUDLEBY Grimkel had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Blancard, Roger of Poitou's man, has 1/2 plough. 5 villagers and 4 smallholders.

. II. Maneria In CATEBI. habuerunt Godric et Siuuard. IIII. bouatas et dimidiam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. caruae. Ibi habet Rogerius modo dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos et I. sochemannum cum. I. caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo similiter.

In ` CADEBY' Godric and Siward had 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Now Roger has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers and 1 Freeman with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now the same.
In Wicham. dimidia bouata terre. Inland Catebi.
In ` WYKEHAM' 1/2 bovate of land. ` Cadeby'. had it
In Welletune. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. SOCA huius Manerii. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et III. uillani habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. partes unius sedis molini.
In WELTON 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. A jurisdiction of this manor. 4 Freemen and 3 villagers have 1 1/2 ploughs. 2 parts of 1 mill site. Cadeby'. Godric and Siward had it

Manerium In LECHEBURNE. habuit Hambe. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae et dimidiae. Ibi Girardus homo Rogerii habet. VIII. sochemannos et XI. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. et CXL. II. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.

In LEGBOURNE Ambi had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Gerard, Roger's man, has 8 Freemen and 11 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 142 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20s.
In Summercotes. III. es par|tes unius carucatae. ad geldum. Terra ad dimidiam carucam. Ibi. III. sochemanni arant. II. bobus.
In SOMERCOTES 3 parts of 1 carucate taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 3 Freemen plough with 2 oxen. [Belongs to Legbourne. Ambi had it. Gerard, Roger's man, has it

Manerium In INGEHAM habuit Aluui. IIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Rogerius. III. sochemannos et II. bordarios et I. uillanum. cum. I. caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo similiter. Mainardus tenet.

In INGHAM Alwy had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Roger has 3 Freemen, 2 smallholders and 1 villager with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now the same. Mainard holds it.
In Cotes. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Inland in Ingeham.
In COATES 1 bovate of land taxable. of Ingham.

Manerium In FILINGEHAM. habuit Turgot. II. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Anschitil homo Rogerii habet. II. carucas. et IX. sochemannos. et II. uillanos. cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo XL. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In FILLINGHAM Thorgot had 2 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Ansketil, Roger's man, has 2 ploughs. 9 Freemen and 2 villagers with 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In NETELTONE. habuit Grinchil. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Blancard homo Rogerii habet. V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et I. sochemannum cum. I. caruca. et II. molinos. X. solidorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos.

In NETTLETON Grimkel had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Blancard, Roger's man, has 5 villagers, 4 smallholders and 1 Freeman with 1 plough; and 2 mills, 10s; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30s.

Manerium In CROCESTONE. habuit Aschil. VI. bouatas terrae geldum Terra. XII. boum. Ibi Anschitil homo Rogerii habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et VII. sochemannos. cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter.
In CROXTON Eskil had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Ansketil, Roger's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 7 Freemen with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same.

Manerium In BLOCHESHAM. habuit Turuer. IX. carucatas terrae et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Rogerius pictauensis. I. carucam |et dimidiam in dominio. et XVIII. sochemannos et II. uillanos habentes. V. carucas. et XIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III. libras.

In BLOXHOLM Thorfridh had 9 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Roger of Poitou has 1 1/2 ploughs in lordship; 18 Freemen and 2 villagers who have 5 ploughs and meadow, 13 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now £3.

Manerium In CANEUUIC et Bragebruge. habuit Strui. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Ernuin homo Rogerii habet. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos et V. uillanos et I. bordarium. arantes. VI. bobus. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et XL acrae prati. et II. piscariae. II. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo XL. solidos.

In CANWICK and BRACEBRIDGE had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Ernwin , Roger's man, has 1 plough. 4 Freemen, 5 villagers and 1 smallholder who plough with 6 oxen. A church and a priest; meadow, 40 acres; 2 fisheries, 2s. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40s.
Ibidem. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. In Branzuic iacet.
There also 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. It lies in {Bran
Manerium In ACLEI. habuit Archilbar XIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Ibi. V. uillani. et XVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.
In EAGLE Arnketil Barn had 13 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. 5 villagers. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
In Haneurde. III bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in Snerteforde. Ibi Turoldus presbyter habet. I. sochemannum et II. bordarios. arantes. II. bobus.
In HANWORTH 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Snarford. Turold the priest has 1 Freeman and 2 smallholders who plough with 2 oxen. Land of Roger of Bully

Manerium In GRENTEWELLE habuit Suuen. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Turoldus homo Rogerii de busli habet III. carucas. et XV. uillanos et VI. bordarios cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. piscariae XV. denariorum. et I. molinus. V. solidorum. et XVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo similiter.

In GREETWELL Swein had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Turold, Roger of Bully's man, has 3 ploughs. 15 villagers and 6 smallholders with 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 fisheries, 15d; 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now the same.

Manerium In APLEBI et RISEBI et Saleclif habuit Gamel. IX. carucatas terrae et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra XIX. carucarum et II. boum. Ibi habet Rogerius de busli in dominio. IIII. carucas. et XXXI. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. et XXXI. sochemannos cum. VI. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. Silua pastilis dimidiam leuam longa. et I. quarentenam lata. et XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit VIII. libras. modo. X. libras. Tailla. III. libras.

In APPLEBY, RISBY and SAWCLIFFE Gamal had 9 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for 19 ploughs and 2 oxen. Roger of Bully has in lordship 4 ploughs; 31 villagers and 2 smallholders with 6 ploughs; 31 Freemen with 6 ploughs. A church and a priest; pasturable woodland 1/2 league long and 1 furlong wide; meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now £10. Exactions £3.
In Sanctone SOCA. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. XII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et VI. acras prati.
In SANTON, a jurisdiction, 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 12 Freemen have 2 ploughs and meadow, 6 acres. Land of Robert of Tosny

Manerium In ENGLEBI. habuit Turgot Lag. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Berengarius de Rotberto de Todeni habet. II. carucas. et V. sochemannos. et VIII. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et C quater XX. acras prati. Siluae pastilis VI. quarentenas longae. et III. latae. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo X. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos. De hac terra. I. carucata et dimidia in SOCA

In INGLEBY Thorgot Lag had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Berengar has 2 ploughs from Robert of Tosny. 5 Freemen and 8 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 180 acres; pasturable woodland, 6 furlongs long and 3 wide. Value before 1066 £8; now £10. Exactions 40s. Of this land 1 1/2 carucates in a jurisdiction.

In Broxholme X. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. SOCA. IX. caructae. et Inland. I. carucata. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et XX. IIII. sochemanni. et II. uillani cum. VIII. carucis et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia. et CC. acrae prati.

In BROXHOLME 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. A jurisdiction, 9 carucates, and , 1 carucate. 1 plough in lordship; 24 Freemen and 2 villagers with 8 1/2 ploughs. A church; meadow, 200 acres. [Jurisdiction and of Ingleby. Thorgot Lag had it. Berengar has it

Manerium In ESETORP. habuit Turgot. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Berengarius de Roberto. habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XII. uillanos. et II. sochemannos. cum. III. carucis. et LX. acras prati. et XXX. III. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. X. solidos. #SOCA dimidia carucata.

In BUSLINGTHORPE Thorgot had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Berengar has 1 1/2 ploughs from Robert. 12 villagers and 2 Freemen with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland, 33 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now the same. Exactions 10s. A jurisdiction, 1/2 carucate.

Manerium In BRANZBI. habuit Turgot. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi De Roberto Berengarius habet. I. et VI. uillanos et III. sochemannos cum una caruca et dimidia. et XIIII. acras prati. et L. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. L. $

In BRANSBY Thorgot had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Berengar has 1 from Robert. 6 villagers and 3 Freemen with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 14 acres; underwood, 50 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 50.

Manerium In CORINGEHAM. habuit Turgot. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum. Ibi de Roberto Berengarius habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Silue pastiles V. quarentenae longae. et V. latae. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. XXX.

In CORRINGHAM Thorgot had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Berengar has 1 plough from Robert. 5 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. Pasturable woodland 5 furlongs long and 5 wide. Value before 1066, 50s; now 30.
$ In Burtone. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Inlant Branzbi. Ibi. II. bordarii. habent. I. carucam.
In BURTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Bransby. 2 smallholders have 1 plough. had it. Berengar has it

Manerium In BINNIBROC. habuit Turgot Lag. VIII. carucatas terre et IIII. bouatas et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XXIIII. carucarum. Nunc habet Robertus de Todeni. et Berengarius de illo. In dominio. IIII. carucae. et VI. uillani et IIII. bordarii. et XL. IIII. sochemanni cum. VIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. molini XX. solidorum. et C. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit VII. libras. modo. XV. libras. Tailla. X. libras. De hac terra. IIII. carucatae et IIII. boatae et dimidia sunt sochemannorum.

In BINBROOK Thorgot Lag had 8 carucates of land and 4 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 24 ploughs. Now Robert of Tosny has it, and Berengar from him. In lordship 4 ploughs; 6 villagers, 4 smallholders and 44 Freemen with 8 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 mills, 20s; meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £7; now £15. Exactions £10. Of this land 4 carucates and 4 1/2 bovates are the Freemen's.
Soca In Ludeburg. VIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. SOCA superioris Manerii. Ibi habet Berengarius. III. carucas. et XXXVIII. sochemannos cum. V. carucis. et CC. acras prati.
In LUDBOROUGH 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. A jurisdiction of the above manor. Berengar has 3 ploughs. 38 Freemen with 5 ploughs. Meadow, 200 acres.

Soca In Fodrebi IIII carucatae et V. bouatae. et Turgrebi. I. carucata. V. carucatae terrae et V. bouatae ad geldum. Terra IX. carucarum. Ibi habet Berengarius. I. carucam. et XXX. III. sochemannos. et II. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. et CXX. acras prati. et IIII. salinas. II. solidorum.

In FOTHERBY 4 carucates and 5 bovates, and THORGANBY, 1 carucate: 5 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Berengar has 1 plough. 33 Freemen and 2 smallholders with 6 ploughs. Meadow, 120 acres; 4 salt-houses, 2s.
Soca In Crosbi. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni et IIII. bordarii. habent. III. carucas. et III. acras prati.
In CROXBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 14 Freemen and 4 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 3 acres. [Jurisdiction of Binbrook. Thorgot Lag had it. Berengar has it

Manerium In OFFINTUNE. habuit Erneber. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. habet Robertus de Todeni. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos

In UFFINGTON Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Robert of Tosny has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 10s.

. II. Maneria In TALINTUNE. habuerunt Aluuinus et Erneber. V. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus et Rogerius homines Roberti habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et V. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XVII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XXX.

In TALLINGTON Alwin and Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. William and Roger , Robert's men, have 1 1/2 ploughs. 5 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 17 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30.

Manerium In GRITEFORDE. habuit Turgot Lag. V. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi Berengarius de Roberto habet. II. carucas. et X. uillanos. et X. sochemannos et II. bordarios. cum. III. carucis et dimidia. et II. molinos. X. solidorum. et LX. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit VIII. libras. modo. IX. libras. Tailla. III. libras.

In GREATFORD Thorgot Lag had 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Berengar has 2 ploughs from Robert. 10 villagers, 10 Freemen and 2 smallholders with 3 1/2 ploughs. 2 mills, 10s; meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now £9. Exactions £3.
Soca In Breseburc et Barnetone. V. carucatae terrae dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi. XVII. sochemanni et VI. uillani habent. V. carucas et dimidiam. et XL. acras prati.

In BRACEBOROUGH and BANTHORPE 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 17 Freemen and 6 villagers have 5 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 40 acres. [Jurisdiction of Greatford. Thorgot Lag had it. Berengar has it

Manerium In RINGESDUNE. habuerunt Aslac et Dane. IIII. carucatas terrae. et VII. bouatas et II. as partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi Iuo homo Roberti habet. II. carucas. et IX. uillanos et VI. sochemannos. et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et XLVI. acras prati. et C. XX. acras siluae minutae. et terciam partem aecclesiae. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. LX.

In `RINGSTONE' Aslak and Dene had 4 carucates of land and 7 bovates and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Ivo , Robert's man, has 2 ploughs. 9 villagers, 6 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 1 1/2 ploughs; and meadow, 46 acres; underwood, 120 acres; the third part of a church. Value before 1066, 50s; now 60.
In CHERCHEBI. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. II. uillani arant. III. bobus. et II. acrae prati. et XL. acrae siluae minutae. Inland.
In KIRKBY 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 2 villagers plough with 3 oxen. Meadow, 2 acres; underwood, 40 acres. . and Dene had it. Ivo , Robert's man, has it

Manerium In GREIBI. habuit Erneber. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi Gunfridus homo Roberti habet. II. carucas. . III. sochemannos. et I. bordarium. arantes. II. bobus. Ibi. XI. acrae prati. et CCIX. acrae siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo XL. solidos.

In GRABY Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Gunfrid , Robert's man, has 2 ploughs. 3 Freemen and 1 smallholder who plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 11 acres; pasturable woodland, 209 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 40s.
Manerium In SCACHETORP. habuit Erneber X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. Nunc. est wastum. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo utcunque X. Solidos.
In SCOTTLETHORPE Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Now it is waste. Value before 1066, 100s; now, at the most, 10s.

Manerium In ASLACHEBI. habuit Erneber. VI. carucatas terrae et dimidiam bouatam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Nunc habet Robertus ibi. VII. uillanos. et I. bordarium. habentes. II. carucas. et XL. acras prati. et XX. IIII. acras siluae minutae. De duabus carucatis habet Gislertus de gand Socam in Fulchingeham.

In ASLACKBY Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 6 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Now Robert has there 7 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 2 ploughs and meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 24 acres. Of 2 carucates Gilbert of Ghent has the jurisdiction in Folkingham.

Manerium In AUETORP. habuit Erneber. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum. Ibi habet Gunfridus homo Roberti dimidiam carucam. et IIII. sochemannos. et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. Ibi. XII. acrae prati. et CXXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In `AVETHORPE' Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Gunfrid , Robert's man, has 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 12 acres; meadow, 130 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 40s. Exactions 20s.
Soca In Loctone. V. bouatae terrae et tercia pars. I. bouatae. ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. Ibi. XI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et dimidiam aecclesiam. et VIII. acras siluae minutae.

In LAUGHTON 5 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. 11 Freemen have 1 plough and 1/2 church; underwood, 8 acres. [Jurisdiction of `Avethorpe'. Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had it. Gunfrid , Robert's man, has it
Soca In Aslachebi. VI. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. VI. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et VI. acras prati. et VI. acras siluae minutae.

In ASLACKBY 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 6 Freemen have 2 ploughs and meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 12 acres. [Jurisdiction of `Avethorpe'. Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had it. Gunfrid , Robert's man, has it
Soca In Sepingeham. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et X. acras prati. et VI. acras siluae minutae.

In `SEMPRINGHAM' 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 4 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 6 acres. [Jurisdiction of `Avethorpe'. Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had it. Gunfrid , Robert's man, has it

Manerium In RIPESLAI. habuit Tori. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. IX. carucarum. Ibi habet Iuo homo Roberti. II. carucas. et II. uillanos. et XXIX. sochemannos. cum VIII. carucis et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia. et CXX. acrae siluae pastilis. et CCCCL. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. C. solidos. Tailla. XL. solidos. SOCA. VI. bouatarum.

In ROPSLEY Thori had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Ivo , Robert's man, has 2 ploughs. 2 villagers and 29 Freemen with 8 1/2 ploughs. A church; pasturable woodland, 120 acres; underwood, 450 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 100s. Exactions 40s. A jurisdiction of 6 bovates.

Manerium In DENTUNE uel Huuelle. habuit. Eddiua. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus in dominio. III. carucas. et XIII. uillanos. cum. IIII. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. et V. solidos. et II. II denarios. modo. C. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In DENTON or WYVILLE Edeva had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Robert has in lordship 3 ploughs; 13 villagers with 4 ploughs. Value before 1066 £4 5s 4d; now 100s. Exactions 20s.

In Hungretune. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Inland. est. Ibi. XIII. uillani habent. VI. carucas. et L. acras prati. et LXXXVII. acras siluae minutae. Haec silua. est in SOCA de grantham.
In HUNGERTON 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. It is . 13 villagers have 6 ploughs and meadow, 50 acres; underwood, 87 acres. This wood is in the jurisdiction of Grantham. had it

Manerium In ULESTANETORP. habuit Leuricus. IIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus in dominio. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos et III. bordarios. et VIII. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas. et III. molinos. XV. solidorum T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In WOOLSTHORPE Leofric <of Bottesford> had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Robert has in lordship 1 plough; 6 villagers, 3 smallholders and 8 Freemen who have 3 ploughs. 3 mills, 15s. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

. II. Maneria Ibidem. habuerunt Goduinus et Archel. IIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus. I. molinum et dimidium. VIII. solidorum et VI. denariorum. et XI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. habens dimidiam carucatam huius terrae. Ibi XXX. acrae prati. et III. uirgate. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

There also Godwin <of Barrowby> and Arnketil had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Robert has 1 1/2 mills, 8s 6d. 11 villagers with 1 plough. A church and a priest who has 1/2 carucate of this land. Meadow, 30 acres and 3 virgates. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In ABURNE. habuit Turgot Lag XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi de Roberto habet Berengarius. in dominio. II. carucas. et XIIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et I. sochemannum. cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. XX. solidorum. et I. piscaria mille anguillarum. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. libras. modo. VI. libras.

In AUBOURN Thorgot Lag had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Berengar has in lordship 2 ploughs from Robert; 14 villagers, 4 smallholders and 1 Freeman with 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 20s; 1 fishery, 1000 eels; meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £5; now £6.
In Hadinctone. III. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. BEREWITA in Aburne. Ibi. II. uillani habent. dimidiam carucam. et VI. acrae prati. et III. acrae siluae minutae.
In HADDINGTON 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. An outlier of Aubourn. 2 villagers have 1/2 plough. Meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 3 acres. has it

Manerium In ADELINCTUNE. habuit Goduinus. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus in dominio. II. carucas. et XIIII. sochemannos. et V. uillanos. et V. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et CXL. acras prati. Ibi habet Warinus homo eius. I. carucatam. et I. bordarius. habens. II. bouatas terrae. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo VI. libras.

In ALLINGTON Godwin <of Barrowby> had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Robert has in lordship 2 ploughs; 14 Freemen, 5 villagers and 5 smallholders with 4 ploughs. A church; meadow, 140 acres. Warin, his man, has 1 carucate. 1 smallholder who has 2 bovates of land. Value before 1066 £3; now £6.

Manerium In NORTCHIME. habuit Mere. VI. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi Iuo homo Roberti. habet. III. carucas. et XII. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. et LVI. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras et XIII. solidos et VIII. denarios. modo. VII. libras.

In NORTH KYME Merra had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Ivo , Robert's man, has 3 ploughs. 12 villagers and 2 smallholders with 4 ploughs. Meadow, 56 acres; pasturable woodland, 30 acres. Value before 1066 £3 13s 8d; now £7. Land of Berengar of Tosny

. II. Maneria In ADELINGETONE. habuerunt Ulfchetel et Goduinus. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Berengerius de Todeni habet. I. carucam. et XIIII. sochemannos. et V. uillanos et V. bordarios. habentes. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. habens dimidiam carucatam huius terrae. et CXL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. VI. libras.

In ALLINGTON Ulfkil and Godwin <of Barrowby> had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Berengar of Tosny has 1 plough. 14 Freemen, 5 villagers and 5 smallholders who have 4 ploughs. A church which has 1/2 carucate of this land; meadow, 140 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now £6. Land of Ilbert of Lacy

Manerium In DUNEHAM. habuit Alrich. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Nunc habet Ilbertus de Laci. De eo miles eius. in dominio. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos. et II. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et XVII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XVI.

In DUNHOLME Alric had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now Ilbert of Lacy has them. A man-at-arms of his in lordship 1 plough from him; 2 Freemen and 2 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 17 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16. Exactions 4s.
Berewita In Scotorne. VII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IX. boum
In SCOTHERN 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 9 oxen.
Soca In Stou. dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. Inland et Soca.
In STOW 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. and a jurisdiction. [Jurisdiction and of Dunholme. Alric had it. A man-at-arms has it
Manerium In WELINGEHAM. habuit Deincora XII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. In hac terra manet unus miles Ilberti. T. R. E.
In WILLINGHAM Deincora had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. One of Ilbert's men-at-arms lives on this land. Value before 1066 and now, 20s. Land of Henry of Ferrers

Manerium In WITENAI. habuit Seubar XII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi Sasuualo homo Henrici habet. II. carucas. et X. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. et XXX. sochemannos. habentes. V. carucas. et CCC. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras. modo. VIII. libras. Tailla. III. libras.

In WHITTON Siward Barn had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Saswalo <of Ettington>, Henry's man, has 2 ploughs. 10 villagers, 4 smallholders and 30 Freemen who have 5 ploughs. Meadow, 300 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £7. Exactions £3.
Berewita In Wintrintone. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Inland /et Wasta. est.
In WINTERTON 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. It is and waste. [Outlier of Whitton. Siward Barn had it. Saswalo <of Ettington>, Henry's man, has it Land of William of Percy

. II. Maneria In IMUNGEHAM. habuit Aluuinus. IIII. carucatas terre. et I. bouatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Willelmus de perci in dominio IIII. carucas. et XII. uillanos et XIIII. bordarios. et XIII. sochemannos habentes IIII. carucas. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo similiter. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In IMMINGHAM Alwin had 4 carucates of land and 1 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. William of Percy has in lordship 4 ploughs; 12 villagers, 14 smallholders and 13 Freemen who have 4 ploughs and meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now the same. Exactions 40s.
#In Lenesbi. dimidia bouata terre ad geldum. SOCA.
In LACEBY 1/2 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction.

Manerium In ABURNE. habuit Alcude. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi Norman homo Willelmi habet dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. et V. sochemannos. cum. I. caruca et II. bobus arantes. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XIIII. solidos. modo XX. solidos. Tailla. IIII. solidos.

In HABROUGH Alcude had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Norman , William's man, has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers, 4 smallholders and 5 Freemen who plough with 1 plough and 2 oxen. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 14s; now 20s. Exactions 4s.
Soca In Lobingeham. I. bouata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. Ibi. I. sochemannus. cum. II. bobus aranns. et XX. acrae prati.
In `LOPINGHEHAM' 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. 1 Freeman who ploughs with 2 oxen. Meadow, 20 acres. [Jurisdiction of Habrough. Alcude had it. Norman , William's man, has it

In TORENTONE. habuit Aluuine. II. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. $ Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi XII. sochemanni et III. bordarii et II. uillani. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Et super has. XI. bouatas terrae habet Rogerius pictauensis. XI. bouatas similiter sicuti Willelmus. quas idem Willelmus. debet habere testimonio hominum de Wapentac. Ibi. CCC. LXIIII. acrae prati. SOCA in Oresbi.

In THORNTON Alwin had 2 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 12 Freemen, 3 smallholders and 2 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. And besides these 11 bovates of land Roger of Poitou, just like William, similarly has 11 bovates which this William ought to have according to the witness of the men of the Wapentake. Meadow, 364 acres. A jurisdiction of Owersby.
$ In Bernetebi. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Wasta. est.
In BARNETBY 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. It is waste. of Thornton.

Manerium In ORESBI. habuit Aluuine. VII. bouatas terrae et II. partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus in dominio habet. II. carucas et III. uillanos et X. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus III. solidorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. L. solidos.

In OWERSBY Alwin had 7 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. William has in lordship 2 ploughs; 3 villagers and 10 Freemen with 1 plough. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In CABURNE. habuit Grinchil. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Norman homo Willelmi habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum et I. bordarium. et XII. acras prati in Chelsi. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XXVI solidos.

In CABOURNE Grimkel had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Norman , William's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager and 1 smallholder. Meadow, 12 acres in Kelsey. Value before 1066, 30s; now 26s.
In Cucualt. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Inland In Caburne.
In CUXWOLD 1 bovate of land taxable. of Cabourne. , William's man, has it

Manerium In WICHINGEBI. habuit Turgot. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum. Ibi Osbern homo Willelmi habet. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos et II. sochemannos. cum. II. carucis. et XV. acras prati. Silua minuta. I. leuam longa. et V. quarentenas lata. T. R. E. et modo ualet III. libras.

In WICKENBY Thorgot had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Osbern, William's man, has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers and 2 Freemen with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 15 acres; underwood 1 league long and 5 furlongs wide. Value before 1066 and now £3.
Soca In Westledebi. IX. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. XVIII. boum. Ibi Radulfus homo Willelmi. habet. VI. sochemannos. cum. II. carucis. et XXX. acras prati.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In WESTLABY 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 18 oxen. Ralph, William's man, has 6 Freemen with 2 ploughs; and Meadow, 30 acres. had it
Soca In Bechelinge. I. bouata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. Ibi Robertus homo Willelmi. habet I. sochemannum. et I. bordarium. arant. II. bobus. et I. acra prati.
In BECKERING 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. Robert, William's man, has 1 Freeman and 1 smallholder; they plough with 2 oxen. Meadow, 1 acre. had it
Soca In Reresbi. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi Norman homo Willelmi habet. I. sochemannum cum dimidia caruca. et X. acrae prati.

In SNELLAND 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Waldin, William's man, has 3 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 6 acres. had it
Soca In Reresbi. IIII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. In Sneleslunt /iacet.
In REASBY 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. It lies in Snelland. had it *

In STAINFIELD Siward had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. William has 1 plough. 8 villagers, 6 smallholders and 4 Freemen with 4 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres; pasturable woodland, 264 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60s.

Soca Ibidem habuit Tona. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. SOCA in Berlinge. Ibi habet Willelmus. IIII. sochemannos et I. bordarium. cum. II. carucis. et XX. acras prati. et CXVII. acras siluae pastililis.

There also Tonni <of Lusby> had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Barlings. William has 4 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs; and meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 117 acres.
Soca In Apeleia. VII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi. X. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. et XV. acras prati. et CX. acras siluae minutae.
In APLEY 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 10 Freemen have 3 ploughs and meadow, 15 acres; underwood, 110 acres.

There also Tonni <of Lusby> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. A jurisdiction of Barlings. William has 10 Freemen with 3 ploughs; and meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 110 acres.

III. libras. modo. IIII.

In KIRMOND Alsi had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. William has in lordship 4 ploughs; 18 villagers, 4 smallholders and 2 Freemen who have 4 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 4.

Manerium In GRIMESBI. habuit Alric. I. carucatam terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Fulco homo Willelmi. habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et V. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. Ibi aecclesia. et XI. acrae prati. et I. salina. VI. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo XX. V. solidos. Tailla. V. solidos.

In GRIMSBY Alric had 1 carucate of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Fulco , William's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers and 5 Freemen with 1 plough. A church; meadow, 11 acres; 1 salt-house, 6d. Value before 1066, 30s; now 25s. Exactions 5s.

. III. Maneria In COUENHAM habuerunt Alsi et Chetel et Turuer. III. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Willelmus. in dominio. III. carucas. et XVIII. to uillanos et XVII. sochemannos. cum. V. carucis et dimidia. et V. salinas II. solidorum. et CL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit CX. solidos. modo IIII. libras.

In COVENHAM Alsi , Ketil and Thorfridh had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. William has in lordship 3 ploughs; 18 villagers and 17 Freemen with 5 1/2 ploughs. 5 salt-houses, 2s; meadow, 150 acres. Value before 1066, 110s; now £4. Exactions 30s. Ketil and Thorfridh were brothers and after the death of their father they divided the land; in such a way, however, that Ketil, while doing the King's service, should have the help of his brother, Thorfridh. William of Percy had Ketil's and Alsi 's land from the King; but this William bought Thorfridh's land from Ansketil, a cook, after 1066.

Manerium In ALCHINTON. habuit AElsi. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. XVI. carucarum. Ibi Fulco homo Willelmi habet. II. carucas. et XXX. VIII. sochemannos cum VII. carucis. et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia. et molinus. III. solidorum. et sedes alterius molini. et XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla XL. solidos. Sex carucatae et dimidia de hac terra sunt sochemannorum.

In ELKINGTON Alsi had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. Fulco , William's man, has 2 ploughs. 38 Freemen with 7 1/2 ploughs. A church; a mill, 3s; the site of another mill; meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 4. Exactions 40s. 6 1/2 carucates of this land are the Freemen's.
$ Soca In Germundtorp. III. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem bouatarum SOCA in Couenham. Ibi. III. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et L. acras prati.
In GRAINTHORPE 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. A jurisdiction of Covenham. 3 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 50 acres.

$ Soca In Houten SOCA in Lagesbi. X. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum Ibi Eurardus homo Willelmi habet. VI. sochemannos et IIII. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et XXX. acras prati.

In HOLTHAM, a jurisdiction of Legsby, 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Everard , William's man, has 6 Freemen, 4 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs and meadow, 30 acres. had it

Manerium In RISTONE et CARLETONE. habuit Alsi. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Osbernus homo Willelmi habet. II. carucas. et IIII. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. et XVIII. sochemannos. cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et II. molini V. solidorum. et XXX. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae pastililis. T. R. E. ualuit. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos. Medietas de hac terra. est sochemannorum.

In RESTON and CARLTON Alsi had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Osbern, William's man, has 2 ploughs. 4 villagers, 4 smallholders and 18 Freemen with 4 ploughs. A church; 2 mills, 5s; meadow, 30 acres; pasturable woodland, 100 acres. Value before 1066 and value now, 40s. Exactions 20s. Half of this land is the Freemen's.

Manerium In ENGLEBI. habuit Gunneuuate. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Willelmus. I. carucam. et V. uillanos. et I. sochemannum cum dimidia caruca. Ibi presbyter. et L. acrae prati. et L. acrae siluae minutae T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXV. Tailla. V. solidos.

In INGLEBY Gunnhvati had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. William has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 1 Freeman with 1/2 plough. A priest; meadow, 50 acres; underwood, 50 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 25. Exactions 5s.

Manerium In ODENEBI. habuit Grinchel. II. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. et VI. boum. Ibi Willelmus homo Willelmi habet. III. carucas. et VII. uillanos et XI. sochemannos cum. III. carucis. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX. Tailla. XX. solidos. De hac terra. IX. bouatae in Soca.

In OWMBY Grimkel had 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs and 6 oxen. William, William's man, has 3 ploughs. 7 villagers and 11 Freemen with 3 ploughs. 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60. Exactions 20s. Of this land 9 bovates in a jurisdiction.

Manerium In STAINTON. habuit Grinchel. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Ibi Alulfus homo Willelmi. habet. II. carucas. et VI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et I. molinum XII. denariorum. et XXVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos.
In STAINTON Grimkel had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. , William's man, has 2 ploughs. 6 villagers with 1 plough. 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 26 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 50.

Manerium In FODREBI. habuit Sberne dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Fulco homo Willelmi habet eam et colit. Ibi. IIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. III. solidos.
In FOTHERBY Esbiorn had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Fulco , William's man, has it and cultivates it. Meadow, 4 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 3s.

Manerium In WIGHINGESBI. habuit Godric. V. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra VII. boum. Ibi Robertus homo Willelmi habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum cum. I. boue. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.
In WICKENBY Godric had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. Robert, William's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager with 1 ox. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.

Manerium In LAGESBI. habuit Alsi. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Eurardus homo Willelmi habet. II. carucas. et VI. uillanos. et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et I. molinum. VI. denariorum. et XII. acrae prati. et XII. acrae siluae pastililis per loca. $ T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XL.

In LEGSBY Alsi had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Everard , William's man, has 2 ploughs. 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. 1 mill, 6d; meadow, 12 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40.
Soca Ibidem. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Soca in Waragebi. Wasta. est.
There also 4 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Wragby. It is waste.

Soca In Summertebi. habuit Salecoc. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. SOCA in Brune. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni habent. V. carucas. et quater XX. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae.
In SOMERBY Salecoc had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Burnham. 14 Freemen have 5 ploughs and meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Land of Gilbert Tison

Manerium In FEREBI. habuit Goduin. II. carucatas terrae et VII. bouatas. et VIII. uam partem bouatae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Anschitillus homo Gisleberti tison habet. I. carucam et VI. sochemannos. de. IX. bouatis huius terrae. et XVII. uillanos habentes. IIII. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molinus X. solidorum. et I. passagium. LX. solidorum. et CCX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit VIII. libras. modo similiter.

In FERRIBY Godwin had 2 carucates of land and 7 bovates and the eighth part of a bovate taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Ansketil, Gilbert Tison's man, has 1 plough. 6 Freemen with 9 bovates of this land; 17 villagers who have 4 1/2 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 10s; 1 ferry, 60s; meadow, 210 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now the same. Land of Gilbert of Ghent

Manerium In SCANTONE. habuit Ulf fenisc. VI. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. Ibi habet Gislebertus de Gand. IIII. carucas in dominio. et XVI. uillanos et XII. sochemannos et VI. bordarios. cum. VII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. II. solidorm. et CLXVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. VIII. libras. Tailla. IIII. libras.

In SCAMPTON Ulf Fenman had 6 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. Gilbert of Ghent has 4 ploughs in lordship; 16 villagers, 12 Freemen and 6 smallholders with 7 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 166 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now £8. Exactions £4.

Berewita In Risun. I. carucata et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae et dimidiae. BEREWITA in Scantone. Ibi habet Colsuan homo Gisleberti. I. carucam. et I. molinum. XII. denariorum. et XXXVI. acras prati.
In RISEHOLME 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. An outlier of Scampton. Kolsveinn , Gilbert's man, has 1 plough. 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 36 acres.
Soca In Burtone. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. XI. sochemanni et IX. bordarii cum. III. carucis.
In BURTON 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 11 Freemen and 9 smallholders with 3 ploughs.
Soca In Carletone. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi. II. sochemanni /arant. V. bobus. et IIII. acrae prati.
In ` CARLTON' 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 2 Freemen plough with 5 oxen. Meadow, 4 acres.

Manerium In UUILINGEHAM. habuit Ulf. XIIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi habet Gislebertus. II. carucas. et XII. uillanos. et I. sochemannum cum II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. piscariae XXX. II. denariorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. IIII. libras.

In WILLINGHAM Ulf had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Gilbert has 2 ploughs. 12 villagers and 1 Freeman with 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 fisheries, 32d; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now £4.
Soca In Brotulbi et Torp. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. V. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. III. carucas et II. boues. et VIII. acras prati. ITEM
Jurisdiction of Scampton: In BRATTLEBY and THORPE 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 5 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 3 ploughs and 2 oxen and meadow, 8 acres. had it

Soca In Torp et AEstorp. V. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi. X. sochemanni. et I. bordarius cum. III. carucis et dimidia. Ibi unus homo Gisleberti. habet. VI. sochemannos. et V. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et C. I. acrae prati.

Also in THORPE and AISTHORPE 5 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 10 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 3 1/2 ploughs. One of Gilbert's men has 6 Freemen and 5 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 101 acres. had it
Berewita In Netelham. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Inland in Wilingeham.
In NETTLEHAM 2 bovates of land taxable. of Willingham. had it
In Stou. Ulf. IIII. toftae cum saca et soca. In Scantone.
In STOW Ulf 4 plots with full jurisdiction. In Scampton.

Manerium In APLEBI et Risebi et Saleclif. habuit Ulfus. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Robertus homo Gisleberti. habet. II. carucas. et X. uillanos. et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et XII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit L. solidos. modo. XL. Tailla. X. solidos.

In APPLEBY, RISBY and SAWCLIFFE Ulf had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Robert , Gilbert's man, has 2 ploughs. 10 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 40. Exactions 10s.
Berewita In Roxebi. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. Ibi. I. uillanus. /habet. II. boues.
In ROXBY 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. 1 villager has 2 oxen. had it. Robert , Gilbert's man, has it

Manerium In WINTRINGEHAM. habuit Ulf. XII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi Robertus homo Gisleberti habet. IIII. carucas in dominio. et XL. uillanos. et V. sochemannos et X. bordarios. cum. VII. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et III. molini XXX. VII. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et I. passagium XIII. solidorum. et sedes piscariae. T. R. E. ualuit et modo. X. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos

In WINTERINGHAM Ulf had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Robert , Gilbert's man, has 4 ploughs in lordship; 40 villagers, 5 Freemen and 10 smallholders with 7 ploughs. A priest and a church; 3 mills, 37s 4d; 1 ferry, 13s; a site of a fishery. Value before 1066 and now £10. Exactions 40s.

Manerium In BERTONE. habuit Ulf XIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. XXVII. carucarum. Ibi habet Gislebert. VII. carucas in dominio. et LXIII. uillanos et XVI. bordarios cum. IX. carucis. et XL. II. sochemannos et LXVII. bordarios. cum. X. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et II. molini. XL. solidorum. et I. mercatum et passagium de. IIII. libris.

In BARTON Ulf had 13 carucates of land taxable. Land for 27 ploughs. Gilbert has 7 ploughs in lordship; 63 villagers and 16 smallholders with 9 ploughs. 42 Freemen and 67 smallholders with 10 ploughs. A church and a priest; 2 mills, 40s; 1 market; a ferry at £4.

Soca In Ferebi. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. I. bouata minus. et VIII. pars unius bouatae ad geldum. SOCA de Bertone. Terra. V. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi modo XXX. IIII. sochemanni et XIII. bordarii cum. VIII. carucis. et I. passagium. III. librarum. et CCX. acras prati. et CCLX acras maresc. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. VIII. libras. et XVI. solidos. modo XXX. libras. Tailla. X. libras.

In FERRIBY 3 carucates of land taxable, less 1 bovate, and the eighth part of 1 bovate taxable. A jurisdiction of Barton. Land for 5 1/2 ploughs. Now 34 Freemen and 13 smallholders with 8 ploughs. 1 ferry, £3; meadow, 210 acres; marsh, 260 acres. Value before 1066 £38 16s; now £30. Exactions £10. had it
$ In Sudtone. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. bobus. Ibi habet Gislebertus gregem ouium.
In 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. Gilbert has a flock of sheep. had it

Soca In Horchetou. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Soca et Inland in Bertone. Ibi habet Gislebert. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VII. uillanos. et XX. sochemannos. cum. VIII. carucis et dimidia.
In HORKSTOW 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. A jurisdiction and of Barton. Gilbert has 1 1/2 ploughs. 7 villagers and 20 Freemen with 8 1/2 ploughs. had it
In Langetone habet Gislebertus. CXL. acras siluae pastilis.
In LANGTON Gilbert has 140 acres of pasturable woodland.

Manerium In BARDENAI. habuit Ulf. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Gislebert. I. carucam. et XVI. uillanos et V. bordarios. et VI. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et I. molinum. VIII. solidorum. et V. piscarias. V. solidorum et IIII. denariorum et XX. acras prati. et quingentae acrae siluae pastilis. T. R. E. et modo. ualet XX. libras. Tailla. XXX. libras.

In BARDNEY Ulf had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Gilbert has 1 plough. 16 villagers, 5 smallholders and 6 Freemen with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 8s; 5 fisheries, 5s 4d; meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 500 acres. Value before 1066 and now £20. Exactions £30.
Soca In Osgotebi SOCA huius Manerii. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XVI. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. et LX. acrae prati. et CCXL. acrae siluae pastilis per loca.
In `OSGODBY', a jurisdiction of this manor, 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 16 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 240 acres. had it
Berewita In Sutreie. Inland in Wilingeham. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Ibi. III. uillani. VI. bobus arantes. et I. piscaria. et IIII. acrae prati. et XX acrae siluae pastilis.
In SOUTHREY, of Willingham, 2 bovates of land taxable. 3 villagers who plough with 6 oxen. 1 fishery; meadow, 4 acres; pasturable woodland, 20 acres. had it

Manerium In BADEBURG. habuit. habuit Ulf XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra X. carucarum. Ibi habet Gislebertus. V. carucas. et XXI. uillanos. et VI. bordarios. et XX. sochemannos et XVI. bordarios eorum. Inter omnes. VII. carucas. et I. molinum VIII. solidorum. et CXL acras siluae pastililis. T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras. $ modo XII. libras. Tailla. III. libras. De hac terra. VI. carucatae in SOCA.

In BAUMBER Ulf had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. Gilbert has 5 ploughs. 21 villagers, 6 smallholders, 20 Freemen and their 16 smallholders; between them 7 ploughs. 1 mill, 8s; pasturable woodland, 140 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £12. Exactions £3. Of this land 6 carucates in a jurisdiction.

Manerium In ELLINGETONE habuit Ulf. X. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra X. carucarum. Ibi Egbertus homo Gisleberti habet. IIII. carucas. et XXV. sochemannos. et VII. uillanos et XIIII. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. et I. molinum. XVI. solidorum. et quater XX et X. acrae prati. et CCX. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit X. libras. modo XI. libras. Tailla. III. libras.

In EDLINGTON Ulf had 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. Egbert, Gilbert's man, has 4 ploughs. 25 Freemen, 7 villagers and 14 smallholders with 6 ploughs. 1 mill, 16s; meadow, 90 acres; underwood, 210 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £11. Exactions £3.
Berewita In Sanctone Inland in Risebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Wasta. est.
In SANTON, of Risby, 1 bovate of land taxable. It is waste.

Manerium In LUZEBI. habuit Tonne. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus homo Gisleberti habet. V. carucas. et XVII. sochemannos et VIII. uillanos. habentes. IX. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. III. solidorum. et C quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XIIII. libras. modo. X. libras. Tailla. C. solidos.

In LUSBY Tonni <of Lusby> had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. William, Gilbert's man, has 5 ploughs. 17 Freemen and 8 villagers who have 9 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 180 acres. Value before 1066 £14; now £10. Exactions 100s.

Manerium In EDEHAM habuit Ulf. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi habet Gislebertus. V. carucas. et XXXII. uillanos. et XXIIII. sochemannos. et IIII. bordarios. cum. IX. carucis. et XXIX. acras prati. et CCCC. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit X. libras. modo XVIII. libras. Tailla. VI. libras.

In EDENHAM Ulf had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Gilbert has 5 ploughs. 32 villagers, 24 Freemen and 4 smallholders with 9 ploughs. Meadow, 29 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 400 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £18. Exactions £6.

Berewita In Osfran. BEREWITA. III. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi. II. carucas in dominio. et V. uillani cum. III. carucis. et quater XX. acrae prati. et CXX. acrae siluae minutae.
In , an outlier, 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 2 ploughs in lordship; 5 villagers with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 120 acres. had it

Berewita In Bacstune BEREWITA. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Iuo homo Gisleberti habet dimidiam carucam. et VIII. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terre et IIII. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et XL. acras prati. Ualet. L. solidos.

In BASTON, an outlier, 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Ivo <of Driby>, Gilbert's man, has 1/2 plough. 8 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 4 villagers and 3 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres. Value 50s. had it
Soca In Griteford. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. SOCA. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni cum. I. caruca
In GREATFORD 2 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction. 4 Freemen with 1 plough. had it
Soca In Bercham. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. SOCA. in Edeham. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni arantes. II. bobus. et ualet. VIII. solidos.
In BARHOLM 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction of Edenham. 4 Freemen who plough with 2 oxen. Value 8s. had it
Soca In Braseborg et Barnetorpi. dimidia carucata ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum.
In BRACEBOROUGH and BANTHORPE 1/2 carucate taxable. Land for 4 oxen. had it
Soca In Opetorp. XIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. Ibi. XVII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. et XX. acrae prati. et XX. acrae siluae pastilis.
In OBTHORPE 13 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 17 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 20 acres. had it

Soca In Witham et Mannetorp et Totf |et Lund. VIII. carucatae terrae et tercia pars unius carucatae. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi. XLV. sochemanni et X. bordarii habent. X. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et XL. acrae prati. et XL. acrae siluae pastililis. et I. molinus. XX. solidorum. De hac terra tenet Bereuuoldus. I. carucatam terrae. et ibi habet. I. carucam. et I. molinum. XII. solidorum. et II. uillanos. et IIII. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XL.

In WITHAM, MANTHORPE, TOFT and LOUND 8 carucates of land and the third part of 1 carucate. Land for as many ploughs. 45 Freemen and 10 smallholders have 10 ploughs. A church; meadow, 40 acres; pasturable woodland, 40 acres; 1 mill, 20s. Of this land Berewold holds 1 carucate of land and has 1 plough. 1 mill, 12s. 2 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Jurisdiction of this manor: In HONINGTON 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Fulbert, Gilbert's man, has 12 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 3 ploughs; and meadow, 35 acres. 60s. had it
Soca In Asedebi. V. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi. XVIII. sochemanni et III. bordarii habent. VI. carucas. et XL. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae minutae.
In OASBY 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. 18 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 6 ploughs and meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 30 acres. had it

Soca In Lauintone. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. et III. pars. I. carucatae. Terra. V. carucarum ad geldum. Ibi habet Azelinus homo Gisleberti. II. carucas in dominio. et X. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. III. carucis. et XXX. acras prati. Ualet. C. solidos.

In ` LAVINGTON' 4 carucates of land taxable and the third part of 1 carucate taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Ascelin, Gilbert's man, has 2 ploughs in lordship; 10 villagers and 3 smallholders with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 30 acres. Value 100s. had it

Soca In Picheuuorde. II. carucatae terrae et dimidia bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Gislebertus habet XXI. sochemannos cum. IIII. carucis. et XVI. acras prati. et L. acras siluae minutae. et XX. acras siluae pastilis.

In PICKWORTH 2 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Gilbert has 21 Freemen with 4 ploughs; and meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 50 acres; pasturable woodland, 20 acres. had it
Soca In Hazebi. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi XIII. sochemanni et V. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et V. acras prati.
In HACEBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 13 Freemen and 5 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 5 acres. had it
Soca In Denbelbi. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi. XX. sochemanni et III. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et XVIII. acras prati. et XII. acras siluae minutae.
In DEMBLEBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 20 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 18 acres; underwood, 12 acres. had it
Soca In Esbernebi. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi XVI. sochemanni et VIII. bordarii habent VIII. carucas. et I. aecclesia ibi. est.
In OSBOURNBY 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 1/2 ploughs. 16 Freemen and 8 smallholders have 8 ploughs. 1 church is there. had it
Soca In Trichingeham. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. est forum reddens XL. solidos. et XI. sochemanni et VIII. bordarii.
In THREEKINGHAM 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A market-place which pays 40s. 11 Freemen and 8 smallholders. had it

Soca In Stou. V. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi Robertus homo Gisleberti habet XXI. sochemannos et XIIII. bordarios habentes. V. carucas. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et I. aecclesia. et XVI. acrae prati. Precium. C. solidi.

In STOW 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Robert , Gilbert's man, has 21 Freemen and 14 smallholders who have 5 ploughs. 1 plough in lordship. 1 church; meadow, 16 acres. Valuation, 100s. had it
Soca In Walecote. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi XXII. sochemanni. et IIII. bordarii et dimidia aecclesia. et XX. VI. acrae prati.
In WALCOT 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 22 Freemen and 4 smallholders. 1/2 church; meadow, 26 acres. had it
Soca In Bellingeburg habet Gislebert socam super dimidiam carucatam terrae.
In BILLINGBOROUGH Gilbert has jurisdiction over 1/2 carucate of land. had it
Soca In Berchetorp. XV. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni et VIII. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et XXVII. acras prati.
In BIRTHORPE 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 8 Freemen and 8 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 27 acres. had it
Soca In Loctone. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni et IIII. bordarii. habent. III. carucas et dimidiam. et IX. acras prati. et XIII.
In LAUGHTON 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 14 Freemen and 4 smallholders have 3 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 9 acres; underwood, 13 acres. had it

Soca In Aslachebi dimidia carucata. et Spingeham. II. carucata. et VI. bouatae. III. carucatae terre et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi. XIII. sochemanni et I. bordarius habentes. III. carucas. et dimidia aecclesia et VI. ta pars alterius aecclesiae et XXIIII. acras prati. et XL. acrae siluae minutae.

In ASLACKBY, 1/2 carucate, and `SEMPRINGHAM', 2 carucates and 6 bovates: 3 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. 13 Freemen and 1 smallholder who have 3 ploughs. 1/2 church and the sixth part of another church; meadow, 24 acres; underwood, 40 acres. had it
Soca In Pochinton. II. carucatae terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi. XVI. sochemanni habent. VI. carucas. et XXX. II. acrae prati. et XL. acrae siluae /minutae.
In POINTON 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 16 Freemen have 6 ploughs. Meadow, 32 acres; underwood, 40 acres. had it
Soca In Goldesbi. III. carucatae terre et I. bouata ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi XVII. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. V. carucas. et XX. V. acras prati. et C. acras siluae minutae.
In INGOLDSBY 3 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 17 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 5 ploughs and meadow, 25 acres; underwood, 100 acres. had it

V. Soca In Hag et Brandune. III. carucatae terrae et III. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi. XIII. sochemanni habent. VI. carucas. et VI. acras prati. Hoc totum tenet Derinc de Gisleberto. et habet ibi dimidiam carucam in dominio. Ualet. XL. solidos.

In HOUGH and BRANDON 3 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 13 Freemen have 6 ploughs and meadow, 6 acres. Deoring holds the whole of this from Gilbert and has 1/2 plough there in lordship. Value 40s. had it
Soca In Chirchebi. VII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi XXX. I. sochemanni. et VI. bordarii. habent. VI. carucas.
In KIRKBY 7 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 31 Freemen and 6 smallholders have 6 ploughs. had it
Soca In Wilgebi. V. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. Ibi. XX. IX. sochemanni et I. bordarius habent. VI. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et CXL. acrae prati.
In WILLOUGHBY 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. 29 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 6 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 140 acres; meadow, 24 acres. had it

Soca In Asuuardebi. IIII. carucatae terrae et dimidia. et I. bouata ad geldum. Terra. IX. carucarum. Ibi. XL. I. sochemanni et III. bordarii habent XVIII. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et II. partes unius aecclesiae. et C quater XX acrae prati. De hac terra habet Radulfus presbyter. III. carucatas et dimidiam. et Ibi habet. IIII.

In ASWARBY 4 1/2 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. 41 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 18 ploughs. A priest and a church and 2 parts of 1 church; meadow, 180 acres. Ralph the priest has 3 1/2 carucates of this land. He has 4 ploughs in lordship. had it
Soca In Scredintune. X. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. IX. carucarum. Ibi XL. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. XIIII. carucas. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia.
In SCREDINGTON 10 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. 40 Freemen and 1 villager have 14 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 21 acres. had it

Soca In Helperincham III. carucatae. et. II. bouatae. et Burton. II. carucatae. V. carucatas terrae et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi XXXV. sochemanni. et VII. bordarii habent. X. carucas. et XX. VI. acrae prati.

In HELPRINGHAM, 3 carucates and 2 bovates, and BURTON , 2 carucates: 5 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. 35 Freemen and 7 smallholders have 10 ploughs. Meadow, 26 acres. had it Land of Hugh son of Baldric

. VI. Maneria In BUNDEBI. habuerunt Grinchel et Merdo et Aldene et alii. III. taini. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi Hugo. filius. Baldri habet. III. carucas in dominio. et XIIII. uillanos et VII. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. VI. Tailla. XX. solidos. Sochemanni. III. bouatas huius terrae.

In BONBY Grimkel, Merdo, Healfdene and three other thanes had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Hugh son of Baldric has 3 ploughs in lordship; 14 villagers and 7 smallholders with 4 ploughs. Value before 1066 £4; now 6. Exactions 20s. Freemen 3 bovates of this land. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In ULURIGEBI. habuit Grinchel dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Radulfus homo Hugonis habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos. habentes II. boues in caruca. T. R. E. et modo. XX. solidos ualet.

In WORLABY Grimkel had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Ralph, Hugh's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers who have 2 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066 and now, 20s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

. II. Maneria In LINBERGE habuerunt Siuuard et Ulf. II. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Hugo. filius. Baldrici. II. carucas. et X. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. et XX. sochemannos de. V. bouatis huius terrae. Inter omnes. IIII. carucae. et II. boues in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit C. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In LIMBER Siward and Ulf had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 1/2 ploughs. Hugh son of Baldric has 2 ploughs. 10 villagers, 4 smallholders and 20 Freemen with 5 bovates of this land; between them 4 ploughs and 2 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066, 100s; now the same. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
In Caburne. dimidia bouata terrae. Soca in Linberge.
In CABOURNE 1/2 bovate of land. A jurisdiction of Limber. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In CHERNITONE. habuit Tope. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum. Ibi Hamelin homo Hugonis habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et VIII. bordarios. et X. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. habentes. XVIII. tofta. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XXX. Tailla. X. solidos.

In KIRMINGTON Topi had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Hamelin, Hugh's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers, 8 smallholders and 10 Freemen with 1 plough who have 18 plots. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30. Exactions 10s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In CROCESTONE. habuit Siuuardus. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Hamelinus homo Hugonis. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos. et III. bordarios. et II. sochemannos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. SOCA. I. bouata. Ibi. VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In CROXTON Siward had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Hamelin, Hugh's man, 1 plough. 6 villagers, 3 smallholders and 2 Freemen with 1 1/2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of 1 bovate. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In STALINBURG. habuerunt Siuuard et Gamel et Ulchil I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Hugo. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos de. V. toftis. et II. uillanos. et I. bordarium. et II. molinos et dimidium. X. solidorum. et II. salinas et dimidiam. II. solidorum. et CC. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo. XXX. solidos ualet.

In STALLINGBOROUGH Siward, Gamal and Ulfkil had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Hugh has 1 plough. 2 Freemen with 5 plots; 2 villagers and 1 smallholder. 2 1/2 mills, 10s; 2 1/2 salt-houses, 2s; meadow, 200 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In STAINTONE. habuit Bertor. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum. Ibi habet Hugo. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos de. I. bouata terrae et XI. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et II. boues in caruca. et LV. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo XL. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In STAINTON Bergthorr had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Hugh has 1 plough. 4 Freemen with 1 bovate of land; 11 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough and 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 55 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 40s. Exactions 10s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In CABURNE. habuit Grinchel. II. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Hugo. II. carucas. et XII. sochemannos de. I. carucata terre. et I. uillanum et III. bordarios cum. III. carucis. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. LX. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In CABOURNE Grimkel had 2 carucates of land and 3 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Hugh has 2 ploughs. 12 Freemen with 1 carucate of land; 1 villager and 3 smallholders with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Berewita In Cucualt BEREWITA. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. K Ibi. IIII. uillani et III. sochemanni cum. I. caruca.
In CUXWOLD, an outlier, 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. 4 villagers and 3 Freemen with 1 plough. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In CROCESTONE. habuit. Grinchel dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Hamelin homo Hugonis habet. I. carucam et. IX. sochemannos de. II. bouatis terre. et VI. uillanos et I. bordarium. habentes. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In CROXTON Grimkel had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Hamelin, Hugh's man, has 1 plough. 9 Freemen with 2 bovates of land; 6 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 1 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Soca In Toresbi et Aluuoldesbi. I. bouata et V. partes. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA in Caburne. Ibi. II. uillani et II. saline. II. solidorum. et XV. acrae prati.
In THORESBY and `AUTBY' 1 bovate and 5 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Cabourne. 2 villagers. 2 salt-houses, 2s; meadow, 15 acres. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

. II. Maneria In TORP. habuerunt Clac et Leuuinus. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Gislebertus homo Hugonis habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. sochemannos de. V. bouatis terre et dimidia. et XII. uillanos et V. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. L.

In THORPE Klak and Leofwin had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Gilbert, Hugh's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 2 Freemen with 5 1/2 bovates of land; 12 villagers and 5 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 50. Exactions 10s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Berewita In Bechebi BEREWITA. V. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. uillanus et I. bordarius. habent. I. bouem in caruca.

In BIGBY, an outlier, 5 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 villager and 1 smallholder have 1 ox in a plough. Thorpe. Klak and Leofwin had it. Gilbert, Hugh's man, has it ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In HAMINGEBI. habuit Edric. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi habet Hugo. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos de. II. bouatis terre. et III. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo. C. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In HEMINGBY Edric had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Hugh has 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen with 2 bovates of land; 3 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 100. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Soca In Buchehale Soca. VI. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi. V. sochemanni et II. uillani habent. I. carucam. et LXV. acras prati. et IX. acras siluae pastilis et minutae siluae. V. acras.

Jurisdiction: In BUCKNALL 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 5 Freemen and 2 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 65 acres; pasturable woodland, 9 acres; underwood, 5 acres. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Soca In Horsintone. II. carucatae terrae et VI. bouatae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi XVI. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et CL. III. acrae prati. et XV. acrae siluae minutae.
In HORSINGTON 2 carucates of land and 6 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 16 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 153 acres; underwood, 15 acres. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
