Soca In Ludeforde SOCA in Wicham. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam. et IIII. acrae prati.
In LUDFORD, a jurisdiction of ` Wykeham', 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough. Meadow, 4 acres. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In CLACHESBI. habuit Dane. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. XIIII. bobus. Ibi Wido gener Hugonis. habet. II. carucas. et I. sochemannum de III. bouatis terre. et V. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et CXX. acrae siluae minutae. Inde habet Gislebertus de gand. II. partes. et Wido alias tres partes. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. IX.

In CLAXBY Dene had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has 2 ploughs. 1 Freeman with 3 bovates of land; 5 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 2s; underwood, 120 acres. Gilbert of Ghent has 2 parts of this and Guy the other three parts. Value before 1066 £8; now 9. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Soca In Widerne. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni et II. uillani habent. II. carucas. et XII. acras prati. et LX.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In WITHERN 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 8 Freemen and 2 villagers have 2 ploughs and meadow, 12 acres; underwood, 60 acres. . Dene had it. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has it ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Soca In Endretorp. II. carucatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum Ibi. XIX. sochemanni et IX. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. Silua minuta dimidiam leuam longa. et tantundem lata.

In WOODTHORPE 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 19 Freemen and 9 smallholders have 4 ploughs. Underwood 1/2 league long and as wide. . Dene had it. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has it ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Soca In Strobi V. bouatae et Malteby. II. . VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi. V. sochemanni habent. V. boues in caruca. et XXX. acras prati.

In STRUBBY, 5 bovates, and MALTBY, 2 : 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 5 Freemen have 5 oxen in a plough and meadow, 30 acres. . Dene had it. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has it ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Soca In Saleby. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. II. sochemanni et II. uillani. habent. II. carucas.
In SALEBY 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 2 Freemen and 2 villagers have 2 ploughs. . Dene had it. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has it ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric
Soca In Thuorstorp. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. V. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. et XL. acrae prati. et XL.

In THORESTHORPE 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 5 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 40 acres. . Dene had it. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has it ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric

Manerium In SLODEBI. habuit Dane. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Wido gener hugonis habet. IIII. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et IIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. VI. solidos.

In SLOOTHBY Dene had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Guy , Hugh's son-in-law, has 4 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 4 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 6s. ? Land of Hugh son of Baldric Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In BROTULBI habuit Chetel. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Colsuan. II. carucas in dominio. et IX. sochemannos de. VII. bouatis huius terrae. et VI. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. IIII. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo LX. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In BRATTLEBY Ketil had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 2 ploughs in lordship; 9 Freemen with 7 bovates of this land; 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 4 ploughs. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In RISUN. habuit Lepsi. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Colsuan. II. carucas. et III. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et I. molinum II. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. LX.

In RISEHOLME Leofsi had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Kolsveinn has 2 ploughs. 3 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. 1 mill, 2s. Value before 1066, 20s; now 60. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In FALINGEURDE. habuit Sberne dimidiam carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra IIII. boum. Ibi. III. uillani Colsuan habent dimidiam carucam. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. X. solidos. modo. V. et IIII. denarios.
In FALDINGWORTH Esbiorn had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 3 villagers of Kolsveinn 's have 1/2 plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 5 4d. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In SCOTSTORNE et Holme et Sudborc. habuit Turulf. III. carucatas terrae et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuan. I. carucam. et XI. sochemannos de. II. carucatis terrae et dimidia. et I. uillanum et I. bordarium. cum. III. carucis. et LXIIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX. Tailla XX. ti solidos.

In SCOTHERN, `HOLME' and SUDBROOKE Thorulf had 3 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 1 plough. 11 Freemen with 2 1/2 carucates of land; 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 64 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Ibidem habuit Godric. IIII. bouatas terrae |et dimidiam. ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. uillanus et I. bordarius habent. II. boues in caruca. T. R. E. et modo ualet. V. solidos.
There also Godric had 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 villager and 1 smallholder have 2 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066 and now, 5s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Ibidem habet Colsuan. I. carucatam terrae de rege sicut dicit. et inde reddit in fiscartone Sancto Petro de bur consuetudinem. Ibi habet. I. molinum. et III. uillanos cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. et modo. X. solidos reddit.

There also Kolsveinn has 1 carucate of land from the King as he says, of which he pays the customary dues in Fiskerton to St Peter's of Peterborough. He has 1 mill; 3 villagers with 1 plough. Before 1066 and now it paid , 10s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In BERLINGE. habuit Col. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. $ Ibi habet Colsuain. I. carucam. et III. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et I. ecclesiam. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. IIII. libras.
In BARLINGS Cola had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Kolsveinn has 1 plough and 3 villagers with 1/2 plough; and 1 church. Value before 1066, 10s; now £4. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Refan. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. BEREWITA Ibi Colsuan. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos dimidia caruca. et XVIII. acras prati.
In REEPHAM 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. An outlier. Kolsveinn 1 plough. 4 villagers 1/2 plough. Meadow, 18 acres. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In CAMESLINGEHAM. habuerunt Chenut et Elnod et Ulchel. et Sbern. IIII. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuan. IIII. carucas in dominio. et VIII. sochemannos de dimidia carucata huius terrae. et XI. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. III. carucis. et LXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In CAMMERINGHAM Cnut , Alnoth, Ulfkil and Esbiorn had 4 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 4 ploughs in lordship; 8 Freemen with 1/2 carucate of this land; 11 villagers and 2 smallholders with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 70 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 4. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In INGEHAM. habuerunt Frane et Summerled. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae et dimidiae. Ibi Rogerius et Anschitil homines Colsuan habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et IIII. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. III. bobus in caruca. et XVI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. XXX. Tailla. X. solidos. $

In INGHAM Frani and Sumarlithi had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Roger and Ansketil, Kolsveinn 's men, have 1 1/2 ploughs. 4 villagers and 1 smallholder with 3 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 30. Exactions 10s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Soca In Frisetorp. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. SOCA in Ingeham. VII. bouatae et Felingeham XVII. bouatae. Ibi. X. sochemanni et III. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et L. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae.

In FRIESTHORPE 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Ingham, 7 bovates, and Fillingham, 17 bovates. 10 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 50 acres; underwood, 20 acres. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Soca In Faldingeurde. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. $ SOCA in Figelingeham. VI. bouatae. et Sperlintone. I. carucata et Lageham. II. bouatae. Ibi. IX. sochemanni. habent. I. carucam. et XXVI. acras prati. et I. acra siluae.

In FALDINGWORTH 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Fillingham, 6 bovates, Spridlington, 1 carucate, and Ingham, 2 bovates. 9 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 26 acres; woodland, 1 acre. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In HANEURDE. habuit Frane. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Turoldus presbyter habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos. et I. bordarium habentes. I. carucam. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXX.

In HANWORTH Frani had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Turold the priest has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 1 plough and meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Hagetorne BEREWITA. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum.
In HACKTHORN, an outlier, 3 bovates of land taxable and the fourth part of 1 bovate. Land for 4 oxen. Hanworth. Frani had it. Turold the priest has it ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In eadem HAGETORNE. habuit Chenut. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi habet Colsuan. II. boues in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos et IIII. denarios. modo similiter.
Also in HACKTHORN Cnut had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Kolsveinn has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 5s 4d; now the same. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In SCALEBI et Stratone. habuit Turulf. XI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Aluredus homo Colsuan habet. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terre. et III. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo. XX. Tailla. V. solidos.

In SCAWBY and STURTON Thorulf had 11 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Alfred , Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 3 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20. Exactions 5s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Reburne. II. bouatae terrae et IIII. partes. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus et dimidia. Colsuan habet et Wasta. est.
In REDBOURNE 2 bovates of land and 4 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 5 1/2 oxen. Kolsveinn has it. It is waste. has it. Thorulf had it ? Land of Kolsveinn
Soca In Hiboldestou. tercia pars. II. bouatae. ad geldum. SOCA in Scalebi
In HIBALDSTOW the third part of 2 bovates taxable. A jurisdiction of Scawby. has it. Thorulf had it ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In RISUN et Carlentun habuit Alsi dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Matheus homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et XX. acras prati. et CLX acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit XV. solidos. modo. XXX.

In RISEHOLME and CARLTON Alsi had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Matthew, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 160 acres. Value before 1066, 15s; now 30. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Manerium In COCRINTON. habuit Elnod. I. bouatam terre ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi habet Matheus dimidiam carucam. T. R. E. et modo. III. solidos.
In COCKERINGTON Alnoth had 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Matthew has 1/2 plough. before 1066 and now, 3s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In BERLINGE habuit Osgot. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. $ Ibi habet Colsuain. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et XX. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XL.

In BARLINGS Asgot had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Kolsveinn has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In CHEFTESBI habuit Aschil. III. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas |et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Colsuani homo Adelelmus. II. carucas. et IX. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et I. molinum. XVI. denariorum. et LVIII. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In KEXBY Eskil had 3 carucates of land and 3 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Adelelm, Kolsveinn 's man, has 2 ploughs. 9 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. 1 mill, 16d; meadow, 58 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 10s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
$ Soca In Cotes. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA in Ingeham.
In COATES 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Ingham. had it. Roger and Ansketil, Kolsveinn 's men, have it ? Land of Kolsveinn

. V. Maneria In FILINGEHAM. habuerunt Frane et Elnod et Aschil et Elnod et Godric. VII. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra. XI. carucarum. $ Ibi habet Colsuan. IIII. carucas. et XXX. II. sochemannos de. IIII. carucatis huius terre et dimidia. et XII. uillanos. cum. III. carucis et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia et CCXL. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. V. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In FILLINGHAM Frani, Alnoth, Eskil, Alnoth and Godric had 7 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 11 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 4 ploughs. 32 Freemen with 4 1/2 carucates of this land; 12 villagers with 3 1/2 ploughs. A church; meadow, 240 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 5. Exactions 40s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In SPERLINCTONE. habuerunt Ebrardus et II. fratres eius. II. carucatas terrae et V. bouatas et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuain. II. carucas. et IIII. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terrae. et XVI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXI. solidos. modo XL.

In SPRIDLINGTON Everard <of Spridlington> and his 2 brothers had 2 carucates of land and 5 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 2 ploughs. 4 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 16 villagers and 4 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 21s; now 40. Exactions 10s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In OUSTORP. habuit Eddiue. III. carucatas terrae et dimidiam. et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuain. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XLIIII. acras prati. et XXIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. LX.

In AUSTHORPE Edeva had 3 1/2 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 44 acres; underwood, 23 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60. ? Land of Kolsveinn

. II. Maneria In HECHINTUNE. habuerunt Turchil et Algar. I. carucatam terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae et V. boum. Ibi Conded homo Colsuain habet. I. uillanum et XVIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXXVI. solidos. modo XXX. solidos.

In HECKINGTON Thorkil and Algar had 1 carucate of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 1 plough and 5 oxen. Conded, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 villager and meadow, 18 acres. Value before 1066, 36s; now 30s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Helpericham. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus et II. acrae prati. Haec terra pene Wasta. est.

In HELPRINGHAM 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 villager. Meadow, 2 acres. This land is almost waste. [Outlier of Heckington. Thorkil and Algar had it. Conded, Kolsveinn 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn
In HUUELLE Hundret. II. bouatae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA in Cherchebi.
In HOWELL hundred 2 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Kirkby. ? Land of Kolsveinn

. II. Maneria In LEDULUETORP. habuerunt Tor et Aschil. V. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Ibi habet Conded et Anchitil homines Colsuain. IIII. carucas. et VII. uillanos. et. X. bordarios. et I. sochemannum cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et dimidia aecclesia et cum dimidia presbytero. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In `LAYTHORPE' Thor and Eskil had 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Conded and Ansketil, Kolsveinn 's men, have 4 ploughs. 7 villagers, 10 smallholders and 1 Freeman with 1 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 church with 1/2 priest. Value before 1066 £4; now the same. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In DODINTONE. habuit Outi. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi habet Colsuain. II. uillanos et II. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et dimidium molinum. III. solidorum. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. X. solidos.

In DODDINGTON Auti had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Kolsveinn has 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Soca Ibidem. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. SOCA in Merestone. Ibi. II. sochemanni et II. bordarii. habent. II. os boues. Dominus dimidiam carucam. et X. acras prati.

There also DODDINGTON 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of Marston. 2 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 2 oxen. The lord 1/2 plough and meadow, 10 acres. had it. Walter, Kolsveinn 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In MERESTONE habuit Alsi. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. in dominio. et X. bouatas terrae in SOCA. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Walterius homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos et V. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et I. boue. et sedem unius molini. et XXX. II. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. L.

In MARSTON Alsi had 1 carucate of land taxable in lordship and 10 bovates of land in a jurisdiction. Land for 3 ploughs. Walter, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 4 Freemen and 5 smallholders with 1 plough and 1 ox. 1 mill site; meadow, 32 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 50. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Soca In HACHAM. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. SOCA in Merestone. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et I. bordarius. habent dimidiam carucas. et IIII. acras prati.

In HOUGHAM 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. A jurisdiction of Marston. 4 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 1/2 plough and meadow, 4 acres. had it. Walter, Kolsveinn 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In HACHAM. habuit Azor. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et V. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et II. bobus. et II. acras et dimidiam prati. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. XXX. solidos.
In HOUGHAM A

Manerium In BOLINBURG. habuit Suen. II. carucatas terrae et VII. bouatas ad geldum. Ibi Brunel homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VIII. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi dimidia aecclesia. et I. molinus. V. solidorum. et IIII. denariorum. et XXVII. acrae prati. et XXVI. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX.

In BILLINGBOROUGH Swein had 2 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Brunel, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 8 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 church; 1 mill, 5s 4d; meadow, 27 acres; underwood, 26 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In ULUESBI habuit Alsi. II. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XVIII. bobus. Ibi Brunel homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VIII. uillanos cum. II. carucis. Ibi dimidia aecclesia et I. molinus V. solidorum. et IIII. denariorum. T. R. E. et modo ualet. LX. solidos.

In `OSEBY' Alsi had 2 carucates of land and 1 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 18 oxen. Brunel, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 8 villagers with 2 ploughs. 1/2 church; 1 mill, 5s 4d. Value before 1066 and now, 60s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Soca In Poclintone dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi habet Conded homo Colsuain. I. carucam. et III. bordarios. et IIII. acras prati.
In POINTON 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Conded, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 3 smallholders. Meadow, 4 acres. had it ? Land of Kolsveinn
Soca In Spanebi. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. XII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et XX. acras prati.
In SPANBY 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 12 Freemen have 2 ploughs and meadow, 20 acres. had it. Brunel, Kolsveinn 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn

. II. Maneria In NEUTONE. habuerunt Turchil et Goduin. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Radulfus homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et XVII. I acrae prati. et LXII. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. LXX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In NEWTON Thorkil and Godwin had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Ralph, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 18 acres; underwood, 72 acres. before 1066 and now, 70s. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Uluesbi. VI. bouatae terrae et tercia pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Inland in Neutone. Ibi modo. I. bordarius et sedes unius molini. et IX. acrae prati.

In `OSEBY' 6 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 plough. of Newton. Now 1 smallholder. 1 mill site; meadow, 9 acres. and Godwin had it. Ralph, Kolsveinn 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Trinchigeham. XIIII. bouatae. et III. pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Inland. Ibi. I. sochemannus. et V. uillani et III. bordarii cum. I. caruca et dimidia.

In THREEKINGHAM 14 bovates and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. . 1 Freeman, 5 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. and Godwin had it. Ralph, Kolsveinn 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In DELBEBI. habuit Gonchel. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi Rainaldus homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et XVI. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E.

In DEMBLEBY Gunnketill had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Rainald, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 4 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In SUAUETONE habuit Auti. VII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra IX. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuan. III. carucas. et XL. sochemannos de. V. carucatis huius terrae. et VII. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. X. carucis. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In SWATON Auti had 7 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 3 ploughs. 40 Freemen with 5 carucates of this land; 7 villagers and 2 smallholders with 10 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now 4. Exactions 40s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In Eadem uilla habuerunt Alsi et Adestan. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Aluricus frater eorum habebat socam super illos in Hazebi solummodo in seruitio regis. Ibi Colsuain habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et XIII. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. X. solidos.

Also in this village Alsi and Aethelstan had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Aelfric , their brother, had jurisdiction over them in Haceby but only in the King's service. Kolsveinn has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 13 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In HORBELINGE. habuit Suen. III. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi Matheuss homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et XI. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terrae. et III. uillanos cum. III. carucis. et XV. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In HORBLING Swein had 3 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Matthew, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 11 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 3 villagers with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 15 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In ASEBI. habuit Aslac. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus homo Colsuain habet. IX. sochemannos. et II. bordarios. habentes. IIII. carucas. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In AISBY Aslak had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. William <of Pickworth>, Kolsveinn 's man, has 9 Freemen and 2 smallholders who have 4 ploughs and meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same. Exactions 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In BERTONE et Billesfelt habuit Letfled. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Willelmus homo Colsuain habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos et II. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et IIII. acrae prati. et CL. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.

In BURTON and BITCHFIELD Leodfled had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. William <of Pickworth>, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 4 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 150 acres. Value before 1066, 16s; now 20s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

. II. Maneria In ASCHEBI. habuerunt Outi et Aschil. III. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuain. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XII. uillanos. et II. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terrae. et I. bordarium. cum. II. carucis. et XV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. LXX. solidos.

In ASHBY Auti and Eskil had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 1 1/2 ploughs. 12 villagers and 2 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 15 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 70s. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In NORTCHIME. habuit Outi. V. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Colsuain. I. carucam. et I. piscariam. VIII. denariorum. et XX. acras prati. et V. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. IIII. libras.

In NORTH KYME Auti had 5 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Kolsveinn has 1 plough. 1 fishery, 8d; meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 5 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £4. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Soca In Westbi. X. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Frisoca in Heidure. Ibi. I. sochemannus et VI. uillani habent. II. carucas. et XII. acrae prati. et L. acrae siluae pastilis per loca.

In WESTBY 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. A free jurisdiction of Heydour. 1 Freeman and 6 villagers have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 12 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 50 acres. ? Land of Kolsveinn
Berewita In Euedune. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Inland in Cherchebi. Ibi. VI. acrae prati. et VIII. acrae siluae minutae. et XL. acrae maresch.
In EVEDON 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. of Kirkby. Meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 8 acres; marsh, 40 acres. ? Land of Kolsveinn

Manerium In PICHEUORDE. habuit Outi. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. hae duae carucatae non sunt in numero alicuius hundret. neque habent pares in Lincolescyra. Ibi Willelmus homo Colsuain habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. Ibi presbyter et dimidiam aecclesia. In ista terra habet quidam francus homo. I. carucam. et

In PICKWORTH Auti had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. These 2 carucates are not in the count of any hundred and do not have their like in Lincolnshire. William <of Pickworth>, Kolsveinn 's man, has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. A priest and 1/2 church. On that land a certain freeman has 1 carucate. ? Land of Kolsveinn
In eadem uilla. II. bouatae terrae et dimidia sunt ad geldum. Terra. III. bobus et dimidiae. SOCA in Picheuorde. Ibi. II. uillani. habent. II. boues. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

Also in this village 2 1/2 bovates of land are taxable. Land for 3 1/2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Pickworth. 2 villagers have 2 oxen. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. 's man, has it ? Land of Kolsveinn Land of Alfred of Lincoln

Manerium In GOLSE. habuit Siuuardus. I. carucatam terre |et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Radulfus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et XVI. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terre. et VI. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL. Tailla. X. solidos.

In GOXHILL Siward <of Thistleton> had 1 carucate of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Ralph, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 16 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 6 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In HABURNE. habuit Aluuinus. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Ibi Radulfus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum et II. bordarios. cum. II. bobus. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. XXX. solidos.

In HABROUGH Alwin had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Ralph, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager and 2 smallholders with 2 oxen. 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 30 acres. before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In COTES habuit Morcar. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi Bernardus homo Aluredi. habet. II. uillanos et II. bordarios. et VIII. sochemannos. de. I. bouata huius terrae. cum. II. carucis. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XXIIII.

In COATES Morcar had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Bernard, Alfred's man, has 2 villagers, 2 smallholders and 8 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land with 2 ploughs; and meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 24.
Berewita In Alesbi. dimidia bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I. bouem. /SOCA in Cotes.
In AYLESBY 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 villager has 1 ox. A jurisdiction of Coates. Morcar had it. Bernard, Alfred's man, has it

Manerium In HECHELINGE. habuit Morcar. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Bernardus homo Aluredi habet. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos de dimidia carucata. huius terrae. et II. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et dimidium molinum III. solidorum. et XXVI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. X. solidos.

In HEALING Morcar had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Bernard, Alfred's man, has 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen with 1/2 carucate of this land; 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 26 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50. Exactions 10s.
Berewita In Sualun. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Inland huius Manerii. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I. bouem in caruca.
In SWALLOW 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. of this manor. 1 villager has 1 ox in a plough. Morcar had it. Bernard, Alfred's man, has it

. II. Maneria In LINDUDE. habuerunt Willelmus et Grimchel et Asford. I. carucatam terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Aluredus. II. carucas in dominio. et XX. uillanos et V. bordarios cum. IIII. carucis. et II. as partes molini. II. solidorum. et CC. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LXV. solidos. modo L. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In LINWOOD William , Grimkel and Asfrith had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Alfred has 2 ploughs in lordship; 20 villagers and 5 smallholders with 4 ploughs; and 2 parts of a mill, 2s; meadow, 280 acres. Value before 1066, 65s; now 50s. Exactions 10s.
Berewita In Rase. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Inland huius Manerii. Ibi. III. uillani habent. II. boues in caruca.
In RASEN 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. of this manor. 3 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough. [Outlier of Linwood. William , Grimkel and Asfrith had it
Soca In altera Rase. IIII. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae SOCA. Ibi. X. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et I. molinum XII. denariorum. et X.

In the other RASEN 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction. 10 Freemen have 1 plough and 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 10 acres. [Jurisdiction of Linwood. William , Grimkel and Asfrith had it

. II. Maneria In TORESUUE. habuerunt Rolf et Code. V. carucatas terrae et VII. bouatas ad geldum. Terra XIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Aluredus. II. carucas. et LVI. sochemannos. et V. uillanos. cum. V. carucis. et II. molinos. III. solidorum. et XL. acras prati. in soca de Castre. Manerium Willelmi de perci. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. C. solidos. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In THORESWAY Rolf and Koddi had 5 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for 13 ploughs. Alfred has 2 ploughs. 56 Freemen and 5 villagers with 5 ploughs. 2 mills, 3s; meadow, 40 acres in the jurisdiction of Caistor, William of Percy's manor. Value before 1066 £4; now 100s. Exactions 40s.
In Tauelesbi habet Aluredus. I. molinum. in soca episcopi baiocensis.
In TEALBY Alfred has 1 mill in the Bishop of Bayeux's jurisdiction. had it

Manerium In CUCUALT. habuit Leduinus. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Gleu homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et II. os uillanos et I. bordarium. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.
In CUXWOLD Leodwin had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Gleu <of Rothwell>, Alfred's man, has 1 plough and 2 villagers and 1 smallholder. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
Soca In Caburne. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Cucualt. Ibi. I. uillanus et I. bordarius habent. I. bouem in caruca.
In CABOURNE 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Cuxwold. 1 villager and 1 smallholder have 1 ox in a plough.

. II. Maneria In RODEUUELLE. habuerunt Grinchil et Willelmus. IIII. carucatas terrae et. I. bouata. . ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi Gleu homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XII. sochemannos de. VII. bouatis huius terrae. et VII. uillanos. et I. bordarium. cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et II. molinos. III. solidorum. et XLVI. acras prati. et unam aecclesiam. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III. Tailla. X. solidos.

In ROTHWELL Grimkel and William had 4 carucates of land and 1 bovate } taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Gleu <of Rothwell>, Alfred's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs and 12 Freemen with 7 bovates of this land; 7 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 1/2 ploughs; and 2 mills, 3s; meadow, 46 acres; 1 church. Value before 1066 £4; now 3. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In RODEWELLE. habuit Torchetel dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Aluredus. I. sochemannum et II. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. et modo ualet. VI. solidos.
In ROTHWELL Thorkil had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Alfred has 1 Freeman and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066 and now, 6s.
In Toresbi et Alduluebi. habet Aluredus. I. salinam in Rodeuuelle.
In THORESBY and `AUTBY' Alfred has 1 salt-house in Rothwell.
Soca In Cucualt. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. III. sochemanni habent. I. carucam.
In CUXWOLD 1 bovate of land taxable. 3 Freemen have 1 plough.
Soca In Caburne. II. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Wasta. est.
In CABOURNE 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. It is waste.

Manerium In STIGESWALT. habuit Siuuard. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi habet idem de Aluredo. IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.

In STIXWOULD Siward <of Thistleton> had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. He also has from Alfred 4 villagers with 1 plough; and meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 40 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Soca In Terintone habuit Rolf. III. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in ipsa uilla. Ibi habet Gozelinus homo Aluredi II. sochemannos et dimidium. habentes. II. boues et dimidium in caruca. et XI. acras prati.

In TORRINGTON Rolf had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of the village itself. Jocelyn , Alfred's man, has 2 1/2 Freemen who have 2 1/2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 11 acres.

Soca Ibidem habuit Clac. III. bouatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in Haintone. Ibi. II. sochemanni et dimidius habent. II. boues et dimidium in caruca. Gozelinus tenet de Aluredo
There also Klak had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Hainton. 2 1/2 Freemen have 2 1/2 oxen in a plough. Jocelyn holds from Alfred.

Manerium In ALUINGEHAM. habuit Edric. V. bouatas terrae et dimidiam. et VI. pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae et dimidiae. Ibi Gozelinus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. Due bouatae de hac terra sunt in SOCA. et XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XXX.

In ALVINGHAM Edric had 5 1/2 bovates of land and the sixth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. Jocelyn , Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers with 1/2 plough. 2 bovates of this land are in a jurisdiction. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30.
Soca In Brachenberg. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi Rannulfus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. SOCA in Aluingham. et X. acrae prati.
In BRACKENBOROUGH 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Ranulf, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 4 villagers with 1/2 plough. A jurisdiction of Alvingham. Meadow, 10 acres.

. II. Maneria In ipsa uilla habuerunt Edric et Hoch. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XIIII. boum. Ibi habet Rannulfus homo Aluredi habet. I. uillanum et X. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et IIII. partes molini. II. solidorum. et XVIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. solidos. modo. XL.

In this village Edric and Hoc had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Ranulf, Alfred's man, has 1 villager and 10 Freemen with 2 ploughs. 4 parts of a mill, 2s; meadow, 18 acres. Value before 1066, 16s; now 40.

. III. Maneria In COCRINTONE. habuerunt Edric et Macus. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XIIII. bobus. Ibi Aluredus et Gozelinus homo eius habent K dimidiam carucam. et I. sochemannum de una tofta. et II. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et dimidium molinum. III. solidorum. et LXX. acrae prati. et LVIII. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XXI. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos.

In COCKERINGTON Edric and Maccus <of Cockerington> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Alfred and Jocelyn , his man, have 1/2 plough. 1 Freeman with 1 plot; 2 villagers with 1/2 plough. 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 70 acres; underwood, 58 acres. Value before 1066, 21s; now 30s.

Manerium In STIUETONE. habuit Elmer. XIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et II. boum. Ibi Aluredus. II. carucas. et X. sochemannos de dimidia carucata terrae. . et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et CC. acrae siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. LX. solidos.

In STEWTON Almer had 13 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 2 oxen. Alfred has 2 ploughs. 10 Freemen with 1/2 carucate of land; 8 villagers with 1 plough. Pasturable woodland, 200 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 60s.

Manerium In CATEBI. habuit Macus. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. XIIII. bobus. Ibi habet Aluredus. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XX. ti

In ` CADEBY' Maccus <of Cockerington> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Alfred has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 4 bovates of this land; 4 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 13 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20.
Soca In Grimoldebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Catebi. Aluredus habet. II. partes et Willelmus terciam. Wasta. est.
In GRIMOLDBY 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of ` Cadeby'. Alfred has 2 parts and William the third. It is waste.
Soca In Salflatebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis et dimidii. SOCA in catebi. Aluredus habet. II. partes. Willelmus terciam.
In SALTFLEETBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. A jurisdiction of ` Cadeby'. Alfred has 2 parts, William the third.

Manerium In TORP. CATEBI habuit Rolf. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi habet Aluredus. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de duabus bouatis huius terrae et dimidia. et III. uillanos habentes. II. boues in caruca. et VI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. LX.

In CALCETHORPE - ` CADEBY' - Rolf had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Alfred has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 2 1/2 bovates of this land; 3 villagers who have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 60.
Soca In Wicham dimidia bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. SOCA in Torp. /Wasta est
In ` WYKEHAM' 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. A jurisdiction of Calcethorpe. It is waste. had it
# Soca In eodem Wicham. V. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. SOCA in Catebi. Ibi. V. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam. et X. acras prati.
Also in ` WYKEHAM' 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. A jurisdiction of ` Cadeby'. 5 Freemen have 1/2 plough and meadow, 10 acres. had it *

. II. Maneria In CHELESTORNE. habuerunt Rolf et Machus. II. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Aluredus. . I. carucam. et IX. sochemannos de. XV. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos. cum. II. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL.

In KELSTERN Rolf and Maccus <of Cockerington> had 2 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 5 1/2 ploughs. Alfred has 1 plough. 9 Freemen with 15 bovates of this land; 4 villagers with 2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40.

Manerium In OFFINTONE. habuit Erneber. VII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem. carucarum. Ibi habet Aluredus. II. carucas in dominio. et XVI. sochemannos de. IIII. carucattis huius terrae. et XXX. I. uillanos. cum. VII. carucis. et III. molinos et dimidium de XL. solidis. $ Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et C. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VII. libras. modo. XI. Tailla. III. libras.

In UFFINGTON Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 7 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Alfred has 2 ploughs in lordship; 16 Freemen with 4 carucates of this land; 31 villagers with 7 ploughs. 3 1/2 mills at 40s. A church and a priest; meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £7; now 11. Exactions £3.

Manerium In eadem uilla habuit Leduinus. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Aluredus. IIII. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et IX. burgenses de Stanford reddentes. IIII. solidos. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

Also in this village Leodwin had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Alfred has 4 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 3 villagers with 1 plough; 9 burgesses of Stamford who pay 4s. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.
Soca In Estou. I. bouata et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis et dimidii. Aluredus habet ibi aecclesiam unam quae iacet in Offintone.
In STOWE 1 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. Alfred has there 1 church which lies in Uffington.

Manerium In CASUIC habuit | Uluiet. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Boso homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. II. bobus in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XX. ti solidos.
In CASEWICK Wulfgeat had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Boso, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20s.

Manerium In TALINTONE. habuit Oluiet. VI. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet. II. carucas. et XIIII. sochemannos de. IIII. carucatis terrae. et IX. uillanos cum. IIII. carucis. et I. molinum. XII. solidorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In TALLINGTON Wulfgeat had 6 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. He has 2 ploughs. 14 Freemen with 4 carucates of land; 9 villagers with 4 ploughs. 1 mill, 12s; meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 4. Exactions 20s.

In Estdepinge. IIII. bouatae. terrae ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. SOCA huius Manerii. Ibi. VI. uillani et II. bordarii habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XX. acras prati. et I. piscariam. V. denariorum.
In `EAST DEEPING' * 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. A jurisdiction of this manor. 6 villagers and 2 smallholders have 1 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 20 acres; 1 fishery, 5d.

Manerium In CRETONE. habuit Turchil. VI. bouatas terrae et III. partes. II. bouatis ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi Radulfus homo Aluredi. habet dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos. et II. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. XX. solidos.

In CREETON Thorkil had 6 bovates of land and 3 parts of 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many oxen. Ralph, Alfred's man, has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers. Meadow, 2 acres; underwood, 30 acres. before 1066 and now, 20s.

Manerium In GRENEHAM et Auuartorp et Bolebi. habuit Aldene. II. carucatas terrae et VII. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Aluredus II. carucas. et IIII. sochemannos de. X. bouatis huius terrae. et II. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et VIII. acras prati. et CCC. XX. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo XL. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In IRNHAM, HAWTHORPE and BULBY Healfdene had 2 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Alfred has 2 ploughs. 4 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 2 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 8 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 320 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In AIGLESTORP. habuit Siuuard. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum. Ibi habet Aluredus. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. VI. bouatis huius terrae. et V. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et XVIII. acras prati. et CCXL. acras siluae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In ELSTHORPE Siward <of Thistleton> had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Alfred has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 6 bovates of this land; 5 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 18 acres; woodland, 240 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In STIGANDEBI. habuit Siuuardus. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra VIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Aluredus. II. carucas. et II. molinos. II. solidorum. et VIII. acras prati et dimidiam. et XL. acras siluae minutae. Ibi. IIII. carucatae eiusdem terrae SOCA. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XL. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In STAINBY Siward <of Thistleton> had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Alfred has 2 ploughs. 2 mills, 2s; meadow, 8 1/2 acres; underwood, 40 acres. 4 carucates of the same land a jurisdiction. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In ROCHESHAM habuit Alden. II. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi Radulfus homo Aluredi. habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VIII. to uillanos cum. II. carucis. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. L. solidos.

In ROXHOLM Healfdene had 2 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Ralph, Alfred's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 8 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50s.

Manerium In BRANZEWELLE. habuit Aldene. II. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Aluredus. III. uillanos et II. bordarios cum III. bobus in caruca. T. R. E. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In BRAUNCEWELL Healfdene had 2 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Alfred has 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 3 oxen in a plough. before 1066, 20s; now 10s.
Soca In Blochesham. II. carucatae terre et III. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi. II. sochemanni cum dimidia caruca.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In BLOXHOLM 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 2 Freemen with 1/2 plough.

Soca In WIME habuit Siuuardus. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Gleu homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et XI. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. III. carucis. et C. acras prati. VI. minus. et quater XX. acras siluae pastis. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. X. solidos. Haec SOCA.

In WITHAM Siward <of Thistleton> had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Gleu <of Rothwell>, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 11 villagers and 3 smallholders with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres, less 6; pasturable woodland, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50. Exactions 10s. This jurisdiction is in Thistleton.

Manerium In TISTELTUNE. habuit Siuuard dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Gleu homo Aluredusd habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et II. bordarios cum dimidia. caruca. Precium eius in Wime.

In THISTLETON Siward <of Thistleton> had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Gleu <of Rothwell>, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Its valuation in Witham.
Soca In alia Tisteltune. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent III. boues in caruca.

Jurisdiction: In another THISTLETON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 2 Freemen have 3 oxen in a plough. [Jurisdiction of Thistleton. Siward <of Thistleton> had it. Gleu <of Rothwell>, Alfred's man, has it

Manerium In MERESTONE. habuit Ulsi. I. carucatam terre in dominio. et I. carucatam terrae in soca. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Walefridus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos et II. bordarios. et I. sochemannum cum. III. carucis. et II. molinos. VIII. solidorum. et XXX. II. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos.

In MARSTON Wulfsi had 1 carucate of land in lordship and 1 carucate of land in a jurisdiction. Land for 3 ploughs. Walefrid, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 8 villagers, 2 smallholders and 1 Freeman with 3 ploughs. 2 mills, 8s; meadow, 32 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40.

Manerium In BRUNE. habuit Turchil. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Dodinus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et terciam partem unius molini III. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et VI. piscarias. XVI. denariorum. et VI. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. XX. solidos.

In BOURNE Thorkil had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. <of Rippingale>, Alfred's man, has 1 plough and 2 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough; and the third part of 1 mill, 3s 4d; 6 fisheries, 16d; meadow, 6 acres; pasturable woodland, 30 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
Berewita In Torulfbi. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi IIII. uillani habent dimidiam carucam. Inland in Brune.
In THURLBY 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 4 villagers have 1/2 plough. of Bourne. had it. <of Rippingale>, Alfred's man, has it

Manerium In REPINGHALE. habuit Turchil. XV. bouatas terre et II. as partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi Dodin homo Aluredi habet dimidiam carucam. et VII. uillanos et III. bordarios cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi presbyter. et tercia pars aecclesiae. et XX. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

In RIPPINGALE Thorkil had 15 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. <of Rippingale>, Alfred's man, has 1/2 plough. 7 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. A priest and the third part of a church; meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In CHERCHEBI. habuit Turuert. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi habet Aluredus dimidiam carucam. et IIII. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et XVI. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. XXX. solidos.

In KIRKBY Thorfridh had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Alfred has 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 4 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium Ibidem habuit Osfran. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi isdem Osfran habet de Aluredo. II. boues in caruca. et II. uillanos. et V. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X.

There also Osfram had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Osfram also has from Alfred 2 oxen in a plough. 2 villagers. Meadow, 5 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10.

Manerium In AUETORP. habuit Offran dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra VI. bobus. Ibi Suen homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium. et IIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos. modo similiter.
In `AVETHORPE' Osfram had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Swein, Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder. Meadow, 4 acres. Value before 1066, 5s; now the same.

Manerium In STEPINGEHAM. habuit Morcar. IIII. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi Gozelinus homo Aluredi habet. I. carucam. et XIIII. sochemannos de. II. carucatis et dimidia huius terrae. et VIII. uillanos et II. bordarios. et IIII. tam partem unius aecclesiae. et XI. acras prati. et VII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In `SEMPRINGHAM' Morcar had 4 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Jocelyn , Alfred's man, has 1 plough and 14 Freemen with 2 1/2 carucates of this land; 8 villagers and 2 smallholders; and the fourth part of 1 church; meadow, 11 acres; underwood, 7 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In BELLINGEBURG. habuit Toli. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Gozelinus homo Aluredi. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. II. bobus in caruca. et XIIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo. X. solidos.

In BILLINGBOROUGH Toli had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Jocelyn , Alfred's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 14 acres. before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium In BODEBI et Summertune habuerunt Aldene et Offerd. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum et VI. boum. Ibi Gozelinus homo Aluredi habet. II. carucas et dimidiam. et VI. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos et VI. bordarios cum. II. carucis. et LV. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL.

In BOOTHBY and `SOMERTON' Healfdene and Osfrith had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs and 6 oxen. Jocelyn , Alfred's man, has 2 1/2 ploughs. 6 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 4 villagers and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 55 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40.

Manerium In HOTOT. habuit Stepi. I. bouatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis et dimidii. Ibi Dodo homo Aluredi habet dimidiam carucam. et I. uillanum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.
In HUTTOFT Stiupi had 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. Doda, Alfred's man, has 1/2 plough. 1 villager. Meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium Ibidem habuit Siuuard. I. bouatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis et dimidii. Ibi Bernardus homo aluredi habet. II. boues in caruca. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. V. solidos et IIII. denarios.
There also Siward <of Thistleton> had 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. Bernard, Alfred's man, has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 5s 4d.
Soca In Tedlagestorp. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. II. boues in caruca. et XL. acras prati.

In THEDDLETHORPE 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 4 Freemen and 1 villager have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 40 acres. [* Siward <of Thistleton> had it. Bernard, Alfred's man, has it *
Soca In Haburne. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA in Neuhuse. Aluredus habet et Wasta. est.
In HABROUGH 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Newsham. Alfred has it. It is waste.
Soca In Brochelesbi. I. bouata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. III. bobus. K SOCA in Neuhuse. Ibi habet Aluredus. I. sochemannum cum. II. bobus in caruca. et XI. acras prati.
In BROCKLESBY 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. A jurisdiction of Newsham. Alfred has 1 Freeman with 2 oxen in a plough; and meadow, 11 acres. Land of Jocelyn son of Lambert

Manerium In BLIBURG. habuit Toui. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Gozelinus filius Lanberti habet. II. carucas in dominio. et I. sochemannum de una bouata huius terrae. et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XXXIII. Tailla. VII. solidos.

In BLYBOROUGH Tovi had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Jocelyn son of Lambert has 2 ploughs in lordship; 1 Freeman with 1 bovate of this land; 8 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 33. Exactions 7s.

Manerium In GLENTEUURDE. habuit Godric. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. bobus. Ibi Gozelinus habet. IIII. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. cum dimidia caruca. Anschitillus homo eius habet ibi. I. carucam. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos et VIII. denarios. modo. XX. solidos.

In GLENTWORTH Godric had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Jocelyn has 4 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land with 1/2 plough. Ansketil, his man, has 1 plough there and meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 10s 8d; now 20s.

Manerium In NORMANEBI et Ounesbi. habuit Agemundus dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi Colsuan homo Gozelini habet dimidiam carucam. et I. uillanum. et IIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. solidos. modo. X. solidos.
In NORMANBY and OWMBY Aghmund had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Kolsveinn , Jocelyn's man, has 1/2 plough. 1 villager. Meadow, 4 acres. Value before 1066, 8s; now 10s.
Ibidem habet Gozelinus. IX. bouatas terrae ad geldum. unde. Remigius. episcopus /habet Socam. Terra. IX. boum.
There also and OWMBY Jocelyn has 9 bovates of land taxable of which Bishop Remigius has the jurisdiction. Land for 9 oxen.

. II. Maneria In WILINGEHAM. habuerunt Aslac et Ernui. V. carucatas terrae ad gwldum. et terciam partem unius carucatae. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Walo homo Gozelini. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. III. carucatis et III. bouatis huius terrae et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. XL.

In WILLINGHAM Aslak and Ernwin had 5 carucates of land taxable and the third part of 1 carucate. Land for as many ploughs. Walo <of Willingham>, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 3 carucates and 3 bovates of this land; 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 60s; now 40.
Soca In STOU. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in Wilingeham. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam.
In STOW 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Willingham. 4 Freemen have 1 plough. and Ernwin had it. Walo <of Willingham>, Jocelyn's man, has it

. II. Maneria In INGEHAM. habuerunt Alnod et Aslac. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra XII. bobus. Ibi Anschitil homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. II. bouatis huius terre. et I. bordarium. cum uno boue in caruca. et VI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In INGHAM Alnoth and Aslak had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Ansketil, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 2 bovates of this land; 1 smallholder with 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.
Manerium In COTES. habuit Aslac dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I. bouem in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. V.
In COATES Aslak had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 villager has 1 ox in a plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 5.
Soca Ibidem. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Ingeham. Wasta. est.
There also 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Ingham. It is waste. had it. Ansketil, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Esnetrebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Wadingham. Wasta
In SNITTERBY 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Waddingham. It is waste. had it

. IIII. Maneria In HERPESWELLE. Agemund et Sichet et alii. II. o fratres habuerunt. II. carucatas terre |et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Gozelinus. II. carucas. et XIII. uillanos cum. III. carucis. et dimidiam aecclesiam. et CIX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IX. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. X. solidos.

In HARPSWELL Aghmund and Sigketill and 2 other brothers had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Jocelyn has 2 ploughs and 13 villagers with 3 ploughs; and 1/2 church; meadow, 109 acres. Value before 1066, 9s; now 50. Exactions 10s.
. II. Maneria In HAGETORNE et Haneuuorde habuerunt Sighet et Briteua II. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum.
In HACKTHORN and HANWORTH Sigketill and Bricteva <of Hackthorn> had 2 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 ploughs.

Soca Ibidem. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Herpesuuelle. et aliae Berewita. II. e bouatae terrae ad geldum Inland in dunebi. Terra unius carucae. Ibi habet Gozelinus. II. carucas in dominio. et XI. sochemannos de XIII. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos et XI. bordarios. cum. III. carucis. et I. molinum XVI. denariorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. ti solidos.

There also HANWORTH 4 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Harpswell. Another 2 bovates of land taxable. of Owmby. Land for 1 plough. Jocelyn has 2 ploughs in lordship; 11 Freemen with 13 bovates of this land; 3 villagers and 11 smallholders with 3 ploughs. 1 mill, 16d; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 60s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In WADINGEHAM et Staintone habuerunt Stangrim et Agemund. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi habet Gozelinus. I. carucam. et XX. uillanos cum. I. caruca et II. bobus in caruca. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo XXX. Tailla. X. solidos.

In WADDINGHAM and `STAINTON' Steingrimr and Aghmund had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Jocelyn has 1 plough. 20 villagers with 1 plough and 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30. Exactions 10s.
. III. Maneria In REBURNE. Agemundus et Bruhise et Scule habuerunt. VII.

In REDBOURNE Aghmund , Brunhyse and Skuli had 7 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 14 ploughs and 2 oxen. Jocelyn and a certain man of his have 3 ploughs in lordship; 6 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 21 villagers and 4 smallholders with 3 1/2 ploughs. 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 140 acres. Value before 1066 £13; now 100s. Exactions 20.

Manerium In SCALLEBI et Stratone. habuit Agemundus XIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Baldricus homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et VI. sochemannos de. III. bouatis huius terrae. et I. uillanum et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XXX. Tailla. X. solidos.

In SCAWBY and STURTON Aghmund had 13 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Baldric <of Scawby>, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 6 Freemen with 3 bovates of this land; 1 villager and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In BULESFORDE. habuit Agemundus. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra unius carucae. Ibi Gozelinus et quidam miles eius habent. II. carucas. et I. sochemannum et VI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et sedem unius molimi. et aecclesiam et XV. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. XXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In BOTTESFORD Aghmund had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Jocelyn and a certain man-at-arms of his have 2 ploughs and 1 Freeman, 6 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough; and 1 mill site; a church; meadow, 15 acres; underwood, 30 acres. Value before 1066, £4; now 30s. Exactions 10s.
Berewita In Cletham. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Inland huius Manerii. Ibi. I. uillanus habet /unum bouem.
In CLEATHAM 2 bovates of land taxable. of this manor. 1 villager has 1 ox. had it

Manerium In RASE. habuit Tor. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Walo homo Gozelini. II. boues in caruca. et I. sochemannum de dimidia bouata huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo. XXIIII.

In RASEN Thor had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Walo <of Willingham>, Jocelyn's man, has 2 oxen in a plough. 1 Freeman with 1/2 bovate of this land; 4 villagers with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 10s; now 24.

Manerium In TAUELESBI. habuit Edric. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Godardus homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos de una bouata huius terre. et X. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et III. molinos XVI. solidorum. et LXI. acra prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo C.

In TEALBY Edric. Land for 12 oxen. Godard, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 4 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 10 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. 3 mills, 16s; meadow, 61 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 100. Exactions 60s.

Soca In Wiuilingeham. XV. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi. XXVIII. sochemanni et X. bordarii habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. et CC. acras prati. Ibi habet Iuo dimidiam carucam.

In WILLINGHAM, a jurisdiction of this manor, 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. 28 Freemen and 10 smallholders have 2 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 200 acres. Ivo has 1/2 carucate there. had it. Godard, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Summerlede. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. est unus bordarius.
In 1 bovate of land taxable. 1 smallholder. had it. Godard, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Clachesbi et Normanesbi. IX. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et II. boum. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni habent XI. boues in caruca et XL. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae minutae.
In CLAXBY and NORMANBY 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. 14 Freemen have 11 oxen in a plough and meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 40 acres. had it. Godard, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Osgotesbi. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi. I. bordarius.
In OSGODBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 smallholder. had it. Godard, Jocelyn's man, has it

Manerium In SNELESLUNT. habuit Agemund. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Raynerus homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et III. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terre. et I. uillanum cum dimidia caruca. et X. acras prati. et XIIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

In SNELLAND Aghmund had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Rainer, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 3 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 1 villager with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 14 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Soca In Reresbi. I. carucata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra XII. bobus. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et V. acras prati. et X. acras siluae minutae. De hac soca tenet Willelmus. de perci. IIII. bouatas

In REASBY 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of this manor. Land for 12 oxen. 4 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 5 acres; underwood, 10 acres. Of this jurisdiction William of Percy holds 4 bovates. had it. Rainer, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Sonetorp. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. sochemannus et VI. acrae prati.
In SWINTHORPE 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 Freeman. Meadow, 6 acres. had it. Rainer, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Wichingebi. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. Ibi. IIII. /sochemanni et VI. acrae prati.
In WICKENBY 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. 4 Freemen. Meadow, 6 acres. had it. Rainer, Jocelyn's man, has it

Manerium In BLESEBI. habuit Agemund. XIIII. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Herman homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. sochemannos de. II. bouatis et dimidia huius terrae. et II. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et II. bobus. et CXX. acras prati. et CXX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. XXII. solidos. modo. XL. solidos.

In BLEASBY Aghmund had 14 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Herman, Jocelyn's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 2 Freemen with 2 1/2 bovates of this land; 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough and 2 oxen. Meadow, 120 acres; underwood, 120 acres. before 1066, 22s; now 40s.
Soca In Bechelinge. dimidia bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. Ibi. I.
In BECKERING 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. 1 Freeman ploughs with 1 ox. Meadow, 1/2 acre. had it. Herman, Jocelyn's man, has it
Soca In Houtone. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni cum. IX bobus in caruca. et X. acrae prati. Herman habet Sub Gozelino
In HOLTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 4 Freemen with 9 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Herman has it under Jocelyn. had it

Manerium In BESEBI et Maltebi. habuit Agemund. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Euroldus homo Gozelini habet dimidiam carucam. et I. sochemannum de. IIII. toftis huius terrae. et I. uillanum cum. II. bobus in caruca. et aecclesia. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. X. solidos.

In BEESBY and MALTBY Aghmund had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Evrold, Jocelyn's man, has 1/2 plough. 1 Freeman with 4 plots of this land; 1 villager with 2 oxen in a plough. A church. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium In ADREDEBI. habuit Lesinc. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Baldricus homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et III. sochemannos. et V. uillanos cum. V. carucis et dimidia. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos.

In ENDERBY Leysing had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Baldric <of Scawby>, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 3 Freemen and 5 villagers with 5 1/2 ploughs. 1 mill, 2s. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30s.
In Hacberdingeham habet Gozelinus. I. molinum. II. solidorum.
In HAGWORTHINGHAM Jocelyn has 1 mill, 2s. Enderby. Leysing had it. Baldric <of Scawby>, Jocelyn's man, has it *

Manerium In TEDFORDE. habuit Britnod. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Walterius homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. VI. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos.

In TETFORD Brictnoth had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Walter, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 6 bovates of this land; 3 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s.
Soca In SUMMERDEBI. habuit Agemund. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra XII. bobus. Ibi. V. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et dimidium molinum. X. denariorum.
Jurisdiction of Hameringham: In SOMERSBY Aghmund had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 5 Freemen have 1 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 mill, 10d.

Manerium Ibidem. habuit Snarri. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Raynerus homo Gozelini habet. VI. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et dimidium molinum X. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XVI. solidos.
There also Snarri had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Rainer, Jocelyn's man, has 6 Freemen with 1 plough. 1/2 mill, 10d. Value before 1066, 10s; now 16s.

Manerium In ANDREBI. habuit Lefsi. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Lanbertus homo Gozelini habet. III. boues in caruca. et VI. sochemannos et I. uillanum et I. bordarium. cum. I. boue in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In ENDERBY Leofsi had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Lambert <of Gonerby>, Jocelyn's man, has 3 oxen in a plough. 6 Freemen, 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 1 ox in a plough. Value before 1066, 8s; now 10s.
Soca Ibidem. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. SOCA in Aschebi. Ibi. I. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. I. bouem in caruca.
There also ENDERBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Ashby . 1 Freeman and 1 villager have 1 ox in a plough. and Ketilfrith had it
Soca In Marchebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. I. bouem in caruca.
Also a jurisdiction: In MARKBY 1 bovate of land taxable. 1 Freeman has 1 ox in a plough. . Othenkar and Ketilfrith had it *
Soca In Wenflet. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi. II. uillani habent. II. boues in caruca. et XX. acras prati. et I. salinam. VIII. denariorum.
In WAINFLEET 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 2 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 20 acres; 1 salt-house, 8d. . Othenkar and Ketilfrith had it *

Manerium In WIZEBI et Clachesbi. habuit Agemund. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Walterius homo Gozelini habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum. et I. molinum. IIII. solidorum. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.
In WINCEBY and CLAXBY Aghmund had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Walter, Jocelyn's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager. 1 mill, 4s. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.

Soca In Waletone et Bodebi. II. carucatae terre et II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra III. carucas. SOCA in Clasbi. Ibi Raynerus homo Gozelini habet dimidiam carucam. et XIIII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas.

In WELTON and BOOTHBY 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Claxby . Rainer, Jocelyn's man, has 1/2 plough. 14 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Aghmund had it Land of Eudo son of Spirewic

Manerium In STRATONE. habuerunt Goduinus et Gonewate. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Eudo filius Spireuuic. habet. V. carucas in dominio. et XVI. uillanos. cum. II. carucis. et I. molinum. X. solidorum. et VIII. denariorum. et CC. acras prati. X. minus. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo VIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

SOUTH RIDING In ` STURTON' Godwin and Gunnhvati had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Eudo son of Spirewic has 5 ploughs in lordship; 16 villagers with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 10s 8d; meadow, 200 acres less 10. Value before 1066, 100s; now £8. Exactions 40s.
Berewita In Sudtone BEREWITA. III. bouatae terre et IIII. pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi. II. uillani.
In , an outlier, 3 bovates of land and the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 2 villagers. Sturton'. Godwin and Gunnhvati had it

Soca Ibidem Goduinus. I. bouatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi habet Eudo. III. sochemannos et III. uillanos et dimidium cum. I. caruca. et XXV. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.
There also Godwin 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Eudo has 3 Freemen and 3 1/2 villagers with 1 plough; and meadow, 25 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s. Sturton'

Manerium In CHIRCHEBI. habuerunt Goduinus et Goneuuate dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. Ibi Eudo habet. I. carucam. et VIII. acras prati. et quater XX. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. X. solidos.
In KIRKBY Godwin and Gunnhvati had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Eudo has 1 plough and meadow, 8 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 80 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Soca In Martone. I. carucata terre ad |et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi. II. sochemanni et III. bordarii habent. I. carucam. et XXX. IIII. acras prati. et XXX. IIII. acras siluae pastilis. et CC. acras siluae minutae. X. minus.

In MARTIN 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. 2 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 1 plough and meadow, 34 acres; pasturable woodland, 34 acres; underwood, 200 acres less 10. A jurisdiction of the above manor. . Godwin and Gunnhvati had it

In Wadingurde. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. SOCA. K in Stratone et in Cherchebi. Media. est episcopi dunelensis. et media Eudonis. Ibi XL. sochemanni habent. VIII. carucas et quater XX. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae minutae.

In WADDINGWORTH 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. A jurisdiction of ` Sturton' and Kirkby. Half is the Bishop of Durham's and half Eudo's. 40 Freemen have 8 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 100 acres.

In Wispinctune. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. K Similiter inter episcopum et Eudonem SOCA bipartita. in Stratone et in Chirchebi. Ibi XVIII. sochemanni et XVI. bordarii. habent. VI. carucas. et CXL. acras prati. Eudo clamat super episcopum utriusque partes terrae.

In WISPINGTON 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Likewise a jurisdiction divided in two between the Bishop and Eudo, in ` Sturton' and Kirkby. 18 Freemen and 16 smallholders have 6 ploughs and meadow, 140 acres. Eudo claims against the Bishop parts of each land.

Manerium In TORP. habuerunt Goduinus et Goneuuate. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi modo. II. carucae in dominio. et XVI. uillani et IIII. bordarii habent. II. carucas. Ibi est aecclesia. et IIII. piscariae et dimidia. X. solidorum. et tercia pars. II. molinorum de. VII. solidis. et XXIIII. acrae prati. et CXL. acrae silue pastilis. T. R. E. et modo ualet. C. solidos. De hac uilla habet episcopus dunelmensis terciam partem. Eudo duas.

In THORPE Godwin and Gunnhvati had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now 2 ploughs in lordship; 16 villagers and 4 smallholders have 2 ploughs. A church; 4 1/2 fisheries, 10s; the third part of 2 mills at 7s; meadow, 24 acres; pasturable woodland, 140 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 100s. The Bishop of Durham has the third part of this village, Eudo two .

Manerium In TUNBI. habuit Goduin et Goneuuate. II. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Eudo. I. carucam. et X. uillanos et V. bordarios et II. sochemannos de. II. obus bouatis huius terrae. cum. II. carucis. Ibi. XX. acrae prati. et I. piscaria et dimidia. II. solidorum. et II. molini. XX. solidorum. et CCCLXX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo LX.
