In TUMBY Godwin and Gunnhvati had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Eudo has 1 plough. 10 villagers, 5 smallholders and 2 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 20 acres; 1 1/2 fisheries, 2s; 2 mills, 20s; pasturable woodland in places, 370 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60.
Manerium In ESTRECALE habuit Siuuat VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Eudo dimidiam carucam. et II. uillanos. et V. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. X. solidos.
In EAST KEAL Sighvatr had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Eudo has 1/2 plough. 2 villagers. Meadow, 5 acres. before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium In WESTRECALE. habuit Goduin. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Eudo. I. carucam. et III. bordarios. Ibi aecclesia et I. molinus III. solidorum. et XXIIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo X. solidos.
In WEST KEAL Godwin had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Eudo has 1 plough. 3 smallholders. A church; 1 mill, 3s; meadow, 24 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 10s.
Berewita In Hagenebi. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. BEREWITA Ibi. III. uillani. habent. III. boues in caruca. et VII. acras prati.
In HAGNABY 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. An outlier. 3 villagers have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 7 acres.
Soca In Screnbi. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I.
In SCREMBY 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 villager has 1 ox. 4 parts of 1/2 church.

Soca In Sudtone. V. bouatae terrae. et IIII. pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VII. bobus. SOCA in Burg. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et II. uillani et II. bordarii habent. VI. boues in caruca. et quater XX. acras prati.
In SUTTON 5 bovates of land and the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 7 oxen. A jurisdiction of Burgh. 4 Freemen, 2 villagers and 2 smallholders have 6 oxen in a plough and meadow, 80 acres.

Berewita Ibidem. III. bouatae terrae et IIII. pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. BEREWITA in Stratone. Ibidem. I. bouata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. III. sochemanni et III. uillani. et dimidius habent. I. carucam. et XXV. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.

There also 3 bovates of land and the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 oxen. An outlier of ` Sturton'. There also 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 3 Freemen and 3 1/2 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 25 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
Berewita In Wenflet. II. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus BEREWITA in Cale. Ibi. II. uillani et I. bordarius habent dimidiam carucam.
In WAINFLEET 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. An outlier of Keal. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder have 1/2 plough.
Berewita In Herdetorp. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. BEREWITA in Cale. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I. bouem in caruca.
In ADDLETHORPE 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. An outlier of Keal. 1 villager has 1 ox in a plough.

Manerium In BURG. habuerunt Goduinus et Tochi et Godric. IX. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. Ibi Eudo et II. homines eius habent I. carucam. et V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios et III. sochemannos cum. I. caruca. et quater XX et V. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. XXIII. solidos.

`CANDLESHOE' Wapentake In BURGH Godwin, Toki <of Burgh> and Godric had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Eudo and two of his men have 1 plough. 5 villagers, 4 smallholders and 3 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 85 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 23s.

Berewita In Herdetorp. I. carucata terrae et I. bouata ad geldum. Terra. IX. uem boum. Ex his. IIII. bouatae sunt Wastae. Inland in Burg. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet VI. boues in caruca. Ibi. CLX. acrae prati.
In ADDLETHORPE 1 carucate of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 9 oxen. Of these, 4 bovates are waste. of Burgh. 1 Freeman has 6 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 160 acres.
Berewita In Wenflet. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. Inland in Burg Ibi. III. uillani habent. II. boues in caruca. et IIII. acras prati. et II. salinas /XVI. denariorum.
In WAINFLEET 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. of Burgh. 3 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 4 acres; 2 salt-houses, 16d.
Soca In Tric. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. boum SOCA in burg. Ibi. I. homo habet. I. bouem in caruca. et XXX. acrae prati.
In 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Burgh. 1 man has 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 30 acres.

Manerium In CALNODESBI habuerunt Grinchel et Clac. IIII. carucatas terre et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum et III. boum. Ibi Eudo habet. V. carucas et dimidiam. et X. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terre. et IIII. uillanos et XI. bordarios cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et II. aecclesias. T. R. E. ualuit C. VIII. solidos. modo. VIII. libras et XII. denarios.

In CANDLESBY Grimkel and Klak had 4 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 5 ploughs and 3 oxen. Eudo has 5 1/2 ploughs and 10 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 4 villagers and 11 smallholders with 2 1/2 ploughs; and 2 churches. Value before 1066, 108s; now £8 12d.
Berewita In Herdetorp BEREWITA. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi III. uillani habent. II. boues in caruca. et C. acras prati.
In ADDLETHORPE, an outlier, 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 3 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 100 acres.
Soca In Tric SOCA. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. II. uillani habent. II. boues in caruca. et XXX. acras prati.
In , a jurisdiction, 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 2 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 30 acres.
Soca In Burg SOCA. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet /. I. carucam.
In BURGH, a jurisdiction, 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 Freeman has 1 plough.
Soca Ibidem Sortebrand. I. bouatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. SOCA in Gunnebi. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. II. boues in caruca. Eudo habet.
There also Swartbrand 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. A jurisdiction of Gunby. 1 Freeman has 2 oxen in a plough. Eudo has it.

Manerium In DREISTORP. habuerunt. II. fratres. I. carucatam terre et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. XIII. boum. Ibi Iuo homo Eudonis habet. I. sochemannum cum. II. bobus. et III. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo. VIII. solidos.

In DEXTHORPE two brothers had 1 carucate of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for 13 oxen. Ivo <of Driby>, Eudo's man, has 1 Freeman with 2 oxen; and underwood, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 8s.

Manerium In TORP habuerunt Goduinus et Goneuuate X. bouatas terrae. et II. partes. I. bouate ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi habet Eudo. I. carucam. et X. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. Ibi habet. II. partes aecclesiae. et quartam partem. II. molinorum de. VI. solidorum. et III. piscarias. VI. solidorum et VIII. denariorum. et XVI. acras prati. et C. acras silue pastilis. VIII. minus. T. R. E. ualuit VI. libras. modo. LXVI. solidos et. VIII. denarios.

`WRAGGOE' Wapentake In THORPE Godwin and Gunnhvati had 10 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. Eudo has 1 plough. 10 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. He has 2 parts of a church; the fourth part of 2 mills at 6s; 3 fisheries, 6s 8d; meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland, 100 acres less 8. Value before 1066 £6; now 66s 8d.

Manerium In SASSEBI habuit Aschil. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Eudo. II. carucas. et I. sochemannum de. II. bouatis huius terrae. et XII. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et II. molinos. III. solidorum. et VI. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

`ASLACOE' Wapentake In SAXBY Eskil had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Eudo has 2 ploughs. 1 Freeman with 2 bovates of his land; 12 villagers with 2 ploughs. 2 mills, 3s; meadow, 6 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.
Manerium In ENDREBI. habuit Goduin. dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi habet Eudo. I. carucam. et I. bordarium. et X. acras prati. T. R. E.
NORTH RIDING BOLINGBROKE Wapentake In ENDERBY Godwin had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Eudo has 1 plough. 1 smallholder. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
Berewita In Radebi BEREWITA. dimidia bouata terrae ad geldum. et dimidia sedes molini.
In RAITHBY, an outlier, 1/2 bovate of land taxable. 1/2 mill site. Enderby. Godwin had it
Berewita In Mundebi. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. uillanus et I. bordarius /habent. II. boues in caruca. et X. acrae prati.
In MUMBY 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 villager and 1 smallholder have 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Enderby. Godwin had it *
Soca In Scirebec. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. Ibi. VIII. uillani habent. I. carucam. SOCA de Tateshale.
In SKIRBECK 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. 8 villagers have 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Tattershall.
In TORP. habuit Ulmar. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucis. quae ibi sunt cum XVIII. uillanis. et IIII. bordariis. Ualet. XX. solidos.
In THORPE Wulfmer had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs, which are there, with 18 villagers and 4 smallholders. Value 20s. Land of Drogo of la Beuvrière

Manerium In BAREUUE. habuit Morcar comes. IX. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. XVIII. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Drogo de beurere. habet. IIII. carucas. et L. sochemannos de. II. carucatis huius terre. et VII. uillanos cum. VIII. carucis. et I. molinum. XIII. solidorum. et IIII. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. II. libras. modo. XV. libras. Tailla. C. solidos.

WEST RIDING In BARROW Earl Morcar had 9 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 18 1/2 ploughs. Drogo of la Beuvrière has 4 ploughs. 50 Freemen with 2 carucates of this land; 7 villagers with 8 ploughs. 1 mill, 13s 4d. Value before 1066 £32; now £15. Exactions 100s.
In GOLSE. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi. XX. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. et CCC. acras prati.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In GOXHILL 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 20 Freemen have 3 ploughs and meadow, 300 acres. . Earl Morcar had it

Manerium In NORMANEBI habuerunt. III. fratres. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Gozelinus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et XVI. sochemannos et IIII. uillanos. et III. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. et II. bobus. et sedem. I. molini. et C. acras prati. et LXXII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. . . .

In NORMANBY 3 brothers had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Jocelyn , Drogo's man, has 1 plough. 16 Freemen, 4 villagers and 3 smallholders with 4 ploughs and 2 oxen. 1 mill site; meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 72 acres. Before 1066 .
Soca In Tedulfbi. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in Normanebi. Ibi. III. sochemanni cum. I. caruca. et VIII. acrae prati.
In THEALBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Normanby. 3 Freemen with 1 plough. Meadow, 8 acres. , Drogo's man, has it

. II. Maneria In BAREWE habuerunt Ernuin et Siuuard II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Tetbaldus homo Drogonis cum. IIII. uillanis habet. I. carucam. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo appreciatur in superiori Manerio.
In BARROW Ernwin and Siward had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Theobald, Drogo's man, with 4 villagers has 1 plough. Value before 1066, 40s; now it is valued in the above manor.

Manerium In CHETELBI. habuit Ulf. III. bouatas terre. et III. ciam partem. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Raynerus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos habentes. V. boues in caruca. et XIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos.

In KETTLEBY Ulf had 3 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 plough. Rainer , Drogo's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers who have 5 oxen in a plough and meadow, 13 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30s.
Manerium In CHERNITONE. habuit Ulf. IIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi Robertus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.
In KIRMINGTON Ulf had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Robert, Drogo's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.
Manerium In LINBERGHAM. habuit Ulf. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Wasta. est. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos.
In LIMBER Ulf had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. It is waste. Value before 1066, 40s.

Manerium In CHELEBI Uel COTES. . habuit Rolf. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Robertus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et X. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. II. carucis. et I. salinam. XII. denariorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. XXX. Tailla. X. solidos. $

In KEELBY or `COTON' Rolf had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Robert, Drogo's man, has 1 plough and 10 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs; and 1 salt-house, 12d; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30. Exactions 10s.
Soca In Lobingeham. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. SOCA in Cotes. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. I. bouem in caruca. et XXX. acrae prati.
In `LOPINGHEHAM' 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of `Coton'. 1 Freeman has 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 30 acres. had it. Robert, Drogo's man, has it

Manerium In WIUELESBI. habuit Rolf. IIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi Robertus homo Drogonis habet. II. uillanos. et XV. sochemannos de. II. carucatis huius terrae. et V. bouatis et III. cia. parte. I. bouate. Ipsi habent. II. carucas. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. C. solidos.

BRADLEY Wapentake In WEELSBY Rolf had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Robert, Drogo's man, has 2 villagers and 15 Freemen with 2 carucates of this land and 5 bovates and the third part of 1 bovate. They have 2 ploughs themselves and meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 100s.
Soca In Sudcotes. VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra XIIII. bobus. Ibi. VI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et XXX. acras prati.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In `SOUTH COATES' COATES * 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. 6 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 30 acres. had it. Robert, Drogo's man, has it

Berewita In Grimesbi. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. BEREWITA. Ibi. IIII. uillani habent. I. bouem in caruca et I. acra prati. require de terra arabili Radulfi. de mortemer et episcopus baio

In GRIMSBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. An outlier. 4 villagers have 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 1 acre. ?Enquire about the arable land: R. of Mort and the Bishop of Bayeux?. had it. Robert, Drogo's man, has it
Soca In Leuesbi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA. Ibi. I. uillanus /. I. bouem habet in caruca.
In LACEBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction. 1 villager has 1 ox in a plough. had it. Robert, Drogo's man, has it
Berewita In Itrebi. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis et dimidiae. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I. bouem in caruca.
In `ITTERBY' 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. 1 villager has 1 ox in a plough. had it. Robert, Drogo's man, has it
$ Berewita In Cheluingholme. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. BEREWITA in Cotes.
In KILLINGHOLME 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. An outlier of `Coton'. It is waste. Meadow, 30 acres. had it. Robert, Drogo's man, has it

Manerium In STAINTONE. habuit Rolf VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum et II. boum. Ibi Goisfridus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de una tofta. et VII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et sedem molini. et XLV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo XXVI. solidos.

In STAINTON Rolf had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. Geoffrey , Drogo's man, has 1 plough and 1 Freeman with 1 plot; 7 villagers with 1 plough; and a mill site; meadow, 45 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 26s.

Manerium In STIMBLEBI. habuit Osmundus. III. carucatas terre et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Goisfridus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et XV. sochemannos de. II. carucatis et VI. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum. II. carucis et II. bobus arantes. et I. molinum IX. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et CCXL. acrae prati. et CCXL. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo III. libras. Tailla. XX. solidos.
In THIMBLEBY Osmund

. II. Maneria In LANGETONE. habuerunt Archil et Aluric. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Goisfridus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terre. et X. uillanos. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et CLX. acras prati. et CC. acras siluae pastilis. et quingentas acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. XL. solidos.

In LANGTON Arnketil and Aelfric had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Geoffrey , Drogo's man, has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 10 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 160 acres; pasturable woodland, 200 acres; underwood, 500 acres. before 1066 and now, 40s.

. II. Maneria In ORMESBI habuerunt Ulf et Scemund. IIII. carucatas terre et VII. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi Goisfridus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et X. sochemannos de. II. carucatis et. II. bouatis huius terre. et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et XL. acras prati. et X. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. LXX. solidos. modo XLV. solidos.

In ORMSBY Ulf and Skemundr had 4 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Geoffrey , Drogo's man, has 1 plough. 10 Freemen with 2 carucates and 2 bovates of this land; 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 70s; now 45s. Exactions 10s.
Ibidem habuit Aluuinus. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae
There also ORMSBY Alwin had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Ormsby. Ulf and Skemundr had it. Geoffrey , Drogo's man, has it *

Manerium In STROUSTUNE. HUNDRET. habuit Morcar comes. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. . . . Ibi habet Wizo homo Drogonis. II. carucas in dominio. et IIII. sochemannos et IX. uillanos et I. bordarium habentes. III. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et XXX. acrae prati. Thomas archiepiscopus habet XV. et Hugo de grentemaisnil. XV. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. C. solidos.
In STROXTON - a hundred - Earl Morcar had 2 carucates of land taxable. . Wi

Berewita In Pamtone BEREWITA huius Manerii. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum. Ibi. est. I. bordarius et I. molinus. VI. solidorum. Silua spineti. VIII. quarentenas longa. et I. lata.

In PONTON, an outlier of this manor, 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 1 smallholder. 1 mill, 6s; woodland - a spinney - 8 furlongs long and 1 wide. [Outlier of Stroxton. Earl Morcar had it. Wi
Berewita In alia Pantone. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. BEREWITA. Ibi sunt. II. bordarii.
In another PONTON PONTON * 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. An outlier. 2 smallholders. [Outlier of Stroxton. Earl Morcar had it. Wi

Manerium In STOCHES. dimidium HUNDRET. Soca de graham. habuit Morcar. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Colegrim homo Drogonis habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et II. molinos. X. solidorum.
In STOKE - a half hundred -, a jurisdiction of Grantham, Morcar had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Kolgrim , Drogo's man, has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers with 1 plough. 2 mills, 10s.
Manerium In NORTSTOCHES. habuit Morcar comes. X bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Colegrim habet de Drogone. et ibi arant censores. VII. solidos reddentes. Prati. XVI. acrae.
In `NORTH STOKE' Earl Morcar had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Kolgrim has it from Drogo. Tributaries plough there who pay 7s. Meadow 16 acres.

Manerium In CARLETUNE. HUNDRET. habuit Morcar XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XVI. carucarum. Ibi habet Drogo. II. carucas. et IX. sochemannos de. XII. bouatis huius terrae. et IX. uillanos et X. bordarios cum. V. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et CC. L. V. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras. modo. VIIII. libras. .

In CARLTON - a hundred - Morcar had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. Drogo has 2 ploughs. 9 Freemen with 12 bovates of this land; 9 villagers and 10 smallholders with 5 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 255 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £9.

Manerium In BREDESTORP. HUNDRET. habuit Morcar comes. VII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucas. SOCA in Westbitham. Ibi Ingelran et Ernulfus homines habent. I. carucam. et VI. sochemannos. et I. uillanum et V. bordarios cum. II. carucis. Ibi. I. molinus. IIII. solidorum. et CC. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo XL. solidos. Tailla. XII. solidos.

`BELTISLOE' Wapentake In - a hundred - Earl Morcar had 7 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. A jurisdiction of `West Bytham' Bytham *. The men Ingelrann and Ernwulf <of > have 1 plough. 6 Freemen, 1 villager and 5 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 4s; underwood, 200 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 40s. Exactions 12s.

Manerium In WESBITHAM. habuit Morcar. IX. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Drogo. III. carucas in dominio. et XXIIII. sochemannos de medietate huius terrae. et VII. uillanos cum. VIII. carucis. Ibi VII. francigene habent. II. carucas. et III. fabricas ferri. de XL. solidorum et VIII. denariorum. Silua pastilis per loca. una leua et dimidia longa. et tantundem lata. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XIX. libras. et X. solidos. modo. X. libras.

In `WEST BYTHAM' BYTHAM * Morcar had 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Drogo has 3 ploughs in lordship; 24 Freemen with half of this land; 7 villagers with 8 ploughs. 7 Frenchmen have 2 ploughs and 3 iron-works at 40s 8d. Pasturable woodland in places 1 1/2 leagues long and as wide; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £19 10s; now £10.

Soca In Cudetorp. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi homo Drogonis Walterius habet. II. carucas. et XII. sochemannos et VI. bordarios cum. III. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras. modo. VI. libras. Ibi Ulricus alter homo eius habet. V. sochemannos cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In COUNTHORPE 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Drogo's man, Walter, has 2 ploughs. 12 Freemen and 6 smallholders with 3 ploughs. Value before 1066 £10; now £6. Wulfric, his other man, has 5 Freemen with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s. Bytham *. Morcar had it

Manerium In BITHAM HUNDRET. habuit Eduuard VII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi habet Drogo. II. carucas. et VI. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terre. et XVIII. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. V. carucis. et I. molinum. III. solidorum et fabricam ferri. XL. solidorum. et VII. acras prati. et CCC. acras siluae pastililis per loca. T. R. E. et modo ualet. VI. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In BYTHAM - a hundred - Edward had 7 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Drogo has 2 ploughs. 6 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 18 villagers and 3 smallholders with 5 ploughs. 1 mill, 3s; iron-works, 40s; meadow, 7 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 300 acres. Value before 1066 and now, £6. Exactions 40s.

Manerium In WITHAM. HUNDRET. habuit Wlf. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. Ibi habet Drogo. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et XXX. acras prati. et XL. acras silue pastililis. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL. Colegrim tenet. Abbas de burg clamat. I. bouatam in SOCA gisleberti.

In WITHAM - a hundred - Ulf had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Drogo has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 30 acres; pasturable woodland, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40. Kolgrim holds it. The Abbot of Peterborough claims 1 bovate in the jurisdiction of Gilbert.

Manerium In HACBERDINGHAM habuit Adestan. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra XIIII. boum. Ibi Robertus homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et I. molinum. *XVIII. denariorum. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. XXX. In ipsa uilla habet Drogo aulam cum saca et soca. et I. toftam.

HILL Wapentake In HAGWORTHINGHAM Aethelstan had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Robert, Drogo's man, has 1 plough. 8 villagers with 1 plough. 1 mill, 18d; meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 30. In this village Drogo has a hall with full jurisdiction and 1 plot.
In Haniuuic habet. V. bouatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Ualet. XXV. solidos.
In ANWICK he has 5 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Value 25s. had it
In Rischintone habet. VI. bouatas terre. ad geldum. et habet ibi. I. carucam. et ualet. XX. solidos.
In RUSKINGTON he has 6 bovates of land taxable. He has 1 plough there. Value 20s. had it

Manerium In CLACHESBI et Normanebi. habuit Ulf. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi Colsuan homo Drogonis habet. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terrae. et V. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et IIII. tam partem molini. VIII. denariorum. et XXX. II. acras prati. et dimidiam. et XL. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

`WALSHCROFT' Wapentake WALESBY hundred In CLAXBY and NORMANBY Ulf had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Kolsveinn , Drogo's man, has 1 plough and 2 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 5 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough; and the fourth part of a mill, 8d; meadow, 32 1/2 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.
In Cuningesbi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Hacberdingam. Ibi. I. bordarius et I. uillanus cum. I. boue in caruca. et II. acrae prati. et XX.
In CONINGSBY 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Hagworthingham. 1 smallholder and 1 villager with 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 2 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Land of Walter of Aincourt

Manerium In BELTONE HUNDRET. habuit Tori. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Walterius de Aincurt. II. carucas in dominio. et VIII. uillanos et V. bordarios cum. I. caruca. Ibi aecclesia. et III. molini. XXX. solidorum. et LX acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII.

In BELTON - a hundred - Thori had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Walter of Aincourt has 2 ploughs in lordship; 8 villagers and 5 smallholders with 1 plough. A church; 3 mills, 30s; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 4. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In GUNFORDEBI HUNDRET. habuerunt Siuuard et Eluui. I. carucatam terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum. Ibi Eluui homo Walterii habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum II. carucis. et II. molinos. XVI. solidorum. et XXII. acras et dimidiam prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In GONERBY - a hundred - Siward and Alwy had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Alwy, Walter's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 6 villagers and 4 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 2 mills, 16s; meadow, 22 1/2 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In SUMMERDEBI. habuit Tori. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra XVIII. bobus. Ibi Raynaldus homo Walterii habet. II. carucas. et V. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia. et presbyter cum. I. caruca. et C quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. Walterius habet Warram. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III. Tailla. XX. solidos. Hoc Manerium tenuit Tori T. R. E. et Norman post eum eodem temporre. sed homines patrie et de Wapentac nesciunt quo pacto. habuit. quia nullum seruitium inde uiderunt illum facere.

In SOMERBY Thori had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 18 oxen. Rainald, Walter's man, has 2 ploughs. 5 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest with 1 plough; woodland, pasture in places, 180 acres. Walter has the defence obligations. Value before 1066 £4; now 3. Exactions 20s. Thori held this manor before 1066, and Northmann after him in the same time, but the men of the locality and of the Wapentake do not know on what basis he had it because they have not seen him perform any service for it.

Soca In Humbi. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum et VI. boum. SOCA in Summerdebi. Ibi. XV. sochemanni et I. uillanus et. I. bordarius cum. V. carucis. et XX. acrae siluae pastilis. et CC. XX. acrae siluae minutae.

In HUMBY 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs and 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of Somerby. 15 Freemen, 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 5 ploughs. Pasturable woodland, 20 acres; underwood, 220 acres. had it. Rainald, Walter's man, has it

Manerium In WESTORP. habuit Tori. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Raynaldus homo Walterii habet. II. carucas. et I. uillanum et IX. bordarios. cum. I. boue in caruca. et III. molinos XL. solidorum. et XIX acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. IIII. libras.

In `WESTHORPE' Thori had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Rainald, Walter's man, has 2 ploughs. 1 villager and 9 smallholders with 1 ox in a plough. 3 mills, 40s; meadow, 19 acres. Value before 1066 and now, £4.
Berewita In Hogetune. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. BEREWITA in Westtorp. Ibi est. I. bordarius.
In `HOUGHTON' 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. An outlier of `Westhorpe'. 1 smallholder. had it. Rainald, Walter's man, has it

Manerium In SUDWELLE habuit Tori. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Walterius. II. carucas. et VII. sochemannos. et VI. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. III. carucis et IIII. acras prati. et CXXX. acras siluae pastilis. per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX. Tailla. X. solidos.

`BELTISLOE' Wapentake In Thori had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Walter has 2 ploughs. 7 Freemen, 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 4 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 130 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60. Exactions 10s.

Berewita In Suamestede HUNDRET dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. BEREWITA in Suduuelle. Ibi Odo homo Walterius habet dimidiam carucam. et I. uillanum. et dimidia acra prati. et XV. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XV.
In SWINSTEAD - a hundred - 1/2 carucate of land taxable. An outlier of . Odo, Walter's man, has 1/2 plough. 1 villager. Meadow, 1/2 acre; underwood, 15 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 15. had it

. IIII. Maneria In BERTUNE HUNDRET. habuerunt Archil et Leuric. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra III. carucarum. Ibi habet Walterius. IIII. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum I. caruca. De hac terra habent. II. o homines eius medietatem. et ibi habent. II. carucas. et VI. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et XXXI. acra prati et dimidia. et CCCXXIII acras siluae pastilis. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. T. R. E. et modo ualet. LX. solidos.

In BURTON - a hundred - Arnketil and Leofric had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Walter has 4 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough. Two of his men have half of this land; they have 2 ploughs. 6 villagers and 3 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 31 1/2 acres; pasturable woodland, 323 acres; 1 mill, 2s. Value before 1066 and now, 60s.

Manerium In GOLDESBI. habuit Siuuard. IIII. bouatas terrae et terciam partem. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Wasta. est. T. R. E. X. solidos. modo. III. Ibi. III. acrae prati et dimidia et XVI. acrae siluae minutae

`ASWARDHURN' Wapentake In INGOLDSBY Siward had 4 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 oxen. It is waste. before 1066, 10s; now 3. Meadow, 3 1/2 acres; underwood, 16 acres.

Manerium In BRANZTUNE HUNDRET. habuit Haminc. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. Ibi Walterius habet. V. carucas. in dominio. et II. sochemannos de. II. carucatis huius terrae. et XLVIII. uillanos et XXIII. bordarios cum. VIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et IIII. or molini de. XXVII. solidis. et III. piscariae de XXX. denariis. et LX. acrae prati. et siluae pastilis. VII. quarentenas et dimidiam longae. et V. quarentenas et dimidiam latae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. libras. modo. XXVI. libras.

Walter has 5 ploughs in lordship; 2 Freemen with 2 carucates of this land; 48 villagers and 23 smallholders with 8 ploughs. A church and a priest; 4 mills at 27s; 3 fisheries at 30d; meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland, 7 1/2 furlongs long and 5 1/2 furlongs wide. Value before 1066 £20; now £26.

In CANWICK Walraven had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Norman has 1 plough and meadow, 25 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same. Land of Erneis of Buron

Manerium In MEDELTONE. habuit Eddeua. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra VII. carucarum. Ibi habet Ernegis de burun. V. carucas. et III. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terrae. et XXX. uillanos et IX. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi ecclesia et presbyter. et LXXVIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo VIII.

In MELTON Edeva had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Erneis of Buron has 5 ploughs. 3 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 30 villagers and 9 smallholders with 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 78 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 8. Exactions 40s.

. II. Maneria In ULUESBI. habuerunt Grim et Siuuard IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. Ibi habet Ernegis. IIII. carucas. et XXX. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terrae. et VIII. uillanos et X. bordarios cum. IX. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et dimidius molinus. X. solidorum. et quingentarum anguillarum. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. libras. modo. VIII. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In ULCEBY Grim and Siward had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. Erneis has 4 ploughs. 30 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 8 villagers and 10 smallholders with 9 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1/2 mill, 10s and 500 eels; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £5; now 8. Exactions 40s.

Manerium In MESSINGEHAM. habuit Eddiua. X. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Ibi Turstinus homo Ernegis habet. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et I. molinum. V. solidorum. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo. XX. Tailla. X. solidos.

In MESSINGHAM Edeva had 10 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. , Erneis' man, has 1 plough. 8 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 20. Exactions 10s.

. III. Maneria In BERNEDEBI. habuerunt Grim et Ulf et Fin. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XIIII. bobus. Ibi Ulricus homo Ernegis habet. I. carucam. et XII. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terre |et. V. toftis. et V. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et dimidiam aecclesiam. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XVI. Tailla. IIII. solidos.

In BARNETBY Grim, Ulf and Fin <of Barnetby> had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Wulfric, Erneis' man, has 1 plough and 12 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land and 5 plots; 5 villagers with 1 plough; and 1/2 church. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16. Exactions 4s.

Manerium In TORENTONE et Brune. habuit Grim. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi Ulricus homo Ernegis habet. III. boues in caruca. et I. sochemannum de. I. tofta. et VII. uillanos cum. III. bobus in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. solidos. modo. VIII. solidos. Tailla. II. solidos.

In THORNTON and BURNHAM Grim had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Wulfric, Erneis' man, has 3 oxen in a plough. 1 Freeman with 1 plot; 7 villagers with 3 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066, 16s; now 8s. Exactions 2s.

Manerium In GOLSE. habuit Grim. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae Ibi Ulricus homo Ernegis habet dimidiam carucam. et XXV. sochemannos et V. uillanos cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et LX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL.

In GOXHILL Grim had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Wulfric, Erneis' man, has 1/2 plough. 25 Freemen and 5 villagers with 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In NETELTONE. habuit Gamel. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XV. bobus. Ibi. III. uillani et III. bordarii cum. II. bobus in caruca. et I. molinus. XII. denariorum. et XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo XX. solidos.
In NETTLETON Gamal had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 15 oxen. 3 villagers and 3 smallholders with 2 oxen in a plough. 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 20 acres. before 1066 and now, 20s.

Manerium In CHETELEBI. habuit Eddeua. III. bouatas terrae et terciam partem. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Turstinus homo Ernegis habet. III. boues in caruca. et I. sochemannum de. V. acris huius terrae. et VI. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et XIIII. acrae prati. et III. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XX.

In KETTLEBY Edeva had 3 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1 plough. , Erneis' man, has 3 oxen in a plough. 1 Freeman with 5 acres of this land; 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 14 acres; underwood, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20.

Manerium In BROCHELESBI. habuit Eddeua. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Rannulfus homo Ernegis habet. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos de una bouata huius terrae. et I. uillanum cum. V. bobus in caruca. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo. XX. solidos.

In BROCKLESBY Edeva had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Ranulf, Erneis' man, has 1 plough. 2 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 1 villager with 5 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 80 acres. before 1066 and now, 20s.
Soca In Haburne et Neuhuse. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. SOCA huius Manerii. Ibi. II. uillani habent V. boues in caruca. et XXX. acras prati.
In HABROUGH and NEWSHAM 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction of this manor. 2 villagers have 5 oxen in a plough and meadow, 30 acres. had it. Ranulf, Erneis' man, has it
Ibidem. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ulchil habuit. modo Wasta. est.
There also 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Ulfkil had it. Now it is waste. had it. Ranulf, Erneis' man, has it *

Manerium In WARAGEBI. habuit Gudeta comitissa. VI. bouatas terre |et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi habet Ernegis. I. carucam. et X. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi AEcclesia et presbyter. et dimidius molinus. XII. denariorum. et XXIIII. acrae prati. Silua pastilis. IIII. quarentenas longa. et IIII. lata. Silua minuta. V. quarentenas longa. et V. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. XIIII. libras. modo. X. libras. Tailla. X. libras.

In WRAGBY Countess Judith had 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Erneis has 1 plough. 10 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1/2 mill, 12d; meadow, 24 acres; pasturable woodland 4 furlongs long and 4 wide; underwood 5 furlongs long and 5 wide. Value before 1066 £14; now £10. Exactions £10.
Soca In Hatune. V. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi. XV. sochemanni et X. bordarii cum. IIII. carucis. et C. acrae prati. et CCXXX. acrae siluae minutae
Jurisdiction Wragby: In HATTON 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. 15 Freemen and 10 smallholders with 4 ploughs. Meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 230 acres.

Soca In Caldecote. I. carucata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi. II. sochemanni et IIII. bordarii habentes. II. boues in caruca. In dominio Ernegis. I. carucam. et II. sedes molini. et VIII. acrae prati.
In `CALCOTE' 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 2 Freemen and 4 smallholders who have 2 oxen in a plough. In lordship Erneis 1 plough. 2 mill sites; meadow, 8 acres.
Soca In Pantone. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. II. carucae in dominio. et XIII. sochemanni et VI. bordarii cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et XL. acrae prati.
In PANTON 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 2 ploughs in lordship; 13 Freemen and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A church; meadow, 40 acres.
Soca In Harduic. V. bouatae terre. et III. cia pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra XI. bobus. Ibi. VI. sochemanni. habent. I. carucam. et LIII. acras prati.
In `HARDWICK' 5 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 11 oxen. 6 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 53 acres.
Soca In Barcourde. II. carucatae terre et. II. bouatae. ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi. X. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. In dominio Ernegis. I. carucam. et aecclesia. et XXX. III.
In BARKWITH 2 carucates and 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. 10 Freemen have 1 plough. In lordship Erneis 1 plough. A church; meadow, 33 acres.
Soca In Terintone. II. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. et tercia pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Ernegis. I. carucam. et XII. sochemannos nil habentes.
In TORRINGTON 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Erneis has 1 plough. 12 Freemen who have nothing.
Soca In Langetone. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. II. boues in caruca. et XXI. acrae siluae minutae.
In LANGTON 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 villager has 2 oxen in a plough. Underwood, 21 acres.
Soca In Fulnedebi. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi. XII. sochemanni. habent. III. carucas. et C. acras prati. et CXX. acrae siluae minutae.
In FULNETBY 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 12 Freemen have 3 ploughs and meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 120 acres.
Soca In Rande. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni et V. bordarii habent. II. carucas et V. boues in caruca. et XL. acrae prati.
In RAND 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. 8 Freemen and 5 smallholders have 2 ploughs and 5 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 20 acres.
Soca In Grisebi et Burg. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi. III. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XII. acrae prati.
In GIRSBY and BURGH 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 3 Freemen have 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 12 acres.

Berewita In Chinetorp. II. bouatae terre et II. partes de dimidia bouata ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. I. bouem in caruca. et IIII. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca.
In KINGTHORPE 2 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for 5 oxen. 1 villager has 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 4 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 80 acres.

. II. Maneria In COLEBI. habuerunt Wege et Baret. II. carucatas terre et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra. XVII. bobus. Ibi Iohannes homo Ernegis habet. II. carucas. et I. sochemannum de. I. tofta. et V. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et X. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo L. Tailla. X. solidos.

In COLEBY <of Womersley> and Barth had 2 carucates of land and 1 bovate taxable. Land for 17 oxen. John <of Orton>, Erneis' man, has 2 ploughs. 1 Freeman with 1 plot; 5 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50. Exactions 10s.
Berewita In Walecote. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi. I. uillanus habet. II. boues in caruca. et XXIIII. acrae prati. et IIII. acrae siluae minutae.
Outlier: In WALCOT 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 villager has 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 24 acres; underwood, 4 acres. had it. John <of Orton>, Erneis' man, has it
Berewita In Wintritone. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. Wasta. est.
In WINTERTON 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. It is waste. had it. John <of Orton>, Erneis' man, has it

Manerium In GRAINGEHAM. habuit Eddeua. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra XII. bobus. Ibi habet Ernegis. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et X. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In GRAYINGHAM Edeva had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Erneis has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Land of Ralph Paynel

Manerium In BERTONE. habuit Merlosuen. X. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus pagenel. II. carucas. et XXIX. sochemannos de. V. carucatis et III. bouatis huius terre. et XXX. IIII. uillanos et VIII. bordarios. cum. XIII. carucis. Ibi ecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus II. solidorum. et CCXL. acrae prati. et II. leuas longa siluae minutae et. I. latae. T. R. E. ualuit X. libras. modo. VII. sed in preterito anno ualuit. X. libras.

In BROUGHTON Merleswein had 10 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Ralph Paynel has 2 ploughs. 29 Freemen with 5 carucates and 3 bovates of this land; 34 villagers and 8 smallholders with 13 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 240 acres; underwood, 2 leagues long and 1 wide. Value before 1066 £10; now 7, but in the past year the value was £10.

Manerium IBIDEM habuit Grinchel. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Radulfus. I. carucam. et V. censarios cum. I. caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. . .
There also Grimkel had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Ralph has 1 plough and 5 tributaries with 1 plough; and meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now .

Manerium In DUNEHAM. habuit Merlesuen. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi quidam miles Radulfus habet. dimidiam carucam. et IIII. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terre. et IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et XVII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos modo XVI. Tailla. IIII. solidos.

In DUNHOLME Merleswein had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. A certain man-at-arms of Ralph's has 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 4 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 17 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 16. Exactions 4s.

Manerium In ROXEBI habuit Merlosuen. V. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus. II. carucas et II. boues in caruca. et XX. III. sochemannos. de XXI. bouatis huius terre. et VIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. VI. carucis. et XL. IIII. acrae prati et VI. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla XX. solidos. Herbertus tenet

In ROXBY Merleswein had 5 carucates of land and 2 bovates. Land for 6 ploughs. Ralph has 2 ploughs and 2 oxen in a plough. 23 Freemen with 21 bovates of this land; 8 villagers and 4 smallholders with 6 ploughs. Meadow, 44 acres; underwood, 6 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 4. Exactions 20s. Herbert holds it.
Berewita In Wintritone. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. II. uillani habent. II boues in caruca.
In WINTERTON 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 2 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough. had it

Manerium In RASE. habuit Merlosuen VI. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. VIIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus IIII. carucas in dominio. et XXXVII. sochemannos de IIII. carucatis et VII. bouatis huius terre. et XV. uillanos cum. IX. carucis. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. et CCC. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. libras. modo. X. libras.

In RASEN Merleswein had 6 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Ralph has 4 ploughs in lordship; 37 Freemen with 4 carucates and 7 bovates of this land; 15 villagers with 9 ploughs. 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 300 acres. Value before 1066 £16; now £10. Exactions £6.
Soca In altera Rase. XIIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. SOCA huius Manerii. Ibi XVI. sochemanni habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. et CLX. acras prati.
In the other RASEN 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. A jurisdiction of this manor. 16 Freemen have 2 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 160 acres. had it
Soca In Wiuilingeham. IX. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XVIII. bobus. Ibi /XIX. sochemanni habent. II. carucas.
In WILLINGHAM 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 18 oxen. 19 Freemen have 2 ploughs. had it

Manerium In TAUELESBI. habuit Merlosuen XIIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Radulfus. |sochemannos de. III. bouatis. et X. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et III. molinos XII. solidorum. et quater XX et IX acras prati. et III. sedes molinorum. T. R. E. ualuit XII. libras. modo L. solidos.
In TEALBY Merleswein had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Ralph has 10. Value before 1066 £12; now 50s. Exactions 9s.

$ Manerium In WITHAM. habuit Merlosuen. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Hacun homo Radulfi habet. II. boues in caruca. et IIII. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et X. acrae prati. et quater XX. et IIII. acras siluae. . . . T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo X. |solidos. et VIII. denarios.

In WITHAM Merleswein had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Hakon, Ralph's man, has 2 oxen in a plough. 4 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres; woodland, 84 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s 8d.

Soca In Suinhamstede habuit Merlosuen. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi fuit. I. tainus quem dedit merlosuen rex Edwardus sicut homines de hundret testantur. Ibi habet Radulfus XX. II. sochemannos. et IIII. uillanos cum. VI. carucis. et XVIII. acrae prati et CC. acrae siluae minutae.

In SWINSTEAD Merleswein had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. There was 1 thane whom King Edward gave to Merleswein as men of the hundred testify. Ralph has 22 Freemen and 4 villagers with 6 ploughs. Meadow, 18 acres; underwood, 200 acres.

Manerium In BERTUNE. habuit Morcar comes. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Ogerus homo Radulfi habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et XII. acrae prati. Silua. VII. quarentenas longa. et. V quarentenas et dimidia lata. Extra hanc et CC et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XXX.

In BURTON Earl Morcar had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Oger , Ralph's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 12 acres; woodland 7 furlongs long and 5 1/2 furlongs wide; besides this, pasturable woodland in places, 280 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30.
$ Soca In Osgotesbi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam in Tauelesbi.
In OSGODBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough in Tealby. had it

Manerium In GERNEHAM. habuit Merlosuen VII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus. III. carucas et dimidiam et VII. sochemannos de. II. carucatis huius terre. et XXIX. uillanos. et IX. bordarios cum. VII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et L. acrae prati. Silua pastilis. I. leuam longa. et X. quarentenas lata. Extra hanc adhuc. CC. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XII. libras. modo X. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In IRNHAM Merleswein had 7 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Ralph has 3 1/2 ploughs. 7 Freemen with 2 carucates of this land; 29 villagers and 9 smallholders with 7 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 50 acres; pasturable woodland 1 league long and 10 furlongs wide. Besides this, a further 200 acres of pasturable woodland in places. Value before 1066 £12; now 10. Exactions 40s.

Manerium In ASCHEBI. habuit Merlosuen. VI. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus. II. carucas. et XVII. sochemannos. et II. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. VIII. carucis. et L. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit IIII. libras. modo. C. solidos.

In ASHBY Merleswein had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Ralph has 2 ploughs. 17 Freemen, 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 8 ploughs. Meadow, 50 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 100s.

Manerium In SCALEBI et Stratone. habuit Grinchel. III. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus. II. carucas. et V. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae et VII. uillanos. et III. bordarios cum. II. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo XL. Tailla. X. solidos.

In SCAWBY and STURTON Grimkel had 3 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Ralph has 2 ploughs. 5 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 7 villagers and 3 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 60s; now 40. Exactions 10s.
In Snardesforde. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam. et XII. acras prati. SOCA in Resne.
In SNARFORD 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 4 Freemen have 1/2 plough and meadow, 12 acres. A jurisdiction of Rasen. had it Land of Ralph of Mortimer

Manerium In GRIMESBI et Sualun. habuit Eddiue II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Ricardus homo Radulfi de mortemer. II. carucas. in dominio. et VII. sochemannos de. VI. II toftis. et XI. uillanos. et X. bordarios. habentes. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi aecclesia. et presbyter. et I. molendinum. IIII. solidorum. et unum passagium. V. solidorum. et XXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. C. solidos.

In GRIMSBY and SWALLOW Edeva had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 4 1/2 ploughs. Richard, Ralph of Mortimer's man, has 2 ploughs in lordship; 7 Freemen with 8 plots; 11 villagers and 10 smallholders who have 1 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 4s; 1 ferry, 5s; meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now 100s.

Manerium In TORENTUNE et Bodebi et Udetone. habuit Eddeua. X. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XX. carucarum. Ibi Radulfus de mortemer habet. III. carucas in dominio. et LVIII. sochemannos de. IIII. carucatis huius terrae et VII. uillanos et VII. bordarios. habentes. VII. carucas. et dimidium molinum. III. um solidorum. T R. E. ualuit. X. libras. modo XV. Tailla. V. libras. De hac terra habet Odo homo Radulfi. II. carucatas. et ibi habet. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terre. et I. uillanum cum una caruca et dimidia. et ualet. L. solidos.

In THORNTON , and WOOTTON Edeva had 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 20 ploughs. Ralph of Mortimer has 3 ploughs in lordship; 58 Freemen with 4 carucates of this land; 7 villagers and 7 smallholders who have 7 ploughs. 1/2 mill, 3s. Value before 1066 £10; now 15. Exactions £5. Odo, Ralph's man, has 2 carucates of this land; he has 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 1 villager with 1 1/2 ploughs. Value 50s.

Manerium In BUNDEBI. habuit Copsi. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus homo Radulfi habet. II. carucas. et II. uillanos. et I. bordarium cum. I. boue in caruca. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In BONBY Kofse had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. William, Ralph's man, has 2 ploughs and 2 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 ox in a plough. Value before 1066 and now, 20s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In HERMODESTONE. habuit Copsi. III. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Radulfus. I. carucam in dominio. et I. sochemannum et IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XXX. V. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Super hanc terram habet. Hugo.

In HARMSTON Kofse had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Ralph has 1 plough in lordship; 1 Freeman and 4 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 35 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Over this land Earl Hugh has jurisdiction in Waddington.
In STOU. habuit Eddiua. III. mansiones. cum saca et soca. Radulfus habet.
In STOW Edeva had 3 messuages with full jurisdiction. Ralph has them. Land of Robert of Vessey

Manerium In HELPERICHAM. habuit Eilric. VII. carucatas terrae |et III. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucis et bobus. Ibi habet Robertus de ueci. III. carucas in dominio. et XIII. uillanos et et IX. bordarios cum. IIII. carucis. et XV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo XII.

In HELPRINGHAM Aelric had 7 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Robert of Vessey has 3 ploughs in lordship; 13 villagers and 9 smallholders with 4 ploughs. Meadow, 15 acres. Value before 1066 £3; now 12.

Manerium In CARLTORP. habuit Eilric. XIX. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas in dominio. et XXVIII. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas de soca ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. idest XL. VIII. to Huic adiacent. III. es hundret. Fristun. Normenton. Wilgebi. Ibi habet Robertus de Ueci. III. carucatas in dominio. et C. XIII. sochemannos cum. XXXII. carucis. et L. uillanos et VII. bordarios cum. XIII. carucis. Ibi. II. aecclesiae et II. presbyteri. et dimidium molendinum. X. solidorum. et octingentae et quater XX. ti acrae prati. De supradicta terra et soca habent. III. homines Roberti. XII. carucatas et VII. bouatas. et ibi habent. IIII. carucas et dimidiam. Unus quoque anglicus habet. I. carucatam et V. bouatas. et ibi habet. I. carucam. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. libras. modo. L. libras.

In CAYTHORPE Aelric had 19 carucates of land and 2 bovates in lordship; 28 carucates of land and 6 bovates of jurisdiction taxable. Land for as many ploughs, that is 48. Three hundreds are attached to it: Frieston, Normanton and Willoughby. Robert of Vessey has 3 ploughs in lordship; 113 Freemen with 32 ploughs; 50 villagers and 7 smallholders with 13 ploughs. 2 churches and 2 priests; 1/2 mill, 10s; meadow, 880 acres. Of the above land and jurisdiction three of Robert's men have 12 carucates and 7 bovates; they have 4 1/2 ploughs. An Englishman has 1 carucate and 5 bovates; he has 1 plough. Value before 1066 £30; now £50.
Soca In Brandune. VII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. XI. boum. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas et II. boues.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In BRANDON 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 11 oxen. 8 Freemen have 2 ploughs and 2 oxen. had it
Soca In Rosbi. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi. XIX. sochemanni habent. III. carucas.
In RAUCEBY 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. 19 Freemen have 3 ploughs. had it
Berewita In Suauitone dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi. I. uillanus et II. bordarii habent. III. boues in caruca. et V. acras prati.
In SWATON 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. An outlier. 1 villager and 2 smallholders have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 5 acres. had it

Manerium In STEUENINGE. habuit Eilric. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra VI. bobus. Ibi habet Robertus. I. uillanum et II. salinas. de. II. solidorum et VIII. denariorum. et I. piscariam reddentem. CC. anguillas. et XVIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.
In STEYNING Aelric had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Robert has 1 villager. 2 salt-houses at 2s 8d; 1 fishery which pays 200 eels; meadow, 18 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
Soca In Hechintune. VI. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus et dimidia. Ibi. I. uillanus et II. bordarii habent. VI. boues in caruca. et VI. acrae prati.
Jurisdiction of Caythorpe: In HECKINGTON 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 1/2 oxen. 1 villager and 2 smallholders have 6 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 6 acres. had it Land of Robert the bursar

Manerium In TORINTUNE. habuit Achi. III. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus dispensator. III. carucas in dominio. et IX. sochemannos de. X. bouatis huius terrae. et V. uillanos et V. bordarios habentes. IIII. carucas. et II. molinos. XX. solidorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. et CCCL. acras siluae per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. V. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In THORNTON Aki had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Robert the bursar has 3 ploughs in lordship; 9 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 5 villagers and 5 smallholders who have 4 ploughs. 2 mills, 20s; meadow, 80 acres; woodland, in places, 350 acres. Value before 1066 £5; now 4. Exactions 20s.

Soca In Rocstune. XII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. SOCA. Ibi. III. sochemanni et dimidius habent. II. carucas et III. boues arantes. et XV. acrae prati. et I. piscaria. II. solidorum. et XL. acras siluae pastilis per loca.

In ROUGHTON 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. A jurisdiction. 3 1/2 Freemen have 2 ploughs and 3 oxen ploughing and meadow, 15 acres; 1 fishery, 2s; pasturable woodland in places, 40 acres. had it

Manerium In SCRIUELESBI. habuit Siuuard. VII. carucatas terrae et V. bouatas ad geldum. Terra VIII. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Robertus. VI. carucas. in dominio. et XXX. sochemannos de. III. carucatis huius terrae. et XVI. uillanos et XI. bordarios cum VI. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molimus XIII. solidorum. et IIII. denariorum. et CC. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit XII. libras. modo. XIIII. libras.

In SCRIVELSBY Siward had 7 carucates of land and 5 bovates taxable. Land for 8 1/2 ploughs. Robert has 6 ploughs in lordship; 30 Freemen with 3 carucates of this land; 16 villagers and 11 smallholders with 6 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 13s 4d; meadow, 200 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £12; now £14.

Berewita In Cuningesbi. IX. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IX. bobus. BEREWITA. Ibi. XV. uillani et III. bordarii habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et X. piscarias VIII. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et LX. acrae prati. et LX. acrae siluae pastilis.
In CONINGSBY 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 9 oxen. An outlier. 15 villagers and 3 smallholders have 1 1/2 ploughs. 10 fisheries, 8s 4d; meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland, 60 acres. had it

Berewita In Wilgesbi. I. carucata terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. carucas. BEREWITA. Ibi habet Robert. I. carucam in dominio. et V. uillani habent. II. boues in caruca. et XX. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae minutae.
In WILKSBY 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. An outlier. Robert has 1 plough in lordship. 5 villagers have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 40 acres. had it
Soca In Meringhe. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA in Scriuuelesbi. Ibi |est. I. us uillanus cum. I. boue in caruca.
In MAREHAM 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Scrivelsby. 1 villager with 1 ox in a plough. had it
In Endrebi. habuit Siuuard. IX. acras terrae arabilis. et VIII. acras siluae. cum saca et soca. Robertus dispensator habet nunc.
In ENDERBY Siward had 9 acres of arable land and 8 acres of woodland with full jurisdiction. Robert the bursar has them now.

Manerium In HERDERTORP habuit Wiuelac. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus. III. carucas in dominio. et XXX. II. sochemannos de medietate huius terrae. et XII. uillanos cum. VI. carucis. Ibi. II. aecclesiae. et CCCC. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit VIII. libras. modo. X. libras.

In ADDLETHORPE Wiglac had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Robert has 3 ploughs in lordship; 32 Freemen with half of this land; 12 villagers with 6 ploughs. 2 churches; meadow, 400 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now £10.
Soca In Partenai. et Stepinge. et Tric. et Burg. II. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi. V. sochemanni et II. uillani habent dimidiam carucam. et XXX. acras prati.
Jurisdiction of Ingoldmells: In PARTNEY, STEEPING, and BURGH 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 5 Freemen and 2 villagers have 1/2 plough and meadow, 30 acres.

Manerium In BUTIATE. habuit Wiglac. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Ibi habet Robertus. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de dimidia carucata terre huius. et X. uillanos habentes. III. carucas. et XV. acrae prati. et CC. acrae siluae pastillis ex media parte. T. R. E. ualuit XL.

In `BUTCHETT' Wiglac had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Robert has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 1/2 carucate of this land; 10 villagers who have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 15 acres; woodland, 200 acres, about half pasturable. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50.

Berewita In Langetone. I. carucata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus. I. carucam. et VIII. sochemannos de dimidia carucata huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et XXIIII. acrae prati. et CC. et quater XX. ti acrae siluae pastilis.

In LANGTON 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Robert has 1 plough. 8 Freemen with 1/2 carucate of this land; 4 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 24 acres; pasturable woodland, 280 acres. had it

Manerium In TADEWELLE. habuit Siuuard. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et II. molinos Chetelber XIIII. solidorum. et C. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.
In TATHWELL Siward had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Robert has 1 plough. 8 villagers with 1 plough. 2 mills, 14s; meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In HOLTHAM. habuit Achi. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Robertus. I. carucam. et III. sochemannos de dimidia carucata huius terrae. et V. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et II. molinos XIII. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et XXIIII. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae pastilis. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

In HALTHAM Aki had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Robert has 1 plough. 3 Freemen with 1/2 carucate of this land; 5 villagers with 1 plough. 2 mills, 13s 4d; meadow, 24 acres; pasturable woodland, 80 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In FUGELESTOU. habuit Aschil. XIIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus. I. carucam. et III. sochemannos de. IX. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. or uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et VI. salinas. VI. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo XX. solidos.

In FULSTOW Eskil had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Robert has 1 plough and 3 Freemen with 9 bovates of this land; 4 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs; and 6 salt-houses, 6s. Value before 1066, 100s; now 20s. Exactions 10s. Land of Guy of Raimbeaucourt

Manerium In WILGEBI. habuit Leuric. III. carucatas terre et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra IIII. carucarum. Ibi Wido de Reinbudcurt habet. II. carucas in dominio. et X. sochemannos de X. bouatis huius terrae. et III. bordarios habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi presbyter habens XXX. VII. acras terrae et dimidiam. reddentes XVI. denarios de consuetudine. Super quartam partem aecclesiae eiusdem uillae. habet Wido socam et XXX. acras prati. et XXVIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VII. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla. XX. solidos

In WILLOUGHBY Leofric <of Willoughby> had 3 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Guy of Raimbeaucourt has 2 ploughs in lordship; 10 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 3 smallholders who have 2 1/2 ploughs. A priest who has 37 1/2 acres of land pays 16d in customary dues. Guy has jurisdiction over the fourth part of the church of this village and meadow, 30 acres; underwood, 28 acres. Value before 1066 £7; now 4. Exactions 20s.

SocaIn Ounesbi. III. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. et II. bouatae sunt Inland. Ibi. XXV. sochemanni habent. VI. carucas et dimidiam. et LXX. acrae prati. et VI. acrae siluae minutae.

In AUNSBY 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. A jurisdiction of this manor. 2 bovates are . 25 Freemen have 6 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 70 acres; underwood, 6 acres. [Ingelrann son of Guy of Raimbeaucourt holds it. Jurisdiction and of Willoughby. Leofric <of Willoughby> had it

Manerium In SIDESTHAM. habuit Leuric. XI. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi nunc in dominio. I. caruca. et XXVII. sochemanni de. VIII. carucatis |et VI. bouatis huius terrae. et X. uillani cum. XII. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. ad quam iacet. I. bouata terrae. Ibi. IVI. molini de. L. solidis. et XXI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. IIII.

In SYSTON Leofric <of Willoughby> had 11 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Now in lordship 1 plough; 27 Freemen with 8 carucates and 6 bovates of this land; 10 villagers with 12 ploughs. A priest and a church of which 1 bovate of land is an adjunct. 6. Value before 1066 £6; now 4. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Beltone habet Wido de Rainbudcurt. X. acrae prati Has terras omnes tenet Ingelrannus filius eius de eo.
In BELTON Guy of Raimbeaucourt has 10 acres of meadow. Ingelrann, his son, holds all these lands from him. Land of Rainer of Brimeux

. II. Maneria In LIMBERGE. habuit Ialf et Turuer. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Raynerius de brimou habet. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos de. II. abus toftis. et II. uillanos et XI. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo XXX. solidos.

In LIMBER Jaulfr and Thorfridh had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Rainer of Brimeux has 1 plough and 2 Freemen with 2 plots; 2 villagers and 11 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Value before 1066 £4; now 30s.

Manerium In INGEHAM. habuit Ialf dimidiam carucatas terrae. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Colsuan homo Rainerii habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos. et II. bordarios cum. V. bobus in caruca. et VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo. X. solidos.

In INGHAM Jaulfr had 1/2 carucate of land. Land for 6 oxen. Kolsveinn , Rainer's man, has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 5 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
In Neutone. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent. III. boues in caruca. et X. acras prati.

In NEWTON 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of the same manor. 2 Freemen have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 10 acres. [Jurisdiction of Ingham. Jaulfr had it. Kolsveinn , Rainer's man, has it

Manerium In HOLTONE habuit Ialf. V. bouatas terrae. et XIIII. acras terre. et I. uirgatam. ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi Rogerius homo Raynerii habet. V. boues in car. et IIII. uillanos et I. bordarium habentes V. boues in caruca. et XIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XX.

In HOLTON Jaulfr had 5 bovates of land and 14 acres of land and 1 virgate taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Roger, Rainer's man, has 5 oxen in a plough. 4 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 5 oxen in a plough and meadow, 13 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20.

Manerium In STAINTONE. habuit Ialf. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra XVIII. bobus. Ibi habet Raynerius dimidiam carucam. et IIII. sochemannos de una bouata huius terre. et I. uillanum et II. bordarios. habentes. V. boues in caruca. et sedem molini. et XLV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo XX. Tailla. V. solidos.

In STAINTON Jaulfr had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 18 oxen. Rainer has 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 1 villager and 2 smallholders who have 5 oxen in a plough and a mill site; meadow, 45 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 20. Exactions 5s.

Manerium In WALESBI. habuit Ialf. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Balduinus homo Raynerii habet. I. carucam. et VII. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et XX. acras prati. et V. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

In WALESBY Jaulfr had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Baldwin , Rainer's man, has 1 plough. 7 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 5 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In BARCUORDE. habuit Code. IIII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Girardus homo Raynerii habet. V. boues in caruca. et I. uillanum cum. I. boue in caruca. et IX. acras prati. T. R. E|et modo ualet X. solidos.
In BARKWITH Koddi had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Gerard, Rainer's man, has 5 oxen in a plough. 1 villager with 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
Soca In Ulingeham. X. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. K SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. XIII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas. et XL. acrae prati.

In WILLINGHAM 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of this manor. 13 Freemen have 3 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres. [Jurisdiction of Barkwith. Koddi had it. Gerard, Rainer's man, has it

Manerium In HAINTONE. habuit Code. III. bouatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. VII. bobus. Nunc habet Raynerius et Wasta. est. Ibi. XX. VI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos modo. XXX. solidos.
In HAINTON Koddi had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. Now Rainer has it. It is waste. Meadow, 26 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s.

Manerium In CHINETORP. habuit Ialf. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra VI. bobus. Ibi habet Raynerius. I. uillanum et I. bordarium cum. III. bobus in caruca. et VIII. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.

In KINGTHORPE Jaulfr had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Rainer has 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 3 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 8 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 100 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
Soca In Strubi. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. SOCA huius Manerii. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent. II. boues in caruca.
In STRUBBY 2 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of this manor. 2 Freemen have 2 oxen in a plough.

Manerium In SISSE. habuit Ialf. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Raynerius. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos et I. bordarium habentes. III. boues in caruca. et quater XX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.
In SIXHILLS Jaulfr had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Rainer has 1 plough. 2 Freemen and 1 smallholder who have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.
Soca In Houten. II. partes unius bouate terrae ad geldum. SOCA. Wasta. est.
In HOLTHAM 2 parts of 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction. It is waste.
In Tauelesbi. habet Raynerius. I. molinum. et IIII. acras terrae. et I. uillanum qui iacet in Sisse.
In TEALBY Rainer has 1 mill and 4 acres of land. 1 villager who lies in Sixhills.
Manerium In WICHAM. habuit Ialf. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Raynerius. X. homines non arantes. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos.
In ` WYKEHAM' Jaulfr had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Rainer has 10 men who do not plough. Value before 1066, 30s; now 15.
Soca In LUDEFORDE. I. bouata terre ad geldum. Terra. II. boum SOCA in Wicham. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam. et I. acrae prati.
In LUDFORD 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction of ` Wykeham'. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough. Meadow, 1 acre.
Manerium In CADINTON. habuit Ialf. IIII. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. et IIII.

In KEDDINGTON Jaulfr had 4 1/2 bovates of land taxable and the fourth part of 1 bovate. Land for 1 plough. Baldwin has 1 plough. 7 Freemen with 1 1/2 bovates and the fourth part of 1 bovate have 5 oxen in a plough and 1 mill, 8s; meadow, 6 acres. A church and a priest with 1 mill, 11s. Value before 1066, 20s; now 25.
Soca In Cocrinton. dimidia bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. SOCA. Ibi. I. homo habet. I. bouem in caruca.
In COCKERINGTON 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A jurisdiction. 1 man has 1 ox in a plough. [Jurisdiction of Keddington. Baldwin has it. Jaulfr had it
Soca In Salflatebi dimidia bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra dimidii bouis. SOCA. est Wasta.
In SALTFLEETBY 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1/2 ox. A jurisdiction. It is waste. [Jurisdiction of Keddington. Baldwin has it. Jaulfr had it

Manerium In COMBREUORDE. habuit Ialf. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. . . Ibi habet. Raynerius. I. carucam. et IX. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. L. solidos.
In CUMBERWORTH Jaulfr had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land . Rainer has 1 plough. 9 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 50s.
Berewita In Maltetorp. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. BEREWITA Ibi. V. uillani habent. I. carucam. et XX. acras prati.
In MABLETHORPE 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. An outlier. 5 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 20 acres.
In Ulesbi. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA. est Wasta.
In ULCEBY 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction. It is waste.

Manerium In COCRINTON. habuit. XIIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Raynerius. I. carucam. et VIII. sochemannos de. I. carucata terrae. et II. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et sedem unius molini. et LX. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In COCKERINGTON he had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Rainer has 1 plough. 8 Freemen with 1 carucate of land; 2 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. 1 mill site; meadow, 60 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 10s.

Soca In Summercotes. tercia pars. I. carucatae ad geldum. Terra. . . hanc terram tenuerunt. III. homines. Terram duorum habet Ilbertus de Laci de episcopo Baiocensi. Terram tercii hominis habet Raynerius de rege. et ibi habet. I. hominem cum. I. boue.

In SOMERCOTES the third part of 1 carucate taxable. Land . Three men held this land. Ilbert of Lacy has the land of two from the Bishop of Bayeux. Rainer has the third man's land from the King; he has 1 man with 1 ox.
Soca In Aluingham. II. bouatae terrae et VI. pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. Ibi est. I. sochemannus. et VII. acrae prati.
In ALVINGHAM 2 bovates of land and the sixth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 1 Freeman. Meadow, 7 acres.

In WIDCALE. habuit Ialf. XV. bouatas terrae |et tercia pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Raynerius. I. carucam. et XII. sochemannos de. XIII. bouatis huius terrae. et III. cia parte I. bouate. et II. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et I. molinum. et terciam partem unius molini. IIII. solidorum. et XII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet LX. solidos. Ibi habet terciam partem. I. aecclesiae. et II. partes alias clamat testimonio Wapentac.

In WITHCALL Jaulfr had 15 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Rainer has 1 plough and 12 Freemen with 13 bovates of this land and the third part of 1 bovate; 2 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs; and 1 mill and the third part of 1 mill, 4s; meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 60s. He has the third part of 1 church and claims the other two parts by the witness of the Wapentake. Land of Osbern of Arques
