Manerium In SCALLEBI et Stratone habuerunt. . . et Grimbold. II. carucatas terrae et III. es bouatas ad geldum. Terra. IIII. or. carucarum. Ibi Aluredus homo Osberni habet. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terrae. et V. uillanos cum. I. caruca et I. boue. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XX. . V. solidos. Tailla. V. solidos.

In SCAWBY and STURTON _ and Grimbald had 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Alfred , Osbern's man, has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 5 villagers with 1 plough and 1 ox. Value before 1066, 30s; now 25s. Exactions 5s.
Berewita In Reburne. II. bouatae terrae et dimidiam et IIII. ta pars unius bouatae. ad geldum. Terra ad duplices boues. BEREWITA in Scalebi. Ibi |sunt XII. acrae prati. Wasta. est.

In REDBOURNE 2 1/2 bovates of land and the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for twice as many oxen. An outlier of Scawby. Meadow, 12 acres. It is waste. has it. _ and Grimbald had it Land of Oger the Breton

Manerium In BRUNE. habuit Morcar comes. II. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Ogerius brito. II. carucas. in dominio. et IIII. sochemannos de IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et XIIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum V. carucis. Ibi dimidia aecclesia et presbyter. et III. molini. XXX. solidorum. et VI. piscariae. reddentes. II. millenaria et dimidium anguillarum. et XIX. acrae prati. Silua pastilis. I. leuam et VIII. quarentenas longa. et I. quarentenam lata. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. VIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In BOURNE Earl Morcar had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Oger the Breton has 2 ploughs in lordship; 4 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 14 villagers and 4 smallholders with 5 ploughs. 1/2 church and a priest; 3 mills, 30s; 6 fisheries which pay 2 1/2 thousand eels; meadow, 19 acres; pasturable woodland 1 league and 8 furlongs long and 1 furlong wide. Value before 1066, 100s; now £8. Exactions 40s.

Manerium IBIDEM habuit Leuuinus. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VII. bobus. Ibi habet Ogerius. III. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. Ibi dimidia aecclesia. et VI. piscariae XXIIII. denariorum. et II. partes molini. V. solidorum. et IX. acrae prati. Silua pastilis I. leuam et VIII. quarentenas longa. et IIII. quarentenas lata. T. R. E. et modo. LX. solidos. Tailla.

There also Leofwin had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. Oger has 3 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 4 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 1/2 church; 6 fisheries, 24d; 2 parts of a mill, 5s; meadow, 9 acres; pasturable woodland 1 league and 8 furlongs long and 4 furlongs wide. before 1066 and now, 60s. Exactions 20s.
Berewita In Dic. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. BEREWITA in Brune. Ibi. II. uillani et II. bordarii habent dimidiam carucam. et IX. acras prati. et XX.
In DYKE 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. An outlier of Bourne. 2 villagers and 2 smallholders have 1/2 plough and meadow, 9 acres; pasturable woodland, 20 acres.
Soca In Caletorp. II. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. SOCA. Ibi. X. sochemanni habent. V. carucas. et XVI. acras prati. et XXIIII.
In CAWTHORPE 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. A jurisdiction. 10 Freemen have 5 ploughs and meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland, 24 acres.
SocaItem In Dic et Caletorp. I. carucata terrae et dimidia. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi. IX. sochemanni cum. I. caruca et II. bobus in caruca. et VI. acrae prati. et XII. acrae siluae pastilis.
Also in DYKE and CAWTHORPE 1 1/2 carucates of land. Land for 12 oxen. 9 Freemen with 1 plough and 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 6 acres; pasturable woodland, 12 acres.
Soca Ibidem. III. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. SOCA in /Hacunesbi
There also 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. A jurisdiction of Haconby.
Berewita In Spanesbi. II. II bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. BEREWITA in Brune. Ibi habet Ogerius. I. carucam. et XVIII. acras prati. T. R. E.
In SPANBY 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. An outlier of Bourne. Oger has 1 plough and meadow, 18 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
In Loctone habet Ogerius. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Socam super eam habet Gislebertus de gand.
In LAUGHTON Oger has 1 carucate of land taxable. Gilbert of Ghent has jurisdiction over it.

. II. Maneria In eadem LOCTONE. habuerunt Toli et Hereuuard. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. Ibi habet Ogerius. II. carucas in dominio. et IIII. uillanos habentes dimidiam carucam. et quartam partem duarum aecclesiarum. et X. acras prati. et VI. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. XL. solidos.

Also in LAUGHTON Toli and Hereward had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Oger has 2 ploughs in lordship; 4 villagers who have 1/2 plough and the fourth part of 2 churches; meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 6 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.
Berewita In Aslachebi et Auetorp. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. BEREWITA in Loctone. Ibi. II. uillani habent dimidiam carucam. et VI. acras prati. et II. acras siluae minutae.
In ASLACKBY and `AVETHORPE' 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. An outlier of Laughton. 2 villagers have 1/2 plough and meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 2 acres. had it
In Ringesdune et Repinghale habet Ogerius. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae.
In `RINGSTONE' and RIPPINGALE Oger has 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. had it
In Ringesdene. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ogerius habet.
In `RINGSTONE' 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Oger has it. had it

Manerium In REPINGHALE habuit Sanctus Guthlacus ad uictum monachorum III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Ogerius. II. carucas. et III. sochemannos de. VI. bouatis huius terrae. . . . Ibi. LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. LX.

In RIPPINGALE St Guthlac's had for the monks' supplies 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Oger has 2 ploughs. 3 Freemen with 6 bovates of this land. . Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60.

In HACONESBI. et Steintone. habuit Ulfenisc. IX. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. SOCA de Edeneham. Ibi habet Ogerius II. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XII. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.

In HACONBY and STAINFIELD Ulf Fenman had 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. A jurisdiction of Edenham. Oger has 2 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 3 villagers with 1 plough; and meadow, 12 acres; woodland, 20 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.

In MORTUNE et Hermodestorp. habuit Ulfenisc. V. carucatas et dimidiam carucatam terre |et dimidiam bouatam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. SOCA de Edeneham. Huius terre medietatem habet Ogerius. et habet ibi XIIII. sochemannos et III. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. et XLV. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae pastilis. Ualet. XL. solidos.

In MORTON and HANTHORPE Ulf Fenman had 5 carucates and 1/2 carucate of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for as many ploughs. A jurisdiction of Edenham. Oger has half of this land; he has there 14 Freemen and 3 smallholders with 6 ploughs; and meadow, 45 acres; pasturable woodland, 40 acres. Value 40s.

Manerium In eadem Mortune. habuit Quenleue. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam bouatam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Ogerius. II. carucas. et II. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terrae. et VIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et XVIII. acrae prati. et XVI. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX.

Also in MORTON Cwenleofu had 2 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Oger has 2 ploughs. 2 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 8 villagers and 4 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 18 acres; underwood, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60.

Berewita In eadem Mortun. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Inland in Haconesbi. Ibi. IIII. uillani habent. I. carucam. et IX. acras prati. et XVI. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.
Also in MORTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. of Haconby. 4 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 9 acres; underwood, 16 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
Soca Ibidem. I. bouata terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus et dimidia. SOCA in Haconesbi.
There also 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Haconby.
Soca In eadem Mortune dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. SOCA de Corninctone. Ibi. IIII. uillani cum dimidia caruca. et V. acrae prati. et VIII. acrae siluae minutae.
In MORTON 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction of Quarrington. 4 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 5 acres; underwood, 8 acres. of Ranulf of St Valery

Manerium In RANDEBI. habuit Godric. XIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Rannulfus de Sancto Walarico. III. carucas in dominio. et XIIII. sochemannos de. VII. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. X. solidorum et VIII. denariorum. et CCLXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. VI. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In RANBY Godric had 13 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Ranulf of St Valery has 3 ploughs in lordship; 14 Freemen with 7 bovates of this land; 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 10s 8d; meadow, 270 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £6. Exactions 40s. of Ranulf of St Valery
Berewita In Stratone. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Inland eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et III. uillani et III. bordarii cum. I. boue in caruca. et LX. acrae prati.
In STURTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. also of this manor. 1 plough in lordship; 3 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 60 acres. of Ranulf of St Valery

Soca In Staintone. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et XVI. sochemanni et IX. uillani et III. bordarii. habentes. IIII. carucas et II. boues in caruca. et II. molini. V. solidorum. et VIII. denariorum. et quater XX. ti acrae prati.

In STAINTON 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. A jurisdiction also of this manor. 1 plough in lordship; 16 Freemen, 9 villagers and 3 smallholders who have 4 ploughs and 2 oxen in a plough. 2 mills, 5s 8d; meadow, 80 acres. of Ranulf of St Valery

Soca In Burgrede. III. bouatae terrae. et III. cia pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. III. sochemanni et. I. uillanus. habent III. boues in caruca. et XV. acrae prati. et CCXX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca.

In `BURRETH' 3 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. A jurisdiction also of this manor. 3 Freemen and 1 villager have 3 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 15 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 220 acres. of Ranulf of St Valery

Manerium In REFAN. habuit Godric. dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi habet Rannulfus. I. carucam. et II. uillanos cum. II. bobus in caruca. et XII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XX.
In REEPHAM Godric had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Ranulf has 1 plough. 2 villagers with 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 20. of Ranulf of St Valery
Soca In Scotorne. II. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. . . . Terra. IIII. bobus. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter habens. I. carucam.
In SCOTHERN 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction also of this manor. A church and a priest who has 1 plough. of Ranulf of St Valery Land of Durand Malet

Manerium In CAMELINGEHAM. habuit Siuuard dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. et Elnod dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum SOCAM eiusdem Manerii. Ibi habet Durandus malet. I. carucam. et VIII. sochemannos et II. uillanos habentes. V. boues in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X. Tailla. III. solidos.

In CAMMERINGHAM Siward had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Alnoth 1/2 carucate of land taxable. A jurisdiction also of this manor. Durand Malet has 1 plough. 8 Freemen and 2 villagers who have 5 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10. Exactions 3s.

Manerium In SCALLEBI et Stratone habuit Eduinus. IX. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Aluredus homo Durandi. habet I. carucam. et III. sochemannos. et I. uillanum et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. solidos. modo. XX. Tailla. V. solidos.

In SCAWBY and STURTON Edwin had 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Alfred , Durand's man, has 1 plough. 3 Freemen, 1 villager and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 15s; now 20. Exactions 5s.
Soca In Wintrintone. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet dimidiam carucam.
Jurisdiction also of this manor: In WINTERTON 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. 1 Freeman has 1/2 plough. [Jurisdiction of Scawby. Alfred has it. Edwin had it

Manerium In BERTONE et Mannebi et Castorp. habuit Eduinus. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Wasta. est. Ibi. X. acrae prati. et X. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo. IIII. solidos.
In BROUGHTON, `MANBY' and CASTLETHORPE Edwin had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. It is waste. Meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 4s.

Manerium In NETELTONE. habuit Rolf. XIIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habent. II. homines Durandi. II. carucas. et X. uillanos. et V. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et III. molinum. V. solidorum. et aecclesiam. et LX. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. IIII. libras.

In NETTLETON Rolf had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Two of Durand's men have 2 ploughs and 10 villagers and 5 smallholders with 1 plough; and 3 mills, 5s; a church; meadow, 60 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066 and now, £4.
In Toresbi et Aduluesbi habet Durandus. I. salinam quae iacet in Rodouuelle.
In THORESBY and `AUTBY' Durand has 1 salt-house which lies in Rothwell. had it

Manerium In SEUREBI. habuit Rolf. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra V. carucarum. Ibi habet Durandus. II. carucas. et XV. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. III. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. L. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In SEARBY Rolf had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Durand has 2 ploughs. 15 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 4 villagers and 2 smallholders with 3 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 50s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In COTES. habuit Rolf. X. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum et V. boum. Ibi Ricardus homo Durandi habet. I. carucam. et X. sochemannos de. I. bouata et dimidia huius terrae. et VI. uillanos cum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. XII. solidorim. et quingentae acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. LX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In COATES Rolf had 10 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs and 5 oxen. Richard, Durand's man, has 1 plough. 10 Freemen with 1 1/2 bovates of this land; 6 villagers with 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 12s; meadow, 500 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 60s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In IRIBI. habuit Rolf. III. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra VII. carucarum. Ibi habet Durandus. II. carucas. et XVII. sochemannos et XV. uillanos cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. XXX. solidos.

In IRBY Rolf had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Durand has 2 ploughs. 17 Freemen and 15 villagers with 4 ploughs. A church and a priest. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50. Exactions 30s.

Manerium In LINDUDE. habuit Rolf dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Durandus. I. carucam. et VII. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et terciam partem aecclesiae. et terciam partem molini. VIII. denariorum. et XL. acras prati. et C. acras silue minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XX. Tailla. V. solidos.

In LINWOOD Rolf had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Durand has 1 plough and 7 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 1/2 ploughs; and the third part of a church; the third part of a mill, 8d; meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20. Exactions 5s.

Manerium In RODOUUELLE. habuit Rolf. XIII. bouatas terrae et dimidiam et terciam partem unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra dupliciter ad arandum. Ibi habet Durandus. I. carucam. et III. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terrae et dimidia. et VI. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. Ibi. XVIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. XXX.

In ROTHWELL Rolf had 13 1/2 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Twice as much land for ploughing. Durand has 1 plough. 3 Freemen with 2 1/2 bovates of this land; 6 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 18 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30.
Soca In Cucualt. I. bouata et III. partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. III. bobus et dimidia. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. II. sochemanni habent dimidiam carucam.
In CUXWOLD 1 bovate and 3 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 3 1/2 oxen. A jurisdiction also of this manor. 2 Freemen have 1/2 plough. had it
Soca In Caburne. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Wasta. est.
In CABOURNE 1 bovate of land taxable. A jurisdiction also of this manor. It is waste. had it
In Aduluesbi. I. salina. est quae iacet in Rodeuuelle. Durandus habet
In `AUTBY' 1 salt-house which lies in Rothwell. Durand has it. had it
In Clachesbi. V. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus.
In CLAXBY 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. A jurisdiction of `Wykeham'.

Manerium In NAUENEBI. habuit Rolf. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi habet Durandus. II. carucas in dominio. et II. uillanos cum. II. bobus in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XXXII. solidos. modo. L. solidos.
In NAVENBY Rolf had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Durand has 2 ploughs in lordship; 2 villagers with 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 32s; now 50s.
Berewita In Welingoure. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. BEREWITA huius Manerii. Ibi. II. sochemanni de. I. bouata terrae et dimidia. et I. uillanus.
In WELLINGORE 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. An outlier of this manor. 2 Freemen with 1 1/2 bovates of land; 1 villager. Meadow, 11 acres. had it
Soca In Aycle. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. II. boues in caruca. et IIII. or acrae prati. SOCA in Nauenebi.
In EAGLE 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 Freeman has 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 4 acres. A jurisdiction of Navenby. had it
In RASA. habet Durandus terciam partem dimidiae carucatae terrae.
In RASEN Durand has the third part of 1/2 carucate of land; he has 3 villagers with 1 ox in a plough. Land of Martin <of Woughton>

Manerium In GLENTEURDE habuit Gamel. VI. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra X. bobus. Ibi habet Martinus. IIII. sochemannos et I. uillanum cum. V. bobus in caruca. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. solidos. modo. X. solidos.
In GLENTWORTH Gamal had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Martin <of Woughton> has 4 Freemen and 1 villager with 5 oxen in a plough; and meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 8s; now 10s.

Manerium In HELMESWELLE. habuit Sperri. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XIIII. boum. Ibi habet Martinus. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. II. bouata huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. . XL. solidos.

In HEMSWELL Sperri had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Martin <of Woughton> has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 2 bovates of this land; 4 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 plough. before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

Manerium In HAGETORN. habuit Suen. III. bouatas terrae et IIII. partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi Martinus habet. II. uillanos habentes. III. boues in caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. V. solidos.

In HACKTHORN Swein had 3 bovates of land and 4 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Martin <of Woughton> has 2 villagers who have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 10 acres. before 1066 and now, 5s.

Berewita In OUSTORP. habuit Godric. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. BEREWITA in Grenebi. Ibi sunt. II. uillani et VIII. acrae prati. et I. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. VIII. solidos.

In AUSTHORPE Godric had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. An outlier of Ewerby. 2 villagers. Meadow, 8 acres; underwood, 1 acre. Value before 1066, 10s; now 8s. had it * Land of Waldin the Breton

Manerium In HAZEBI. habuit Uluiet. XI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Goduinus homo Waldini britonis habet. II. uillanos et II. bordarios. habentes. II. boues in caruca. et VIII. acras prati et dimidiam. et XVII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo X. solidos.

In HACEBY Wulfgeat had 11 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Godwin, Waldin the Breton's man, has 2 villagers and 2 smallholders who have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 8 1/2 acres; underwood, 17 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.

Soca In Orbelinge. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. SOCA in Hazebi. Ibi Waldinus habet. I. bordarium. et et II. acras prati et dimidiam. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. IIII. . . . Wido de credun habet socam
In HORBLING 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. A jurisdiction of Haceby. Waldin has 1 smallholder and meadow, 2 1/2 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 4. Guy of Craon has the jurisdiction.

Manerium In Wilgebi habuit Uluiet XV. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucis. et VI. bobus. Ibi habet Waldinus. II. carucas. et VIII. uillanos cum II. carucis. et LVI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XX. solidos.
In WILLOUGHBY Wulfgeat had 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs and 6 oxen. Waldin has 2 ploughs. 8 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 56 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20s.

Manerium In STIGESWALDE. habuit Uluiet. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Ibi habet. I. carucam. et II. piscariae. IIII. solidorum. et XL. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. XX. solidos.
In STIXWOULD Wulfgeat had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. He has 1 plough. 2 fisheries, 4s; meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 80 acres. before 1066 and now, 20s. Land of Waldin the artificer

Manerium In WILCHETONE habuit Grimchel. XVII. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. et Sberne. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Waldinus ingeniator. II. carucas. et XVII. sochemannos. de. X. bouatis huius terre et dimidia. et VII. bordarios cum. II. carucis. et quater XX. ti acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LXX. solidos. modo LX. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In WILLOUGHTON Grimkel had 17 1/2 bovates of land taxable and Esbiorn 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Waldin the artificer has 2 ploughs. 17 Freemen with 10 1/2 bovates of this land; 7 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 70s; now 60. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In HAGETORNE. habuit Ernui. I. carucatam terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Waldinus. I. carucam. et III. uillanos et. VII. bordarios. cum. X. bobus in caruca. et dimidiam aecclesiam. et I. molinum. XII. denariorum. et XXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In HACKTHORN Ernwin had 1 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Waldin has 1 plough and 3 villagers and 7 smallholders with 10 oxen in a plough; and 1/2 church; 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In CHILEBI. habuit Eiric. III. bouatas terrae et terciam partem unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum et dimidiae. Ibi Willelmus homo Waldini habet. I. bouem in caruca. et I. sochemannum de. II. toftis et II. bordarios. et XIIII. acras prati.

In KEELBY Erik had 3 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 1/2 oxen. William, Waldin's man, has 1 ox in a plough. 1 Freeman with 2 plots; 2 smallholders. Meadow, 14 acres. before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium In ITREBI. habuit Elaf. II. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. Ibi Willelmus homo Waldini. habet II. boues in caruca. et XIIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo XVI.
In `ITTERBY' Elaf had 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. William, Waldin's man, has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 14 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16.

Manerium In TORGREBI. habuit Ailof. V. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi Willelmus homo Waldini habet. I. bordarium et II. sochemannos de. II. toftis. et IIII. partes unius molini. II. solidorum. et IX. acras prati. T. R. E. . XX. solidos.

In THORGANBY Elaf had 5 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. William, Waldin's man, has 1 smallholder and 2 Freemen with 2 plots; and 4 parts of 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 9 acres. before 1066, 20s; now 10.

Manerium In RAUENDALE. habuit Eilaf. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi Willelmus homo Waldini habet. I. carucam. et II. uillanos habentes. II. boues in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X.
In RAVENDALE Elaf had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. William, Waldin's man, has 1 plough. 2 villagers who have 2 oxen in a plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10.

Manerium In BELESBI. habuit Elaf. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Willelmus homo Waldini habet. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et dimidium molinum. III. solidorum. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.
In BEELSBY Elaf had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. William, Waldin's man, has 1 plough. 8 villagers with 1 plough. 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

In WARAGEBI. habuit Godeuert. V. bouatas terrae |et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Waldinus. I. carucam. et III. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos. et V. bordarios cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et sedem molini. et XVI. acrae prati. et CC. XL. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XXXV. solidos. Tailla. V. solidos.

In WRAGBY Guthfrithr had 5 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Waldin has 1 plough and 3 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 4 villagers and 5 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs; and a mill site; meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 240 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 35s. Exactions 5s.
Soca In Langetone. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in Waragebi. Ibi. VI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et XL. III. acras siluae minutae.
In LANGTON 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Wragby. 6 Freemen have 1 plough and underwood, 43 acres.

Manerium In CHEILESTORNE. habuit Clac. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra IIII. boum. Ibi Waldinus habet. III. boues in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. V. solidos et VIII. denariorum.
In KELSTERN Klak had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Waldin has 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 5s 8d. Land of Odo the bowman

Manerium In WILCHETONE. habuerunt Alestan et Odincar. III. carucatas et III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Odo balistarius. II. carucas in dominio. et XVIII. sochemannos de XIII. bouatis et dimidia huius terrae. et VI. uillanos cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et CVIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III. Tailla. LX. solidos

In WILLOUGHTON Alstan and Othenkar had 3 carucates and 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 1/2 ploughs. Odo the bowman has 2 ploughs in lordship; 18 Freemen with 13 1/2 bovates of this land; 6 villagers with 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 108 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 3. Exactions 60s.

Manerium In SCALLEBI habuerunt Sbern et Grimbold. II. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Aluredus homo Odonis habet. I. carucam. et V. sochemannos de. I. carucata huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit XXX. solidos. modo. XX. V. Tailla. V. solidos.

In SCAWBY Esbiorn and Grimbald had 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Alfred , Odo's man, has 1 plough. 5 Freemen with 1 carucate of this land; 4 villagers with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 30s; now 25. Exactions 5s.
In Reburne. II. bouatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. BEREWITA in Scallebi. Wasta. est.
In REDBOURNE 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. An outlier of Scawby. It is waste. has it. Esbiorn and Grimbald had it

Manerium In SUINHOPE. habuit Ainar et nouerca eius. III. carucatas terre et dimidiam bouatam et IIII. partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Odo. II. carucas. et X. sochemannos de X. toftis. et VIII. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. III. carucis et dimidia. et XII. acras prati. et I. molinum. V. solidorum. T. R. E. ualuit. III. libras. modo. IIII. Tailla XX. solidos.

In SWINHOPE Einarr and his stepmother had 3 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate and the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 1/2 ploughs. Odo has 2 ploughs. 10 Freemen with 10 plots; 8 villagers and 2 smallholders with 3 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 12 acres; 1 mill, 5s. Value before 1066 £3; now 4. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In NEUTONE. habuit Alsi. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi habet Odo. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. I. bouata huius terrae et V. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia. et XII. acrae prati. et LXX. acrae siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo similiter. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In NEWTON Alsi had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Odo has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 1 bovate of this land; 5 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. A church; meadow, 12 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 70 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now the same. Exactions 40s.

Berewita In Uuesbi. VI. bouatae terrae et III. cia pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. BEREWITA in Neutone. Ibi Willelmus homo Odonis habet III. bordarios. et dimidium molinum. III. solidorum. et IX. acras prati.
In `OSEBY' 6 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. An outlier of Newton. William, Odo's man, has 3 smallholders and 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 9 acres. had it

Berewita In Trichingeham. X. bouatae terre. et tercia pars. II. bouatarum ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. BEREWITA in Neutone. Ibi habet Odo. II. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terrae. et V. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca et II. bobus in caruca. Ibi pertinet. VI. pars unius aecclesiae Sancta Petri. et tercia pars. I. aecclesiae Sanctae Mariae. et tercia pars dimidiae carucatae quae iacet in aecclesia SANCTAE MARIAE.

In THREEKINGHAM 10 bovates of land and the third part of 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many oxen. An outlier of Newton. Odo has 2 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough and 2 oxen in a plough. The sixth part of 1 church of St Peter belongs there, also the third part of 1 church of St Mary and the third part of 1/2 carucate which lies in the church of St Mary. had it

Manerium In HAZEBI. habuit Gunchil. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi habet Odo. II. boues in caruca. et II. acras prati. et VIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. III. solidos.
In HACEBY Gunnketill had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Odo has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 2 acres; underwood, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 3s.

Soca In Torgrebi. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. SOCA in belesbi. Ibi Herbertus homo Odonis habet XII. sochemannos cum. II. carucis. et XXX. acras prati. et I. molinum. III. solidorum.
In THORGANBY 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Bleasby. Herbert, Odo's man, has 12 Freemen with 2 ploughs and meadow, 30 acres; 1 mill, 3s.
Manerium In B|iLESBI. habuit. Edric. dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Odo. I. bordarium. et VI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. II. solidos.
In BEELSBY Edric had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Odo has 1 smallholder and meadow, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 2s.

Manerium In BLASEBI. habuit Alestan. V. bouatas terrae. et III. ciam partem unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Ibi Herbertus homo Odonis habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum. et III. bordarios et XL. acras prati. et XL. II. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In BLEASBY Alstan had 5 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Herbert, Odo's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager and 3 smallholders. Meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 42 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In SUARREBI. habuit Godeman. III. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Odo. II. sochemannos cum X. bobus in caruca. et terciam partem unius aecclesiae. et XX. acras prati. et XII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.

In SWARBY Godman had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Odo has 2 Freemen with 10 oxen in a plough; and the third part of 1 church; meadow, 20 acres; underwood, 12 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium In WILGEBI. habuit Ragenald. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra IIII. boum. Ibi habet Colegrim homo Odonis. I. bordarium et I. bouem in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. V. solidos.
In WILLOUGHBY Regnvald had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Kolgrim , Odo's man, has 1 smallholder and 1 ox in a plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 5s.

Manerium In TUROLFBI. habuit Botild. IIII. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Odo. III. sochemannos et IIII. uillanos et I. bordarium cum II. carucis. et III. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XVI.
In THURLBY Bothild had 4 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Odo has 3 Freemen, 4 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs; and meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16.

Manerium In ACLEI. habuit Gonchetel. VII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. boum. Ibi habet Odo. II. uillanos et II. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.
In EAGLE Gunnketill had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Odo has 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.
In Duneham habet Odo balistarius. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra II. carucarum. SOCA in Eteleham.
In DUNHOLME Odo the bowman has 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Nettleham. Land of William Blunt

Manerium In FALDINGEURDE. habuit Osulf. II. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Willelmus blundus. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos de. V. bouatis huius terrae. et VI. uillanos et II. bordarios. habentes VI. boues in caruca. et XL. acras prati. et XII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo XX. solidos. Tailla. V. solidos.

In FALDINGWORTH Oswulf had 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. William Blunt has 1 plough. 2 Freemen with 5 bovates of this land; 6 villagers and 2 smallholders who have 6 oxen in a plough and meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 12 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 20s. Exactions 5s.

Manerium In CROCSBI. habuit Asford. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarm. Ibi habet Willelmus. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. II. bouatis huius terrae. et V. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et IX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. XL.

In CROXBY Asfrith had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. William has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 2 bovates of this land; 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 40.
In Torgrebi. habet Willelmus. I. molinum. III. solidorum. quod pertinet ad crocsbi. In Soca Turgoti.
In THORGANBY William has 1 mill, 3s, which belongs to Croxby, in Thorgot 's jurisdiction.

. II. Maneria In WIDCALE. habuerunt Godric et Siuuard. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. * Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Willelmus. I. carucam. et III. uillanos. cum. III. bobus in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos
In WITHCALL Godric and Siward had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. William has 1 plough. 3 villagers with 3 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
Manerium In CATEBI. habuit Elnod. II. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. V. boum. Willelmus habet. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. V. solidos.
In ` CADEBY' Alnoth had 2 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. William has it. Value before 1066, 20s; now 5s.
Soca In Salflatebi et Schitebroc. II. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. SOCA in Catebi. Wasta. est.
In SALTFLEETBY and `SKIDBROOKE' 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. A jurisdiction of ` Cadeby'. It is waste. Land of Restold

Manerium In GLENTEURDE habuit Sota. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Ibi habet Restoldus dimidiam carucam. et IIII. sochemannos. de. III. bouatis huius terrae. et I. bordarium. cum. I. caruca. et XXV. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo X. solidos.

In GLENTWORTH Sotr had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Restold has 1/2 plough. 4 Freemen with 3 bovates of this land; 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 25 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s. Land of Godfrey of Cambrai

Manerium In WEST DEPINGE. habuerunt Azor. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. et Elmer habuit tantundem. II. carucatas et dimidiam terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi Godefridus de Cambrai. habet. X. uillanos habentes. III. carucas. et IIII. molinos. XL. solidorum. et C. acras prati. et VIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. VI. Tailla. X. solidos.
In WEST DEEPING A

. III. Maneria In ESTDEPINGE. habuerunt AElmer et Erneber et Fredgist III. carucatas terre et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucis et bobus. Ibi habent. II. homines Godefridi. II. carucas. et XIX uillanos. et II. II. bordarios. habentes. VII. carucas. et quater XX. et XIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. C. solidos. Tailla. XXX. V. solidos.

In `EAST DEEPING' * Almer, Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> and Fredegaest had 3 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Two of Godfrey's men have 2 ploughs. 19 villagers and 4 smallholders who have 7 ploughs. Meadow, 93 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 100s. Exactions 35s.

IBIDEM. habuit Sanctus Petrus de burg. V. socam super. V. Maneria de. II. carucatis terre et VI. bouatis. ad geldum. Terra totidem carucis et bobus. Ibi habent. II. homines Godefridi. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XII. uillanos cum. III. carucis et dimidia. et I. piscariam. XII. denariorum. et LXXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo L. Tailla. XII. solidos.

There also * St Peter's of Peterborough had jurisdiction over 5 manors of 2 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Two of Godfrey's men have 1 1/2 ploughs. 12 villagers with 3 1/2 ploughs. 1 fishery, 12d; meadow, 70 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 50. Exactions 12s.

Manerium In BERCHEHAM. habuit Aschil. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habent. II. homines Godefridi dimidiam carucam. et V. sochemannos de tercia parte huius terrae frisocae. habentes. II. boues in caruca. et I. acram prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo XII. Tailla. XII. solidos similiter.

In BARHOLM Eskil had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Two of Godfrey's men have 1/2 plough. 5 Freemen with a third part of this land, a free jurisdiction, who have 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 1 acre. Value before 1066, 20s; now 12. Exactions 12s likewise.
Soca In Estou. I. bouata terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi. V. sochemanni habent. V. boues in caruca. SOCA in Bercheham. Ualet. II. solidos.
In STOWE 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 5 Freemen have 5 oxen in a plough. A jurisdiction of Barholm. Value 2s.
Soca In Griteford. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. bobus. Ibi Euremarus homo Godefridi habet. III. sochemannos. et IIII. boues in caruca. et IIII. acras prati. Precium eius. . .
In GREATFORD 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Euremar, Godfrey's man, has 3 Freemen and 4 oxen in a plough and meadow, 4 acres. Its valuation .

Manerium In CRETUN. habuit Ulf cilt. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Godefridus. X. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et VII. acras prati. et C. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo XX.

In CREETON Ulf the noble had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Godfrey has 10 villagers with 1 plough; and meadow, 7 acres; underwood, 100 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 20.
Soca In Bintham. IIII. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. SOCA Ibi. I. uillanus habet. II. boues in caruca. et I. acram prati.
In BYTHAM 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction. 1 villager has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 1 acre.
In silua Westbitham. habet Godefridus. XL. acras pro VIII.
In the wood of `WEST BYTHAM' BYTHAM * Godfrey has 40 acres for 8d .

- In TISTELTUNE habuit Turuert. I. carucatam et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi Gleu homo Godefridi habet. I. sochemannum et III. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et XV. acras siluae. et XL. acras in Warnode Drogonis. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X.

In THISTLETON Thorfridh had 1 1/2 carucates taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Gleu <of Rothwell>, Godfrey's man, has 1 Freeman and 3 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and woodland, 15 acres; 40 acres in Drogo 's . Value before 1066, 20s; now 10.
In Helpericham habuit Ascerzor. I. ecclesiam in qua iacent. IIII. bouatae terrae. et IIII. acrae prati. Godefridus habet et iacet in Depinge.
In HELPRINGHAM A

Manerium In WIUELESFORDE. habuit Siuuard. IX. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. De hac terra habuit Azor frater eius. VI. bouatas. et I. molinum ab omni seruitio quietum praeter exercitum. Ibi Godefridus habet. III. carucas. et XII. sochemannos de. III. carucatis huius terrae. et VI. uillanos et II. bordarios. habentes VI. carucas. Ibi aecclesia ad quam pertinent. II. bouatae de hac terra. et XLV. acrae prati. et XX. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. IIII. libras. Tailla. XX. solidos. Hoc Manerium emit. Remigius. episcopus de Godefrido. ad aecclesiam SANCTAE MARIAE de Lincole.
In WILSFORD Siward had 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Of this land A

Manerium In CASUIC habuit Azor. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Ibi Gunfridus de cioches habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et V. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et dimidium molinum. XII. solidorum. et VI. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.
In CASEWICK A

Manerium In POCHINTONE. habuit Erneber. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. I. uillanus est. et III. acrae prati. et XL acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. III. solidos.
In POINTON Arnbiorn <of `Avethorpe'> had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 1 villager. Meadow, 3 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 3s. Land of Osbern the priest

Manerium In FALDINGURDE. habuit Turuert. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. totidem bobus. Ibi habet Osbernus presbyter. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terre. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium. et XII. acras prati. et I. acra siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.

In FALDINGWORTH Thorfridh had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Osbern the priest has 1 plough. 2 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 2 villagers and 1 smallholder. Meadow, 12 acres; underwood, 1 acre. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.

Manerium In BINNIBROC. habuit Chetelbar. IX. bouatas terre et III. es partes. I. bouate ad geldum. Terra. . . Ibi habet Osbernus presbyter. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terrae. et XIII. uillanos et VII. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molinus. V. solidorum. et XII. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. L. solidos.

In BINBROOK Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> had 9 bovates of land and 3 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land . Osbern the priest has 1 plough. 4 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land; 13 villagers and 7 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 12 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 50s. of the same Osbern and of Ralph

. II. Maneria In MERESTUNE habuerunt Turuert et alius Turuert. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi Radulfus dapifer et Osbernus presbyter habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. et III. sochemannos de. IIII. bouatis et dimidia huius terrae. et X. uillanos et V. bordarios cum. II. carucis. et II. molini. XX. II. solidorum. et quater XX. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. IIII. libras.

In MARSTON Thorfridh and another Thorfridh had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Ralph the steward and Osbern the priest have 2 1/2 ploughs. 3 Freemen with 4 1/2 bovates of this land; 10 villagers and 5 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 2 mills, 22s; meadow, 80 acres. Value before 1066 and now £4. of the same Osbern and of Ralph
Soca In Barchestune. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA huius Manerii Ibi. VII. acrae prati et dimidia.

In BARKSTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of this manor. Meadow, 7 1/2 acres. [Jurisdiction of Marston. Thorfridh and another Thorfridh had it of the same Osbern and of Ralph Land of Ansgot

Manerium In BURUELLE. habuit Godric. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Ansgotus. III. carucas in dominio. et XX. III. uillanos. et VI. bordarios cum. VI. carucis. Ibi aecclesia. et I. molinus. III. solidorum et Silua pastilis. I. leuam longa. et I. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. libras. modo XV.

In BURWELL Godric had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 8 ploughs. Ansgot has 3 ploughs in lordship; 23 villagers and 6 smallholders with 6 ploughs. A church; 1 mill, 3s; pasturable woodland 1 league long and 1 wide. Value before 1066 £16; now 15. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Agetorp. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et V. uillani et I. bordarius. cum. II. carucis. et VIII.
In AUTHORPE 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. A jurisdiction also of this manor. 4 Freemen, 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 8 acres.

Manerium In MACHETONE. habuit Turuerd. XII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Ansgot. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos. et V. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca et dimidia. Ibi aecclesia et VII. acrae prati. Silua minuta. I. leuam longa. et IIII. quarentenas lata. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XX.

In MUCKTON Thorfridh had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Ansgot has 1 plough. 2 Freemen, 5 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. A church; meadow, 7 acres; underwood 1 league long and 4 furlongs wide. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20.
In Welletone habet Ansgotus. I. uillanum cum dimidia caruca. Ibi. est terra ad geldum. II. bouatae. Terra. V. bobus. Ualet. V. solidos.
In WELTON Ansgot has 1 villager with 1/2 plough. Taxable land, 2 bovates. Land for 5 oxen. Value 5s. Land of Countess Judith

Manerium In WIDME. habuit Eduuard cilt. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi iudita comitissa et Bernardus sub ea habet. II. carucas. et II. salinas. X. solidorum. et XL. I. acra prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo VIII. libras. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In WITHAM Edward the noble had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Countess Judith, and Bernard under her, has 2 ploughs and 2 salt-houses, 10s; meadow, 41 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now £8. Exactions 20s.

Soca In Tiuuorde. V. carucatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. SOCA Ibi VIII. sochemanni et VI. uillani habent. IIII. carucas. et XVI. acras prati. Silua pastilis per loca. IX. quarentenas et IX. perticas. longa. et VI. quarentenas lata.

In `TWYFORD' 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. A jurisdiction. 8 Freemen and 6 villagers have 4 ploughs and meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland in places 9 furlongs and 9 perches long and 6 furlongs wide. Witham. Edward the noble had it. Bernard has it under Countess Judith
Soca In Suinhamstede. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. SOCA. Ibi VIII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et IIII. acras prati. et C. acrae silue pastilis IIII. or minus.

In SWINSTEAD 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. A jurisdiction. 8 Freemen have 2 ploughs and meadow, 4 acres; pasturable woodland, 100 acres less 4. Witham. Edward the noble had it. Bernard has it under Countess Judith
In Offintone. habuit Leuric abbas Sancti Petri de burg. LX. acras terre sine geldo. . . . Iudita comitissa hanc terram habet. In ea nil pecunie habet. sed colit eam in belmestorp Manerio.

In UFFINGTON Abbot Leofric of St Peter's of Peterborough had 60 acres of land without tax. . Countess Judith has this land. She has no livestock on it, but cultivates it with the manor of Belmesthorpe. Value 10s.

Manerium In HACHAM habuit Estori. V. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Hoc Manerium habet Remigius episcopus de ea. et ibi habet IX. uillanos et II. bordarios. et I. molinum. V. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et sedem unius molini XIII. solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. XX. solidos. modo. L. solidos.

In HOUGHAM Stori <of Bolingbroke> had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Bishop Remigius has this manor from her; he has 9 villagers and 2 smallholders and 1 mill, 5s 4d; 1 mill site, 13s 4d; meadow, 10 acres. before 1066, 20s; now 50s.

Manerium In magna PANTONE. habuerunt Grimber et Elmer. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi Nigellus homo comitissae. . I. carucam. et III. uillanos et I. bordarium. cum dimidia caruca. et V. molinos XLIIII. solidorum. Silua minuta XVI. quarentenas longa. et IIII. quarentenas lata. et III. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit C. solidos. modo similiter.

In GREAT PONTON Grimbert and Almer had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Nigel, the Countess's man, 1 plough. 3 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1/2 plough. 5 mills, 44s; underwood 16 furlongs long and 4 furlongs wide; meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now the same.

Manerium In parua PANTONE. habuit Turuert X. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. carucarum. Ibi Nigel de comitissa habet. I. carucam. et VIII. sochemannos de. III. carucatis huius terrae. et XII. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. V. carucis. et IIII. molinos de. LXIII. solidis. Silua minuta. VI. quarentenas longa. et V. quarentenas et dimidiam lata. T. R. E. et modo ualet. VI. libras.

In LITTLE PONTON Thorfridh had 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 10 ploughs. Nigel has 1 plough from the Countess. 8 Freemen with 3 carucates of this land; 12 villagers and 3 smallholders with 5 ploughs. 4 mills at 63s; underwood 6 furlongs long and 5 1/2 furlongs wide. Value before 1066 and now £6.

Manerium In GERMUNTORP. habuerunt Turuert et Grimbert. I. carucatam terre et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Nigellus de comitissa habet dimidiam carucam. et XI. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. et III. molinos de XXV. solidis. et IIII. denariis. et XVI. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. L. solidos. modo. XL. solidos.

In `GANTHROPS' Thorfridh and Grimbert had 1 carucate of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Nigel has 1/2 plough from the Countess. 11 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. 3 mills at 25s 4d; meadow, 16 acres; underwood, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 50s; now 40s.

Manerium In STAPLEFORDE. habuit Morcar. X. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Osbernus de comitissa habet. II. carucas. et XXVII. sochemannos de VI. carucatis et VI. bouatis huius terre. et III. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. VII. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. cum dimidia carucata huius terre. et V. quarentenas prati longa. et LX. perticas lata. T. R. E. ualuit. VII. libras. modo VIII. libras.

In STAPLEFORD Morcar had 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Osbern has 2 ploughs from the Countess. 27 Freemen with 6 carucates and 6 bovates of this land; 3 villagers and 3 smallholders with 7 ploughs. A priest and a church with 1/2 carucate of this land. Meadow, 5 furlongs long and 60 perches wide. Value before 1066 £7; now £8. Exactions 40s.

Soca In Nortune. XII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi habet Iudita. VII. sochemannos et XI. uillanos. cum. V. carucis. et XII. acras prati. Siluae minutae. VI. quarentenas longae. et I. latae.

In NORTON 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Judith has 7 Freemen and 11 villagers with 5 ploughs; and meadow, 12 acres; underwood 6 furlongs long and 1 wide. Morcar had it. Osbern has it

Manerium In OUERTUNE et Stratone. habuit Waltef comes. III. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi Iudita comitissa habet. III. carucas in dominio. et XXX. V. uillanos. et VIII. bordarios. cum. IX. carucis. et XL. acras prati. et Siluae pastiles. I. leuam longae. et dimidiam latae. T. R. E. ualuit. X|. II. . libras. Modo: XL. libras.

In OVERTON and STRETTON Earl Waltheof had 3 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Countess Judith has 3 ploughs in lordship; 35 villagers and 8 smallholders with 9 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres; pasturable woodland, 1 league long and 1/2 wide. Value before 1066 £12; now £40.

Manerium In TISTERTUNE. habuit Erich dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Hugo homo comitissa. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XL.
In THISTLETON Erik had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Hugh , the Countess's man, has 1 plough. 6 villagers with 1 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40.

Manerium In WICHINGEDENE. habuit Wallef comes. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi Hugo homo comitissae habet. V. carucas in dominio. et XXVII. uillanos et VII. bordarios. cum. VIII. carucis. Pratum. X. quarentenas longum et VIII. quarentenas latum.

In WHISSENDINE Earl Waltheof had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Hugh , the Countess's man, has 5 ploughs in lordship; 27 villagers and 7 smallholders with 8 ploughs. Meadow 10 furlongs long and 8 furlongs wide. .

Manerium In AKELEY. habuit Wallef comes. VIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi comitissa Iudita habet. II. carucas. et XVIII. uillanos. et I. bordarium cum. IIII. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et pratum. XV. quarentenas longum. et I. latum. Silua. XIIII. quarentenas longa. et IIII. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras.

In EAGLE Earl Waltheof had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Countess Judith has 2 ploughs. 18 villagers and 1 smallholder with 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow 15 furlongs long and 1 wide; woodland 14 furlongs long and 4 wide. Value before 1066 £10; now £12.
Soca In Turulfbi. VII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. et dimidia. Terra. III. carucis et VI. bobus. Inlant et Soca in Acley. Ibi. XIIII. sochemanni cum. IIII. carucis.
?S&B. Land for 3 ploughs and 6 oxen. and a jurisdiction of Eagle. 14 Freemen with 4 ploughs.

Soca In Sunderby. XI. carucatae ad geldum. SOCA in Acley. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi habet comitissa Iudita. XLIX. sochemannos. habentes. XIII. carucas. Silua pastilis. VIII. quarentenas longa. et V. lati. medietas pascuae. alia medietas minutae siluae.

In SWINDERBY 11 carucates taxable. A jurisdiction of Eagle. Land for 6 ploughs. Countess Judith has 49 Freemen who have 13 ploughs. Pasturable woodland 8 furlongs long and 5 wide: half of pasture, the other half of underwood.

Manerium In EXENTUNE. habuit Wallef comes. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. carucarum. Ibi habet Iudita comitissa. III. carucas. et XXX. VII. uillanos. cum. VIII. carucis. et II. molinos. XIII. solidorum. Pratum. VI. quarentenas longa. Silua pastilis per loca. V. quarentenas longa. et V. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII.

`ROTELAND' In EXTON Earl Waltheof had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Countess Judith has 3 ploughs. 37 villagers with 8 ploughs. 2 mills, 13s; meadow 6 furlongs long; pasturable woodland in places 5 furlongs long and 5 wide. Value before 1066 £8; now £10.

Similiter In Rotelande Manerium In WITEWELLE habuit Besy. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Herbertus homo comitissae habet. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos et IIII. bord arioscum. II. carucis. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. XII. denariorum. et XX. acrae prati. Silua pastilis. VI. quarentenas et VI. perticas longa. et III. quarentenas et XIII. perticas lata. Ualet. XL. solidos.

Likewise in `ROTELAND' In WHITWELL <of Calverton> had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Herbert, the Countess's man, has 1 plough. 6 villagers and 4 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland 6 furlongs and 6 perches long and 3 furlongs and 13 perches wide. Value 40s.

Manerium In COLEBY. habuit Archil. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Iudita comitissa. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. I. carucata huius terrae. et VI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XXX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. XL.

In COLEBY Arnketil had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Countess Judith has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 1 carucate of this land; 6 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 30 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 40.

Soca In Wimme. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Soca in Ouretone. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni et II. uillani |et I. bordarius. habent. III. carucas. Ibi dimidia aeclesia et LX. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae.
In WITHAM 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Overton. 8 Freemen, 2 villagers and 1 smallholder have 3 ploughs. 1/2 church; meadow, 60 acres; woodland, 100 acres.
Soca In Tisteltone. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Soca eiusdem. Manerii. Ibi. II. bordarii habent. II. boues in caruca. Ualet X. solidos. Hugo tenet.
In THISTLETON 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. A jurisdiction also of this manor. 2 smallholders have 2 oxen in a plough. Value 10s. Hugh holds it. Overton. Earl Waltheof had it
Berewita In Bichere. I. bouata terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Inland in Wime. Wasta. est praeter unam salinam.
In BICKER 1 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. of Witham. It is waste except for 1 salt-house.
In MENTINGES. habet Willelmus presbyter. II. bouatas et dimidiam et VI. tam partem. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ualet. II. solidos.
In MINTING William the priest has 2 1/2 bovates and the sixth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Value 2s. Land of Guy of Craon

Manerium In ACHESBI. habuit Aslac. IX. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi Aluredus homo Widonis de credon habet. II. carucas. et IX. sochemannos de. III. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XXX. acras prati. et IX. acras et dimidiam siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. IIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In ASHBY Aslak had 9 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Alfred , Guy of Craon's man, has 2 ploughs. 9 Freemen with 3 bovates of this land; 3 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 30 acres; underwood, 9 1/2 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £4. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Rauenedale. X. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi. X. sochemanni habent. II. carucas et dimidiam.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In RAVENDALE 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. 10 Freemen have 2 1/2 ploughs. . Alfred has it. Aslak had it
Soca In Brigelai. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi. VIII. sochemanni et I. bordarius habent. I. carucam. et V. acras prati.
In BRIGSLEY 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 8 Freemen and 1 smallholder have 1 plough and meadow, 5 acres. . Alfred has it. Aslak had it
Soca In Wade. V. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi VI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et X. acras prati.
In WAITHE 5 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 6 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 10 acres. . Alfred has it. Aslak had it

. II. Maneria In Normanebi et Santone. habuerunt Sbern et Chetel. VII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi habet Aluredus homo Widonis. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. uillanos et II. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XV. Tailla. V. solidos.

In NORMANBY and SANTON Esbiorn and Ketil had 7 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Alfred , Guy's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 2 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 15. Exactions 5s.

Manerium In BINNIBROC et Erforde. habuit Eduuard. X. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. et dimidiae. Ibi Aluredus homo Widonis habet. II. carucas. et I. molinum. V. solidorum. et XII. acras prati. T. R. E.
In BINBROOK and ORFORD Edward had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 1/2 ploughs. Alfred , Guy's man, has 2 ploughs and 1 mill, 5s; meadow, 12 acres. before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In LACESTONE. habuit Ulgrim. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi homo Widonis Aluredus habet. II. carucas. et IX. sochemannos de. X. bouatis huius terrae. et VIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. III. carucis. et XVII. acras prati. et XII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. et modo similiter. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In LAUGHTON Ulfgrim <of Laughton> had 2 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Guy's man, Alfred , has 2 ploughs. 9 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 8 villagers and 4 smallholders with 3 ploughs. Meadow, 17 acres; underwood, 12 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now the same. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Blitone. XIIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In BLYTON 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. [Jurisdiction of Laughton. Alfred has it. Ulfgrim <of Laughton> had it
In Scotone habet Wido. II. bouatas terrae.
In SCOTTON Guy has 2 bovates of land. [A jurisdiction of Laughton. Alfred has it. Ulfgrim <of Laughton> had it

Manerium In REPINGHALE. habuit Adestan. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Widaldus homo Widonis habet nunc. I. carucam. et X. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. V. carucis. et LX. acras prati. et XVI. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III.

In RIPPINGALE Aethelstan had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Now Widald, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 10 villagers and 2 smallholders with 5 ploughs. Meadow, 60 acres; underwood, 16 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 3.

Soca In Loctone. V. bouatae terrae et tercia pars unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi Warnerus homo Widonis habet. III. bordarios. et X. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In LAUGHTON 5 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many oxen. Warner <of Pointon>, Guy's man, has 3 smallholders and underwood, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s. had it

Manerium In DUSEBI habuit Osfram in uadimonio. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Hanc terram disuadiauit Hernald filius Ansgot antequam Wido fuit saisitus de terra Osfram. et post habuit semper Wido seruitium. Ibi. est. I. caruca in dominio. et III. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et XXX. I. acra prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.

In DOWSBY Osfram had in pledge 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Arnold son of Ansgot redeemed this land before Guy was in possession of Osfram's land, and afterwards Guy always had the service. 1 plough in lordship; 3 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 31 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In POCHINTONE. habuit Adestan. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Warnerus homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXX.
In POINTON Aethelstan had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Warner <of Pointon>, Guy's man, has 1 plough and underwood, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30.

Manerium In SCACHERTORP. habuit Adestan. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Wido usque nunc tenuit in soca. et modo est deratiocinatum capitale Manerium ad opus regis. Ibi. est. I. caruca in dominio. et I. uillanus et II. bordarii. habentes. II. boues in caruca. Ibi. I. acra prati. et I. acra siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X.

In SCOTTLETHORPE Aethelstan had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Guy has held it until now in jurisdiction; now it is adjudged a head manor for the King's use. 1 plough in lordship; 1 villager and 2 smallholders who have 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 1 acre; underwood, 1 acre. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10.

Manerium In OSBERNEDEBI. habuit Aluric. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Uitalis homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. I. carucata huius terrae. et V. uillanos et III. bordarios cum. I. carucis et dimidia. et XX. IIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. VI. libras.

In OSBOURNBY Aelfric had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Vitalis, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 1 carucate of this land; 5 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 24 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now £6.
Soca In Dembelbi. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. SOCA in Osbernedebi. Ibi. I. sochemannus et II. uillani habent. I. carucam. et XIIII. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae.

In DEMBLEBY 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Osbournby. 1 Freeman and 2 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 14 acres; underwood, 20 acres. had it. Vitalis, Guy's man, has it
In Wilgebi. habet Wido socam super dimidiam aecclesiam et super presbyterum qui pertinet ad Osbernedebi.
In WILLOUGHBY Guy has jurisdiction over 1/2 church and over a priest who belongs to Osbournby. had it. Vitalis, Guy's man, has it

Manerium In HAZEBI. habuit Aluric. XI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi Goduinus homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum et I. uillanum. et I. bordarium habentes. II. boues in caruca. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et VIII. acras prati et dimidiam. et XVIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXX. Hanc terram clamat Waldin de dono regis. Super. XI. bouatas terrae Waldini. habet Wido socam. sicut Wapentac testatur.

In HACEBY Aelfric had 11 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Godwin, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 1 Freeman, 1 villager and 1 smallholder who have 2 oxen in a plough. A priest and a church; meadow, 8 1/2 acres; underwood, 18 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30. Waldin claims this land from the King's gift. Guy has jurisdiction over 11 bovates of Waldin's land, as the Wapentake testifies.

Manerium In SUAUINTONE. habuit Adestan. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. XI. boum. Ibi Warnerus homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et I. uillanum cum. II. bobus in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. X. solidos.

In SWATON Aethelstan had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 11 oxen. Warner <of Pointon>, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 1 villager with 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 10s.
In Horbelinge habet Wido socam super. VI. bouatas terrae Waldini.
In HORBLING Guy has jurisdiction over 6 bovates of Waldin's land.

Soca In Haidure. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. SOCA in Osbernedebi. Ibi. XX. IIII. sochemanni. et III. bordarii habent. VI. carucas. et quater XX. acrae prati. et XVI. acrae siluae minutae. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia

In HEYDOUR 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Osbournby. 24 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 6 ploughs. Meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 16 acres. A priest and a church. had it. Vitalis, Guy's man, has it

Manerium In WELLEBI. habuit Adestan. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Rannulfus homo Widonis habet. II. carucas in dominio. et V. sochemannos de. III. carucatis et II. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et L. III acras prati. et quater XX. ti acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LX.

In WELBY Aethelstan had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Ranulf, Guy's man, has 2 ploughs in lordship; 5 Freemen with 3 carucates and 2 bovates of this land; 3 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 53 acres; underwood, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 60.

Manerium In HERIGERBI. habuit Algar. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Idem Algar de Widone habet. ibi. I. carucam in dominio. et I. molinum de. IIII. solidis. et IX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.
In HARROWBY Algar had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Algar also has from Guy 1 plough there in lordship and 1 mill at 4s; meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium In TUDETORP. habuit Algar. II. carucatas terre et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi Rannulfus homo Widonis habet. I. carucam in dominio. et II. sochemannos de. II. bouatis huius terre. et V. uillanos. et VI. bordarios cum. I. caruca. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et III. molinos. XL. solidorum. et XVII. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. LX. solidos.

In `TOWTHORPE' Algar had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Ranulf, Guy's man, has 1 plough in lordship; 2 Freemen with 2 bovates of this land; 5 villagers and 6 smallholders with 1 plough. A priest and a church; 3 mills, 40s; meadow, 17 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 60s.
Soca In Beltone. dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi. I. sochemannus cum dimidia caruca. est. et IX. acrae prati.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In BELTON 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. 1 Freeman with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 9 acres. [Jurisdiction of `Towthorpe'. Algar had it. Ranulf, Guy's man, has it

Soca In Gunfordebi. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. et dimidiam bouatam terre ad geldum. Terra /III. bobus. Ibi. II. sochemanni et I. uillanus habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. et VII. acras prati et dimidiam. et molinum. V. solidos.

In GONERBY 3 bovates of land taxable and 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. 2 Freemen and 1 villager have 1 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 7 1/2 acres; a mill, 5s. [Jurisdiction of `Towthorpe'. Algar had it. Ranulf, Guy's man, has it

Manerium In WIBERTONE. habuit Adestan. XI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra XIIII. boum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Wido. II. carucas in dominio. et X. acrae prati. et II. bordarii. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. L. solidos.
In WYBERTON Aethelstan had 11 bovates taxable. Land for 14 1/2 oxen. Guy has 2 ploughs in lordship; meadow, 10 acres; 2 smallholders. Value before 1066, 60s; now 50s.

Manerium In FRANTUNE. habuit Adestan. IIII. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet |Wido. II. carucas in dominio. et II. sochemannod de. IIII. bouatis huius terrae. et X. uillanos et I. bordarium habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. LXX. solidos modo similiter. Tailla. X. solidos.

In FRAMPTON Aethelstan had 4 carucates of land and 2 bovates taxable. Land for 5 1/2 ploughs. Guy has 2 ploughs in lordship; 2 Freemen with 4 bovates of this land; 10 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 2 1/2 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 70s; now the same. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In CHIRCHETUNE. habuit Aluric. XIIII. bouatas terrae et II. partes unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra. XVII. boum. Ibi habet Wido. I. carucam in dominio. et II. sochemannos de. I. bouata huius terrae. habentes. III. boues in caruca. et XVI. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXX. solidos.

In KIRTON Aelfric had 14 bovates of land and 2 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 17 oxen. Guy has 1 plough in lordship; 2 Freemen with 1 bovate of this land who have 3 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s.

Manerium In BURTUN. habuit Adestan. X. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XVII. carucarum. Ibi habet Wido. V. carucas. et XXX. sochemannos et IX. uillanos et. XII. bordarios habentes. XI. carucas et dimidiam. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et CXX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo VIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In BURTON Aethelstan had 10 carucates of land taxable. Land for 17 ploughs. Guy has 5 ploughs. 30 Freemen, 9 villagers and 12 smallholders who have 11 1/2 ploughs. A priest and a church; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 120 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now £8. Exactions 10s.
Soca In Hechintune. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. SOCA. Ibi. II. uillani et I. bordarius habentes. III. boues in caruca. et III. acras prati.
In HECKINGTON 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 3 acres. . Aethelstan had it
Soca In Asuuardebi. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA in Marram. Ibi. I. sochemannus et I. bordarius habent dimidiam carucam. et XX. acras prati.
In ASWARBY 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of `Mareham'. 1 Freeman and 1 smallholder have 1/2 plough and meadow, 20 acres.

Manerium In SUARREBI. habuit Aluric. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi Uitalis homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et XVI. sochemannos et III. uillanos habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. et quater XX. acras prati. et quater XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In SWARBY Aelfric had 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Vitalis, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 16 Freemen and 3 villagers who have 2 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 80 acres; underwood, 80 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.
Soca In Chillebi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi Aschil presbyter sub Widone habet. II. uillanos habentes. III. boues in caruca.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In KELBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Eskil the priest has under Guy 2 villagers who have 3 oxen in a plough. had it
Berewita In Merestune. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. BEREWITA in Hazebi. Ibi Osbertus habet. III. boues in caruca. et XII. acras prati. Ualet. X. solidos.
In MARSTON 6 bovates of land taxable. An outlier of Haceby. Osbert. Value 10s. had it
Manerium In WERANGLE. habuit Adestan. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Wido habet. et Wastum est. propter fluxum maris.
In WRANGLE Aethelstan had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Guy has it. It is waste on account of flooding by the sea.

Manerium In TOFT. habuit Adestan. IX. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Wido. III. carucas. et I. sochemannum et IX. uillanos et I. bordarium habentes. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. X. solidorum. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. X.

In FISHTOFT Aethelstan had 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Guy has 3 ploughs. 1 Freeman, 9 villagers and 1 smallholder who have 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 10s; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £8; now 10.

Manerium In BUTRUIC. habuit Wluuardus. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. carucarum. Ibi habet Wido. II. carucas. et XXXVI. sochemannos de. IX. carucatis huius terrae. et VI. uillanos et X. bordarios. habentes XV. carucas. Ibi. II. aecclesiae et. II. presbyteri. et C. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. libras. Tailla. C. solidos.

In BUTTERWICK Wulfward had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Guy has 2 ploughs. 36 Freemen with 9 carucates of this land; 6 villagers and 10 smallholders who have 15 ploughs. 2 churches and 2 priests; meadow, 100 acres. Value before 1066 and now, £10. Exactions 100s.

Soca In Fristune. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi. XX. sochemanni et XXVI. uillani et XV. bordarii. habent XV. carucas. De hac soca habent. II. o homines Widonis. V. carucatas et I. bouatam. et ibi habent. II. carucas et dimidiam. et V. sochemannos et XII. uillanos habentes. I. carucam et dimidiam.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In FREISTON 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 20 Freemen, 26 villagers and 15 smallholders have 15 ploughs. Of this jurisdiction two of Guy's men have 5 carucates and 1 bovate; they have 2 1/2 ploughs and 5 Freemen and 12 villagers who have 1 1/2 ploughs. had it
In Trichingeham habet Wido. II. bouatas de terra Gisleberti de gand. /de qua. est soca in folchingham.
In THREEKINGHAM Guy has 2 bovates of Gilbert of Ghent's land of which the jurisdiction is in Folkingham.

Manerium In CHISEBI. habuit Osfram. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Wido. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et. IIII. bordarios habentes. I. carucam et dimidiam. et XX. IIII. acras prati. et LX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo XXX.

In KEISBY Osfram had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Guy has 1 plough. 2 villagers and 4 smallholders who have 1 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 24 acres; underwood, 60 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30.
Berewita In Auetorp. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. BEREWITA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. II. uillani habent. I. carucam. et VIII. acras prati. Ualet. X. solidos.
In `AVETHORPE' 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. An outlier also of this manor. 2 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value 10s.

Soca In Summerdebi Adelid. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Haec Soca talis erat. quod nichil reddebat. sed adiuuabat in exercitu regis in terra et in mari. Ibi habet Wido V. boues in caruca. et V. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. V. solidos.
