In SOMERBY Aethelgyth <of Somerby> 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. This jurisdiction was such that it paid nothing but helped in the King's army on land and on sea. Guy has 5 oxen in a plough and underwood, 5 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 5s.

Manerium In BICHERE. habuit Adestan. X. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi habet Wido. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et I. salina XVI. denariorum. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. XX. solidos.

In BICKER Aethelstan had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Guy has 1 plough. 4 villagers and 4 smallholders with 1/2 plough. 1 salt-house, 16d; meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.

Manerium In SUDTORP. habuit Osfram. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Wido. II. carucas. et X. uillanos. et VI. bordarios. cum II. carucis. et I. molinum. II. solidorum. et XVI. acras prati. et CC. acras siluae pastilis. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. X. solidos.

In `SOUTHORPE' Osfram had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Guy has 2 ploughs. 10 villagers and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland, 200 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In SCHILLINTUNE. habuit Colbert. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi habet Wido. V. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XX. acras prati. et XX. acras in Warnode Algari. pastilis siluae. et XX. acras siluae minutae in Warnode archiepiscopi. T. R. E.

In SKILLINGTON Colbert had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Guy has 5 villagers with 1 plough; and meadow, 20 acres; pasturable woodland, 20 acres in Algar's ; underwood, 20 acres in the Archbishop 's . Value before 1066 and now, 20s.

Manerium In CHASCHINGETORP. habuit Algarus I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. bobus. Idem Algar habet de Widone Ibi. I. caruca. et III. uillani et II. bordarii habent. V. boues in caruca. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XVI. solidod. modo. XX.

In CASTHORPE Algar had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Algar also has it from Guy. 1 plough. 3 villagers and 2 smallholders have 5 oxen in a plough and meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 16s; now 20.

Manerium In HOGTONE. habuit Alestan. III. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas |et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi Uitalis homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. I. bouata huius terrae. et X. uillanos et IIII. bordarios habentes. II. carucas et dimidiam. et II. molinos. XX. VI. solidorum. et VIII. denariorum. et III. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. III.

In `HOUGHTON' Alstan. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Vitalis, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 1 bovate of this land; 10 villagers and 4 smallholders who have 2 1/2 ploughs and 2 mills, 26s 8d; meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066 £4; now 3.
Soca In Tudetorp. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. III. acrae prati.
Jurisdiction of `Houghton': In `TOWTHORPE' 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Meadow, 3 acres. had it. Vitalis, Guy's man, has it

Manerium In HOLOBECH et COPELADE. habuit Alestan. II. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. XII. deum. Ibi habet Wido. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et X. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. C. solidos. modo. VIII. libras.
In HOLBEACH and WHAPLODE Alstan. Land for 12 . Guy has 1 plough. 4 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066, 100s; now £8.
Soca In Stith. XII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. sochemannus et I. uillanus habentes. II. boues in caruca.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In TYDD 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 1 Freeman and 1 villager who have 2 oxen in a plough. had it
Soca In Pincebec. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ibi habet Wido. VII. uillanos cum. I. caruca.
In PINCHBECK 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Guy has 7 villagers with 1 plough. had it
Soca In Westune et Multune. XV. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XV. carucarum. Ibi. VI. uillani habent dimidiam carucam.
In WESTON and MOULTON 15 bovates of land taxable. Land for 15 ploughs. 6 villagers have 1/2 plough. had it

Manerium In SPALLINGE. habuit Alestan. XI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. . . Ibi habet Wido. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et II. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et aream salinarum. reddentem. IIII. denarios. T. R. E.
In SPALDING Alstan. Land . Guy has 1 plough and 5 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough; and a drying-place with salt-houses which pays 4d. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In BODEBI et Summerdebi. habuit Alestan. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Goduinus homo Widonis habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et II. acrae prati. et XXX. acrae pastilis. et quater XX. acrae siluae minutae. Ad hoc Manerium iacent. III. bouatae terrae et dimidia. unde Siuuate habet socam. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo similiter.

In BOOTHBY and SOMERBY Alstan. Land for 1 plough. Godwin, Guy's man, has 1 plough. 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 2 acres; pasture, 30 acres; underwood, 80 acres. To this manor are attached 3 1/2 bovates of land of which Sighvatr has the jurisdiction. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same.

In DRAITONE habuit Alestan dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. bobus. Haec terra fuit liberata Widoni pro uno Manerio. Ibi habet. I. uillanum et IIII. bordarios cum dimidia caruca. et II. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. V. solidos. modo. III. solidos.
In DRAYTON Alstan. Land for 4 oxen. This land was delivered to Guy as one manor. He has 1 villager and 4 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 2 acres. Value before 1066, 5s; now 3s.
In Aighelestorp et in Bolebi. habuit Osfram. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Wido habet. et uacuae sunt. sed tamen coluntur.
In ELSTHORPE and BULBY Osfram had 2 bovates of land taxable. Guy has them; they are vacant, but they are cultivated, however. had it * Land of Robert Malet

Manerium In WELLEBRUNE. habuit Goduine. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XVI. carucarum. Ibi habet Robert malet. III. carucas in dominio. et XXXV. sochemannos de. VII. carucatis huius terre. et XII. uillanos et VIII. bordarios. habentes XII. carucas et II. boues. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. ad quam pertinent. V. bouatae terrae et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et CC. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XVI. libras.

In WELBOURN Godwin <of Barrowby> had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 16 ploughs. Robert Malet has 3 ploughs in lordship; 35 Freemen with 7 carucates of this land; 12 villagers and 8 smallholders who have 12 ploughs and 2 oxen. A priest and a church, to which belong 5 bovates of land; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 200 acres. Value before 1066 and now, £16. Exactions 40s.

Manerium In BERGEBI. habuit Goduinus. VIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. XV. carucarum. Ibi habet Robert. V. carucas. et II. sochemannos de X. bouatis huius terre. et L. uillanos. et II. bordarios. habentes X. carucas. et I. molinum. III. solidorum. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XII. libras. modo. XVI.

In BARROWBY Godwin <of Barrowby> had 8 carucates of land taxable. Land for 15 ploughs. Robert has 5 ploughs. 2 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 50 villagers and 2 smallholders who have 10 ploughs. 1 mill, 3s. A church and a priest; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 £12; now 16.
Soca In Ingoldesbi. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni habent. I. carucam et II. boues. et VII. acras prati. et L. II. acras siluae minutae.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In INGOLDSBY 6 bovates of land taxable. 4 Freemen have 1 plough and 2 oxen and meadow, 7 acres; underwood, 52 acres.

Soca In Caschingetorp. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. hanc Socam tenet Iuo de Roberto. et habet ibi. VI. sochemannos cum. I. caruca et II. bobus. et II. molinos. IIII. solidorum. et VII. acras prati.
In CASTHORPE 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Ivo holds this jurisdiction from Robert; he has there 6 Freemen with 1 plough and 2 oxen; and 2 mills, 4s; meadow, 7 acres.
Soca In Stanuuald. IIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi XIX. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. IIII. carucas. et I. molinum. IIII. solidorum. et XV. acras prati.
In STENWITH 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 19 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 4 ploughs and 1 mill, 4s; meadow, 15 acres.

Manerium In SECHEBROC. habuit Goduin. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra IX. carucarum. Ibi habet Robertus. IIII. carucas. et XX. VII. uillanos. et V. bordarios habentes. VI. carucas. et III. molinos. XVI. solidorum. et LX. acrae prati. et VIII. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. IX. libras. modo. VIII. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In SEDGEBROOK Godwin <of Barrowby> had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Robert has 4 ploughs. 27 villagers and 5 smallholders who have 6 ploughs. 3 mills, 16s; meadow, 60 acres; underwood, 8 acres. Value before 1066 £9; now 8. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Wiuelesforde. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. SOCA huius Manerii. Ibi. IX. sochemanni et II. bordarii habent. III. carucas. et XV. acras prati.
In WILSFORD 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. A jurisdiction of this manor. 9 Freemen and 2 smallholders have 3 ploughs and meadow, 15 acres.

In Adelinctune. VI. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi Godricus habet de Roberto malet. II. carucas in dominio. et XI. sochemannos. et X. uillanos et III. bordarios habentes. IIII. carucas. et CXL. acras prati.

In ALLINGTON 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Godric has 2 ploughs in lordship from Robert Malet; 11 Freemen, 10 villagers and 3 smallholders who have 4 ploughs and meadow, 140 acres. Land of Robert of Stafford

Manerium In DENTUNE. habuit Uctebrand. I. carucatam terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. SOCA pertinet ad grantham. Ibi Robertus de stadford et Gaufridus de eo. habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos et II. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et XXVIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo XX.

In DENTON Uhtbrand <of Denton> had 1 carucate of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. The jurisdiction belongs to Grantham. Robert of Stafford, and Geoffrey <of Colton> from him, has 1/2 plough. 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 28 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 20.

Manerium In CHASCHINTORP. habuit Ulfchetel. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi Hugo homo Roberti habet dimidiam carucam. et I. uillanum et II. bordarios cum. I. boue in caruca. et VII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos.

In CASTHORPE Ulfkil had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Hugh, Robert's man, has 1/2 plough. 1 villager and 2 smallholders with 1 ox in a plough. Meadow, 7 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10.

Manerium In BULETHAM. habuit Osmundus. IX. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi modo. I. uillanus cum. I. boue. et VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit XIII. solidos et IIII. denarios. modo VI. solidos.
In BOULTHAM Osmund

. II. Maneria In CARLEBI. habuerunt Dane et Carle. I. carucatam terre. et bis quartam partem unius bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Terra Carle fuit frig soca sub Dane. Ibi Goisfridus homo Roberti. habet. I. carucam. et X. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et X. acras prati. et XL. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. X. solidos.

In CARLBY Dene and Karli had 1 carucate of land and twice the fourth part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Karli's land was a free jurisdiction under Dene. Geoffrey <of Colton>, Robert's man, has 1 plough. 10 villagers with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50. Exactions 10s.

+. III. Maneria In BRESEBURG et Barnetorp habuerunt Dane et Carle et Ledflet XX. ti bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Terra. IIorum ex his fuit frigsoca sub Dane. Ibi Goisfridus homo Roberti habet. I. carucam. et IIII. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et II. molinos. XX. solidorum. et terciam partem aecclesiae. et VII. acras prati. et LV. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos. modo XL.

In BRACEBOROUGH and BANTHORPE Dene, Karli and Leodfled had 20 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. The land of two of these was a free jurisdiction under Dene. Geoffrey <of Colton>, Robert's man, has 1 plough and 4 villagers with 1/2 plough; and 2 mills, 20s; the third part of a church; meadow, 7 acres; underwood, 55 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 40.
Ibidem Karle et Dane. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. SOCA. est /in Greteford Manerium Turgot laga. Wasta. est.
There also Karli and Dene 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. The jurisdiction is in Thorgot Lag's manor of Greatford. It is waste.

Manerium In BRUNE. habuit Aldene. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Ibi Goisfridus homo Roberti habet dimidiam carucam. et III. uillanos et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et terciam partem unius molini. III. um solidorum et IIII. denariorum. et vI. piscinas. XVI. denariorum. et VII. acras prati. et XXX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XX. solidos.

In BOURNE Healfdene had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Geoffrey <of Colton>, Robert's man, has 1/2 plough and 3 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough; and the third part of 1 mill, 3s 4d; 6 fisheries, 16d; meadow, 7 acres; underwood, 30 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
Berewita In Turoluebi dimidia carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. BEREWITA Ibi. II. uillani et II. bordarii habent dimidiam carucam. et IIII. acras prati. et XXX.

In THURLBY 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. An outlier. 2 villagers and 2 smallholders have 1/2 plough and meadow, 4 acres; underwood, 30 acres. [Outlier of Bourne. Healfdene had it. Geoffrey <of Colton>, Robert's man, has it

. II. Maneria In CRETUNE. habuerunt Fredgist et Brictmar XII. bouatas terre et. II. partes. II. bouatarum ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Terra Brictmar frigsoca sub Fredgist. Ibi Basuin homo Roberti habet dimidiam carucam. et V. sochemannos et IIII. uillanos cum. I. caruca et dimidia. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo. XXX. Tailla. X. solidos.

In CREETON Fredegaest and Brictmer had 12 bovates of land and 2 parts of 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many oxen. Brictmer's land a free jurisdiction under Fredegaest. Baswin <of Creeton>, Robert's man, has 1/2 plough. 5 Freemen and 4 villagers with 1 1/2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 40s; now 30. Exactions 10s.
In Bitham dimidia carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. SOCA in Cretune. Wasta. est. Ibi. I. acrae prati.
In BYTHAM 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A jurisdiction of Creeton. It is waste. Meadow, 1 acre.

Manerium In BILLEFELT et Westbi. habuit AElmer. XII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi Basuin homo Roberti habet. II. or uillanos et I. bordarium cum. VI. bobus in caruca. et XIIII. acras prati. et CCC. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XX.

In BITCHFIELD and WESTBY Almer had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Baswin <of Creeton>, Robert's man, has 2 villagers and 1 smallholder with 6 oxen in a plough; and meadow, 14 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 300 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 20.

. I. Manerium In ROSBI. habuit Ulsi. III. carucatas terrae et dimidiam bouatam ad geldum. . II. Maneria et Osmund III. bouatas et dimidiam et Siuuard. I. carucatam. habuerunt XI. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucis et bobus. Terra Siuuard frigsoca sub Osmundo. Ibi Edelo homo Roberti habet. VII. sochemannos de. II. carucatis et V. bouatis huius terrae. et I. uillanum cum. IIII. carucis.
In RAUCEBY Wulfsi had 3 carucates of land and 1/2 bovate taxable. Osmund

Soca et In altera Rosbi habuit Turuert. III. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi. VI. uillani et I. censarius habent II. carucas. et dimidiam aecclesiam. T. R. E. ualuit. LX. solidos. modo. LXX. solidos.
In the other RAUCEBY Thorfridh had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 6 villagers and 1 tributary have 2 ploughs and 1/2 church. Value before 1066, 60s; now 70s.

Manerium In ROSCEBI. habuit Turuert. IX. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IX. carucarum. Ibi Brien homo Roberti habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. uillanos et I. bordarium. Ibidem. V. bouatae terrae pertinent ad aulam.

In RAUCEBY Thorfridh had 9 carucates of land taxable. Land for 9 ploughs. Brian <of Rauceby>, Robert's man, has 1 1/2 ploughs. 2 villagers and 1 smallholder. There also 5 bovates of land belong to the hall.

Ibidem habuit Osmund. III. carucatas terrae et I. bouatam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Tres bouatae et dimidia pertinebant ad aulam eius. Reliqua erat SOCA eiusdem Manerii. Ibi Brien homo Roberti habet. XX. sochemannos et IIII. bordarios. habentes. IIII. carucas. et III. boues in caruca. T. R. E. ualuit XL. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. X. solidos.
There also Osmund

Manerium In SCREDINCTUN. habuit Leuricus. XII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi Gulferedus homo Roberti habet. I. carucam. et dimidium sochemannum et I. uillanum habentes. III. boues in caruca. et III. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. X.

In SCREDINGTON Leofric had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Wulfrad, Robert's man, has 1 plough. 1/2 Freeman and 1 villager who have 3 oxen in a plough and meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10.

Manerium In HACONESBI. habuit Uluiet. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Gulfer homo Roberti habet. I. carucam. et V. uillanos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et XVI. acras prati. et XXX. V. acras siluae prati. T. R. E. ualuit et modo XXX. solidos.

In HACONBY Wulfgeat had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Wulfrad, Robert's man, has 1 plough. 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 16 acres; woodland meadow, 35 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In SCHINENDE. habuit Ulueue. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi Colegrim homo Roberti habet. VII. uillanos. habentes IIII. carucas. et I. bouem in caruca. et L acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit LX. solidos.

In SKINNAND Wulfeva had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Kolgrim , Robert's man, has 7 villagers who have 4 ploughs and 1 ox in a plough and meadow, 50 acres. Value before 1066, 60s; now 20.

Manerium In MEDRICESHAM habuit Lefsi. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. Ibi Ehelo homo Roberti habet XXX. acras prati. et III. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XVI. solidos. modo. X.
In METHERINGHAM Leofsi had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. Ehelo. Value before 1066, 16s; now 10.

Manerium In WILGEBI. habuit Osmund. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. boum. Ibi Goduinus homo Roberti habet dimidiam carucam. et I. sochemannum de. III. bouatis huius terrae. et I. uillanum cum. V. bobus in caruca. et XX. IIII. acrae prati. et XII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.
In WILLOUGHBY Osmund
Soca In Cudetorp. habet Robertus. II. sochemannos de. II. acris et tribus perticis terrae. SOCA in Cretone.
In COUNTHORPE Robert has 2 Freemen with 2 acres and 3 perches of land. A jurisdiction of Creeton. Land of Peter of Valognes

In Burtone habuit Godric. II. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. SOCA in Scantune. sed tamen fuit ibi aula. Nunc Petrus de Ualonges habet ibi. I. uillanum et IIII. bordarios. cum dimidia caruca. et V. acras prati. Dominium colitur et locatur. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. solidos. modo. XI. solidos.

In BURTON Godric had 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Scampton, but there was a hall there, however. Now Peter of Valognes has there 1 villager and 4 smallholders with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 5 acres. The lordship is cultivated and let. Value before 1066, 15s; now 11s. Land of Heppo the bowman

Manerium In HACONESBI. et in STENTUITH. habuit Leuricus. III. carucatas terrae et II. bouatas et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucis et bobus. Ibi Heppo balistarius habet. II. carucas. et III. sochemannos de XII. bouatis huius terrae. et XIII. uillanos et VI. bordarios. cum. VI. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et I. molinus. XII. denariorum. et XL. acrae prati. et quater XX. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. C. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In HACONBY and in STAINFIELD Leofric had 3 carucates of land and 2 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Heppo the bowman has 2 ploughs. 3 Freemen with 12 bovates of this land; 13 villagers and 6 smallholders with 6 ploughs. A priest and a church; 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 80 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 100s. Exactions 20s.
Soca In Dic. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. boum.
In DYKE 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. A jurisdiction also of this manor.
Soca In Mortune. IX. bouatae terrae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra totidem boum. Ibi. IX. sochemanni habent. I. carucam. et X. acras prati. et XII. acras siluae minutae.
In MORTON 9 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 9 Freemen have 1 plough and meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 12 acres.

Manerium In HERMODESTORP. habuit Turuert. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi Simund homo Hepponis habet. I. carucam. et IX. acras prati. et XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. XXX. ta
In HANTHORPE Thorfridh had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Sigmund <of Hanthorpe>, Heppo's man, has 1 plough and meadow, 9 acres; underwood, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30.

Manerium In SUEREFELT. habuit Alsi. IIII. carucatas terrae et dimidiam K ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Heppo. I. carucam. et XI. uillanos et VI. bordarios cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et II. salinas. XII. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit. IIII. libras. modo. LXVI. solidos.

In SURFLEET Alsi had 4 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Heppo has 1 plough. 11 villagers and 6 smallholders with 2 1/2 ploughs. 2 salt-houses, 12d. Value before 1066 £4; now 66s.

Manerium In CHERCHEBI et Scapeuic habuit Aldene. V. carucatas terrae et VI. bouatas ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi Heppo habet. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos de. IIII. carucatis et II. bouatis huius terrae. et III. uillanos et. II bordarios cum. V carucis et dimidia. et dimidium molinum. V. solidorum. et XX. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos. modo. L. Tailla. X. solidos.

In KIRKBY and SCOPWICK Healfdene had 5 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Heppo has 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen with 4 carucates and 2 bovates of this land; 3 villagers and 2 smallholders with 5 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 mill, 5s; meadow, 20 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 50. Exactions 10s.

Soca In Timberlunt. III. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. BEREWITA Ibi Simund homo Hepponis habet dimidiam carucam. et XI. sochemannos de. II. carucis huius terre et I. bordarium cum. II. carucis. T. R. E. ualuit XX.

In TIMBERLAND 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. An outlier. Sigmund <of Hanthorpe>, Heppo's man, has 1/2 plough. 11 Freemen with 2 carucates of this land; 1 smallholder with 2 ploughs. Value before 1066, 20s; now 30s. . Healfdene had it
Soca In Scapeuic XII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra XII. bobus. Ibi. I. sochemannus habet. I. carucam. et IIII. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. VI. solidos.
In SCOPWICK 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 1 Freeman has 1 plough and meadow, 4 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 6s. . Healfdene had it

Manerium In SNETREBI. habuit Goduinus X. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra XII. boum. Ibi habet Heppo. I. carucam. et LXX. V. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo similiter. Tailla. X. solidos.
In SNITTERBY Godwin had 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. Heppo has 1 plough and meadow, 75 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now the same. Exactions 10s.
Soca In Radburne. III. bouatae terre ad geldum. et in Staintone et Wadingham. dimidia bouata terre ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi. II. uillani cum dimidia caruca. et VI. acrae prati.

A jurisdiction: In REDBOURNE 3 bovates of land taxable and in `STAINTON' and WADDINGHAM 1/2 bovate of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. 2 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 6 acres. Land of Ralph son of Hubert

Manerium In GUNNEBI. habuit Goduinus. IIII. carucatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. . II. carucarum. Ibi Radulfus filius Huberti habet. II. as carucas. et I. molinum. XII. denariorum et LX. III. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. LXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.
In GUNBY Godwin had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Ralph son of Hubert has 2 ploughs and 1 mill, 12d; meadow, 63 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 70s. Exactions 10s.

Ibidem habuit Uluuine. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Hanc inuasit Ansfridus presbyter Radulfi. In ea. II. uillani. et X. acrae prati. Quidam Willelmus locat eam. VI. solidis. SOCA et bereuuita in Wime.
There also Wulfwin had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Ansfrid, Ralph's priest, sei

Manerium In BLIBURG. habuit Leuric cilt. II. carucatas terrae et II. I bouatas ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi Robertus homo Goisfridi de Wirce habet. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos de. X. bouatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum. II. carucis et dimidia. Ibi dimidia aecclesia. et I. molinus. II. solidorum. et LX. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In BLYBOROUGH Leofric the noble had 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Robert <of Bitteswell>, Geoffrey of la Guerche's man, has 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen with 10 bovates of this land; 4 villagers with 2 1/2 ploughs. 1/2 church; 1 mill, 2s; meadow, 60 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In GAINESBURG. habuit Leduinus. VIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi Rainaldus homo Goisfridi habet. II. carucas. et XII sochemannos de. IIII. carucatis huius terrae. et IIII. uillanos cum. VI. carucis. et XL. acras prati. et quater XX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. III.

In GAINSBOROUGH Leodwin. Land for 12 ploughs. Rainald, Geoffrey's man, has 2 ploughs. 12 Freemen with 4 carucates of this land; 4 villagers with 6 ploughs. Meadow, 40 acres; underwood, 80 acres. Value before 1066 £6; now 3. Exactions 20s.

Berewita In Summerdebi. IIII. bouatae terre ad geldum. BEREWITA Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi dimidia caruca in dominio. et I. uillanus habens. II. boues in caruca. et X. acras prati. et X. acras siluae minutae.

In SOMERBY 4 bovates of land taxable. An outlier. Land for 4 oxen. 1/2 plough in lordship; 1 villager who has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 10 acres; underwood, 10 acres. had it. Rainald, Geoffrey's man, has it
Berewita et Soca In Ioletorp. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Inland et SOCA Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et VI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam.
?B&S. Land for 1 plough. and a jurisdiction. 1 plough in lordship; 6 Freemen have 1 plough. had it. Rainald, Geoffrey's man, has it

Manerium In EPEURDE. habuit Leduinus VIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Tera XII. carucarum. Ibi Goisfridus de Wirce habet. II. carucas. et VIII. sochemannos de. II. carucatis et V. bouatis huius terrae. et XIII. uillanos et IX. bordarios cum. VI. carucis. et XI. piscarias. V. solidorum. et XVI. acrae prati. Silua pastilis. I. leuam longa. et I. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. VIII. libras. modo. V. Tailla. XX. solidos

In EPWORTH Leodwin. Land for 12 ploughs. Geoffrey of la Guerche has 2 ploughs. 8 Freemen with 2 carucates and 5 bovates of this land; 13 villagers and 9 smallholders with 6 ploughs. 11 fisheries, 5s; meadow, 16 acres; pasturable woodland 1 league long and 1 wide. Value before 1066 £8; now 5. Exactions 20s.

Manerium In OSTONE. habuit Guede. IIII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. carucarum. Ibi habet Goisfridus. I. carucam. et IX. uillanos et VI. bordarios cum. III. carucis. et III. piscarias. III. solidorum. et VI. acras prati. Silua pastilis. I. leuam longa. et I. lati. T. R. E. ualuit. VI. libras. modo. XXX. solidos. Tailla. X. solidos.

In OWSTON Gytha <of Owston> had 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 4 ploughs. Geoffrey has 1 plough. 9 villagers and 6 smallholders with 3 ploughs. 3 fisheries, 3s; meadow, 6 acres; pasturable woodland 1 league long and 1 wide. Value before 1066 £6; now 30s. Exactions 10s.

Manerium In ACHESEIA. habuit Siuuard barn. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi Wazelinus homo Goisfridi habet. II. carucas et dimidiam. et XVI. uillanos et VIII. bordarios cum. III. carucis et dimidia. et IX. piscarias VII. solidorum. et III. acras prati. Silua pastilis per loca. V. quarentenas longa. et I. quarentenam lata. T. R. E. et modo ualet. C. solidos. Tailla. XX. solidos.
In HAXEY Siward Barn had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Wa
. II. Maneria In LUND et altero LUND. habuerunt Fulcheri et Weghe XIIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VII. boum.
In LOUND and the other LOUND Fulcric and <of Womersley> had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen.
Ibidem. IX. bouatae terre ad geldum.
There also 9 bovates of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Epworth. had it

Ibidem. I. bouata terre ad geldum. BEREWITA in Beltone. Terra. V. boum. Ibi sunt. IIII. sochemanni et IIII. uillani et II. censorii habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam. et I. piscariam. XII. denariorum. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XVI. solidos.
There also 1 bovate of land taxable. An outlier of Belton. Land for 5 oxen. 4 Freemen, 4 villagers and 2 tributaries who have 3 1/2 ploughs. 1 fishery, 12d. Value before 1066, 20s; now 16s.
In Brune et altero Brune. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. SOCA in Epeurde. Ibi XVIII. sochemanni habent. VII. carucas.
In BURNHAM and the other BURNHAM 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Epworth. 18 Freemen have 7 ploughs. had it

. II. Maneria In BELTONE. habuerunt Ulf et Alnod. V. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. carucarum. Ibi habet Goisfridus. I. carucam. et XVII. sochemannos. et XX. uillanos et VI. bordarosi habentes. IIII. carucas et VI. boues. et XI. piscarias VII. solidorium. Silua pastilis per loca. II. leuas longa. et II. lata. T. R. E. ualuit. VII. libras. modo. IIII. et V. solidos. et IIII. denarios. Tailla. XX. solidos.

In BELTON Ulf and Alnoth had 5 carucates of land taxable. Land for 5 ploughs. Geoffrey has 1 plough. 17 Freemen, 20 villagers and 6 smallholders who have 4 ploughs and 6 oxen. 11 fisheries, 7s; pasturable woodland in places 2 leagues long and 2 wide. Value before 1066 £7; now 4 5s 4d. Exactions 20s.
Soca In Beltot. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et XVI. bordarii habent. III. carucas. Silua pastilis per loca. IIII. quarentenas longa. et IIII. lati.
In BELTOFT 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 4 Freemen and 16 smallholders have 3 ploughs. Pasturable woodland in places 4 furlongs long and 4 wide.
Soca In Aletorp. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. VI. sochemanni habent. I. carucam.
In ALTHORPE 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 6 Freemen have 1 plough.

Manerium In CRULE. habuit Aluuinus. VI. carucatas terrae. I. bouata minus ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. et Ibidem. I. bouata terre ad gelum inland in hubaldestorp Nunc quidam abbas de Sancto Germano de Salebi habet de Goisfrido. Ibi. I. caruca in dominio. et XV. uillani et XIX. bordarii habent VII. carucas. et XXX. I. piscariae. XXXI. solidorum. et XXX. acrae prati. Ibi aecclesia. et Silua pastilis. I. leuam longa. et I. leuam lata. T. R. E. ualuit XII. libras. modo VIII. libras. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In CROWLE Alwin had 6 carucates of land, less 1 bovate, taxable. Land for as many ploughs. There also 1 bovate of land taxable, of Upperthorpe. Now a certain Abbot of St German's of Selby has it from Geoffrey. 1 plough in lordship; 15 villagers and 19 smallholders have 7 ploughs. 31 fisheries, 31s; meadow, 30 acres. A church; pasturable woodland 1 league long and 1 league wide. Value before 1066 £12; now £8. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Amecotes. II. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. II. sochemanni et VI. /uillani. habent. I. carucam.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In AMCOTTS 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 2 Freemen and 6 villagers have 1 plough.
Berewita Ibidem. III. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. Inland |in Westude.
There also 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. of Westwoodside.
Soca Ibidem. VI bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. boum. SOCA in Gerulftorp.
There also 6. Land for 5 oxen. A jurisdiction of Garthorpe.
Soca In Gerulftorp et Ludintone. IIII. carucatae terre et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae et dimidia. SOCA in Crul. Ibi nunc. XII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas.
In GARTHORPE and LUDDINGTON 4 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Crowle. Now 12 Freemen have 2 ploughs.
Manerium IBIDEM habuit Fulcheri. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae.
There also Fulcric had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough.
et Ibidem habuit Ulf dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. SOCA in Beltone. Haec terra Wasta. est. Tamen. III. solidos reddit. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos.
There also Ulf had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. A jurisdiction of Belton. This land is waste; however, it pays 3s. Value before 1066, 10s.
Soca et Berewita In Butreuuic. III. carucatae terrae ad geldum. SOCA et Inland in Ostone. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. I. sochemannus et VI. uillani habent. I. carucam. et I. molinus. IIII. solidorum.
?S&B. A jurisdiction and of Owston . Land for 1 plough. 1 Freeman and 6 villagers have 1 plough. 1 mill, 4s.

In LUDINTONE. et Gerulftorp et Marae et Watretone. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. De hac terra IIII. carucatae et dimidia sunt in SOCA de Crul. Ibi modo XII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas.
In LUDDINGTON, GARTHORPE, `THE MARSHES' and WATERTON 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Of this land 4 1/2 carucates are in the jurisdiction of Crowle. Now 12 Freemen have 2 ploughs.
Manerium IIBI habuit Fulcheri. I. carucatam terre cum aula. Modo Wasta. est.
There Fulcric had 1 carucate of land with a hall. Now it is waste.
Soca Ibi Ulfenisc dimidiam carucam SOCA in Beltone. Gislebertus clamat Goisfridus habet et Wasta. est. T. R. E. ualuit X. solidos. modo. III. solidos.
There Ulf Fenman 1/2 carucate, a jurisdiction of Belton. Gilbert claims it. Geoffrey has it; it is waste. Value before 1066, 10s; now 3s.
Ad hanc insulam adiacent maresc. X. leuas longum. et III. latum
To this island are attached _ marshes 10 leagues long and 3 wide. Land of Geoffrey Alselin
Soca In Rochesham. III. carucatae terre et VI. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucis et bobus.
Jurisdiction of Ruskington: In ROXHOLM 3 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. had it
Soca In Leuesingham. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi XXX. acrae prati.
In LEASINGHAM 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Meadow, 30 acres. had it
In Coteland. V. carucatae prati ad geldum. Maresc. X. quarentenas longum. et VI. quarentenas latum.
In 5 carucates of meadow taxable. Marsh 10 furlongs long and 6 furlongs wide. had it

Soca In Stobetun. V. carucatae et II. bouatae et dimidia ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. SOCA in Westburg. Ibi. XX. sochemanni et V. bordarii cum. VII. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aeclesia. et CXX. acrae prati. De ista terra habet. I. miles eius. VI. bouatas. et ibi habet. I. carucam.

In STUBTON 5 carucates and 2 1/2 bovates taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. A jurisdiction of Westborough. 20 Freemen and 5 smallholders with 7 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 120 acres. Of that land one of his men-at-arms has 6 bovates; he has 1 plough. had it

Manerium In RESCHINTONE. habuit Tochi. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi Goisfridus Alselin et Radulfus nepos eius habent. II. carucas. et XXII. sochemannos de. III. carucatis et II. bouatis huius terrae. et VIII. uillanos et VIII. bordarios. habentes. VIII. carucas. et LX. acras prati. et CCXL. acras siluae pastilis per loca. T. R. E. ualuit XXV. libras. modo. L. libras. Tailla. X. libras. Ibi ecclesia et presbyter. et III. molini IIII. librarum et XII. solidorum et VIII. denariorum. Quidam Drogo tenet. VI. bouatas terre in Reschintone. et habet ibi. I. carucam. Ualet. XX. solidos.

`FLAXWELL' Wapentake In RUSKINGTON Toki had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Geoffrey Alselin and his nephew have 2 ploughs. 22 Freemen with 3 carucates and 2 bovates of this land; 8 villagers and 8 smallholders who have 8 ploughs and meadow, 60 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 240 acres. Value before 1066 £25; now £50. Exactions £10. A church and a priest; 3 mills, £4 12s 8d. A certain Drogo holds 6 bovates of land in Ruskington; he has 1 plough there. Value 20s.

Berewita In Amuinc. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. BEREWITA in Reschintone. Ibi Radulfus nepos Goisfridi habet. XXI. sochemannos et IIII. uillanos habentes. VII. carucas. Drogo homo eius tenet de eadem terra. V. bouatarum et dimidiae. et habet ibi. VI. boues in caruca. et I. uillanum et III. bordarios cum. I. boue. Ualet. XXV. solidos.

In ANWICK 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. An outlier of Ruskington. Ralph, Geoffrey's nephew, has 21 Freemen and 4 villagers who have 7 ploughs. Drogo , his man, holds 5 1/2 bovates also of this land; he has 6 oxen in a plough there. 1 villager and 3 smallholders with 1 ox. Value 25s. had it

Soca In Derintone. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi habet Goisfridus. I. carucam in dominio. et XXVIII. sochemannos. et VIII. bordarios. cum. VII. carucis. Unus homo eius habet ibi. IX. bouatas terrae. cum. I. caruca. Ualet XX. solidos. Ibi. XX. C XL acrae prati. et L. acrae siluae minutae.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In DORRINGTON 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Geoffrey has 1 plough in lordship; 28 Freemen and 8 smallholders with 7 ploughs. One of his men has 9 bovates of land there with 1 plough. Value 20s. Meadow, 160. had it
Soca In Dicbi. XII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi XXX. V. sochemanni habent. XII. carucas. et C. acras prati. et X.
In DIGBY 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. 35 Freemen have 12 ploughs and meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 10 acres. had it

Soca In Rouestune. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi. XXX. II. sochemanni habent. X. carucas. Duo milites Goisfridi tenent. I. carucam de hac terra. et habent ibi. I. carucam et dimidiam. et II. bordarios. et CL. acras prati. Ualet. XX. solidos.

In ROWSTON 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. 32 Freemen have 10 ploughs. Two of Geoffrey's men-at-arms hold 1 carucate of this land; they have 1 1/2 ploughs there. 2 smallholders. Meadow, 150 acres. Value 20s. had it

Soca et Berewita In Branzeuuelle. IXSoca. carucatae terrae et II. inland bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi habet Goisfridus. I. carucam. et XIII. sochemannos et III. bordarios. cum. IIII. carucis. Duo homines eius tenent. XIII. bouatas terrae huius. et habent ibi. I. carucam. aecclesiam et presbyterum. et IIII. acras prati et dimidiam. et XIIII. acras siluae minutae. Ualet. XX. solidos.

?S&B. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Geoffrey has 1 plough. 13 Freemen and 3 smallholders with 4 ploughs. Two of his men hold 13 bovates of this land; they have 1 plough and a church and a priest; meadow, 4 1/2 acres; underwood, 14 acres. Value 20s. had it
Soca In Dunnesbi. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi habent Goisfridus et nepos eius. II. carucas. et XIII. sochemannos et I. bordarium cum. I. caruca. et VI. acras prati.
In DUNSBY 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Geoffrey and his nephew have 2 ploughs. 13 Freemen and 1 smallholder with 1 plough. Meadow, 6 acres. had it

Soca In Rosbi. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. et II. bouatae et dimidia. Terra totidem carucis et bobus. Ibi nepos Goisfridus habet XXV. sochemannos. et VIII. uillanos et V. bordarios cum. VIII. carucis.
In RAUCEBY 6 carucates of land taxable and 2 1/2 bovates. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. Geoffrey's nephew has 25 Freemen, 8 villagers and 5 smallholders with 8 ploughs. had it
Soca In altero Rosbi. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. bobus. Ibi VII. sochemanni et II. bordarii. cum. I. caruca et III. bobus.
In the other RAUCEBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 12 oxen. 7 Freemen and 2 smallholders with 1 plough and 3 oxen. had it
Berewita In Euedune. II. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. XIIII. boum. BEREWITA. Ibi habent Goisfridus et nepos eius. I. molinum. . . . et XL. acras maresch.
In EVEDON 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. An outlier. Geoffrey and his nephew have 1 mill ; marsh, 40 acres. had it

Manerium In WESTBURG. habuit Tochi. XII. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. XII. carucarum. Ibi Goisfridus Alselin et Radulfus nepos eius habent. IIII. carucas. et V. sochemannos de. XII. bouatis huius terrae. et XII. uillanos et VI. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et II. molini XXX. solidorum. et CC. acrae prati. De hac terra tenet. II. homines eorum. XI. bouatas. et habent ibi. I. carucam et. II. boues. et VI. bordarios cum. I. boue. T. R. E. ualuit. XV. libras. modo. XXV.

In WESTBOROUGH Toki had 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 12 ploughs. Geoffrey Alselin and Ralph his nephew have 4 ploughs. 5 Freemen with 12 bovates of this land; 12 villagers and 6 smallholders with 2 ploughs. A priest and a church; 2 mills, 30s; meadow, 200 acres. Of this land two of their men hold 11 bovates; they have 1 plough and 2 oxen there. 6 smallholders with 1 ox. Value before 1066 £15; now 25.

Soca In Dodintone. IX. carucatae terrae et VI. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi. V. sochemanni et XII. uillani habent. VII. carucas. et CC. acras prati. et X. acras siluae minutae.

Jurisdiction of this manor: In DODDINGTON 9 carucates of land and 6 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 5 Freemen and 12 villagers have 7 ploughs and meadow, 200 acres; underwood, 10 acres. had it. Geoffrey Alselin and Ralph his nephew have it

Soca In Claipol. VII. carucatae terre et VII. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum et boum. Ibi XXX. IIII. sochemanni et VI. bordarii. habent. VIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et I. molinus. X. solidorum. et XL. acrae prati. De hac terra habet Elduinus. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam. et ibi habet. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ualet. XL. solidos.

In CLAYPOLE 7 carucates of land and 7 bovates taxable. Land for as many ploughs and oxen. 34 Freemen and 6 smallholders have 8 ploughs. A church and a priest; 1 mill, 10s; meadow, 40 acres. Of this land Aldwin has 2 1/2 carucates of land; he has 1 1/2 ploughs. Value 40s. had it. Geoffrey Alselin and Ralph his nephew have it

Manerium In WARAGEBI. habuit Tochi. II. carucatas terrae et III. bouatas et V. partes. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VII. carucarum. Ibi nunc in dominio. II. carucae. et XVI. uillani et XV. bordarii. habent. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia et presbyter. et C. acrae prati. et C. acrae siluae pastilis per loca T. R. E. ualuit. X. libras. modo. VI. libras. Tailla. XX. solidos. Radulfus tenet de Goisfrido

In WRAWBY Toki had 2 carucates of land and 3 bovates and 5 parts of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 7 ploughs. Now in lordship 2 ploughs. 16 villagers and 15 smallholders have 4 ploughs. A church and a priest; meadow, 100 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 100 acres. Value before 1066 £10; now £6. Exactions 20s. Ralph holds it from Geoffrey.

Soca et Berewita In Eleham. II. carucatae terre et II. bouatae ad geldum. In Chetelbi. III. bouatae terrae et III. pars. I. bouatae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. SOCA et Inland in Waragebi. Ibi nunc in dominio. I. caruca. et XI. sochemanni et IIII. uillani et VIII. bordarii cum. II. carucis. et CXIIII. acrae prati.

?S&B. In KETTLEBY 3 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. A jurisdiction and of Wrawby. Now in lordship 1 plough; 11 Freemen, 4 villagers and 8 smallholders with 2 ploughs. Meadow, 114 acres. had it. Ralph holds it from Geoffrey Land of Baldwin

Soca In Hadinctune habuit Ailricus VIII. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. VII. carucatae et III. bouatae soca. et IX. bouatae inland. in Dodintune. Terra. IIII. carucis et II. bobus. Ibi habet Balduinus XIII. sochemannos habentes. III. carucas et dimidiam. Ualet. XX. solidos.

In HADDINGTON Aelric had 8 1/2 carucates of land taxable: 7 carucates and 3 bovates, a jurisdiction, and 9 bovates, , of Doddington. Land for 4 ploughs and 2 oxen. Baldwin has 13 Freemen who have 3 1/2 ploughs. Value 20s.

Soca In Wizebi. VI. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. SOCA IIII. carucatae et Inland. II. carucatae eiusdem Manerii. Ibi. VII. sochemanni habent. II. carucas. et prati V. quarentenas longum. et I. latum. Ualet XX. solidos.

In WHISBY 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. A jurisdiction, 4 carucates, and , 2 carucates, also of this manor. 7 Freemen have 2 ploughs. Meadow, 5 furlongs long and 1 wide. Value 20s. had it

Soca In Hicham. IIII. carucatae terre ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Inland III. carucatae et SOCA. I. carucata eiusdem Manerii. Ibi in dominio. est. I. caruca. et II. sochemanni. et X. uillani et II. bordarii cum. III. carucis. et II. piscariae. III. solidorum. et prati. II. quarentenas longum. et II. latum. et silue minute tantundem. Ualet. XL. solidos.

In HYKEHAM 4 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. , 3 carucates, and a jurisdiction, 1 carucate, also of this manor. In lordship 1 plough; 2 Freemen, 10 villagers and 2 smallholders with 3 ploughs. 2 fisheries, 3s; meadow, 2 furlongs long and 2 wide; underwood, as much. Value 40s. had it

Berewita In Scheldinchope. XII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi XVII. uillani. et II. sochemanni et IIII. bordarii habent. VI. carucas. pratum. I. leuam longum. et II. quarentenas et dimidiam latum. et tantundem siluae minutae. Ualet. XL. solidos.

In SKELLINGTHORPE 12 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. 18 villagers, 2 Freemen and 4 smallholders have 6 ploughs. Meadow 1 league long and 2 1/2 furlongs wide; underwood, as much. Value 40s. had it

Soca et Berewita In Northhicam. VIII. carucatae terrae ad geldum. SOCA VII. carucatae et Inland. I. carucata eiusdem Manerii. Ibi XIII. sochemanni habent. III. carucas et dimidiam. et LII. acras prati. Ualet XX. solidos. Haec terra omnis pertinet ad Dodintune Manerium Sancti Petri Westmonasteriensis hanc tenet Balduinus de rege. abbas uero clamat ad opus Sancti Petri. testimonio hominum totius comitatus.

?S&B. 13 Freemen have 3 1/2 ploughs and meadow, 52 acres. Value 20s. All this land belongs to Doddington, a manor of St Peter's of Westminster. Baldwin holds it from the King, but the Abbot claims it for St Peter's use by the witness of the men of the whole County. Land of William Tallboys
Manerium In ASCHEBI. habuit Turuert. III. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. V. bobus. Ibi habet Willelmus taillebosc. II. boues in caruca. et XL. acras prati. T. R. E.
In ASHBY Thorfridh had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. William Tallboys has 2 oxen in a plough and meadow, 40 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 5.

Manerium In ALFORDE. habuit Turuerd. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Willelmus. I. uillanum cum. II. bobus in caruca. et VI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. V. solidos
In ALFORD Thorfridh had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. William has 1 villager with 2 oxen in a plough; and meadow, 6 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 5s. Land of Kolgrim

Manerium In IERESBI. Colegrim habuit et habet. II. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra XIIII. boum. Ibi Rold homo Colegrim habet. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos. et IIII. uillanos. cum. I. caruca. et XXI. acra prati. et IX. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XL. solidos.

In EWERBY Kolgrim had and has 2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Roald , Kolgrim 's man, has 1 plough. 2 Freemen and 4 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 21 acres; underwood, 9 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40s.
Soca In HUuelle. IIII. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi. IIII. or acrae prati.
Jurisdiction of this manor: In HOWELL 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Meadow, 4 acres. had it. Roald , Kolgrim 's man, has it
Soca In Burg. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ibi aecclesia. est.
In 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. A church. had it. Roald , Kolgrim 's man, has it
Soca In Euedune. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. est aecclesia. et. II. acrae prati. et I. acrae siluae minutae. et V. acrae maresc.
In EVEDON 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. A church; meadow, 2 acres; underwood, 1 acre; marsh, 5 acres. had it. Roald , Kolgrim 's man, has it

Manerium In BURG. habuit Archil. VI. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi habet idem de rege. I. carucam. et II. uillanos et V. bordarios cum. II. bobus. et I. molinum. XX. solidorum. et VIII. acras prati. et III. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo. XL.

In Arnketil had 6 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. He also has from the King 1 plough. 2 villagers and 5 smallholders with 2 oxen. 1 mill, 20s; meadow, 8 acres; underwood, 3 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now 40.
Berewita In Echintune. II. bouatae et dimidia prati. pertinet ad burg. Inland.
In HECKINGTON 2 1/2 bovates of meadow which belong to . .

Manerium In GOLDESBI. habuit Colegrim. IIII. bouatas terrae et III. ciam partem unius bouatae ad geldum in dominio. et tantundem terrae in soca. ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum. Ipse ibi habet modo. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos et VI. uillanos cum. II. carucis. et IX. acras prati. et LXIII. acras siluae pastilis per loca. et aecclesiam. T. R. E. et modo ualet. X. solidos.

In INGOLDSBY Kolgrim had 4 bovates of land and the third part of 1 bovate taxable, in lordship, and as much land in a jurisdiction, taxable. Land for 2 ploughs. Now he has 1 plough there himself and 2 Freemen and 6 villagers with 2 ploughs; and meadow, 9 acres; pasturable woodland in places, 63 acres; a church. Value before 1066 and now, 10s.

Manerium IBIDEM habuit Ingulf. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Nunc habet Aschil de rege in elemosina. et Ibi habet. II. uillanos cum. V. bobus. et IIII. acras prati. et XVI. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. V. solidos.

There also Ingulf had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Now Eskil has it from the King in alms. He has 2 villagers with 5 oxen; and meadow, 4 acres; underwood, 16 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 5s.

Manerium In BRUNE. habuit Uluric. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. Nunc habet Suen de rege. Ibi. V. uillani et I. bordarius cum. I. caruca. et I. boue in caruca. et VI. partes unius molini. XVIII. denariorum. et III. piscarias. VIII. denariorum. et IIII. acras prati. et dimidiam. et XV. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos. modo. XVI. solidos.

In BOURNE Wulfric had 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. Now Swein has it from the King. 5 villagers and 1 smallholder with 1 plough and 1 ox in a plough. 6 parts of 1 mill, 18d; 3 fisheries, 8d; meadow, 4 1/2 acres; underwood, 15 acres. Value before 1066, 10s; now 16s.

Manerium In NEUTONE. habuit Uluricus Wild. III. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Nunc habet Uluiet de rege. et ibi dimidia caruca. et III. uillani cum dimidia caruca. et VI. acras prati. et XXX. V. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. XXV. solidos.

In NEWTON Wulfric Wilde had 3 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Now Wulfgeat has it from the King; 1/2 plough there. 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 6 acres; underwood, 35 acres. Value before 1066, 20s; now 25s.

Berewita In Trichingeham. V. bouatae terre et VI. pars. II. bouatae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Nunc habet Uluiet de rege. et ibi. I. sochemannus de. I. bouata et VI. parte. II. bouatarum. et III. uillani cum dimidia caruca. et XII. mam partem unius aecclesiae Sancti Petri. et VI. tam partem unius aecclesiae SANCTAE MARIAE. et VI. tam partem de. IIII. bouatis quae iacent in aecclesia Sanctae Mariae.

In THREEKINGHAM 5 bovates of land and the sixth part of 2 bovates taxable. Land for as many oxen. Now Wulfgeat has it from the King. 1 Freeman with 1 bovate and the sixth part of 2 bovates; 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. The twelfth part of 1 church of St Peter , and the sixth part of 1 church of St Mary , and the sixth part of 4 bovates which lie in the church of St Mary.

Manerium In Summerdebi. habuit Ulsi. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra VI. boum. Nunc habet Torchil de rege. et habet ibi. I. bouem in caruca. et I. bordarium. et VIII. acras siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo. V. solidos.
In SOMERBY Wulfsi had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Now Thorkil has it from the King; he has 1 ox in a plough there. 1 smallholder. Underwood, 8 acres. before 1066 and now, 5s.

Manerium In BELTONE. habuit Rold. II. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra totidem carucarum. Ibi habet Colegrim. I. carucam. et I. sochemannum de. I. bouata huius terrae. et VII. uillanos et IIII. bordarios. cum. II. carucis. et II. molinos XII. solidorum. et XXXVI. acrae prati. et XVI. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. ualuit. XXX. solidos. modo similiter.

In BELTON Roald had 2 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for as many ploughs. Kolgrim has 1 plough. 1 Freeman with 1 bovate of this land; 7 villagers and 4 smallholders with 2 ploughs. 2 mills, 12s; meadow, 36 acres; underwood, 16 acres. Value before 1066, 30s; now the same.
Berewita In Tuuetorp. VI. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. BEREWITA in Beltone. Ibi Colegrim habet. I. uillanum et I. bordarium cum dimidia caruca. et V.
In `TOWTHORPE' 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. An outlier of Belton. Kolgrim has 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 1/2 plough; and meadow, 5 acres. had it
Berewita In Barchestone. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum Ibi in dominio dimidia caruca. et II. molini unde iacet soca in Granham.
In BARKSTON 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. In lordship 1/2 plough. 2 mills of which the jurisdiction lies in Grantham. had it. Kolgrim has it
Soca In eadem. I. carucata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. SOCA de Beltone. Ibi. II. sochemanni et II. uillani habent dimidiam carucam. et XXXV. acrae prati.
In the same 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. A jurisdiction of Belton. 2 Freemen and 2 villagers have 1/2 plough. Meadow, 35 acres. had it. Kolgrim has it
Berewita In Lundetorp. VI. bouatae terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. BEREWITA in Beltone. Ibi Colegrim habet. I. uillanum et I. bordarium cum dimidia caruca.
In LONDONTHORPE 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. An outlier of Belton. Kolgrim has 1 villager and 1 smallholder with 1/2 plough. had it
Soca In Draitone habuit Wider dimidiam carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra dimidiae carucae. SOCA in Draitone Manerio. Alani. comitis. Ibi habet Godric. III. bordarios. et II. acras prati.
In DRAYTON Withar had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1/2 plough. A jurisdiction of Count Alan's manor of Drayton. Godric has 3 smallholders and meadow, 2 acres. Ralph the constable had it
In Bichere. Wider. I. carucatam terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi habet Godric. I. carucam in dominio. et XII. uillanos. T. R. E. ualuit. XX. solidos.
In BICKER Withar 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. Godric has 1 plough in lordship; 12 villagers. Value before 1066, 20s; now 40. had it *

Manerium In HOCHTUNE. habuit Colegrim. XIIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra totidem bobus. Ibi Fredgis homo Colegrim habet II. uillanos et III. bordarios cum. I. caruca. et II. molinos. XXX. solidorum. et III. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In `HOUGHTON' Kolgrim had 14 bovates of land taxable. Land for as many oxen. Fredegis , Kolgrim 's man, has 2 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough; and 2 mills, 30s; meadow, 3 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.
Ibidem. X. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. X. boum. Hanc terram tenet abbas Turoldus de Colegrim. et arat eam cum suo dominio. Ibi. VI. acrae prati. Ualet. VI. solidos.
There also 10 bovates of land taxable. Land for 10 oxen. Abbot Turold holds this land from Kolgrim and ploughs it with his own lordship . Meadow, 6 acres. Value 6s. had it

Manerium In ULUESBI. habuit Uluric. VI. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. bobus. Nunc habet Suen de rege. et ibi habet. I. carucam. et III. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et dimidium molinum. III. solidorum. et IX. acrae prati. T. R. E. ualuit. X. solidos.
In `OSEBY' Wulfric had 6 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Now Swein has it from the King; he has 1 plough. 3 villagers with 1/2 plough. 1/2 mill, 3s; meadow, 9 acres. Value before 1066, 10s.

Manerium In DUSEBI. habuit Osfram. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet ipse nunc. I. carucam. et VI. uillanos cum. I. caruca. et XXX. I. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XXX. solidos.
In DOWSBY Osfram had 3 carucates of land taxable. Land for 3 ploughs. Now he has 1 plough himself. 6 villagers with 1 plough. Meadow, 31 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 30s.

Manerium In GUNNEWORDEBI. habuit Colegrim. IIII. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Idem habet nunc ibi. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos et III. uillanos cum. VI. bobus. et VIII. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XVI. solidos.
In GONERBY Kolgrim had 4 bovates of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Now he also has 1 plough. 2 Freemen and 3 villagers with 6 oxen. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 16s.
In Suindrebi. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. VI. boum. Ibi habet Colegrim cum. I. caruca. et C. acras prati. Siluae minutae. IX. quarentenas longae.
In SWINDERBY 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 6 oxen. Kolgrim has it, with 1 plough and meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 9 furlongs long and 3 furlongs wide. had it
In Caneuuic habuit Agemundus. I. carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. II. uillani cum. I. caruca. et III. bordarii. et LV. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XV. solidos.
In CANWICK Aghmund had 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 2 villagers with 1 plough; 3 smallholders. Meadow, 55 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 15s. had and holds it *
Ibidem Quendrud monacha dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. IIII. boum. Ualet. VIII. solidos.
There also Cwenthryth the nun 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 4 oxen. Value 8s. had and holds it * Land of Swartbrand and other thanes

Manerium In BURTONE. habuit Ednod. III. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. carucarum. Ibi habet Sortebrant. II. carucas in dominio. et VIII. uillanos. et III. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et IIII. censores. VIII. solidos reddentes. Ibi. VIII. acrae prati. T. R. E. Ualuit XXI. solidos. modo. XL. solidos.
In BURTON Ednoth. Land for 3 ploughs. Swartbrand has 2 ploughs in lordship; 8 villagers and 3 smallholders with 1 plough; 4 tributaries who pay 8s. Meadow, 8 acres. Value before 1066, 21s; now 40s.

Manerium In CARLETUNE. habuit Gonneuuate. VI. carucatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. VI. carucarum. Ibi Sortebrant habet. VI. boues in caruca. et quidam homo eius. I. carucam. et VIII. sochemannos. et VI. uillanos et IIII. bordarios cum. II. carucis et dimidia. et XXX. acras prati et dimidiam. et C. acras prati in Snotingeham. T. R. E. et modo ualet XL. solidos. Tailla. XL. solidos.

In CARLTON Gunnhvati had 6 carucates of land taxable. Land for 6 ploughs. Swartbrand has 6 oxen in a plough, and one of his men 1 plough. 8 Freemen, 6 villagers and 4 smallholders with 2 1/2 ploughs. Meadow, 30 1/2 acres; meadow in Nottingham, 100 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s. Exactions 40s.
Soca In Nortcarletone. I. carucata terre ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi III. sochemanni et III. bordarii habent. I. carucam et dimidiam. Ibi presbyter et aecclesia. et XX. II. acrae prati.
In NORTH CARLTON 1 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 3 Freemen and 3 smallholders have 1 1/2 ploughs. A priest and a church; meadow, 22 acres. Carlton. Swartbrand has it. Gunnhvati had it

Manerium In MEDRICHESHAM. habuit Ragenald. V. carucatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum. Terra. II. carucarum et dimidiae. Ibi habet Sortebrand. I. carucam. et II. sochemannos. et X. uillanos et IIII. bordarios habentes. IIII. carucas. Ibi aecclesia. et C. acrae prati. et VIII. acrae siluae minutae. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In METHERINGHAM Regnvald had 5 1/2 carucates of land taxable. Land for 2 1/2 ploughs. Swartbrand has 1 plough. 2 Freemen, 10 villagers and 4 smallholders who have 4 ploughs. A church; meadow, 100 acres; underwood, 8 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.

Manerium In CALE. habuit Siric. XII. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra XIIII. boum. Ibi habet Chetelbern habet. I. carucam. et VIII. uillanos cum dimidia caruca. et LVI. acras prati. T. R. E. ualuit. XL. solidos. modo. L. solidos.
In KEAL Siric had 12 bovates of land taxable. Land for 14 oxen. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 1 plough. 8 villagers with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 56 acres. Value before 1066, 40s; now 50s.
Berewita In Cuningesbi. I. bouata terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis. Inland in cale. . Ibi habet Chetelbern. I. uillanum. et I. piscariam. XL. denariorum. et XX.
In CONINGSBY 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 ox. of Keal. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 1 villager. 1 fishery, 40d; underwood, 20 acres.
In Aschebi habet Chetelber. I. molinum XII. solidorum.
In ASHBY Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 1 mill, 12s. Keal. Siric had it *
Manerium In Calnodesbi. habuit Sortebrand dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. V. boum. Ibi habet Chetelbern dimidiam carucam. T. R. E. ualuit XX. solidos. modo. X. solidos.
In CANDLESBY Swartbrand had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 5 oxen. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 1/2 plough. Value before 1066, 20s; now 10s.
Soca In Breietoft. Sortebrand. II. bouatas terre ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi. II. uillani habent. I. carucam. et LX. acrae prati.
In BRATOFT Swartbrand 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. 2 villagers have 1 plough and meadow, 60 acres.
Berewita In Arduluetorp. II. bouatae terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi habet Chetelbern. IIII. uillanos non arantes. et quater XX. acrae prati.
In ADDLETHORPE 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 4 villagers who do not plough. Meadow, 80 acres. had it
Berewita In Frischenei. Sortebrand. II. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. II. boum. Ibi Chetelbern habet. III. uillanos non arantes. et IIII. acrae prati.
In FRISKNEY Swartbrand 2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 2 oxen. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 3 villagers who do not plough. Meadow 4 acres.
Soca In Tedlagestorp. Siric. III. bouatas terrae ad geldum. Terra. III. boum. Ibi Chetelbern habet. IIII. sochemannos habentes. II. boues in caruca. et XXIIII.
In THEDDLETHORPE Siric 3 bovates of land taxable. Land for 3 oxen. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 4 Freemen who have 2 oxen in a plough. Meadow, 24 acres. had it

Manerium In SUDTONE habuit Siric. V. bouatas terrae et dimidiam ad geldum Terra. VII. boum. Ibi habet Chetelbern. I. carucam. et IIII. sochemannos. et VI. uillanos et VI. bordarios. cum. I. caruca. et L. acrae prati. T. R. E. et modo ualet. XL. solidos.

In SUTTON Siric had 5 1/2 bovates of land taxable. Land for 7 oxen. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 1 plough. 4 Freemen, 6 villagers and 6 smallholders with 1 plough. Meadow, 50 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 40s.
Soca Ibidem. Siuuard. I. bouatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. bouis et dimidiae. SOCA in Hotoft. Ibi Chetelbern habet. IIII. sochemannos cum dimidia caruca. et IIII. acrae prati. Ualet. V. solidos.
There also Siward <of Thistleton> 1 bovate of land taxable. Land for 1 1/2 oxen. A jurisdiction of Huttoft. Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> has 4 Freemen with 1/2 plough. Meadow, 4 acres. Value 5s.

Manerium In GROSEBI. habuit Chetelbern. dimidiam carucatam terrae ad geldum. Terra. I. carucae. Ibi. IIII. sochemanni et IIII. bordarii habent. I. carucam. et X. acras prati. T. R. E. et modo. ualet. XX. solidos.
In GRASBY Ketilbiorn <of Nettleton> had 1/2 carucate of land taxable. Land for 1 plough. 4 Freemen and 4 smallholders have 1 plough and meadow, 10 acres. Value before 1066 and now, 20s.
